```{r mi-missing-audit}
top_vars <- miss_tbl$variable[seq_len(min(K, nrow(miss_tbl)))]
p_top <- ggplot(miss_tbl[miss_tbl$variable %in% top_vars, ],
                aes(x = reorder(variable, pct_miss), y = pct_miss)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Top missing variables (after MI)", x = NULL, y = "% missing") +
  theme_pub()
save_diag_plot(p_top, results_path("figs", "missingness-after-mi-top-vars.png"), width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
print(p_top)

# 3) Small heatmap on imputed data (rows/cols sampled)
M <- 60
R <- min(1500, nrow(dat_imp))
cols_heat <- head(top_vars, M)
rows_heat <- dplyr::slice_sample(dat_imp, n = R)

p_heat <- naniar::vis_miss(rows_heat[, cols_heat, drop = FALSE]) +
  labs(title = sprintf("Missingness heatmap on imputed data (%d rows × %d cols)", R, length(cols_heat)))
save_diag_plot(p_heat, results_path("figs", "missingness-after-mi-heatmap.png"), width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
print(p_heat)

# 4) Optional, but often heavy: UpSet of co-missingness - skip by default.
# If you really want it, do it for top 6-10 variables only:
# naniar::gg_miss_upset(dat_imp[, head(top_vars, 8), drop = FALSE])
```

## Refit propensity models within each imputation

MI propensity scores use logistic regression with restricted cubic splines (`rms::rcs`, 4 knots by default) for continuous covariates; the same covariate set used in non-MI models is reused here (`covars_ps`). IPSW truncation rules are unchanged.

Note: the MI computations below run in a single pass per imputation (weights, balance, cat3, spline). Subsequent MI sections reuse those outputs and will stop if they are missing.

### FAIL-FAST CHECKS

```{r fail-fast-checks}
#| code-block-title: "FAIL-FAST CHECKS"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Purpose: fail fast checks.
# These checks intentionally stop early if MI state is not valid.
# Failing here is cheaper than failing deep in long modeling loops.
mi_min_required <- if (IS_PILOT) 20L else 50L
if (M_IMP < mi_min_required) {
  stop("M_IMP must be >= ", mi_min_required, ". Current M_IMP = ", M_IMP)
}

stopifnot(exists("imp"))

if (imp$m < mi_min_required) {
  stop("imp$m must be >= ", mi_min_required, ". Current imp$m = ", imp$m)
}

# Ensure no missing covariates in each imputation for WeightIt
for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
  di <- get_imp(i)
  # Weighting models require complete covariates after MI.
  assert_no_na_covars(di, covars_ps, context = paste0("imputation ", i))
}
```

```{r mi-single-pass}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass pipeline (weights, balance, outcomes)"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# This single-pass loop computes MI weights, target balance, 3-level outcomes,
# and spline outcomes in one traversal of imputations to avoid repeated
# mice::complete() calls and re-normalization.

stopifnot(exists("imp"))
imp_n <- imp$m
mi_single_pass_t0 <- Sys.time()

prepare_mi_ps_frame <- function(d) {
  # Build the MI propensity-score design frame once per imputation so ABG and
  # VBG fits do not each make a separate full-size normalized copy.
  d_ps <- d[, c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars_ps), drop = FALSE]
  d_ps <- normalize_types(d_ps, levels_ref)
  droplevels_all(d_ps)
}

# --- Helper: fit ABG/VBG weights for a single imputation ----------------------
fit_abg_one <- function(d_ps, imp_index) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(d_ps), all(c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars_ps) %in% names(d_ps)))
  # Write one factor-level diagnostic file (first imputation only).
  if (imp_index == 1L) {
    write_factor_levels_diag(d_ps, covars_ps, "abg", file_prefix = "mi_logistic_ps_factor_levels")
  }

  # Guardrail: covariates must be complete before fitting propensity model.
  assert_no_na_covars(d_ps, covars_ps, context = "ABG MI PS (glm)")

  # Fit MI logistic propensity model with spline terms for continuous predictors.
  ps_fit <- fit_mi_ps_glm(
    d_ps, "has_abg", covars_ps,
    k = MI_PS_SPLINE_K, maxit = MI_GLM_MAXIT,
    context = make_context(
      stage = "MI", component = "mi_ps_glm",
      analysis_variant = "weighted_imputed",
      model_type = "ps",
      group = "ABG",
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  if (!is.null(ps_fit$error)) {
    stop("MI PS model failed (ABG, imp ", imp_index, "): ", ps_fit$error)
  }

  # Convert propensity scores to one-sided IPSW according to project rules.
  ipow <- compute_ipow_weights(
    ps_fit,
    treat = to01(d_ps$has_abg),
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    stabilize = TRUE
  )
  assert_finite_weights(ipow$weights[d_ps$has_abg == 1], "w_abg")

  # Return compact metadata only (no large model object retained).
  list(
    weights = ipow$weights,
    ps = ipow$ps,
    ipow_info = list(
      ps_floor = ipow$ps_floor,
      cap      = ipow$cap,
      trunc_rate = mean(ipow$truncated, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    method = ps_fit$method,
    fit_ok = isTRUE(ps_fit$fit_ok),
    converged = isTRUE(ps_fit$converged),
    n = ps_fit$n,
    p = ps_fit$p,
    formula = ps_fit$formula,
    basis = ps_fit$basis,
    coef = ps_fit$coef,
    vcov_diag = ps_fit$vcov_diag
  )
}

# helper: fit the VBG logistic propensity model and convert it to one-sided
# IPSW weights for a single imputation.
fit_vbg_one <- function(d_ps, imp_index) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(d_ps), all(c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars_ps) %in% names(d_ps)))
  # Same logic as ABG helper, using has_vbg as treatment indicator.
  if (imp_index == 1L) {
    write_factor_levels_diag(d_ps, covars_ps, "vbg", file_prefix = "mi_logistic_ps_factor_levels")
  }
  assert_no_na_covars(d_ps, covars_ps, context = "VBG MI PS (glm)")
  ps_fit <- fit_mi_ps_glm(
    d_ps, "has_vbg", covars_ps,
    k = MI_PS_SPLINE_K, maxit = MI_GLM_MAXIT,
    context = make_context(
      stage = "MI", component = "mi_ps_glm",
      analysis_variant = "weighted_imputed",
      model_type = "ps",
      group = "VBG",
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  if (!is.null(ps_fit$error)) {
    stop("MI PS model failed (VBG, imp ", imp_index, "): ", ps_fit$error)
  }

  # Apply one-sided IPSW transformation to VBG propensity scores.
  ipow <- compute_ipow_weights(
    ps_fit,
    treat = to01(d_ps$has_vbg),
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    stabilize = TRUE
  )
  assert_finite_weights(ipow$weights[d_ps$has_vbg == 1], "w_vbg")

  # Keep only lightweight fields needed downstream.
  list(
    weights = ipow$weights,
    ps = ipow$ps,
    ipow_info = list(
      ps_floor = ipow$ps_floor,
      cap      = ipow$cap,
      trunc_rate = mean(ipow$truncated, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    method = ps_fit$method,
    fit_ok = isTRUE(ps_fit$fit_ok),
    converged = isTRUE(ps_fit$converged),
    n = ps_fit$n,
    p = ps_fit$p,
    formula = ps_fit$formula,
    basis = ps_fit$basis,
    coef = ps_fit$coef,
    vcov_diag = ps_fit$vcov_diag
  )
}

# --- Helper: target balance (treated vs target) -------------------------------
target_balance_table <- function(data, treat_var, weights, covars, levels_ref = NULL) {
  # These SMDs compare the tested cohort to the target analytic cohort, not to
  # the untested cohort. That is the balance target implied by this one-sided
  # weighting design, because we want tested encounters to resemble the full
  # analytic population after weighting.
  stopifnot(length(weights) == nrow(data))
  treat <- to01(data[[treat_var]]) == 1L
  treat[is.na(treat)] <- FALSE
  w <- as.numeric(weights)

  w_mean <- function(x, wts) {
    # Small weighted-mean helper that tolerates missing/non-finite values.
    ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(wts)
    if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
    sum(wts[ok] * x[ok]) / sum(wts[ok])
  }

  out <- lapply(covars, function(v) {
    x <- data[[v]]
    if (is.character(x)) {
      if (!is.null(levels_ref) && !is.null(levels_ref[[v]])) {
        x <- factor(x, levels = levels_ref[[v]])
      } else {
        x <- factor(x)
      }
    }

    if (is.factor(x)) {
      # Factor covariates: evaluate SMD at each level indicator.
      levs <- levels(x)
      lapply(levs, function(lv) {
        ind <- as.integer(x == lv)
        p_target <- mean(ind, na.rm = TRUE)
        sd_target <- sqrt(p_target * (1 - p_target))
        ind_treat <- ind[treat]
        w_treat <- w[treat]
        pre <- mean(ind_treat, na.rm = TRUE)
        post <- w_mean(ind_treat, w_treat)
        smd_pre <- if (is.finite(sd_target) && sd_target > 0) (pre - p_target) / sd_target else NA_real_
        smd_post <- if (is.finite(sd_target) && sd_target > 0) (post - p_target) / sd_target else NA_real_
        data.frame(
          variable = v,
          level = lv,
          type = "factor",
          smd_pre = smd_pre,
          smd_post = smd_post,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }) |> dplyr::bind_rows()
    } else {
      # Numeric covariates: compare means scaled by target SD.
      x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
      mean_target <- mean(x_num, na.rm = TRUE)
      sd_target <- stats::sd(x_num, na.rm = TRUE)
      x_treat <- x_num[treat]
      w_treat <- w[treat]
      mean_pre <- mean(x_treat, na.rm = TRUE)
      mean_post <- w_mean(x_treat, w_treat)
      smd_pre <- if (is.finite(sd_target) && sd_target > 0) (mean_pre - mean_target) / sd_target else NA_real_
      smd_post <- if (is.finite(sd_target) && sd_target > 0) (mean_post - mean_target) / sd_target else NA_real_
      data.frame(
        variable = v,
        level = NA_character_,
        type = "numeric",
        smd_pre = smd_pre,
        smd_post = smd_post,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

```

```{r mi-single-pass-model-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass model helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# helper: keep only model metadata needed for prediction without retaining the
# fitting function frame through terms/formula environments.
strip_terms_environment <- function(tt) {
  stopifnot(inherits(tt, "terms"))
  attr(tt, ".Environment") <- baseenv()
  stopifnot(identical(attr(tt, ".Environment"), baseenv()))
  tt
}

compact_model_metadata <- function(fit) {
  fit_terms <- strip_terms_environment(stats::delete.response(stats::terms(fit)))
  fit_frame <- stats::model.frame(fit)
  list(
    terms = fit_terms,
    xlevels = stats::.getXlevels(fit_terms, fit_frame),
    contrasts = tryCatch(
      attr(stats::model.matrix(fit), "contrasts"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  )
}

# --- Helper: fit 3-level outcome per imputation -------------------------------
fit_cat3_imp <- function(d, weights, outcome_var, co2_var, treat_var,
                         low_cut, high_cut, group_label, imp_index,
                         adj_vars = adj_core,
                         analysis_variant = "mi_ipw") {
  # Fit one categorical outcome model for one imputation within the tested
  # cohort only. This restriction is intentional because measured CO2 is only
  # defined for encounters that actually had the corresponding blood gas.
  # The Normal CO2 category is the reference for Low/High contrasts.
  stopifnot(co2_var %in% names(d))
  d[[co2_var]] <- coerce_num(d[[co2_var]])

  # Restrict to treated cohort with observed CO2.
  g <- d[[treat_var]] == 1 & is.finite(d[[co2_var]])
  if (!any(g)) {
    return(list(error = "No treated rows with finite CO2"))
  }

  d2 <- d[g, , drop = FALSE]
  w <- weights[g]
  w[!is.finite(w)] <- NA_real_
  ok <- is.finite(w)
  if (!all(ok)) {
    d2 <- d2[ok, , drop = FALSE]
    w  <- w[ok]
    if (nrow(d2) == 0L) return(list(error = "All weights non-finite"))
  }

  d2$co2_cat <- make_co2_cat3(d2[[co2_var]], low_cut, high_cut)
  d2$co2_cat <- stats::relevel(base::droplevels(d2$co2_cat), ref = "Normal")
  if (nlevels(d2$co2_cat) < 2) {
    return(list(error = "co2_cat has <2 levels"))
  }

  d2[[outcome_var]] <- to01(d2[[outcome_var]])
  des <- survey::svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~w, data = d2)
  fml <- stats::reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_vars), response = outcome_var)

  # Fit model with diagnostics wrapper so warnings/errors are tracked in logs.
  fit_res <- fit_with_diagnostics(
    function() survey::svyglm(fml, design = des, family = quasibinomial(),
                              control = stats::glm.control(maxit = 50)),
    context = make_context(
      stage = "outcome",
      component = "cat3",
      analysis_variant = analysis_variant,
      model_type = "cat3",
      group = group_label,
      outcome = outcome_var,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  diag <- fit_res$diag
  if (!is.null(diag) && nrow(diag)) {
    diag$n_used <- nrow(d2)
    diag$events <- sum(d2[[outcome_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  fit <- fit_res$fit
  fit_compact <- NULL
  if (!is.null(fit) && inherits(fit, "svyglm")) {
    # Store only lightweight model metadata needed for reusable predictions.
    fit_compact <- c(
      list(
        coef = stats::coef(fit),
        vcov = stats::vcov(fit)
      ),
      compact_model_metadata(fit)
    )
  }
  list(fit = fit_compact, diag = diag, warnings = fit_res$warnings)
}

# --- Pool terms across imputations (robust svyglm) ----------------------------
pool_terms <- function(fits, term_prefix = NULL, term_pattern = NULL, min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  fit_compact <- lapply(fits, function(x) {
    if (inherits(x, "svyglm")) {
      return(list(coef = stats::coef(x), vcov = stats::vcov(x)))
    }
    if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coef) && !is.null(x$vcov)) {
      return(list(coef = x$coef, vcov = x$vcov))
    }
    NULL
  })
  ok <- !vapply(fit_compact, is.null, logical(1))
  fit_compact <- fit_compact[ok]
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok <- length(fit_compact)
  if (m_ok == 0L) {
    stop("pool_terms: no successful fits; check per-imputation diagnostics.")
  }
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    warning("pool_terms: only ", m_ok, " / ", m_tot,
            " fits succeeded (below min_ok_frac).", call. = FALSE)
  }
  results <- lapply(fit_compact, `[[`, "coef")
  variances <- lapply(fit_compact, `[[`, "vcov")
  pooled <- mitools::MIcombine(results = results, variances = variances)
  pooled_mi_vcov_check(pooled)
  est <- as.numeric(coef(pooled))
  se  <- sqrt(diag(pooled$variance))
  term <- names(coef(pooled))
  out <- data.frame(
    term = term,
    logOR = est,
    estimate = exp(est),
    SE = se,
    LCL = exp(est - 1.96 * se),
    UCL = exp(est + 1.96 * se),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  if (!is.null(term_prefix)) {
    out <- out[grepl(paste0("^", term_prefix), out$term), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (!is.null(term_pattern)) {
    out <- out[grepl(term_pattern, out$term), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  out
}

```

```{r mi-single-pass-spline-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass spline helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# --- Fit spline model on treated cohort only (IPSW) ---------------------------
fit_spline_imp <- function(data, weights, outcome, co2_var, treat_var,
                           adj_vars = NULL,
                           spline_df = SPLINE_DF,
                           spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
                           grid_df = NULL,
                           ref_idx = NULL,
                           imp_index = NA_integer_,
                           analysis_variant = "mi_ipw") {
  # Fit one spline outcome model for one imputation within the tested cohort.
  # If grid_df/ref_idx are supplied, also return pointwise log-OR and linear-
  # predictor quantities so Rubin pooling can happen later without storing large
  # model objects for every imputation/outcome combination.
  spline_basis <- match.arg(spline_basis, c("ns", "rcs"))
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(data))
  stopifnot(length(weights) == nrow(data))
  stopifnot(all(c(outcome, co2_var, treat_var) %in% names(data)))
  if (!is.null(adj_vars) && length(adj_vars)) {
    missing_adj <- setdiff(adj_vars, names(data))
    if (length(missing_adj)) {
      return(list(error = paste0("Missing adj_core vars: ", paste(missing_adj, collapse = ", "))))
    }
  }

  data[[treat_var]] <- to01(data[[treat_var]])
  data[[outcome]]   <- to01(data[[outcome]])
  data[[co2_var]]   <- coerce_num(data[[co2_var]])
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(weights))

  keep <- (data[[treat_var]] == 1L) &
    is.finite(data[[co2_var]]) &
    !is.na(data[[outcome]]) &
    is.finite(w) & (w > 0)

  if (!any(keep)) {
    return(list(error = "No eligible treated rows after filtering (treated==1, finite CO2, non-missing outcome, finite positive weights)."))
  }

  d2 <- data[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  w2 <- w[keep]
  d2$w <- w2

  if (length(unique(d2[[outcome]])) < 2L) {
    return(list(error = paste0("Outcome has one level in treated sample after filtering: outcome=",
                               outcome, ", n=", nrow(d2),
                               ", events=", sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))))
  }

  des <- survey::svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~w, data = d2)
  if (spline_basis == "ns") {
    # Natural spline basis for CO2 plus fixed adjustment covariates.
    rhs_terms <- c(sprintf("splines::ns(%s, %d)", co2_var, spline_df), adj_vars)
    fml <- stats::as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  } else {
    # rms::rcs option retained for compatibility with previous runs.
    dd <- rms::datadist(d2)
    old_opt <- options(datadist = ".__dd_tmp__")
    assign(".__dd_tmp__", dd, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    on.exit({
      options(old_opt)
      rm(list = ".__dd_tmp__", envir = .GlobalEnv)
    }, add = TRUE)
    rhs_terms <- c(sprintf("rms::rcs(%s, %d)", co2_var, spline_df), adj_vars)
    fml <- stats::as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  }

  group_label <- if (identical(treat_var, "has_abg")) "ABG" else if (identical(treat_var, "has_vbg")) "VBG" else treat_var
  fit_res <- fit_with_diagnostics(
    function() survey::svyglm(fml, design = des, family = quasibinomial(),
                              control = stats::glm.control(maxit = 50)),
    context = make_context(
      stage = "outcome",
      component = "spline",
      analysis_variant = analysis_variant,
      model_type = "spline",
      group = group_label,
      outcome = outcome,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  fit <- fit_res$fit
  warns <- fit_res$warnings
  diag <- fit_res$diag
  if (!is.null(diag) && nrow(diag)) {
    diag$n_used <- nrow(d2)
    diag$events <- sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  if (is.null(fit)) {
    err_msg <- if (!is.null(diag$error_message) && is.finite(nchar(diag$error_message))) diag$error_message else "svyglm error"
    return(list(error = err_msg,
                warnings = warns,
                diag = diag,
                n_used = nrow(d2),
                events = sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }

  fit_compact <- list(
    # Compact storage for Rubin pooling and post-hoc diagnostic predictions.
    coef = stats::coef(fit),
    vcov = stats::vcov(fit),
    formula_text = paste(deparse(fml, width.cutoff = 500L), collapse = " "),
    outcome = outcome,
    co2_var = co2_var,
    adj_vars = adj_vars,
    spline_df = spline_df,
    spline_basis = spline_basis
  )
  fit_compact <- c(fit_compact, compact_model_metadata(fit))

  if (!is.null(grid_df)) {
    if (is.null(ref_idx)) {
      return(list(error = "ref_idx is required when grid_df is provided.",
                  warnings = warns, diag = diag))
    }
    pr <- tryCatch(
      predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit, grid_df, ref_idx, co2_var),
      error = function(e) list(error = paste0("predict error: ", conditionMessage(e)))
    )
    if (!is.null(pr$error)) return(list(error = pr$error,
                                        warnings = warns,
                                        diag = diag,
                                        n_used = nrow(d2),
                                        events = sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)))
    return(list(
      fit = fit_compact,
      eta = pr$eta,
      var_eta = pr$var_eta,
      logOR = pr$logOR,
      var_logOR = pr$var_logOR,
      warnings = warns,
      diag = diag,
      n_used = nrow(d2),
      events = sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ))
  }

  list(fit = fit_compact, warnings = warns, diag = diag,
       n_used = nrow(d2),
       events = sum(d2[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
}

# --- Pool spline coefficients across imputations ------------------------------
pool_spline_coefs <- function(fit_list, min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  fit_compact <- lapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$fit) && is.list(x$fit) &&
        !is.null(x$fit$coef) && !is.null(x$fit$vcov)) {
      return(x$fit)
    }
    if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coef) && !is.null(x$vcov)) {
      return(x)
    }
    if (inherits(x, "svyglm")) {
      return(list(coef = stats::coef(x), vcov = stats::vcov(x)))
    }
    NULL
  })
  ok <- !vapply(fit_compact, is.null, logical(1))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok  <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed spline fits: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }
  fit_compact <- fit_compact[ok]
  results <- lapply(fit_compact, `[[`, "coef")
  variances <- lapply(fit_compact, `[[`, "vcov")
  pooled <- mitools::MIcombine(results = results, variances = variances)
  pooled_mi_vcov_check(pooled)
  est <- as.numeric(coef(pooled))
  se  <- sqrt(diag(pooled$variance))
  data.frame(
    term = names(coef(pooled)),
    estimate = est,
    SE = se,
    LCL = est - 1.96 * se,
    UCL = est + 1.96 * se,
    m_used = m_ok,
    m_total = m_tot,
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

# --- Pool spline curves (pointwise Rubin pooling on log-OR scale) -------------
pool_spline_curve <- function(fit_list, grid_df, ref_idx, co2_ref, min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  # Pool on the log-OR scale, then exponentiate. Pooling already-transformed ORs
  # directly would distort both the mean curve and its uncertainty interval.
  n_grid <- nrow(grid_df)
  ok <- vapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    is.list(x) && is.null(x$error) &&
      !is.null(x$logOR) && !is.null(x$var_logOR) &&
      length(x$logOR) == n_grid && length(x$var_logOR) == n_grid
  }, logical(1))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok  <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed spline fits: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }

  logOR_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  var_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  ok_idx <- which(ok)
  for (i in seq_along(ok_idx)) {
    fit_i <- fit_list[[ok_idx[i]]]
    logOR_mat[, i] <- fit_i$logOR
    var_mat[, i] <- fit_i$var_logOR
  }
  Qbar <- rowMeans(logOR_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  Ubar <- rowMeans(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  B    <- apply(logOR_mat, 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
  Tvar <- Ubar + (1 + 1 / m_ok) * B
  se   <- sqrt(Tvar)
  if (!is.na(ref_idx) && is.finite(ref_idx)) {
    if (abs(exp(Qbar[ref_idx]) - 1) > 1e-6) {
      warning("Pooled spline OR at reference differs from 1 (check ref_idx/co2_ref).", call. = FALSE)
    }
  }
  data.frame(
    grid_df,
    logOR = Qbar,
    SE_logOR  = se,
    OR = exp(Qbar),
    LCL = exp(Qbar - 1.96 * se),
    UCL = exp(Qbar + 1.96 * se),
    co2_ref = co2_ref,
    m_used = m_ok,
    m_total = m_tot,
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

# --- Pool spline predicted probabilities (pointwise Rubin pooling on eta) -----
pool_spline_prob_curve <- function(fit_list, grid_df, co2_ref, min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  # Pool predicted probabilities on the linear predictor (eta) scale, then
  # convert back with plogis(). This is more stable than averaging probabilities.
  n_grid <- nrow(grid_df)
  ok <- vapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    is.list(x) && is.null(x$error) &&
      !is.null(x$eta) && !is.null(x$var_eta) &&
      length(x$eta) == n_grid && length(x$var_eta) == n_grid
  }, logical(1))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok  <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed spline fits for probability pooling: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }

  eta_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  var_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  ok_idx <- which(ok)
  for (i in seq_along(ok_idx)) {
    fit_i <- fit_list[[ok_idx[i]]]
    eta_mat[, i] <- fit_i$eta
    var_mat[, i] <- fit_i$var_eta
  }

  Qbar <- rowMeans(eta_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  Ubar <- rowMeans(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  B <- apply(eta_mat, 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
  Tvar <- Ubar + (1 + 1 / m_ok) * B
  se_eta <- sqrt(pmax(Tvar, 0))

  data.frame(
    grid_df,
    eta = Qbar,
    SE_eta = se_eta,
    var_eta = Tvar,
    p = plogis(Qbar),
    p_LCL = plogis(Qbar - 1.96 * se_eta),
    p_UCL = plogis(Qbar + 1.96 * se_eta),
    co2_ref = co2_ref,
    m_used = m_ok,
    m_total = m_tot,
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

```

```{r mi-single-pass-prediction-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass prediction helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# --- Pool 3-level category probabilities (Rubin pooling on eta) ----------------
make_cat3_ref_grid <- function(ref_df = data.frame(.ref = 1), cat_var = "co2_cat") {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(ref_df), nrow(ref_df) > 0L, length(cat_var) == 1L, nzchar(cat_var))
  grid <- ref_df[rep(1L, length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)), , drop = FALSE]
  grid[[cat_var]] <- factor(CO2_CAT_LEVELS, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
  grid
}

compact_spline_fit <- function(x) {
  if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$fit) && is.list(x$fit) &&
      !is.null(x$fit$coef) && !is.null(x$fit$vcov)) {
    return(x$fit)
  }
  if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coef) && !is.null(x$vcov)) {
    return(x)
  }
  if (inherits(x, c("svyglm", "glm"))) {
    tt <- stats::delete.response(stats::terms(x))
    attr(tt, ".Environment") <- baseenv()
    return(list(
      coef = stats::coef(x),
      vcov = stats::vcov(x),
      terms = tt,
      xlevels = x$xlevels,
      contrasts = x$contrasts
    ))
  }
  NULL
}

compact_model_matrix <- function(fit_compact, new_data, fallback_formula,
                                 context = "compact model prediction") {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), is.data.frame(new_data))
  if (!is.null(fit_compact$terms)) {
    tt <- fit_compact$terms
    if (!identical(attr(tt, ".Environment"), baseenv())) {
      stop(context, ": compact terms retain a non-base environment.")
    }
    mf_new <- stats::model.frame(
      tt,
      data = new_data,
      na.action = stats::na.pass,
      xlev = fit_compact$xlevels
    )
    return(stats::model.matrix(tt, mf_new, contrasts.arg = fit_compact$contrasts))
  }
  tt <- stats::delete.response(stats::terms(fallback_formula))
  stats::model.matrix(tt, data = new_data)
}

align_compact_vcov <- function(vcov_mat, coef_names, context = "compact model prediction") {
  if (is.null(vcov_mat)) stop(context, ": missing vcov matrix.")
  if (!is.null(rownames(vcov_mat)) && !is.null(colnames(vcov_mat)) &&
      all(coef_names %in% rownames(vcov_mat)) && all(coef_names %in% colnames(vcov_mat))) {
    return(vcov_mat[coef_names, coef_names, drop = FALSE])
  }
  vcov_mat
}

predict_prob_from_compact <- function(fit_compact, new_data, fallback_formula,
                                      context = "compact model prediction") {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), !is.null(fit_compact$coef), !is.null(fit_compact$vcov))
  beta <- fit_compact$coef
  beta_names <- names(beta)
  if (is.null(beta_names) || any(!nzchar(beta_names))) {
    stop(context, ": coefficient names are required.")
  }
  mm <- compact_model_matrix(fit_compact, new_data, fallback_formula, context = context)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(beta_names, colnames(mm))
  if (length(missing_cols)) {
    mm <- cbind(
      mm,
      matrix(
        0,
        nrow = nrow(mm),
        ncol = length(missing_cols),
        dimnames = list(NULL, missing_cols)
      )
    )
  }
  mm <- mm[, beta_names, drop = FALSE]
  vcov_mat <- align_compact_vcov(fit_compact$vcov, beta_names, context = context)
  if (!identical(dim(vcov_mat), c(length(beta), length(beta)))) {
    stop(context, ": vcov dimensions do not match coefficient vector.")
  }
  eta <- as.numeric(mm %*% beta)
  mm_v <- mm %*% vcov_mat
  var_eta <- pmax(rowSums(mm_v * mm), 0)
  tibble::as_tibble(new_data) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      eta = eta,
      SE_eta = sqrt(var_eta),
      var_eta = var_eta,
      p = stats::plogis(eta),
      p_LCL = stats::plogis(eta - 1.96 * sqrt(var_eta)),
      p_UCL = stats::plogis(eta + 1.96 * sqrt(var_eta))
    )
}

predict_marginal_prob_from_compact <- function(fit_compact, new_data, fallback_formula,
                                               context = "marginal standardized prediction",
                                               chunk_rows = MARGINAL_PREDICTION_CHUNK_ROWS) {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), !is.null(fit_compact$coef), !is.null(fit_compact$vcov))
  beta <- fit_compact$coef
  beta_names <- names(beta)
  if (is.null(beta_names) || any(!nzchar(beta_names))) {
    stop(context, ": coefficient names are required.")
  }
  vcov_mat <- align_compact_vcov(fit_compact$vcov, beta_names, context = context)
  if (!identical(dim(vcov_mat), c(length(beta), length(beta)))) {
    stop(context, ": vcov dimensions do not match coefficient vector.")
  }
  if (!nrow(new_data)) {
    stop(context, ": new_data has zero rows.")
  }

  align_mm <- function(mm) {
    missing_cols <- setdiff(beta_names, colnames(mm))
    if (length(missing_cols)) {
      mm <- cbind(
        mm,
        matrix(
          0,
          nrow = nrow(mm),
          ncol = length(missing_cols),
          dimnames = list(NULL, missing_cols)
        )
      )
    }
    mm[, beta_names, drop = FALSE]
  }

  chunk_rows <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(chunk_rows[[1L]]))
  if (!is.finite(chunk_rows) || chunk_rows <= 0L) chunk_rows <- nrow(new_data)
  chunk_rows <- min(chunk_rows, nrow(new_data))
  use_chunking <- !is.null(fit_compact$terms) && nrow(new_data) > chunk_rows

  if (use_chunking) {
    p_sum <- 0
    dp_sum <- stats::setNames(rep(0, length(beta)), beta_names)
    n_pred <- 0L
    for (row_start in seq.int(1L, nrow(new_data), by = chunk_rows)) {
      row_end <- min(row_start + chunk_rows - 1L, nrow(new_data))
      nd_chunk <- new_data[row_start:row_end, , drop = FALSE]
      mm <- align_mm(compact_model_matrix(fit_compact, nd_chunk, fallback_formula, context = context))
      eta <- as.numeric(mm %*% beta)
      p_i <- stats::plogis(eta)
      ok <- is.finite(p_i)
      if (any(ok)) {
        p_ok <- p_i[ok]
        mm_ok <- mm[ok, , drop = FALSE]
        p_sum <- p_sum + sum(p_ok)
        dp_sum <- dp_sum + colSums(sweep(mm_ok, 1L, p_ok * (1 - p_ok), `*`))
        n_pred <- n_pred + length(p_ok)
      }
      rm(nd_chunk, mm, eta, p_i)
    }
    if (!n_pred) {
      stop(context, ": no finite predicted probabilities.")
    }
    p_bar <- p_sum / n_pred
    dp_dbeta <- dp_sum / n_pred
  } else {
    mm <- align_mm(compact_model_matrix(fit_compact, new_data, fallback_formula, context = context))
    eta <- as.numeric(mm %*% beta)
    p_i <- stats::plogis(eta)
    p_bar <- mean(p_i, na.rm = TRUE)
    dp_dbeta <- colMeans(sweep(mm, 1L, p_i * (1 - p_i), `*`), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  p_safe <- min(max(p_bar, 1e-8), 1 - 1e-8)
  var_p <- as.numeric(t(dp_dbeta) %*% vcov_mat %*% dp_dbeta)
  var_p <- max(var_p, 0)
  var_eta <- var_p / ((p_safe * (1 - p_safe))^2)
  tibble::tibble(
    eta_imp = stats::qlogis(p_safe),
    var_eta_imp = var_eta,
    p_imp = p_bar,
    var_p_imp = var_p,
    n_standardized = nrow(new_data)
  )
}

# helper: compute category-level predicted probabilities from a compact
# coefficient/vcov representation so pooled MI fits need not keep full model objects.
predict_cat3_prob_from_compact <- function(fit_compact, grid_df, outcome_var,
                                           cat_var = "co2_cat",
                                           adj_vars = adj_core) {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), !is.null(fit_compact$coef), !is.null(fit_compact$vcov))
  stopifnot(cat_var %in% names(grid_df))
  fml <- stats::reformulate(c(cat_var, adj_vars), response = outcome_var)
  predict_prob_from_compact(
    fit_compact,
    grid_df,
    fallback_formula = fml,
    context = paste0("predict_cat3_prob_from_compact(", outcome_var, ")")
  ) |>
    as.data.frame()
}

predict_spline_prob_from_compact <- function(fit_compact, grid_df,
                                             outcome_var,
                                             co2_var,
                                             adj_vars = adj_core) {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), !is.null(fit_compact$coef), !is.null(fit_compact$vcov))
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(grid_df), co2_var %in% names(grid_df))
  rhs_terms <- c(sprintf("splines::ns(%s, %d)", co2_var, SPLINE_DF), adj_vars)
  fallback_fml <- stats::as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  predict_prob_from_compact(
    fit_compact,
    grid_df,
    fallback_formula = fallback_fml,
    context = paste0("predict_spline_prob_from_compact(", outcome_var, ")")
  )
}

pool_spline_prob_curve_from_compact <- function(fit_list, grid_df,
                                                outcome_var,
                                                co2_var,
                                                co2_ref,
                                                min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  pred_list <- lapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(x)
    if (is.null(fit_compact)) return(NULL)
    tryCatch(
      predict_spline_prob_from_compact(
        fit_compact,
        grid_df = grid_df,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        co2_var = co2_var
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  })

  n_grid <- nrow(grid_df)
  ok <- vapply(pred_list, function(x) {
    is.data.frame(x) &&
      nrow(x) == n_grid &&
      all(c("eta", "var_eta") %in% names(x))
  }, logical(1L))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed compact spline predictions: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }

  eta_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  var_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  ok_idx <- which(ok)
  for (j in seq_along(ok_idx)) {
    pred_j <- pred_list[[ok_idx[[j]]]]
    eta_mat[, j] <- pred_j$eta
    var_mat[, j] <- pred_j$var_eta
  }

  qbar <- rowMeans(eta_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  ubar <- rowMeans(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  bvar <- apply(eta_mat, 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
  tvar <- ubar + (1 + 1 / m_ok) * bvar
  se_eta <- sqrt(pmax(tvar, 0))

  tibble::as_tibble(grid_df) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      eta = qbar,
      SE_eta = se_eta,
      var_eta = tvar,
      p = stats::plogis(qbar),
      p_LCL = stats::plogis(qbar - 1.96 * se_eta),
      p_UCL = stats::plogis(qbar + 1.96 * se_eta),
      co2_ref = co2_ref,
      m_used = m_ok,
      m_total = m_tot
    )
}

# helper: pool categorical predicted probabilities across imputations on the
# linear-predictor scale and return low/normal/high estimates with CIs.
pool_cat3_prob_curve <- function(fit_list, ref_df, outcome_var,
                                 cat_var = "co2_cat",
                                 adj_vars = adj_core, min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  grid_df <- make_cat3_ref_grid(ref_df, cat_var = cat_var)
  n_grid <- nrow(grid_df)

  pred_list <- lapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    fit_compact <- NULL
    if (inherits(x, "svyglm")) {
      fit_compact <- list(coef = stats::coef(x), vcov = stats::vcov(x))
    } else if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coef) && !is.null(x$vcov)) {
      fit_compact <- x
    }
    if (is.null(fit_compact)) return(NULL)
    tryCatch(
      predict_cat3_prob_from_compact(
        fit_compact,
        grid_df,
        outcome_var,
        cat_var = cat_var,
        adj_vars = adj_vars
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  })

  ok <- vapply(pred_list, function(x) {
    is.data.frame(x) &&
      nrow(x) == n_grid &&
      all(c("eta", "var_eta") %in% names(x)) &&
      length(x$eta) == n_grid &&
      length(x$var_eta) == n_grid
  }, logical(1))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed category-probability fits: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }

  eta_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  var_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  ok_idx <- which(ok)
  for (i in seq_along(ok_idx)) {
    pred_i <- pred_list[[ok_idx[i]]]
    eta_mat[, i] <- pred_i$eta
    var_mat[, i] <- pred_i$var_eta
  }

  Qbar <- rowMeans(eta_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  Ubar <- rowMeans(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  B <- apply(eta_mat, 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
  Tvar <- Ubar + (1 + 1 / m_ok) * B
  se_eta <- sqrt(pmax(Tvar, 0))

  data.frame(
    category = as.character(grid_df[[cat_var]]),
    co2_cat = as.character(grid_df[[cat_var]]),
    eta = Qbar,
    SE_eta = se_eta,
    var_eta = Tvar,
    p = plogis(Qbar),
    p_LCL = plogis(Qbar - 1.96 * se_eta),
    p_UCL = plogis(Qbar + 1.96 * se_eta),
    m_used = m_ok,
    m_total = m_tot,
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

common_std_sample_cap <- if (!IS_PILOT) {
  20000L
} else if (is.finite(PILOT_FRAC) && PILOT_FRAC >= 0.25) {
  5000L
} else {
  1000L
}
common_std_min_ok_frac <- 0.9

```

```{r mi-single-pass-standardization-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass standardization helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
build_common_std_source_df <- function(d, imp_index,
                                       adj_vars = adj_core,
                                       sample_cap = common_std_sample_cap) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(d), length(adj_vars) > 0L)
  missing_adj <- setdiff(adj_vars, names(d))
  if (length(missing_adj)) {
    stop("Common standardization source missing adjustment variables: ",
         paste(missing_adj, collapse = ", "), call. = FALSE)
  }
  source_df <- d[, adj_vars, drop = FALSE]
  source_df <- source_df[stats::complete.cases(source_df), , drop = FALSE]
  n_available <- nrow(source_df)
  if (!n_available) {
    stop("Common standardization source has zero complete rows in imputation ", imp_index, call. = FALSE)
  }
  if (is.finite(sample_cap) && n_available > sample_cap) {
    set.seed(8100L + as.integer(imp_index))
    source_df <- source_df[sample.int(n_available, size = as.integer(sample_cap), replace = FALSE), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  attr(source_df, "n_available") <- n_available
  attr(source_df, "sample_cap") <- as.integer(sample_cap)
  source_df
}

predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized <- function(fit_compact, source_df,
                                                     co2_var, co2_values,
                                                     outcome_var,
                                                     adj_vars = adj_core) {
  rhs_terms <- c(sprintf("splines::ns(%s, %d)", co2_var, SPLINE_DF), adj_vars)
  fallback_fml <- stats::as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  purrr::map_dfr(co2_values, function(co2_value) {
    nd <- source_df
    nd[[co2_var]] <- co2_value
    predict_marginal_prob_from_compact(
      fit_compact,
      nd,
      fallback_formula = fallback_fml,
      context = paste0("predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(", outcome_var, ")")
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        co2_value = co2_value,
        n_available = attr(source_df, "n_available"),
        standardization_sample_cap = attr(source_df, "sample_cap")
      )
  })
}

predict_prob_cat3_marginal_standardized <- function(fit_compact, source_df,
                                                    outcome_var,
                                                    cat_var = "co2_cat",
                                                    adj_vars = adj_core) {
  fallback_fml <- stats::reformulate(c(cat_var, adj_vars), response = outcome_var)
  purrr::map_dfr(CO2_CAT_LEVELS, function(category_value) {
    nd <- source_df
    nd[[cat_var]] <- factor(category_value, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
    predict_marginal_prob_from_compact(
      fit_compact,
      nd,
      fallback_formula = fallback_fml,
      context = paste0("predict_prob_cat3_marginal_standardized(", outcome_var, ")")
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        category = category_value,
        co2_cat = category_value,
        n_available = attr(source_df, "n_available"),
        standardization_sample_cap = attr(source_df, "sample_cap")
      )
  })
}

pool_marginal_standardized_predictions <- function(pred_df, group_vars,
                                                   m_total = imp_n,
                                                   min_ok_frac = common_std_min_ok_frac,
                                                   context = "marginal standardized predictions") {
  assert_is_df(pred_df, context = context)
  assert_has_cols(pred_df, c(group_vars, "imp", "eta_imp", "var_eta_imp", "p_imp"), context = context)
  min_required <- ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_total)
  pooled_df <- pred_df |>
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(group_vars))) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      eta = mean(.data$eta_imp, na.rm = TRUE),
      ubar = mean(.data$var_eta_imp, na.rm = TRUE),
      bvar = stats::var(.data$eta_imp, na.rm = TRUE),
      p_imp_mean = mean(.data$p_imp, na.rm = TRUE),
      m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
      m_total = m_total,
      n_available = stats::median(.data$n_available, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_standardized = stats::median(.data$n_standardized, na.rm = TRUE),
      standardization_sample_cap = stats::median(.data$standardization_sample_cap, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      bvar = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$bvar), 0, .data$bvar),
      var_eta = .data$ubar + (1 + 1 / pmax(.data$m_used, 1)) * .data$bvar,
      SE_eta = sqrt(pmax(.data$var_eta, 0)),
      p = stats::plogis(.data$eta),
      p_LCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta - 1.96 * .data$SE_eta),
      p_UCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta + 1.96 * .data$SE_eta),
      passed_threshold = .data$m_used >= min_required,
      min_required = min_required
    )
  failed <- pooled_df |>
    dplyr::filter(!.data$passed_threshold)
  if (nrow(failed)) {
    stop(
      context, " failed completion threshold for ",
      paste(apply(failed[, group_vars, drop = FALSE], 1, paste, collapse = "/"), collapse = "; "),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  pooled_df
}

# helper: convenience wrapper for non-MI categorical probability predictions
# from a full fitted model object.
predict_cat3_prob_from_fit <- function(fit_obj, ref_df, outcome_var,
                                       cat_var = "co2_cat",
                                       adj_vars = adj_core) {
  fit_compact <- compact_cat3_fit(
    fit_obj,
    context = paste0("predict_cat3_prob_from_fit(", outcome_var, ")")
  )
  grid_df <- make_cat3_ref_grid(ref_df, cat_var = cat_var)
  pred_df <- predict_cat3_prob_from_compact(
    fit_compact,
    grid_df,
    outcome_var,
    cat_var = cat_var,
    adj_vars = adj_vars
  )
  pred_df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      category = as.character(.data[[cat_var]]),
      co2_cat = as.character(.data[[cat_var]])
    )
}

```

```{r mi-single-pass-cache-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass cache helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# --- Single-pass loop ---------------------------------------------------------
cat3_outcomes <- c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure")
cat3_labels <- c(
  imv_proc = "IMV",
  niv_proc = "NIV",
  death_60d = "Death60d",
  hypercap_resp_failure = "HCRF"
)

abg_co2_obs <- subset_data$paco2[subset_data$has_abg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data$paco2)]
if (length(abg_co2_obs) < 10) stop("ABG spline: not enough observed PaCO2 values.")
q_abg <- stats::quantile(abg_co2_obs, probs = c(0.02, 0.98), na.rm = TRUE)
grid_abg_info_mi <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "paco2",
  seq(q_abg[1], q_abg[2], length.out = SPLINE_GRID_N),
  x_ref_abg,
  ABG_CO2_REF
)
grid_abg_mi <- grid_abg_info_mi$grid
ref_idx_abg_mi <- grid_abg_info_mi$ref_idx
co2_ref_abg_mi <- grid_abg_info_mi$co2_ref

vbg_co2_obs <- subset_data$vbg_co2[subset_data$has_vbg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data$vbg_co2)]
if (length(vbg_co2_obs) < 10) stop("VBG spline: not enough observed VBG CO2 values.")
q_vbg <- stats::quantile(vbg_co2_obs, probs = c(0.02, 0.98), na.rm = TRUE)
grid_vbg_info_mi <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "vbg_co2",
  seq(q_vbg[1], q_vbg[2], length.out = SPLINE_GRID_N),
  x_ref_vbg,
  VBG_CO2_REF
)
grid_vbg_mi <- grid_vbg_info_mi$grid
ref_idx_vbg_mi <- grid_vbg_info_mi$ref_idx
co2_ref_vbg_mi <- grid_vbg_info_mi$co2_ref

covars_use <- intersect(covars_ps, names(subset_data))
covars_use_abg <- covars_use
covars_use_vbg <- covars_use

# MI PS covariate typing (continuous vs categorical) for transparency
mi_logistic_ps_type_file <- results_path("mi_logistic_ps_covariate_types.csv")
d_ps_tmp <- get_imp(1)
d_ps_tmp <- normalize_types(d_ps_tmp, levels_ref)
d_ps_tmp <- d_ps_tmp[, c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars_ps), drop = FALSE]
d_ps_tmp <- droplevels_all(d_ps_tmp)
cont_vars <- covars_ps[vapply(covars_ps, ps_is_continuous, logical(1), df = d_ps_tmp)]
cat_vars_ps  <- setdiff(covars_ps, cont_vars)
mi_logistic_ps_types <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  data.frame(variable = cont_vars, type = "continuous", stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(variable = cat_vars_ps,  type = "categorical", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
write_csv_safely(mi_logistic_ps_types, mi_logistic_ps_type_file, row_names = FALSE)
rm(d_ps_tmp, cont_vars, cat_vars_ps, mi_logistic_ps_types)
gc()

mi_logistic_ps_abg_list <- vector("list", imp_n)
mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list <- vector("list", imp_n)
mi_weight_dir <- results_path("mi_weights")
mi_fit_cache_dir <- results_path("mi_fit_cache")
# These cached per-imputation weight files are scratch outputs used later in
# the render and for post-hoc debugging. Create the directory explicitly with
# fs so long Quarto runs do not depend on a silent base-R dir.create() result.
fs::dir_create(mi_weight_dir, recurse = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(mi_weight_dir)) {
  stop("Failed to create MI weight cache directory: ", mi_weight_dir)
}
fs::dir_create(mi_fit_cache_dir, recurse = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(mi_fit_cache_dir)) {
  stop("Failed to create MI compact fit cache directory: ", mi_fit_cache_dir)
}

mi_single_pass_status_rows <- list()
mi_single_pass_cache_manifest_rows <- list()
mi_single_pass_memory_rows <- list()
mi_single_pass_storage_equivalence_rows <- list()
mi_fit_cache_paths <- rep(NA_character_, imp_n)

write_mi_single_pass_status <- function() {
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(mi_single_pass_status_rows),
    results_path("mi_single_pass_status.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
}

record_mi_single_pass_status <- function(imp_index, stage, status, message = "") {
  mi_single_pass_status_rows[[length(mi_single_pass_status_rows) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    stage = stage,
    status = status,
    message = message,
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write_mi_single_pass_status()
  invisible(TRUE)
}

write_mi_single_pass_manifest <- function() {
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(mi_single_pass_cache_manifest_rows),
    results_path("mi_single_pass_cache_manifest.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
}

record_mi_single_pass_cache <- function(rows) {
  if (is.null(rows) || !nrow(rows)) return(invisible(FALSE))
  mi_single_pass_cache_manifest_rows <<- c(mi_single_pass_cache_manifest_rows, list(rows))
  write_mi_single_pass_manifest()
  invisible(TRUE)
}

record_mi_single_pass_memory <- function(imp_index, stage, when) {
  mem <- get_vcells_stats()
  mi_single_pass_memory_rows[[length(mi_single_pass_memory_rows) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    stage = stage,
    when = when,
    gc_vcells_used_mb = mem$gc_vcells_used_mb,
    gc_vcells_limit_mb = mem$gc_vcells_limit_mb,
    gc_vcells_frac = mem$gc_vcells_frac,
    gc_vcells_trigger_mb = mem$gc_vcells_trigger_mb,
    gc_vcells_max_used_mb = mem$gc_vcells_max_used_mb,
    rss_mb = get_rss_mb(),
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(mi_single_pass_memory_rows),
    results_path("mi_single_pass_memory_log.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  invisible(mem)
}

record_mi_storage_equivalence <- function(component, ok, detail = "") {
  mi_single_pass_storage_equivalence_rows[[length(mi_single_pass_storage_equivalence_rows) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
    component = component,
    passed = isTRUE(ok),
    detail = detail,
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(mi_single_pass_storage_equivalence_rows),
    results_path("mi_single_pass_storage_equivalence.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  invisible(isTRUE(ok))
}

validate_mi_cache_vector <- function(x, expected_len, kind, context, finite_index = NULL) {
  if (!is.numeric(x)) {
    stop(context, ": expected numeric ", kind, " vector.")
  }
  if (!is.finite(expected_len) || length(x) != expected_len) {
    stop(context, ": expected length ", expected_len, " but found ", length(x), ".")
  }
  if (identical(kind, "ps")) {
    if (any(!is.finite(x))) {
      stop(context, ": non-finite values found in propensity-score vector.")
    }
    if (any(x < 0 | x > 1)) {
      stop(context, ": propensity scores outside [0, 1].")
    }
  } else if (identical(kind, "weight")) {
    if (any(is.infinite(x))) {
      stop(context, ": infinite values found in weight vector.")
    }
    if (!is.null(finite_index)) {
      stopifnot(length(finite_index) == expected_len)
      required <- finite_index %in% TRUE
      if (any(!is.finite(x[required]))) {
        stop(context, ": non-finite values found in analysis-required weight rows.")
      }
    } else if (!any(is.finite(x))) {
      stop(context, ": no finite values found in weight vector.")
    }
    finite_weights <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if (length(finite_weights) && any(finite_weights <= 0)) {
      stop(context, ": non-positive finite weights found.")
    }
  }
  invisible(TRUE)
}

write_mi_vector_cache <- function(x, path, kind, group, imp_index, expected_len,
                                  finite_index = NULL) {
  context <- paste0("MI ", group, " ", kind, " cache imp ", imp_index)
  validate_mi_cache_vector(x, expected_len, kind, context, finite_index = finite_index)
  saveRDS(x, path)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(context, ": failed to write cache file ", path)
  }
  data.frame(
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    group = group,
    artifact_type = kind,
    path = path,
    n = as.integer(expected_len),
    bytes = as.numeric(file.info(path)$size),
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

read_mi_vector_from_meta <- function(meta, path_field, kind, context) {
  stopifnot(is.list(meta), !is.null(meta[[path_field]]), file.exists(meta[[path_field]]))
  expected_len <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(meta$n))
  x <- readRDS(meta[[path_field]])
  validate_mi_cache_vector(x, expected_len, kind, context)
  x
}

check_rds_equivalence <- function(original, path, component) {
  reloaded <- readRDS(path)
  cmp <- all.equal(original, reloaded, tolerance = 0, check.attributes = TRUE)
  ok <- isTRUE(cmp)
  detail <- if (ok) "" else paste(cmp, collapse = "; ")
  record_mi_storage_equivalence(component, ok, detail)
  if (!ok) {
    stop("RDS storage equivalence failed for ", component, ": ", detail)
  }
  invisible(TRUE)
}

read_mi_fit_cache <- function(path, imp_index) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Missing compact MI fit cache for imputation ", imp_index, ": ", path)
  }
  obj <- readRDS(path)
  if (!is.list(obj) || !identical(as.integer(obj$imp), as.integer(imp_index))) {
    stop("Invalid compact MI fit cache for imputation ", imp_index, ": ", path)
  }
  obj
}

restore_mi_fit_banks <- function(cache_paths, outcomes, imp_n) {
  init_bank <- function() setNames(lapply(outcomes, function(x) vector("list", imp_n)), outcomes)
  out <- list(
    bal_rows_abg = vector("list", imp_n),
    bal_rows_vbg = vector("list", imp_n),
    cat3_fits_abg = init_bank(),
    cat3_fits_vbg = init_bank(),
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg = init_bank(),
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg = init_bank(),
    spline_fits_abg = init_bank(),
    spline_fits_vbg = init_bank(),
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg = init_bank(),
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg = init_bank(),
    cat3_diag_rows = list(),
    spline_diag_rows = list(),
    weight_diag_abg = vector("list", imp_n),
    weight_diag_vbg = vector("list", imp_n),
    mi_imp_perf = vector("list", imp_n)
  )

  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    cache_i <- read_mi_fit_cache(cache_paths[[imp_index]], imp_index)
    out$bal_rows_abg[[imp_index]] <- cache_i$bal_rows_abg
    out$bal_rows_vbg[[imp_index]] <- cache_i$bal_rows_vbg
    out$weight_diag_abg[[imp_index]] <- cache_i$weight_diag_abg
    out$weight_diag_vbg[[imp_index]] <- cache_i$weight_diag_vbg
    out$mi_imp_perf[[imp_index]] <- cache_i$mi_imp_perf
    out$cat3_diag_rows <- c(out$cat3_diag_rows, cache_i$cat3_diag_rows)
    out$spline_diag_rows <- c(out$spline_diag_rows, cache_i$spline_diag_rows)
    for (outcome_var in outcomes) {
      out$cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]]
      out$cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]
      out$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]]
      out$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]
      out$spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]]
      out$spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]
      out$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]]
      out$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- cache_i$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]
    }
    rm(cache_i)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
  out
}

message("MI single-pass: running ", imp_n, " imputations sequentially.")
```

```{r mi-single-pass-loop}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass per-imputation loop"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
for (i in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  # MI single-pass workflow:
  # 1) complete one imputed dataset,
  # 2) fit ABG and VBG propensity models,
  # 3) derive one-sided IPSW weights and target-balance summaries,
  # 4) fit categorical and spline outcome models, and
  # 5) save only compact outputs needed for later pooling and reporting.
  # Per-imputation telemetry (time + memory) supports full-run troubleshooting.
  imp_label <- sprintf("imp_%03d", i)
  append_mem_snapshot("mi_single_pass", imp_label, "pre")
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "imputation", "started")
  mem_pre <- record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "imputation", "pre")
  imp_t0 <- Sys.time()
  d <- get_imp(i)
  d_ps <- prepare_mi_ps_frame(d)

  # Fit ABG and VBG propensity models for this imputation.
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "ps_abg", "started")
  record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "ps_abg", "pre")
  set.seed(20251206 + i)
  fit_abg <- fit_abg_one(d_ps, i)
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "ps_abg", "completed")
  record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "ps_abg", "post")
  invisible(gc(FALSE))

  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "ps_vbg", "started")
  record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "ps_vbg", "pre")
  set.seed(30251206 + i)
  fit_vbg <- fit_vbg_one(d_ps, i)
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "ps_vbg", "completed")
  record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "ps_vbg", "post")
  rm(d_ps)
  invisible(gc(full = TRUE))

  w_abg_i <- fit_abg$weights
  w_vbg_i <- fit_vbg$weights
  ps_abg_i <- fit_abg$ps
  ps_vbg_i <- fit_vbg$ps
  w_path_abg <- file.path(mi_weight_dir, sprintf("w_abg_imp_%03d.rds", i))
  w_path_vbg <- file.path(mi_weight_dir, sprintf("w_vbg_imp_%03d.rds", i))
  ps_path_abg <- file.path(mi_weight_dir, sprintf("ps_abg_imp_%03d.rds", i))
  ps_path_vbg <- file.path(mi_weight_dir, sprintf("ps_vbg_imp_%03d.rds", i))
  # Reassert the scratch directory at write time because this chunk is long
  # and we want an informative failure if the cache path disappears mid-render.
  fs::dir_create(mi_weight_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  if (!dir.exists(mi_weight_dir)) {
    stop("MI weight cache directory is unavailable during imputation ", i, ": ", mi_weight_dir)
  }
  cache_rows_i <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    write_mi_vector_cache(
      w_abg_i, w_path_abg, "weight", "ABG", i, nrow(d),
      finite_index = d$has_abg == 1
    ),
    write_mi_vector_cache(
      w_vbg_i, w_path_vbg, "weight", "VBG", i, nrow(d),
      finite_index = d$has_vbg == 1
    ),
    write_mi_vector_cache(ps_abg_i, ps_path_abg, "ps", "ABG", i, nrow(d)),
    write_mi_vector_cache(ps_vbg_i, ps_path_vbg, "ps", "VBG", i, nrow(d))
  )
  record_mi_single_pass_cache(cache_rows_i)
  if (i == 1L) {
    check_rds_equivalence(w_abg_i, w_path_abg, "abg_weight_vector_rds")
    check_rds_equivalence(w_vbg_i, w_path_vbg, "vbg_weight_vector_rds")
    check_rds_equivalence(ps_abg_i, ps_path_abg, "abg_ps_vector_rds")
    check_rds_equivalence(ps_vbg_i, ps_path_vbg, "vbg_ps_vector_rds")
  }
  # Unit weights intentionally reuse the same modeling code path for the
  # imputed-but-unweighted analyses, making weighted vs unweighted contrasts
  # differ only in the supplied weights rather than in helper logic.
  w_unweighted_i <- rep(1, nrow(d))

  # Persist compact PS metadata so downstream chunks can reload on demand.
  # The full vectors live only on disk; keeping them in these metadata lists was
  # the full-run memory failure mode.
  mi_logistic_ps_abg_list[[i]] <- list(
    weights_path = w_path_abg,
    ps_path = ps_path_abg,
    ipow_info = fit_abg$ipow_info,
    method = fit_abg$method,
    formula = fit_abg$formula,
    basis = fit_abg$basis,
    coef = fit_abg$coef,
    vcov_diag = fit_abg$vcov_diag,
    fit_ok = fit_abg$fit_ok,
    converged = fit_abg$converged,
    n = fit_abg$n,
    p = fit_abg$p
  )
  mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list[[i]] <- list(
    weights_path = w_path_vbg,
    ps_path = ps_path_vbg,
    ipow_info = fit_vbg$ipow_info,
    method = fit_vbg$method,
    formula = fit_vbg$formula,
    basis = fit_vbg$basis,
    coef = fit_vbg$coef,
    vcov_diag = fit_vbg$vcov_diag,
    fit_ok = fit_vbg$fit_ok,
    converged = fit_vbg$converged,
    n = fit_vbg$n,
    p = fit_vbg$p
  )
  rm(fit_abg, fit_vbg, ps_abg_i, ps_vbg_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))

  bal_rows_abg_i <- NULL
  bal_rows_vbg_i <- NULL
  cat3_fits_abg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  cat3_fits_vbg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  spline_fits_abg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  spline_fits_vbg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg_i <- setNames(vector("list", length(cat3_outcomes)), cat3_outcomes)
  cat3_diag_rows_i <- list()
  spline_diag_rows_i <- list()

  # Target-balance summaries for this imputation and group.
  bal_rows_abg_i <- target_balance_table(
    d, "has_abg", w_abg_i, covars_use_abg, levels_ref
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group = "ABG", imp = i)
  bal_rows_vbg_i <- target_balance_table(
    d, "has_vbg", w_vbg_i, covars_use_vbg, levels_ref
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group = "VBG", imp = i)

  # 3-level CO2 outcome models for each endpoint (ABG and VBG).
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "cat3_models", "started")
  for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
    fit_abg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d, w_abg_i, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH, "ABG", i,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "mi_ipw"
    )
    cat3_fits_abg_i[[outcome_var]] <- fit_abg_cat$fit
    if (!is.null(fit_abg_cat$diag)) cat3_diag_rows_i[[length(cat3_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_cat$diag

    fit_vbg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d, w_vbg_i, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH, "VBG", i,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "mi_ipw"
    )
    cat3_fits_vbg_i[[outcome_var]] <- fit_vbg_cat$fit
    if (!is.null(fit_vbg_cat$diag)) cat3_diag_rows_i[[length(cat3_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_cat$diag

    fit_abg_cat_unweighted <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d, w_unweighted_i, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH, "ABG", i,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "mi_unweighted"
    )
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg_i[[outcome_var]] <- fit_abg_cat_unweighted$fit
    if (!is.null(fit_abg_cat_unweighted$diag)) {
      cat3_diag_rows_i[[length(cat3_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_cat_unweighted$diag
    }

    fit_vbg_cat_unweighted <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d, w_unweighted_i, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH, "VBG", i,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "mi_unweighted"
    )
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg_i[[outcome_var]] <- fit_vbg_cat_unweighted$fit
    if (!is.null(fit_vbg_cat_unweighted$diag)) {
      cat3_diag_rows_i[[length(cat3_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_cat_unweighted$diag
    }
    rm(fit_abg_cat, fit_vbg_cat, fit_abg_cat_unweighted, fit_vbg_cat_unweighted)
  }
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "cat3_models", "completed")

  # Spline outcome models for each endpoint (ABG and VBG).
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "spline_models", "started")
  for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
    spline_abg <- fit_spline_imp(
      d, w_abg_i, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      grid_df = grid_abg_mi, ref_idx = ref_idx_abg_mi, imp_index = i
    )
    spline_fits_abg_i[[outcome_var]] <- spline_abg
    if (!is.null(spline_abg$diag)) spline_diag_rows_i[[length(spline_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- spline_abg$diag

    spline_vbg <- fit_spline_imp(
      d, w_vbg_i, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      grid_df = grid_vbg_mi, ref_idx = ref_idx_vbg_mi, imp_index = i
    )
    spline_fits_vbg_i[[outcome_var]] <- spline_vbg
    if (!is.null(spline_vbg$diag)) spline_diag_rows_i[[length(spline_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- spline_vbg$diag

    spline_abg_mi_unweighted <- fit_spline_imp(
      d, w_unweighted_i, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      grid_df = grid_abg_mi, ref_idx = ref_idx_abg_mi, imp_index = i,
      analysis_variant = "mi_unweighted"
    )
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg_i[[outcome_var]] <- spline_abg_mi_unweighted
    if (!is.null(spline_abg_mi_unweighted$diag)) {
      spline_diag_rows_i[[length(spline_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- spline_abg_mi_unweighted$diag
    }

    spline_vbg_mi_unweighted <- fit_spline_imp(
      d, w_unweighted_i, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      grid_df = grid_vbg_mi, ref_idx = ref_idx_vbg_mi, imp_index = i,
      analysis_variant = "mi_unweighted"
    )
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg_i[[outcome_var]] <- spline_vbg_mi_unweighted
    if (!is.null(spline_vbg_mi_unweighted$diag)) {
      spline_diag_rows_i[[length(spline_diag_rows_i) + 1L]] <- spline_vbg_mi_unweighted$diag
    }
    rm(spline_abg, spline_vbg, spline_abg_mi_unweighted, spline_vbg_mi_unweighted)
  }
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "spline_models", "completed")

  # Store compact weight diagnostics used in report tables.
  weight_diag_abg_i <- {
    w <- w_abg_i
    t <- d$has_abg
    w <- w[t == 1]
    c(
      n = length(w),
      min = min(w, na.rm = TRUE),
      p99 = stats::quantile(w, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(w, na.rm = TRUE),
      ess = sum(w)^2 / sum(w^2)
    )
  }
  weight_diag_vbg_i <- {
    w <- w_vbg_i
    t <- d$has_vbg
    w <- w[t == 1]
    c(
      n = length(w),
      min = min(w, na.rm = TRUE),
      p99 = stats::quantile(w, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(w, na.rm = TRUE),
      ess = sum(w)^2 / sum(w^2)
    )
  }

  # Save per-imputation performance diagnostics.
  mem_post <- get_vcells_stats()
  imp_t1 <- Sys.time()
  mi_imp_perf_i <- data.frame(
    imp = i,
    seconds = as.numeric(difftime(imp_t1, imp_t0, units = "secs")),
    gc_vcells_used_mb_pre = mem_pre$gc_vcells_used_mb,
    gc_vcells_frac_pre = mem_pre$gc_vcells_frac,
    gc_vcells_used_mb_post = mem_post$gc_vcells_used_mb,
    gc_vcells_frac_post = mem_post$gc_vcells_frac,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  fit_cache_i <- list(
    imp = i,
    bal_rows_abg = bal_rows_abg_i,
    bal_rows_vbg = bal_rows_vbg_i,
    cat3_fits_abg = cat3_fits_abg_i,
    cat3_fits_vbg = cat3_fits_vbg_i,
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg = mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg_i,
    mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg = mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg_i,
    spline_fits_abg = spline_fits_abg_i,
    spline_fits_vbg = spline_fits_vbg_i,
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg = mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg_i,
    mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg = mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg_i,
    cat3_diag_rows = cat3_diag_rows_i,
    spline_diag_rows = spline_diag_rows_i,
    weight_diag_abg = weight_diag_abg_i,
    weight_diag_vbg = weight_diag_vbg_i,
    mi_imp_perf = mi_imp_perf_i
  )
  fit_cache_path <- file.path(mi_fit_cache_dir, sprintf("mi_fit_imp_%03d.rds", i))
  saveRDS(fit_cache_i, fit_cache_path)
  if (i == 1L) {
    check_rds_equivalence(fit_cache_i, fit_cache_path, "compact_fit_cache_rds")
  }
  mi_fit_cache_paths[[i]] <- fit_cache_path
  record_mi_single_pass_cache(data.frame(
    imp = i,
    group = "ABG_VBG",
    artifact_type = "compact_fit_cache",
    path = fit_cache_path,
    n = nrow(d),
    bytes = as.numeric(file.info(fit_cache_path)$size),
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = as.character(Sys.time()),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))

  append_mem_snapshot("mi_single_pass", imp_label, "post")
  record_mi_single_pass_memory(i, "imputation", "post")
  record_mi_single_pass_status(i, "imputation", "completed")

  # Aggressive cleanup inside loop to reduce peak memory pressure.
  rm(d, w_abg_i, w_vbg_i, w_unweighted_i,
     w_path_abg, w_path_vbg, ps_path_abg, ps_path_vbg, cache_rows_i,
     bal_rows_abg_i, bal_rows_vbg_i,
     cat3_fits_abg_i, cat3_fits_vbg_i,
     mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg_i, mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg_i,
     spline_fits_abg_i, spline_fits_vbg_i,
     mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg_i, mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg_i,
     cat3_diag_rows_i, spline_diag_rows_i,
     weight_diag_abg_i, weight_diag_vbg_i, mi_imp_perf_i,
     fit_cache_i, fit_cache_path,
     mem_pre, mem_post, imp_t0, imp_t1, imp_label)
  invisible(gc(full = TRUE))
}

```

```{r mi-single-pass-pooling}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass pooled model outputs"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
fit_banks <- restore_mi_fit_banks(mi_fit_cache_paths, cat3_outcomes, imp_n)
bal_rows_abg <- fit_banks$bal_rows_abg
bal_rows_vbg <- fit_banks$bal_rows_vbg
cat3_fits_abg <- fit_banks$cat3_fits_abg
cat3_fits_vbg <- fit_banks$cat3_fits_vbg
mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg <- fit_banks$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg
mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg <- fit_banks$mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg
spline_fits_abg <- fit_banks$spline_fits_abg
spline_fits_vbg <- fit_banks$spline_fits_vbg
mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg <- fit_banks$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg
mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg <- fit_banks$mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg
cat3_diag_rows <- fit_banks$cat3_diag_rows
spline_diag_rows <- fit_banks$spline_diag_rows
weight_diag_abg <- fit_banks$weight_diag_abg
weight_diag_vbg <- fit_banks$weight_diag_vbg
mi_imp_perf <- fit_banks$mi_imp_perf
rm(fit_banks)
invisible(gc(full = TRUE))

mi_imp_perf_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_imp_perf)
write_csv_safely(mi_imp_perf_df, results_path("mi_single_pass_imp_diagnostics.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
saveRDS(mi_logistic_ps_abg_list, mi_logistic_ps_abg_file)
saveRDS(mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list, mi_logistic_ps_vbg_file)

# helper: retrieve one on-disk MI weight vector for the requested cohort and
# imputation without rebuilding anything. The vector is validated on reload so
# path-backed storage cannot silently change downstream estimates.
get_mi_weight <- function(group, i) {
  stopifnot(i >= 1L, i <= imp_n)
  grp <- toupper(group)
  meta <- if (grp == "ABG") {
    mi_logistic_ps_abg_list[[i]]
  } else if (grp == "VBG") {
    mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list[[i]]
  } else {
    stop("Unknown group for get_mi_weight: ", group)
  }
  read_mi_vector_from_meta(
    meta, "weights_path", "weight",
    paste0("MI ", grp, " weight vector imp ", i)
  )
}

# helper: retrieve one on-disk MI propensity-score vector for the
# requested cohort and imputation.
get_mi_ps <- function(group, i) {
  stopifnot(i >= 1L, i <= imp_n)
  grp <- toupper(group)
  meta <- if (grp == "ABG") {
    mi_logistic_ps_abg_list[[i]]
  } else if (grp == "VBG") {
    mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list[[i]]
  } else {
    stop("Unknown group for get_mi_ps: ", group)
  }
  read_mi_vector_from_meta(
    meta, "ps_path", "ps",
    paste0("MI ", grp, " propensity-score vector imp ", i)
  )
}

append_outcome_diag(dplyr::bind_rows(cat3_diag_rows, spline_diag_rows))

bal_imp_abg <- list(
  bal_long = dplyr::bind_rows(bal_rows_abg)
)
bal_imp_abg$bal_imp_summary <- bal_imp_abg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_post = max(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_post = mean(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
bal_imp_abg$worst_rows_overall <- bal_imp_abg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(abs_post)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
bal_imp_abg$worst_by_imp <- bal_imp_abg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(term = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level)),
                abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::slice_max(abs_post, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(group, imp, term, smd_pre, smd_post, abs_post)
bal_imp_abg$worst_terms_by_imp <- bal_imp_abg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(term = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level)),
                abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::slice_max(abs_post, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(group, imp, term, smd_pre, smd_post, abs_post)

bal_imp_vbg <- list(
  bal_long = dplyr::bind_rows(bal_rows_vbg)
)
bal_imp_vbg$bal_imp_summary <- bal_imp_vbg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_post = max(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_post = mean(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
bal_imp_vbg$worst_rows_overall <- bal_imp_vbg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(abs_post)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
bal_imp_vbg$worst_by_imp <- bal_imp_vbg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(term = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level)),
                abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::slice_max(abs_post, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(group, imp, term, smd_pre, smd_post, abs_post)
bal_imp_vbg$worst_terms_by_imp <- bal_imp_vbg$bal_long |>
  dplyr::mutate(term = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level)),
                abs_post = abs(smd_post)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, imp) |>
  dplyr::slice_max(abs_post, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(group, imp, term, smd_pre, smd_post, abs_post)

mi_weight_diag_abg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(weight_diag_abg, function(x) {
  as.data.frame(as.list(x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
mi_weight_diag_vbg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(weight_diag_vbg, function(x) {
  as.data.frame(as.list(x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))

abg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "ABG",
      OR = estimate
    )
}))
vbg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "VBG",
      OR = estimate
    )
}))
mi_unweighted_abg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "ABG",
      OR = estimate
    )
}))
mi_unweighted_vbg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "VBG",
      OR = estimate
    )
}))

abg_cat_prob_curves <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_cat3_prob_curve(cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], x_ref_abg, outcome_var) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "ABG"
    )
}))
vbg_cat_prob_curves <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_cat3_prob_curve(cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], x_ref_vbg, outcome_var) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "VBG"
    )
}))
mi_unweighted_abg_cat_prob_curves <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_cat3_prob_curve(mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], x_ref_abg, outcome_var) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "ABG"
    )
}))
mi_unweighted_vbg_cat_prob_curves <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_cat3_prob_curve(mi_unweighted_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], x_ref_vbg, outcome_var) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = cat3_labels[[outcome_var]],
      group = "VBG"
    )
}))

abg_spline <- list(
  curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_curve(spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], grid_abg_mi, ref_idx_abg_mi, co2_ref_abg_mi) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  })),
  prob_curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_prob_curve(spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], grid_abg_mi, co2_ref_abg_mi) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  })),
  coefs = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_coefs(spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]]) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  }))
)
vbg_spline <- list(
  curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_curve(spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], grid_vbg_mi, ref_idx_vbg_mi, co2_ref_vbg_mi) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  })),
  prob_curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_prob_curve(spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], grid_vbg_mi, co2_ref_vbg_mi) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  })),
  coefs = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_coefs(spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  }))
)

mi_unweighted_abg_spline <- list(
  curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_curve(
      mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]],
      grid_abg_mi,
      ref_idx_abg_mi,
      co2_ref_abg_mi
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  })),
  prob_curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_prob_curve(
      mi_unweighted_spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]],
      grid_abg_mi,
      co2_ref_abg_mi
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  }))
)
mi_unweighted_vbg_spline <- list(
  curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_curve(
      mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]],
      grid_vbg_mi,
      ref_idx_vbg_mi,
      co2_ref_vbg_mi
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  })),
  prob_curves = dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_spline_prob_curve(
      mi_unweighted_spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]],
      grid_vbg_mi,
      co2_ref_vbg_mi
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  }))
)

abg_curves <- abg_spline$curves
abg_prob_curves <- abg_spline$prob_curves
abg_coefs  <- abg_spline$coefs
vbg_curves <- vbg_spline$curves
vbg_prob_curves <- vbg_spline$prob_curves
vbg_coefs  <- vbg_spline$coefs
mi_unweighted_abg_curves <- mi_unweighted_abg_spline$curves
mi_unweighted_abg_prob_curves <- mi_unweighted_abg_spline$prob_curves
mi_unweighted_vbg_curves <- mi_unweighted_vbg_spline$curves
mi_unweighted_vbg_prob_curves <- mi_unweighted_vbg_spline$prob_curves

abg_prob_curves_conditional_xref <- abg_prob_curves
vbg_prob_curves_conditional_xref <- vbg_prob_curves
abg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref <- abg_cat_prob_curves
vbg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref <- vbg_cat_prob_curves

```

```{r mi-single-pass-standardization-predictions}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass common-source standardization"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
standardization_validation_rows <- list()
record_standardization_status <- function(component, status, reason, artifact_path = "") {
  standardization_validation_rows[[length(standardization_validation_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    component = component,
    status = status,
    reason = reason,
    artifact_path = artifact_path,
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

probability_generation_inventory <- tibble::tribble(
  ~artifact, ~analysis_family, ~current_method, ~uses_x_ref_abg, ~uses_x_ref_vbg, ~manuscript_facing, ~needs_conversion,
  "Figure 2", "primary_mi_ipw_spline", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "Table 2", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "Figure S4", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "cat3_key_results_long.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "table_summary_key_results_cat3.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "mi_spline_prob_curve_abg.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_spline", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "mi_spline_prob_curve_vbg.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_spline", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "mi_cat3_prob_curve_abg.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
  "mi_cat3_prob_curve_vbg.csv", "primary_mi_ipw_cat3", "common_source_marginal_standardized", FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE,
```
