```{r mi-single-pass-standardization-predictions}
  "discordance_current_summary.csv", "discordance_diagnostic", "conditional_modality_specific_xref", TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE,
  "probability_method_comparison_summary.csv", "standardization_diagnostic", "conditional_vs_common_vs_marginal", TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  probability_generation_inventory,
  results_path("probability_generation_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_standardization_status(
  "probability_generation_inventory",
  "completed",
  "Inventory confirms manuscript-facing primary probability outputs use common-source marginal standardization; conditional X_ref outputs are retained only as diagnostics.",
  "Results/probability_generation_inventory.csv"
)

common_ref_profile <- make_ref_profile(subset_data, adj_core)
grid_abg_common_ref_info <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "paco2",
  grid_abg_mi$paco2,
  common_ref_profile,
  co2_ref_abg_mi
)
grid_vbg_common_ref_info <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "vbg_co2",
  grid_vbg_mi$vbg_co2,
  common_ref_profile,
  co2_ref_vbg_mi
)

prob_curve_common_xref_abg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_spline_prob_curve_from_compact(
    spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]],
    grid_df = grid_abg_common_ref_info$grid,
    outcome_var = outcome_var,
    co2_var = "paco2",
    co2_ref = co2_ref_abg_mi
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG", probability_method = "common_reference_profile")
}))
prob_curve_common_xref_vbg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_spline_prob_curve_from_compact(
    spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]],
    grid_df = grid_vbg_common_ref_info$grid,
    outcome_var = outcome_var,
    co2_var = "vbg_co2",
    co2_ref = co2_ref_vbg_mi
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG", probability_method = "common_reference_profile")
}))

standardization_prediction_status_rows <- list()
record_standardization_prediction_status <- function(imp_index, group, outcome_var,
                                                     probability_family, status,
                                                     error_message = "",
                                                     n_available = NA_integer_,
                                                     n_standardized = NA_integer_,
                                                     n_grid = NA_integer_) {
  standardization_prediction_status_rows[[length(standardization_prediction_status_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    imp = imp_index,
    group = group,
    outcome = outcome_var,
    probability_family = probability_family,
    status = status,
    error_message = error_message,
    n_available = as.integer(n_available),
    n_standardized = as.integer(n_standardized),
    n_grid = as.integer(n_grid)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

std_spline_imp_rows <- list()
std_cat3_imp_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  std_source_df <- build_common_std_source_df(d_imp, imp_index)
  n_available_i <- attr(std_source_df, "n_available")
  n_standardized_i <- nrow(std_source_df)

  for (group_label in c("ABG", "VBG")) {
    co2_var <- if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
    co2_values <- if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) grid_abg_mi$paco2 else grid_vbg_mi$vbg_co2
    spline_bank <- if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) spline_fits_abg else spline_fits_vbg
    cat3_bank <- if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) cat3_fits_abg else cat3_fits_vbg

    for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
      spline_fit <- compact_spline_fit(spline_bank[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]])
      if (is.null(spline_fit)) {
        record_standardization_prediction_status(
          imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "spline",
          "skipped_no_compact_fit",
          "compact spline fit unavailable",
          n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(co2_values)
        )
      } else {
        spline_try <- tryCatch(
          list(
            value = predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
              spline_fit,
              source_df = std_source_df,
              co2_var = co2_var,
              co2_values = co2_values,
              outcome_var = outcome_var
            ),
            error = NULL
          ),
          error = function(e) list(value = NULL, error = conditionMessage(e))
        )
        if (is.null(spline_try$error) && is.data.frame(spline_try$value) && nrow(spline_try$value)) {
          std_spline_imp_rows[[length(std_spline_imp_rows) + 1L]] <- spline_try$value |>
            dplyr::mutate(
              imp = imp_index,
              group = group_label,
              outcome = outcome_var,
              co2_scale = co2_var,
              probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized"
            )
          record_standardization_prediction_status(
            imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "spline",
            "completed", "", n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(co2_values)
          )
        } else {
        record_standardization_prediction_status(
          imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "spline",
          "failed_prediction",
          if (is.null(spline_try$error)) "prediction returned no rows" else spline_try$error,
          n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(co2_values)
        )
      }
      }

      cat3_fit <- cat3_bank[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]]
      if (is.null(cat3_fit) || is.null(cat3_fit$coef) || is.null(cat3_fit$vcov)) {
        record_standardization_prediction_status(
          imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "cat3",
          "skipped_no_compact_fit",
          "compact categorical fit unavailable",
          n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
        )
      } else {
        cat3_try <- tryCatch(
          list(
            value = predict_prob_cat3_marginal_standardized(
              cat3_fit,
              source_df = std_source_df,
              outcome_var = outcome_var
            ),
            error = NULL
          ),
          error = function(e) list(value = NULL, error = conditionMessage(e))
        )
        if (is.null(cat3_try$error) && is.data.frame(cat3_try$value) && nrow(cat3_try$value)) {
          std_cat3_imp_rows[[length(std_cat3_imp_rows) + 1L]] <- cat3_try$value |>
            dplyr::mutate(
              imp = imp_index,
              group = group_label,
              outcome = outcome_var,
              probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized"
            )
          record_standardization_prediction_status(
            imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "cat3",
            "completed", "", n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
          )
        } else {
        record_standardization_prediction_status(
          imp_index, group_label, outcome_var, "cat3",
          "failed_prediction",
          if (is.null(cat3_try$error)) "prediction returned no rows" else cat3_try$error,
          n_available_i, n_standardized_i, length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
        )
      }
      }
    }
  }

  rm(d_imp, std_source_df)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

standardization_prediction_status <- dplyr::bind_rows(standardization_prediction_status_rows)
standardization_prediction_summary <- standardization_prediction_status |>
  dplyr::group_by(probability_family, group, outcome) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    m_used = sum(.data$status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE),
    m_total = imp_n,
    min_required = ceiling(common_std_min_ok_frac * imp_n),
    m_failed = sum(.data$status == "failed_prediction", na.rm = TRUE),
    m_skipped = sum(.data$status == "skipped_no_compact_fit", na.rm = TRUE),
    first_error = {
      errors <- .data$error_message[nzchar(.data$error_message)]
      if (length(errors)) errors[[1L]] else ""
    },
    passed_threshold = .data$m_used >= .data$min_required,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
standardization_prediction_status <- standardization_prediction_status |>
    dplyr::left_join(
    standardization_prediction_summary |>
      dplyr::select(probability_family, group, outcome,
                    m_used, m_total, min_required, passed_threshold),
    by = c("probability_family", "group", "outcome")
  )
write_csv_safely(
  standardization_prediction_status,
  results_path("standardization_prediction_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  standardization_prediction_summary,
  results_path("standardization_prediction_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

standardization_failures <- standardization_prediction_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(!.data$passed_threshold)
if (nrow(standardization_failures)) {
  record_standardization_status(
    "marginal_prediction_completion",
    "failed",
    paste0("Common-source marginal standardization failed completion threshold for ",
           paste(paste0(standardization_failures$probability_family, "/",
                        standardization_failures$group, "/",
                        standardization_failures$outcome, " ",
                        standardization_failures$m_used, "/",
                        standardization_failures$m_total), collapse = "; ")),
    "Results/standardization_prediction_status.csv"
  )
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(standardization_validation_rows),
    results_path("standardization_validation_status.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  stop("Common-source marginal standardization failed; see Results/standardization_prediction_status.csv")
}
record_standardization_status(
  "marginal_prediction_completion",
  "completed",
  paste0("All primary spline and categorical marginal predictions met min_ok_frac = ",
         common_std_min_ok_frac, "."),
  "Results/standardization_prediction_status.csv"
)

```

```{r mi-single-pass-standardization-pooling}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass standardized probability pooling"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
std_spline_imp <- dplyr::bind_rows(std_spline_imp_rows)
std_cat3_imp <- dplyr::bind_rows(std_cat3_imp_rows)
prob_curve_marginal_standardized_all <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  std_spline_imp,
  group_vars = c("group", "outcome", "co2_scale", "co2_value", "probability_method"),
  context = "primary spline common-source marginal probabilities"
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    co2_ref = dplyr::if_else(.data$group == "ABG", co2_ref_abg_mi, co2_ref_vbg_mi)
  )
prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_all <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  std_cat3_imp,
  group_vars = c("group", "outcome", "category", "co2_cat", "probability_method"),
  context = "primary categorical common-source marginal probabilities"
)

prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg <- prob_curve_marginal_standardized_all |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$group == "ABG") |>
  dplyr::mutate(paco2 = .data$co2_value) |>
  dplyr::relocate(paco2, .after = co2_value)
prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg <- prob_curve_marginal_standardized_all |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$group == "VBG") |>
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_co2 = .data$co2_value) |>
  dplyr::relocate(vbg_co2, .after = co2_value)
prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_abg <- prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_all |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$group == "ABG")
prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_vbg <- prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_all |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$group == "VBG")

write_csv_safely(
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg,
  results_path("prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg,
  results_path("prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_abg,
  results_path("prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_abg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_vbg,
  results_path("prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_vbg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  abg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  results_path("prob_curve_conditional_xref_abg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  vbg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  results_path("prob_curve_conditional_xref_vbg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  abg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  results_path("prob_cat3_conditional_xref_abg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  vbg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  results_path("prob_cat3_conditional_xref_vbg.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

abg_prob_curves <- prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("probability_method"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized")
vbg_prob_curves <- prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("probability_method"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized")
abg_cat_prob_curves <- prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_abg |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("probability_method"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized")
vbg_cat_prob_curves <- prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_vbg |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("probability_method"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized")

record_standardization_status(
  "marginal_standardized_outputs",
  "completed",
  paste0(
    "Generated common-source marginal standardized probability outputs with sample_cap = ",
    common_std_sample_cap,
    " and common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
  ),
  "Results/prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg.csv; Results/prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg.csv; Results/prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_abg.csv; Results/prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_vbg.csv"
)

probability_method_comparison_curves <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  abg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$paco2, probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  vbg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$vbg_co2, probability_method = "conditional_modality_specific_xref"),
  prob_curve_common_xref_abg |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$paco2),
  prob_curve_common_xref_vbg |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$vbg_co2),
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$paco2),
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg |>
    dplyr::mutate(co2_value = .data$vbg_co2)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    probability_method = factor(
      .data$probability_method,
      levels = c(
        "conditional_modality_specific_xref",
        "common_reference_profile",
        "common_source_marginal_standardized"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Conditional modality-specific X_ref",
        "Common reference profile",
        "Common-source marginal standardized"
      )
    ),
    outcome_label = normalize_key_results_outcome(.data$outcome, context = "probability method comparison"),
    group = normalize_key_results_group(.data$group, context = "probability method comparison")
  )
write_csv_safely(
  probability_method_comparison_curves,
  results_path("probability_method_comparison_curves.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

```

```{r mi-single-pass-probability-comparison}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass probability method comparison"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
comparison_nearest_probability <- function(method_label, group_label, outcome_value, target_value) {
  curve_df <- probability_method_comparison_curves |>
    dplyr::filter(
      as.character(.data$probability_method) == method_label,
      as.character(.data$group) == group_label,
      .data$outcome == outcome_value
    )
  if (!nrow(curve_df) || !is.finite(target_value)) return(NA_real_)
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(curve_df$co2_value))
  ok <- is.finite(x)
  if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
  idx <- which(ok)[which.min(abs(x[ok] - target_value))]
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(curve_df$p[[idx]]))
}

comparison_relative_gap <- function(abg_value, vbg_value) {
  ifelse(
    is.finite(vbg_value) & abs(vbg_value) > 0,
    (abg_value - vbg_value) / abs(vbg_value),
    NA_real_
  )
}

probability_method_comparison_summary <- tidyr::crossing(
  outcome = cat3_outcomes,
  level = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),
  probability_method = levels(probability_method_comparison_curves$probability_method)
) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_target = dplyr::case_when(
      level == "Low" ~ ABG_CO2_LOW,
      level == "Normal" ~ co2_ref_abg_mi,
      TRUE ~ ABG_CO2_HIGH
    ),
    vbg_target = dplyr::case_when(
      level == "Low" ~ VBG_CO2_LOW,
      level == "Normal" ~ co2_ref_vbg_mi,
      TRUE ~ VBG_CO2_HIGH
    ),
    abg_probability = comparison_nearest_probability(probability_method, "ABG", outcome, abg_target),
    vbg_probability = comparison_nearest_probability(probability_method, "VBG", outcome, vbg_target),
    absolute_gap = abg_probability - vbg_probability,
    relative_gap = comparison_relative_gap(abg_probability, vbg_probability),
    outcome_label = as.character(normalize_key_results_outcome(outcome, context = "probability comparison summary"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome, outcome_label, level, probability_method,
    abg_target, vbg_target, abg_probability, vbg_probability,
    absolute_gap, relative_gap
  )
write_csv_safely(
  probability_method_comparison_summary,
  results_path("probability_method_comparison_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

probability_method_comparison_plot_df <- probability_method_comparison_curves |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$outcome %in% c("imv_proc", "niv_proc")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(as.character(.data$outcome_label), levels = c("IMV", "NIV")),
    group = factor(as.character(.data$group), levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
  )
probability_method_comparison_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  probability_method_comparison_plot_df,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$co2_value, y = .data$p, color = .data$probability_method,
               linetype = .data$probability_method)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.65) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(outcome_label ~ group, scales = "free_x") +
  ggplot2::scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Predicted probability methods for NIV and IMV",
    subtitle = "Conditional reference profiles vs common reference profile vs common-source marginal standardization",
    x = expression(CO[2]~"(mmHg)"),
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Method",
    linetype = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10) +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
probability_method_comparison_png <- results_path("figs", "probability_method_comparison.png")
probability_method_comparison_pdf <- results_path("figs", "probability_method_comparison.pdf")
save_diag_plot(probability_method_comparison_plot, probability_method_comparison_png, width = 8.5, height = 5.6)
save_diag_plot(probability_method_comparison_plot, probability_method_comparison_pdf, width = 8.5, height = 5.6)
register_plot_file("probability_method_comparison", probability_method_comparison_png)

record_standardization_status(
  "probability_method_comparison",
  "completed",
  "Generated comparison curves and gap summary for conditional X_ref, common reference, and common-source marginal standardized probabilities.",
  "Results/probability_method_comparison_summary.csv; Results/figs/probability_method_comparison.png"
)

manuscript_probability_output_map <- probability_generation_inventory |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    old_probability_method = .data$current_method,
    new_probability_method = dplyr::if_else(
      .data$manuscript_facing & .data$needs_conversion,
      "common_source_marginal_standardized",
      .data$current_method
    ),
    updated = .data$manuscript_facing & .data$needs_conversion
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    artifact, analysis_family,
    old_probability_method, new_probability_method,
    manuscript_facing, updated
  )
write_csv_safely(
  manuscript_probability_output_map,
  results_path("manuscript_probability_output_map.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_standardization_status(
  "manuscript_probability_output_map",
  "completed",
  "Manuscript-facing primary probability outputs now map to common-source marginal standardized predictions.",
  "Results/manuscript_probability_output_map.csv"
)

```

```{r mi-single-pass-finalize}
#| code-block-title: "MI single-pass output finalization"
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
write_csv_safely(abg_curves, results_path("mi_spline_curve_abg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(abg_prob_curves, results_path("mi_spline_prob_curve_abg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(abg_coefs,  results_path("mi_spline_coef_abg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(vbg_curves, results_path("mi_spline_curve_vbg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(vbg_prob_curves, results_path("mi_spline_prob_curve_vbg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(vbg_coefs,  results_path("mi_spline_coef_vbg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(abg_cat_prob_curves, results_path("mi_cat3_prob_curve_abg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(vbg_cat_prob_curves, results_path("mi_cat3_prob_curve_vbg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(
  dplyr::bind_rows(standardization_validation_rows),
  results_path("standardization_validation_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

mi_single_pass_t1 <- Sys.time()
stopifnot(exists("runtime_log"))
runtime_log <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  runtime_log,
  data.frame(
    step_name = "mi_single_pass",
    seconds = as.numeric(difftime(mi_single_pass_t1, mi_single_pass_t0, units = "secs")),
    start_time = as.character(mi_single_pass_t0),
    end_time = as.character(mi_single_pass_t1),
    notes = paste0("m=", imp_n),
    run_id = runtime_run_id,
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    n_subset = nrow(subset_data),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)

mi_single_pass_done <- TRUE
```

```{r mi-propensity-abg}

stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"))
message("ABG MI weights were computed in the single-pass MI loop above.")

```

```{r}
#| label: mi-weight-diagnostics-abg
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "asis"
# Weight diagnostics for ABG IPW across imputations
stopifnot(exists("mi_weight_diag_abg"))
mi_weight_diag_abg_df <- dplyr::as_tibble(mi_weight_diag_abg)
mi_weight_diag_abg_df <- dplyr::mutate(
  mi_weight_diag_abg_df,
  dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))
)
mi_weight_diag_abg_sum <- mi_weight_diag_abg_df |>
  dplyr::summarise(dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~ stats::median(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  round(mi_weight_diag_abg_sum, 3),
  caption = "ABG MI-logistic IPSW weight diagnostics (median across imputations)",
  file_stub = "mi_weight_diag_abg_summary",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)
stopifnot(all(is.finite(mi_weight_diag_abg_df$ess)))
```

### Balance diagnostics across imputations

```{r target-balance-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "Target balance helpers (treated vs target)"
# Purpose: target balance helpers.
stopifnot(exists("target_balance_table"))

# Use a fixed x-axis max so ABG/VBG balance plots are directly comparable.
```

```{r mi-balance-abg}
#| code-block-title: "MI target balance (ABG)"
# Purpose: mi balance abg.
stopifnot(exists("bal_imp_abg"))

bal_abg_pooled <- bal_imp_abg$bal_long |>
  mutate(label = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level))) |>
  group_by(label) |>
  summarise(
    pre_med = median(abs(smd_pre), na.rm = TRUE),
    post_med = median(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    pre_mean = mean(abs(smd_pre), na.rm = TRUE),
    post_mean = mean(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    post_max = max(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bal_abg_plot <- bal_abg_pooled |>
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = label[order(post_med, decreasing = TRUE)])) |>
  pivot_longer(c(pre_med, post_med), names_to = "type", values_to = "smd") |>
  mutate(type = recode(type, pre_med = "Pre", post_med = "Post"))

p_abg <- ggplot(bal_abg_plot, aes(x = smd, y = label, shape = type)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "MI target balance (ABG): pooled |SMD|", x = "|Target SMD|", y = NULL, shape = "Stage") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, BAL_XLIM_MAX),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)
save_diag_plot(p_abg, results_path("figs", "diag-mi-balance-pooled-abg.png"), width = 7, height = 6)

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  bal_imp_abg$worst_rows_overall,
  caption = "ABG MI-logistic IPSW target SMD rows across imputations (sorted by |SMD|)",
  file_stub = "abg_worst_target_smd_rows",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)

abg_imp_summary <- bal_imp_abg$bal_imp_summary |>
  summarise(
    med = median(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90 = quantile(max_abs_post, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  abg_imp_summary,
  caption = "ABG MI-logistic IPSW max |Target SMD| summary across imputations",
  file_stub = "abg_target_smd_summary",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)
```

## Weighted outcome models within each imputation + pooling

Within each imputation, fit covariate-adjusted CO2 spline outcome models **only in the measured cohort** (has_abg==1 for PaCO2; has_vbg==1 for VBG CO2), using IPSW weights to address nonrandom testing. Curves are pooled pointwise across imputations (Rubin's rules on the log-OR scale) and displayed as odds ratios relative to CO2_ref at a reference covariate profile.

### Helper: fit + extract log-OR and SE from svyglm

```{r mi-pool-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "MI outcome helpers (defined in single-pass MI section)"
# Purpose: mi pool helpers.
stopifnot(exists("fit_spline_imp"), exists("pool_spline_curve"),
          exists("pool_spline_prob_curve"),
          exists("pool_spline_coefs"), exists("pool_terms"))
```

```{r mi-abg-outcomes}
# Purpose: mi abg outcomes.
stopifnot(exists("mi_single_pass_done"), isTRUE(mi_single_pass_done))
stopifnot(exists("abg_spline"), exists("abg_curves"), exists("abg_prob_curves"), exists("abg_coefs"))
message("ABG MI spline results were computed in the single-pass MI loop above.")
```

### VBG: MI pooled spline models (treated cohort only)

## Explainability

```{r shap-top10-mi-logistic}
#| code-block-title: "MI logistic IPSW: top 10 features by mean absolute contribution (ABG vs VBG)"
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: shap top10 mi logistic.
# MI logistic models are linear on the log-odds scale, so we compute
# contribution magnitudes from centered design-matrix terms and aggregate
# to parent features.
stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"), exists("mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list"))

mi_shap_abg_file <- results_path("shap_top10_mi_logistic_abg.csv")
mi_shap_vbg_file <- results_path("shap_top10_mi_logistic_vbg.csv")
mi_shap_stability_file <- results_path("diag-ps-shap-stability.csv")
mi_shap_error_file <- results_path("diag_mi_shap_errors.csv")
mi_shap_method_file <- results_path("diag_mi_shap_method_used.csv")
mi_shap_diag_file <- results_path("mi_shap_imp_diagnostics.csv")

# helper: return an empty MI SHAP summary with the same schema as the populated
# outputs so downstream code can stay simple.
make_empty_mi_shap <- function() {
  data.frame(feature = character(), mean_abs_shap = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

# helper: approximate per-feature contribution magnitudes for one MI logistic
# propensity model using a sampled model matrix on the link scale.
calc_mi_glm_contrib <- function(meta, d_ps, feature_names, imp_index, group_label,
                                sample_n = MI_SHAP_SAMPLE_N,
                                max_terms = MI_SHAP_MAX_TERMS) {
  # Memory-safe contribution approximation for GLM PS:
  # sample rows first, build sparse model matrix, then aggregate |contribution|
  # by feature without constructing a full-N dense matrix.
  diag_row <- data.frame(
    imp = imp_index,
    group = group_label,
    sample_n = NA_integer_,
    n_terms_used = NA_integer_,
    seconds = NA_real_,
    vcells_pre_mb = NA_real_,
    vcells_post_mb = NA_real_,
    method_used = "sparse_sampled_glm_link",
    ok = FALSE,
    error_msg = NA_character_,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  t0 <- Sys.time()
  mem_pre <- get_vcells_stats()
  diag_row$vcells_pre_mb <- mem_pre$gc_vcells_used_mb

  err_msg <- NA_character_
  out <- tryCatch({
    if (is.null(meta$formula) || is.null(meta$coef) || !length(meta$coef)) {
      stop("Missing formula/coefficients in MI PS metadata.")
    }

    n_all <- nrow(d_ps)
    n_use <- min(as.integer(sample_n), n_all)
    if (!is.finite(n_use) || n_use < 2L) {
      stop("Insufficient rows available for MI SHAP sample.")
    }
    seed_offset <- if (toupper(group_label) == "ABG") 10000L else 20000L
    set.seed(20251206L + as.integer(imp_index) + seed_offset)
    idx <- if (n_all > n_use) sample.int(n_all, size = n_use, replace = FALSE) else seq_len(n_all)
    d_sample <- d_ps[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    diag_row$sample_n <- n_use

    form <- stats::as.formula(meta$formula)
    mm_model <- NULL
    mm_mode <- "dense_model_matrix"
    if (requireNamespace("Matrix", quietly = TRUE)) {
      mm_sparse_try <- tryCatch(
        Matrix::sparse.model.matrix(form, data = d_sample),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (!is.null(mm_sparse_try)) {
        mm_model <- mm_sparse_try
        mm_mode <- "sparse_sampled_glm_link"
      }
    }
    if (is.null(mm_model)) {
      mm_model <- stats::model.matrix(form, data = d_sample)
      mm_mode <- "dense_sampled_glm_link"
    }
    diag_row$method_used <- mm_mode

    coef_vec <- meta$coef
    canon_term <- function(x) {
      x <- gsub("`", "", x, fixed = TRUE)
      gsub("\\s+", "", x, perl = TRUE)
    }
    mm_terms <- colnames(mm_model)
    coef_terms <- names(coef_vec)
    mm_key <- canon_term(mm_terms)
    coef_key <- canon_term(coef_terms)
    coef_pos <- setNames(seq_along(coef_terms), coef_key)
    keep_mm <- which(mm_key %in% names(coef_pos) & mm_terms != "(Intercept)")
    if (!length(keep_mm)) {
      stop("No overlapping terms between sparse design matrix and coefficient vector.")
    }

    mm_model <- mm_model[, keep_mm, drop = FALSE]
    diag_row$n_terms_used <- ncol(mm_model)
    if (is.finite(max_terms) && ncol(mm_model) > as.integer(max_terms)) {
      stop(
        "MI SHAP term count (", ncol(mm_model), ") exceeded MI_SHAP_MAX_TERMS (",
        as.integer(max_terms), ")."
      )
    }

    mm_terms_kept <- colnames(mm_model)
    mm_keys_kept <- canon_term(mm_terms_kept)
    coef_idx <- coef_pos[mm_keys_kept]
    beta <- as.numeric(coef_vec[coef_idx])
    names(beta) <- mm_terms_kept
    mu <- colMeans(mm_model, na.rm = TRUE)
    abs_beta <- abs(beta)
    term_abs <- vapply(
      seq_len(ncol(mm_model)),
      function(j) {
        xj <- mm_model[, j]
        if (!is.numeric(xj)) xj <- as.numeric(xj)
        mean(abs(xj - mu[j]), na.rm = TRUE) * abs_beta[j]
      },
      numeric(1)
    )
    names(term_abs) <- colnames(mm_model)
    rm(mm_model, mu, abs_beta)
    invisible(gc())

    out_tbl <- data.frame(
      term = names(term_abs),
      mean_abs = as.numeric(term_abs),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(feature = vapply(term, term_to_parent_feature, character(1), feature_names = feature_names)) |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(feature)) |>
      dplyr::group_by(feature) |>
      dplyr::summarise(mean_abs_shap = sum(mean_abs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    if (!nrow(out_tbl)) {
      stop("No feature-mapped terms remained after contribution aggregation.")
    }
    out_tbl
  }, error = function(e) {
    err_msg <<- conditionMessage(e)
    make_empty_mi_shap()
  })

  mem_post <- get_vcells_stats()
  diag_row$vcells_post_mb <- mem_post$gc_vcells_used_mb
  diag_row$seconds <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "secs"))
  diag_row$ok <- nrow(out) > 0
  if (!isTRUE(diag_row$ok) && is.na(diag_row$error_msg)) {
    diag_row$error_msg <- err_msg
  }

  list(data = out, diag = diag_row)
}

# helper: fall back to absolute pooled coefficient magnitudes when sampled
# contribution calculations fail or are intentionally skipped.
calc_mi_coef_fallback <- function(meta_list, feature_names, group_label, top_n = SHAP_TOP_N) {
  # Fallback ranking using absolute coefficients if contribution matrix
  # cannot be computed (keeps figure/table generation robust).
  coef_rows <- lapply(seq_along(meta_list), function(i) {
    coef_vec <- meta_list[[i]]$coef
    if (is.null(coef_vec) || !length(coef_vec)) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      imp = i,
      term = names(coef_vec),
      mean_abs = abs(as.numeric(coef_vec)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  coef_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(coef_rows)
  if (!nrow(coef_df)) {
    return(data.frame(feature = character(), mean_abs_shap = numeric(), group = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  }
  coef_df |>
    dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") |>
    dplyr::mutate(feature = vapply(term, term_to_parent_feature, character(1), feature_names = feature_names)) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(feature)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(feature) |>
    dplyr::summarise(mean_abs_shap = mean(mean_abs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mean_abs_shap)) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group = group_label)
}

if (RUN_SHAP) {
  # Streaming accumulator avoids storing per-imputation SHAP tables in memory.
  update_feature_accum <- function(accum, contrib_df) {
    if (!nrow(contrib_df)) return(accum)
    vals <- stats::setNames(contrib_df$mean_abs_shap, contrib_df$feature)
    feats <- names(vals)
    new_feats <- setdiff(feats, names(accum$sum))
    if (length(new_feats)) {
      accum$sum[new_feats] <- 0
      accum$count[new_feats] <- 0
    }
    accum$sum[feats] <- accum$sum[feats] + vals
    accum$count[feats] <- accum$count[feats] + 1L
    accum
  }
  finalize_feature_accum <- function(accum, group_label) {
    if (!length(accum$sum)) {
      return(data.frame(feature = character(), mean_abs_shap = numeric(), group = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
    }
    keep <- accum$count > 0
    data.frame(
      feature = names(accum$sum)[keep],
      mean_abs_shap = as.numeric(accum$sum[keep] / accum$count[keep]),
      group = group_label,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) |>
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mean_abs_shap)) |>
      dplyr::slice_head(n = SHAP_TOP_N)
  }

  accum_abg <- list(sum = numeric(0), count = numeric(0))
  accum_vbg <- list(sum = numeric(0), count = numeric(0))
  mi_shap_diag_rows <- list()
  mi_shap_error_rows <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
    d_i <- get_imp(i)
    d_ps <- d_i[, c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars_ps), drop = FALSE]
    d_ps <- normalize_types(d_ps, levels_ref)
    d_ps <- droplevels_all(d_ps)

    abg_res <- calc_mi_glm_contrib(
      mi_logistic_ps_abg_list[[i]], d_ps, covars_ps,
      imp_index = i, group_label = "ABG",
      sample_n = MI_SHAP_SAMPLE_N, max_terms = MI_SHAP_MAX_TERMS
    )
    mi_shap_diag_rows[[length(mi_shap_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- abg_res$diag
    if (!isTRUE(abg_res$diag$ok)) {
      mi_shap_error_rows[[length(mi_shap_error_rows) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
        imp = i, group = "ABG", error_msg = abg_res$diag$error_msg,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    accum_abg <- update_feature_accum(accum_abg, abg_res$data)

    vbg_res <- calc_mi_glm_contrib(
      mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list[[i]], d_ps, covars_ps,
      imp_index = i, group_label = "VBG",
      sample_n = MI_SHAP_SAMPLE_N, max_terms = MI_SHAP_MAX_TERMS
    )
    mi_shap_diag_rows[[length(mi_shap_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- vbg_res$diag
    if (!isTRUE(vbg_res$diag$ok)) {
      mi_shap_error_rows[[length(mi_shap_error_rows) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
        imp = i, group = "VBG", error_msg = vbg_res$diag$error_msg,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    accum_vbg <- update_feature_accum(accum_vbg, vbg_res$data)

    rm(d_i, d_ps, abg_res, vbg_res)
    invisible(gc())
  }

  mi_shap_top_abg <- finalize_feature_accum(accum_abg, "ABG")
  mi_shap_top_vbg <- finalize_feature_accum(accum_vbg, "VBG")

  used_method_abg <- "sparse_sampled_glm_link"
  used_method_vbg <- "sparse_sampled_glm_link"
  if (nrow(mi_shap_top_abg) == 0L && isTRUE(MI_SHAP_FAIL_OPEN)) {
    mi_shap_top_abg <- calc_mi_coef_fallback(mi_logistic_ps_abg_list, covars_ps, "ABG")
    used_method_abg <- "coef_fallback"
  }
  if (nrow(mi_shap_top_vbg) == 0L && isTRUE(MI_SHAP_FAIL_OPEN)) {
    mi_shap_top_vbg <- calc_mi_coef_fallback(mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list, covars_ps, "VBG")
    used_method_vbg <- "coef_fallback"
  }

  mi_shap_diag_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_shap_diag_rows)
  mi_shap_error_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_shap_error_rows)
  infer_primary_method <- function(diag_df, grp, fallback_method) {
    if (identical(fallback_method, "coef_fallback")) return("coef_fallback")
    diag_grp <- diag_df |>
      dplyr::filter(group == grp, ok %in% TRUE, !is.na(method_used), nzchar(method_used))
    if (!nrow(diag_grp)) return(fallback_method)
    names(sort(table(diag_grp$method_used), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
  }
  used_method_abg <- infer_primary_method(mi_shap_diag_df, "ABG", used_method_abg)
  used_method_vbg <- infer_primary_method(mi_shap_diag_df, "VBG", used_method_vbg)
  mi_shap_method_df <- data.frame(
    group = c("ABG", "VBG"),
    method_used = c(used_method_abg, used_method_vbg),
    n_success = c(
      sum(mi_shap_diag_df$group == "ABG" & (mi_shap_diag_df$ok %in% TRUE), na.rm = TRUE),
      sum(mi_shap_diag_df$group == "VBG" & (mi_shap_diag_df$ok %in% TRUE), na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    fallback_used = c(used_method_abg == "coef_fallback", used_method_vbg == "coef_fallback"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_diag_df, mi_shap_diag_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_error_df, mi_shap_error_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_method_df, mi_shap_method_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_top_abg, mi_shap_abg_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_top_vbg, mi_shap_vbg_file, row_names = FALSE)

  mi_shap_stability <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_shap_top_abg, mi_shap_top_vbg) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      cohort = group,
      feature = feature,
      mean_abs_seed1 = mean_abs_shap,
      mean_abs_seed2 = mean_abs_shap,
      run_id = diag_run_id
    )
  write_csv_safely(mi_shap_stability, mi_shap_stability_file, row_names = FALSE)

  mi_shap_plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_shap_top_abg, mi_shap_top_vbg)
  if (nrow(mi_shap_plot_df) > 0) {
    p_shap_mi <- plot_shap_top10_two_panel(
      mi_shap_plot_df,
      "MI logistic IPSW: top 10 features by mean absolute contribution",
      "Mean absolute contribution on link scale"
    )
    shap_file <- results_path("figs", "shap-top10-mi-logistic-abg-vbg.png")
    save_diag_plot(p_shap_mi, shap_file, width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 300)
    register_plot_file("shap-top10-mi-logistic-abg-vbg", shap_file)
  }

  rm(
    accum_abg, accum_vbg, mi_shap_diag_rows, mi_shap_error_rows,
    mi_shap_diag_df, mi_shap_error_df, mi_shap_method_df,
    mi_shap_plot_df, mi_shap_stability, mi_shap_top_abg, mi_shap_top_vbg
  )
  invisible(gc())
} else {
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_diag_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_error_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_method_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_abg_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_vbg_file, row_names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safely(data.frame(), mi_shap_stability_file, row_names = FALSE)
}
```

## MI three-level PCO2 helpers and checks

```{r}
#| label: mi_pco2_threelevel
#| message: false
# Purpose: chunk.
stopifnot(exists("pool_terms"))
message("MI 3-level helpers defined in the single-pass MI section.")
```

```{r}
#| label: mi-co2-cat-checks
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Three-level CO2 category sanity: per-imputation overlap for ABG/VBG
stopifnot(exists("imp"))
stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"), exists("mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list"))
imp_n <- imp$m

# helper: verify that each imputation still has at least two observed CO2
# categories within the tested cohort before categorical modeling proceeds.
check_cat <- function(d, co2, grp, low_cut, high_cut) {
  x   <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[co2]]))
  fac <- make_co2_cat3(x, low_cut, high_cut)
  tab <- table(fac, useNA = "ifany")
  message(grp, ": ", paste(names(tab), tab, collapse = " | "))
  obs_levels <- names(tab)[!is.na(names(tab))]
  stopifnot(sum(tab[obs_levels] > 0) >= 2)
}

invisible(lapply(seq_len(imp_n), function(i) {
  di <- get_imp(i)
  stopifnot("paco2" %in% names(di))
  check_cat(di[di$has_abg == 1, , drop = FALSE], "paco2",
            sprintf("ABG imp %d", i), low_cut = ABG_CO2_LOW, high_cut = ABG_CO2_HIGH)
}))

invisible(lapply(seq_len(imp_n), function(i) {
  di <- get_imp(i)
  stopifnot("vbg_co2" %in% names(di))
  check_cat(di[di$has_vbg == 1, , drop = FALSE], "vbg_co2",
            sprintf("VBG imp %d", i), low_cut = VBG_CO2_LOW, high_cut = VBG_CO2_HIGH)
}))
```

## MI + IPW three-level PCO2 (ABG & VBG)

### ABG: MI + IPW, three-level PCO2 outcomes

```{r}
#| label: mi-ipw-abg-threelevel
#| code-block-title: "ABG: MI + IPW three-level PCO2"
# Purpose: chunk.
stopifnot(exists("mi_single_pass_done"), isTRUE(mi_single_pass_done))
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"))

mi_abg_cat_forms <- list(
  "MI IPW ABG 3-level: IMV ~ CO2 category + X"      = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "imv_proc"),
  "MI IPW ABG 3-level: NIV ~ CO2 category + X"      = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "niv_proc"),
  "MI IPW ABG 3-level: Death60d ~ CO2 category + X" = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "death_60d"),
  "MI IPW ABG 3-level: HCRF ~ CO2 category + X"     = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "hypercap_resp_failure")
)
register_model_diagrams(mi_abg_cat_forms)
message("ABG MI 3-level results were computed in the single-pass MI loop above.")
```

```{r}
stopifnot(exists("mi_single_pass_done"), isTRUE(mi_single_pass_done))

mi_vbg_cat_forms <- list(
  "MI IPW VBG 3-level: IMV ~ CO2 category + X"      = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "imv_proc"),
  "MI IPW VBG 3-level: NIV ~ CO2 category + X"      = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "niv_proc"),
  "MI IPW VBG 3-level: Death60d ~ CO2 category + X" = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "death_60d"),
  "MI IPW VBG 3-level: HCRF ~ CO2 category + X"     = reformulate(c("co2_cat", adj_core), response = "hypercap_resp_failure")
)
register_model_diagrams(mi_vbg_cat_forms)
message("VBG MI 3-level results were computed in the single-pass MI loop above.")
```

### MI-pooled IPW associations (3-level CO2)

```{r table3-ipw-mi-co2}
#| code-block-title: "Primary IPW associations (MI-pooled)"
#| echo: true
#| message: false

# Purpose: table3 ipw mi co2.
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"), exists("vbg_cat_results"))

mi_threelevel_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(method = "IPW + MI adjusted")
write_csv_safely(mi_threelevel_results, results_path("mi_threelevel_results.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

table3_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    exposure = gsub("^co2_cat", "", term),
    contrast = dplyr::recode(exposure,
                             Low  = "Low vs normal",
                             High = "High vs normal",
                             .default    = exposure),
    outcome_label = dplyr::recode(
      outcome,
      IMV      = "IMV",
      NIV      = "NIV",
      Death60d = "Death (60d)",
      HCRF     = "Hypercapnic RF"
    ),
    or_ci = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", OR, LCL, UCL)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(group, outcome_label, contrast, or_ci)

table3_wide <- table3_df |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = contrast, values_from = or_ci) |>
  arrange_key_results_outcome_group(
    outcome_col = "outcome_label",
    group_col = "group"
  )

gt::gt(table3_wide) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = "MI-pooled MI-logistic IPSW associations between CO2 category and outcomes (adjusted)") |>
  gt::cols_label(
    group           = "Cohort",
    outcome_label   = "Outcome",
    `Low vs normal` = "Low vs normal OR (95% CI)",
    `High vs normal`= "High vs normal OR (95% CI)"
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_missing(columns = gt::everything(), missing_text = "-") |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    paste0(
      "Weighted survey GLMs adjusted for baseline covariates; weights = MI-specific GLM (RCS) IPW; m = ", M_IMP,
      " imputations (seed ", MI_SEED, "); reference = Normal."
    )
  )
```

### Ratio of odds ratios: ABG versus VBG categorical associations

```{r ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3}
#| code-block-title: "Ratio of odds ratios: ABG versus VBG MI-pooled categorical associations"
#| include: false
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| message: false

# Purpose: estimate ABG/VBG ratios of the primary MI-logistic IPSW categorical
# odds ratios without refitting outcome models. The interval uses the pooled
# log-OR standard errors already returned by Rubin pooling. ABG/VBG covariance
# is not available from the separately pooled fits, so the standard error treats
# the two pooled log-OR estimates as independent.
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"), exists("vbg_cat_results"))

ror_outcome_levels <- c("IMV", "NIV", "Death60d", "HCRF")
ror_outcome_display <- c(
  IMV = "IMV",
  NIV = "NIV",
  Death60d = "Death (60d)",
  HCRF = "Hypercapnic RF"
)
ror_contrast_levels <- c("Low vs normal", "High vs normal")

label_ror_outcome <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- as.character(x)
  out <- unname(ror_outcome_display[x_chr])
  out[is.na(out)] <- x_chr[is.na(out)]
  out
}

normalize_cat3_ror_input <- function(df, group_label) {
  required_cols <- c("term", "outcome", "OR", "LCL", "UCL", "logOR", "SE")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols)) {
    stop(
      "Missing required pooled categorical columns for ", group_label, ": ",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  out <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = group_label,
      term = gsub("`", "", as.character(.data$term)),
      outcome = as.character(.data$outcome),
      contrast = dplyr::case_when(
        .data$term == "co2_catLow" ~ "Low vs normal",
        .data$term == "co2_catHigh" ~ "High vs normal",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      contrast = factor(.data$contrast, levels = ror_contrast_levels),
      outcome = factor(.data$outcome, levels = ror_outcome_levels)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$contrast), !is.na(.data$outcome)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = as.character(.data$outcome),
      contrast = as.character(.data$contrast),
      OR = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$OR)),
      LCL = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$LCL)),
      UCL = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$UCL)),
      logOR = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$logOR)),
      SE = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$SE))
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      dplyr::all_of(c("group", "outcome", "contrast", "OR", "LCL", "UCL", "logOR", "SE"))
    )

  bad_rows <- out |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.finite(.data$OR) | !is.finite(.data$LCL) | !is.finite(.data$UCL) |
        !is.finite(.data$logOR) | !is.finite(.data$SE) |
        .data$OR <= 0 | .data$LCL <= 0 | .data$UCL <= 0 | .data$SE < 0
    )
  if (nrow(bad_rows)) {
    stop(
      "Non-finite or invalid pooled categorical rows for ", group_label,
      "; cannot compute ratio of odds ratios.",
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  out
}

build_cat3_ratio_of_odds_ratios <- function(abg_results, vbg_results) {
  ror_input <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    normalize_cat3_ror_input(abg_results, "ABG"),
    normalize_cat3_ror_input(vbg_results, "VBG")
  )

  expected_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    outcome = ror_outcome_levels,
    contrast = ror_contrast_levels,
    group = c("ABG", "VBG")
  )
  missing_grid <- dplyr::anti_join(
    expected_grid,
    ror_input,
    by = c("outcome", "contrast", "group")
  )
  if (nrow(missing_grid)) {
    stop(
      "Missing categorical OR rows needed for ratio-of-odds-ratios analysis: ",
      paste(
        paste(missing_grid$group, missing_grid$outcome, missing_grid$contrast, sep = " / "),
        collapse = "; "
      ),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  ror_input |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = "group",
      values_from = c("OR", "LCL", "UCL", "logOR", "SE"),
      names_sep = "_"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = factor(.data$outcome, levels = ror_outcome_levels),
      contrast = factor(.data$contrast, levels = ror_contrast_levels),
      log_ror = .data$logOR_ABG - .data$logOR_VBG,
      se_log_ror = sqrt(.data$SE_ABG^2 + .data$SE_VBG^2),
      ror = exp(.data$log_ror),
      ror_lcl = exp(.data$log_ror - 1.96 * .data$se_log_ror),
      ror_ucl = exp(.data$log_ror + 1.96 * .data$se_log_ror),
      z = dplyr::if_else(.data$se_log_ror > 0, .data$log_ror / .data$se_log_ror, NA_real_),
      p_value = dplyr::if_else(
        is.finite(.data$z),
        2 * stats::pnorm(abs(.data$z), lower.tail = FALSE),
        NA_real_
      ),
      outcome_label = label_ror_outcome(.data$outcome),
      abg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_ABG, .data$LCL_ABG, .data$UCL_ABG),
      vbg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_VBG, .data$LCL_VBG, .data$UCL_VBG),
      ror_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$ror, .data$ror_lcl, .data$ror_ucl),
      covariance_assumption = "ABG/VBG pooled log-OR covariance unavailable; CI treats model estimates as independent."
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$outcome, .data$contrast) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = as.character(.data$outcome),
      contrast = as.character(.data$contrast)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      dplyr::all_of(c(
        "outcome", "outcome_label", "contrast",
        "OR_ABG", "LCL_ABG", "UCL_ABG", "SE_ABG",
        "OR_VBG", "LCL_VBG", "UCL_VBG", "SE_VBG",
        "log_ror", "se_log_ror", "ror", "ror_lcl",
        "ror_ucl", "z", "p_value", "abg_or_ci",
        "vbg_or_ci", "ror_ci", "covariance_assumption"
      ))
    )
}

ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3 <- build_cat3_ratio_of_odds_ratios(
  abg_cat_results,
  vbg_cat_results
)

expected_ror_n <- length(ror_outcome_levels) * length(ror_contrast_levels)
stopifnot(nrow(ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3) == expected_ror_n)
stopifnot(all(is.finite(ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3$ror)))
stopifnot(all(ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3$ror_lcl > 0))
stopifnot(all(ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3$ror_ucl > 0))
stopifnot(all(ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3$ror_lcl <= ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3$ror_ucl))

write_csv_safely(
  ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3,
  results_path("ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE,
  required_cols = c(
    "outcome", "outcome_label", "contrast", "OR_ABG", "OR_VBG",
    "ror", "ror_lcl", "ror_ucl", "p_value", "covariance_assumption"
  )
)

ratio_of_odds_ratios_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "input_schema",
    "expected_contrasts",
    "finite_estimates",
    "covariance_assumption"
  ),
  status = "completed",
  detail = c(
    "ABG and VBG pooled categorical result objects included term, outcome, OR, LCL, UCL, logOR, and SE.",
    paste0("Computed ", expected_ror_n, " rows: four outcomes by low/high categorical contrasts."),
    "All ratio-of-odds-ratios estimates and confidence limits were finite and positive.",
    "Confidence intervals treat ABG and VBG pooled log-OR estimates as independent because cross-model covariance is not estimated."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  ratio_of_odds_ratios_status,
  results_path("ratio_of_odds_ratios_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ratio_of_odds_ratios_display <- ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3 |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Contrast = .data$contrast,
    `ABG OR (95% CI)` = .data$abg_or_ci,
    `VBG OR (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_or_ci,
    `ABG/VBG ratio of ORs (95% CI)` = .data$ror_ci,
    `P value` = format.pval(.data$p_value, digits = 2, eps = 0.001),
    `CI method note` = "Independent pooled log-OR assumption"
  )

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  ratio_of_odds_ratios_display,
  caption = "Ratio of odds ratios comparing ABG versus VBG MI-pooled categorical associations",
  file_stub = "ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3_display",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 4,
  landscape = TRUE,
  show = TRUE
)
```

```{r or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3}
#| include: false
#| eval: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-pos: "H"

# Purpose: plot the ratio of odds ratios from the primary MI-logistic IPSW
# categorical models. Values above one indicate larger categorical ORs in the
# ABG-tested cohort than in the VBG-tested cohort.
stopifnot(exists("ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3"))

ror_plot_df <- ratio_of_odds_ratios_mi_ipw_cat3 |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(
      .data$outcome_label,
      levels = unname(ror_outcome_display[ror_outcome_levels])
    ),
    contrast = factor(.data$contrast, levels = ror_contrast_levels)
  )
ror_axis_spec <- compute_or_axis_spec(
  ror_plot_df,
  lo_col = "ror_lcl",
  hi_col = "ror_ucl",
  default_limits = c(0.25, 4)
)

ror_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  ror_plot_df,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$ror, y = .data$contrast, color = .data$contrast)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_segment(
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$ror_lcl, xend = .data$ror_ucl, yend = .data$contrast),
    linewidth = 0.45,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 1.9) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Low vs normal" = "#0072B2", "High vs normal" = "#D55E00"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  or_axis_scale_x(ror_axis_spec) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "ABG/VBG ratio of odds ratios from MI-pooled categorical models",
    x = "Ratio of odds ratios (log scale)",
    y = "PCO2 contrast",
    caption = "Intervals treat separately pooled ABG and VBG log-OR estimates as independent."
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

print_plot_once(ror_plot, "or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3", width = 8, height = 4.8)
if (!isTRUE(VALIDATION_INLINE_ANALYSIS_PREVIEWS)) {
  render_inline_graphic(results_path("figs", "or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3.png"))
}
```

### Covariance-aware VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios

The executable stacked-ROR scientific code is shown below in bounded chunks. Cleanup, export, and validation wrappers remain hidden so the PDF exposes the modeling path without printing a LaTeX-breaking monolithic code block.

```{r stacked-ror-housekeeping}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR cleanup and legacy-output quarantine"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

# Purpose: estimate VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios with one stacked weighted
# interaction model per imputation and outcome. Dual-tested encounters
# contribute one ABG row and one VBG row sharing the same cluster id, so the
# model covariance carries through to the ROR interval.
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"), exists("vbg_cat_results"))
stopifnot(exists("get_imp"), exists("get_mi_weight"), exists("imp_n"))

stacked_ror_outcome_levels <- c("IMV", "NIV", "Death60d", "HCRF")
stacked_ror_outcome_display <- c(
  IMV = "IMV",
  NIV = "NIV",
  Death60d = "Death (60d)",
  HCRF = "Hypercapnic RF"
)
stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label <- c(
  imv_proc = "IMV",
  niv_proc = "NIV",
  death_60d = "Death60d",
  hypercap_resp_failure = "HCRF"
)
stacked_ror_contrast_levels <- c("Low vs normal", "High vs normal")
stacked_ror_required_cat_rows <- length(cat3_outcomes) * length(stacked_ror_contrast_levels)

legacy_independence_files <- c(
  "ror_legacy_independence_method_audit.csv",
  "stacked_ror_input_inventory.csv",
  "stacked_ror_id_availability_audit.csv",
  "stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_readout_grid.csv",
  "stacked_ror_dataset_summary.csv",
  "stacked_ror_cluster_strategy.csv",
  "stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics.csv",
  "stacked_ror_by_imputation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_by_imputation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_grid.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_by_imputation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc.csv",
  "ror_figure_interpretability_qc.csv",
  "stacked_ror_pooled.csv",
  "stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm.csv",
  "stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation.csv",
  "stacked_ror_validation_status.csv",
  "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3.csv",
  "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3.pdf",
  "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm.csv",
  "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm.pdf",
  "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_values.csv",
  "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_values.pdf",
  "table_s8_offset_scan_summary.csv",
  "table_s8_offset_scan_summary.pdf",
  "figs/or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3.png",
  "figs/or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3.pdf",
  "figs/figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis.png",
  "figs/figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis.pdf",
  "figs/figure_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend.png",
  "figs/figure_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend.pdf"
)
ror_legacy_independence_method_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  artifact = legacy_independence_files,
  exists_at_render = file.exists(results_path(legacy_independence_files)),
  status = "deprecated_not_manuscript_facing",
  replacement = dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_values", artifact) ~ "Deprecated stale Table S7 name; use table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm.",
    grepl("figs/or-plot-ratio-of-odds-ratios-mi-ipw-cat3", artifact) ~ "No categorical ROR replacement figure; use Table S6.",
    TRUE ~ "stacked covariance-aware ROR outputs"
  ),
  reason = "Prior separate-variance method replaced by stacked weighted interaction models."
)
write_csv_safely(
  ror_legacy_independence_method_audit,
  results_path("ror_legacy_independence_method_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r stacked-ror-data-clustering}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR data assembly and clustering"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

stacked_ror_label_outcome <- function(x) {
  out <- as.character(x)
  dplyr::recode(out, !!!stacked_ror_outcome_display, .default = out)
}

stacked_ror_patient_id_candidates <- c(
  "patient_id", "person_id", "pat_id", "mrn", "empi", "trinetx_patient_id",
  "member_id"
)
stacked_ror_encounter_id_candidates <- c(
  "encounter_id", "visit_id", "visitid", "csn", "har", "account_id"
)
stacked_ror_id_candidates <- c(
  stacked_ror_patient_id_candidates,
  stacked_ror_encounter_id_candidates
)

summarize_stacked_ror_id_source <- function(source_name, data_obj, reference_row_count) {
  if (!is.data.frame(data_obj)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      source_name = source_name,
      row_count = NA_integer_,
      reference_row_count = as.integer(reference_row_count),
      row_aligned = FALSE,
      id_role = c("patient", "encounter"),
      candidate_n = 0L,
      candidates_present = "",
      usable_candidate_n = 0L,
      usable_candidates = "",
      max_nonmissing_n = 0L,
      max_unique_id_n = 0L
    ))
  }
  role_candidates <- list(
    patient = stacked_ror_patient_id_candidates,
    encounter = stacked_ror_encounter_id_candidates
  )
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(role_candidates), function(id_role) {
    candidates <- intersect(role_candidates[[id_role]], names(data_obj))
    if (!length(candidates)) {
      return(tibble::tibble(
        source_name = source_name,
        row_count = nrow(data_obj),
        reference_row_count = as.integer(reference_row_count),
        row_aligned = nrow(data_obj) == reference_row_count,
        id_role = id_role,
        candidate_n = 0L,
        candidates_present = "",
        usable_candidate_n = 0L,
        usable_candidates = "",
        max_nonmissing_n = 0L,
        max_unique_id_n = 0L
      ))
    }
    candidate_stats <- tibble::tibble(column = candidates) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        nonmissing_n = vapply(.data$column, function(var) {
          vals <- trimws(as.character(data_obj[[var]]))
          sum(!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals))
        }, integer(1L)),
        unique_id_n = vapply(.data$column, function(var) {
          vals <- trimws(as.character(data_obj[[var]]))
          vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals)]
          length(unique(vals))
        }, integer(1L)),
        usable = .data$unique_id_n >= 2L
      )
    tibble::tibble(
      source_name = source_name,
      row_count = nrow(data_obj),
      reference_row_count = as.integer(reference_row_count),
      row_aligned = nrow(data_obj) == reference_row_count,
      id_role = id_role,
      candidate_n = length(candidates),
      candidates_present = paste(candidates, collapse = "; "),
      usable_candidate_n = sum(candidate_stats$usable, na.rm = TRUE),
      usable_candidates = paste(candidate_stats$column[candidate_stats$usable], collapse = "; "),
      max_nonmissing_n = max(candidate_stats$nonmissing_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_unique_id_n = max(candidate_stats$unique_id_n, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }))
}

choose_stacked_ror_id_source <- function(id_audit) {
  ranked <- id_audit |>
    dplyr::filter(
      .data$row_aligned,
      .data$usable_candidate_n > 0L,
      nzchar(.data$usable_candidates)
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      role_priority = dplyr::case_when(
        .data$id_role == "patient" ~ 1L,
        .data$id_role == "encounter" ~ 2L,
        TRUE ~ 9L
      ),
      source_priority = dplyr::case_when(
        .data$source_name == "imputation_input" ~ 1L,
        .data$source_name == "subset_data" ~ 2L,
        .data$source_name == "subset_data_raw" ~ 3L,
        TRUE ~ 9L
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$role_priority, .data$source_priority)
  if (!nrow(ranked)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      source_name = "source_row_id",
      id_role = "source_row_id",
      selected_candidate = NA_character_,
      carry_required = FALSE,
      selection_detail = "No row-aligned patient or encounter ID candidate with at least two unique nonmissing values was available."
    ))
  }
  selected <- ranked[1L, , drop = FALSE]
  selected_candidate <- strsplit(selected$usable_candidates[[1L]], ";\\s*")[[1L]][[1L]]
  tibble::tibble(
    source_name = selected$source_name[[1L]],
    id_role = selected$id_role[[1L]],
    selected_candidate = selected_candidate,
    carry_required = selected$source_name[[1L]] != "imputation_input",
    selection_detail = paste0(
      "Selected ", selected$id_role[[1L]], " ID candidate `", selected_candidate,
      "` from ", selected$source_name[[1L]], "."
    )
  )
}

attach_stacked_ror_id_columns <- function(data_i) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(data_i))
  if (
    !exists("stacked_ror_selected_id_source", inherits = TRUE) ||
      !is.data.frame(stacked_ror_selected_id_source) ||
      !nrow(stacked_ror_selected_id_source)
  ) {
    return(data_i)
  }
  selected_source <- stacked_ror_selected_id_source$source_name[[1L]]
  selected_candidate <- stacked_ror_selected_id_source$selected_candidate[[1L]]
  if (
    selected_source %in% c("source_row_id", "imputation_input") ||
      is.na(selected_candidate) ||
      !nzchar(selected_candidate)
  ) {
    return(data_i)
  }
  source_data <- switch(
    selected_source,
    subset_data = subset_data,
    subset_data_raw = subset_data_raw,
    stop("Unsupported stacked ROR ID source: ", selected_source)
  )
  if (!is.data.frame(source_data) || nrow(source_data) != nrow(data_i)) {
    stop("Selected stacked ROR ID source is not row-aligned at execution time: ", selected_source)
  }
  if (!selected_candidate %in% names(source_data)) {
    stop("Selected stacked ROR ID candidate is missing from source data: ", selected_candidate)
  }
  if (!selected_candidate %in% names(data_i)) {
    data_i[[selected_candidate]] <- source_data[[selected_candidate]]
  }
  data_i
}

make_stacked_gas_dataset <- function(data_i, outcome_var, adj_vars, id_vars = NULL,
                                     w_abg, w_vbg, imp_index = NA_integer_) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(data_i), outcome_var %in% names(data_i))
  stopifnot(length(w_abg) == nrow(data_i), length(w_vbg) == nrow(data_i))
  missing_adj <- setdiff(adj_vars, names(data_i))
  if (length(missing_adj)) {
    stop("Stacked ROR missing adjustment variables: ", paste(missing_adj, collapse = ", "))
  }
  id_vars <- intersect(id_vars, names(data_i))
  base_vars <- unique(c(adj_vars, id_vars))
  source_row_id <- seq_len(nrow(data_i))

  make_group_rows <- function(group_label, treat_var, co2_var, cat_var,
                              weights_vec, ref_value) {
    co2_value <- coerce_num(data_i[[co2_var]])
    outcome_value <- to01(data_i[[outcome_var]])
    keep <- to01(data_i[[treat_var]]) == 1L &
      is.finite(co2_value) &
      !is.na(outcome_value) &
      is.finite(weights_vec) &
      weights_vec > 0
    if (!any(keep)) {
      return(tibble::tibble())
    }
    out <- tibble::as_tibble(data_i[keep, base_vars, drop = FALSE])
    if (cat_var %in% names(data_i)) {
      co2_cat <- as.character(data_i[[cat_var]][keep])
    } else if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) {
      co2_cat <- as.character(make_co2_cat3(co2_value[keep], ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH))
    } else {
      co2_cat <- as.character(make_co2_cat3(co2_value[keep], VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH))
    }
    out$gas_type <- factor(group_label, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
    out$co2_cat <- factor(co2_cat, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
    out$pco2_value <- co2_value[keep]
    out$pco2_centered <- co2_value[keep] - ref_value
    out$analysis_weight <- as.numeric(weights_vec[keep])
    out$outcome <- outcome_value[keep]
    out$source_row_id <- source_row_id[keep]
    out$imputation <- as.integer(imp_index)
    out
  }

  stacked_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    make_group_rows("ABG", "has_abg", "paco2", "pco2_cat_abg", w_abg, ABG_CO2_REF),
    make_group_rows("VBG", "has_vbg", "vbg_co2", "pco2_cat_vbg", w_vbg, VBG_CO2_REF)
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data$outcome),
      !is.na(.data$co2_cat),
      is.finite(.data$pco2_value),
      is.finite(.data$pco2_centered),
      is.finite(.data$analysis_weight),
      .data$analysis_weight > 0
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      gas_type = factor(.data$gas_type, levels = c("ABG", "VBG")),
      co2_cat = factor(.data$co2_cat, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
    )
  droplevels_all(stacked_df)
}

choose_stacked_cluster_var <- function(stacked_df, id_vars = NULL) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(stacked_df), "source_row_id" %in% names(stacked_df))
  patient_candidates <- intersect(
    stacked_ror_patient_id_candidates,
    names(stacked_df)
  )
  encounter_candidates <- intersect(
    stacked_ror_encounter_id_candidates,
    names(stacked_df)
  )

  candidate_stats <- function(candidates) {
    if (!length(candidates)) {
      return(tibble::tibble(
        candidate_n = 0L,
        nonmissing_n = 0L,
        unique_id_n = 0L,
        usable_candidate_n = 0L,
        usable_candidates = ""
      ))
    }
    by_candidate <- tibble::tibble(column = candidates) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        nonmissing_n = vapply(.data$column, function(var) {
          vals <- trimws(as.character(stacked_df[[var]]))
          sum(!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals))
        }, integer(1L)),
        unique_id_n = vapply(.data$column, function(var) {
          vals <- trimws(as.character(stacked_df[[var]]))
          vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals)]
          length(unique(vals))
        }, integer(1L)),
        usable = .data$unique_id_n >= 2L
      )
    tibble::tibble(
      candidate_n = length(candidates),
      nonmissing_n = max(by_candidate$nonmissing_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      unique_id_n = max(by_candidate$unique_id_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      usable_candidate_n = sum(by_candidate$usable, na.rm = TRUE),
      usable_candidates = paste(by_candidate$column[by_candidate$usable], collapse = "; ")
    )
  }

  usable_id <- function(var) {
    vals <- trimws(as.character(stacked_df[[var]]))
    vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals)]
    length(unique(vals)) > 1L
  }
  patient_stats <- candidate_stats(patient_candidates)
  encounter_stats <- candidate_stats(encounter_candidates)
  patient_ok <- patient_candidates[vapply(patient_candidates, usable_id, logical(1L))]
  encounter_ok <- encounter_candidates[vapply(encounter_candidates, usable_id, logical(1L))]
  if (length(patient_ok)) {
    chosen <- patient_ok[[1L]]
    source <- "patient_id_with_source_row_fallback"
    source_type <- "patient_id"
    id_prefix <- "patient:"
  } else if (length(encounter_ok)) {
    chosen <- encounter_ok[[1L]]
    source <- "encounter_id_with_source_row_fallback"
    source_type <- "encounter_id"
    id_prefix <- "encounter:"
  } else {
    chosen <- "source_row_id"
    source <- "source_row_id_fallback"
    source_type <- "source_row_id"
    id_prefix <- "row:"
  }

  source_row_cluster <- paste0("row:", stacked_df$source_row_id)
  if (identical(chosen, "source_row_id")) {
    selected_missing <- rep(FALSE, nrow(stacked_df))
    cluster_id <- source_row_cluster
  } else {
    vals <- trimws(as.character(stacked_df[[chosen]]))
    selected_missing <- is.na(vals) | !nzchar(vals)
    cluster_id <- ifelse(selected_missing, source_row_cluster, paste0(id_prefix, vals))
  }
  final_missing <- is.na(cluster_id) | !nzchar(cluster_id)
  if (any(final_missing)) {
    stop("Stacked ROR cluster id materialization produced missing cluster IDs.")
  }

  stacked_out <- dplyr::mutate(stacked_df, stacked_cluster_id = cluster_id)
  cluster_sizes <- table(stacked_out$stacked_cluster_id)
  source_row_cluster_check <- stacked_out |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$source_row_id) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      stacked_row_n = dplyr::n(),
      clustered_id_n = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$stacked_cluster_id),
      gas_type_n = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$gas_type),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  dual_tested_source_row_n <- sum(source_row_cluster_check$stacked_row_n > 1L, na.rm = TRUE)
  dual_tested_clustered_n <- sum(
    source_row_cluster_check$stacked_row_n > 1L &
      source_row_cluster_check$gas_type_n > 1L &
      source_row_cluster_check$clustered_id_n == 1L,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  dual_tested_unclustered_n <- sum(
    source_row_cluster_check$stacked_row_n > 1L &
      source_row_cluster_check$gas_type_n > 1L &
      source_row_cluster_check$clustered_id_n > 1L,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  paired_row_cluster_ok <- dual_tested_unclustered_n == 0L
  source_row_fallback_row_n <- if (identical(source_type, "source_row_id")) {
    nrow(stacked_out)
  } else {
    sum(selected_missing)
  }
  fallback_cluster_n <- if (identical(source_type, "source_row_id")) {
    length(cluster_sizes)
  } else if (any(selected_missing)) {
    dplyr::n_distinct(stacked_out$stacked_cluster_id[selected_missing], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    0L
  }
  strategy_status <- dplyr::case_when(
    sum(final_missing) > 0L ~ "FAIL",
    !paired_row_cluster_ok ~ "FAIL",
    identical(source_type, "patient_id") ~ "PASS",
    identical(source_type, "encounter_id") ~ "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS",
    identical(source_type, "source_row_id") & dual_tested_source_row_n > 0L ~ "WARN",
    identical(source_type, "source_row_id") ~ "FAIL",
    TRUE ~ "FAIL"
  )
  strategy_detail <- dplyr::case_when(
    strategy_status == "PASS" ~ "Patient-level clustering selected; missing selected IDs fall back to source-row clusters.",
    strategy_status == "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS" ~ "Encounter-level clustering selected because patient-level IDs were unavailable.",
    strategy_status == "WARN" ~ "Source-row fallback clustering selected; duplicated ABG/VBG source rows share clusters, but no patient or encounter ID was available.",
    TRUE ~ "Cluster strategy failed because final IDs were missing or paired source rows were not clustered together."
  )
  info <- tibble::tibble(
    cluster_var = "stacked_cluster_id",
    selected_source_column = chosen,
    selected_source_type = source_type,
    strategy = source,
    strategy_status = strategy_status,
    strategy_detail = strategy_detail,
    patient_id_candidate_n = patient_stats$candidate_n,
    patient_id_available = patient_stats$usable_candidate_n > 0L,
    patient_id_usable_candidate_n = patient_stats$usable_candidate_n,
    patient_id_nonmissing_n = patient_stats$nonmissing_n,
    patient_id_unique_n = patient_stats$unique_id_n,
    patient_id_usable_candidates = patient_stats$usable_candidates,
    encounter_id_candidate_n = encounter_stats$candidate_n,
    encounter_id_available = encounter_stats$usable_candidate_n > 0L,
    encounter_id_usable_candidate_n = encounter_stats$usable_candidate_n,
    encounter_id_nonmissing_n = encounter_stats$nonmissing_n,
    encounter_id_unique_n = encounter_stats$unique_id_n,
    encounter_id_usable_candidates = encounter_stats$usable_candidates,
    selected_id_missing_n = sum(selected_missing),
    source_row_fallback_n = source_row_fallback_row_n,
    source_row_fallback_cluster_n = fallback_cluster_n,
    final_missing_cluster_id_n = sum(final_missing),
    dual_tested_source_row_n = dual_tested_source_row_n,
    dual_tested_clustered_n = dual_tested_clustered_n,
    dual_tested_unclustered_n = dual_tested_unclustered_n,
    paired_row_cluster_ok = paired_row_cluster_ok,
    n_clusters = length(cluster_sizes),
    max_cluster_size = if (length(cluster_sizes)) max(as.integer(cluster_sizes)) else NA_integer_
  )
  list(data = stacked_out, info = info)
}
```

```{r stacked-ror-model-contrasts}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR model fitting and covariance contrasts"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

fit_stacked_ror_model <- function(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_vars, cluster_var,
                                  model_type = c("cat3", "spline")) {
  model_type <- match.arg(model_type)
  stopifnot(cluster_var %in% names(stacked_df))
  rhs_core <- if (identical(model_type, "cat3")) {
    "co2_cat"
  } else {
    sprintf("splines::ns(pco2_centered, df = %d)", SPLINE_DF)
  }
  rhs <- paste0("gas_type * (", paste(c(rhs_core, adj_vars), collapse = " + "), ")")
  fml <- stats::as.formula(paste("outcome ~", rhs))
  d2 <- stacked_df |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data$outcome),
      is.finite(.data$analysis_weight),
      .data$analysis_weight > 0
    )
  if (length(unique(stats::na.omit(d2$outcome))) < 2L) {
    stop("Stacked ROR ", model_type, " model has fewer than two outcome levels for ", outcome_var)
  }
  design <- survey::svydesign(
    ids = stats::as.formula(paste0("~", cluster_var)),
    weights = ~analysis_weight,
    data = d2
  )
  warnings_seen <- character()
  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    survey::svyglm(
      fml,
      design = design,
      family = quasibinomial(),
      control = stats::glm.control(maxit = 50)
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warnings_seen <<- c(warnings_seen, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )
  diag <- tibble::tibble(
    outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
    model_type = model_type,
    n_rows = nrow(d2),
    n_clusters = dplyr::n_distinct(d2[[cluster_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
    events = sum(d2$outcome == 1L, na.rm = TRUE),
    non_events = sum(d2$outcome == 0L, na.rm = TRUE),
    converged = isTRUE(fit$converged),
    iterations = suppressWarnings(as.integer(fit$iter)),
    warning_n = length(warnings_seen),
    top_warning = if (length(warnings_seen)) warnings_seen[[1L]] else NA_character_,
    formula = paste(deparse(fml, width.cutoff = 500L), collapse = " ")
  )
  list(fit = fit, diag = diag)
}

fit_stacked_ror_cat3 <- function(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_vars, cluster_var) {
  fit_stacked_ror_model(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_vars, cluster_var, model_type = "cat3")
}

fit_stacked_ror_spline <- function(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_vars, cluster_var) {
  fit_stacked_ror_model(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_vars, cluster_var, model_type = "spline")
}

stacked_contrast_components <- function(fit, new_data, context) {
  beta <- stats::coef(fit)
  beta_names <- names(beta)
  if (is.null(beta_names) || any(!nzchar(beta_names))) {
    stop(context, ": coefficient names are required.")
  }
  tt <- stats::delete.response(stats::terms(fit))
  xlev <- tryCatch(stats::.getXlevels(tt, stats::model.frame(fit)), error = function(e) fit$xlevels)
  mf_new <- stats::model.frame(tt, new_data, na.action = stats::na.pass, xlev = xlev)
  mm <- stats::model.matrix(tt, mf_new, contrasts.arg = fit$contrasts)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(beta_names, colnames(mm))
  if (length(missing_cols)) {
    mm <- cbind(
      mm,
      matrix(
        0,
        nrow = nrow(mm),
        ncol = length(missing_cols),
        dimnames = list(NULL, missing_cols)
      )
    )
  }
  mm <- mm[, beta_names, drop = FALSE]
  vcov_mat <- stats::vcov(fit)
  vcov_mat <- align_compact_vcov(vcov_mat, beta_names, context = context)
  if (!identical(dim(vcov_mat), c(length(beta), length(beta)))) {
    stop(context, ": vcov dimensions do not match coefficient vector.")
  }
  list(beta = beta, vcov = vcov_mat, model_matrix = mm)
}

estimate_from_contrast <- function(contrast_vec, beta, vcov_mat) {
  cvec <- as.numeric(contrast_vec)
  active <- is.finite(cvec) & abs(cvec) > sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
  if (!any(active)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(estimate = 0, variance = 0))
  }
  beta_active <- as.numeric(beta[active])
  vcov_active <- vcov_mat[active, active, drop = FALSE]
  if (any(!is.finite(beta_active)) || any(!is.finite(vcov_active))) {
    stop("Non-finite coefficient or covariance in active stacked ROR contrast.")
  }
  c_active <- cvec[active]
  est <- sum(c_active * beta_active)
  var <- as.numeric(c_active %*% vcov_active %*% c_active)
  tibble::tibble(estimate = est, variance = max(var, 0))
}

extract_stacked_cat3_contrasts <- function(fit, stacked_df, outcome_var, imp_index) {
  ref_profile <- make_ref_profile(stacked_df, adj_core)
  make_row <- function(gas, cat) {
    row <- ref_profile
    row$gas_type <- factor(gas, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
    row$co2_cat <- factor(cat, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)
    row
  }
  new_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("ABG", "Normal"), row_id = "ABG_Normal"),
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("ABG", "Low"), row_id = "ABG_Low"),
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("ABG", "High"), row_id = "ABG_High"),
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("VBG", "Normal"), row_id = "VBG_Normal"),
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("VBG", "Low"), row_id = "VBG_Low"),
    dplyr::mutate(make_row("VBG", "High"), row_id = "VBG_High")
  )
  comp <- stacked_contrast_components(fit, new_data, "stacked categorical ROR contrast")
  row_index <- stats::setNames(seq_len(nrow(new_data)), new_data$row_id)
  contrast_rows <- lapply(c("Low", "High"), function(cat) {
    contrast_label <- paste(cat, "vs normal")
    c_abg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("ABG_", cat)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[["ABG_Normal"]], , drop = FALSE]
    c_vbg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("VBG_", cat)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[["VBG_Normal"]], , drop = FALSE]
    abg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    vbg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
```
