    ror <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg - c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    tibble::tibble(
      imputation = as.integer(imp_index),
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = stacked_ror_label_outcome(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]),
      contrast = contrast_label,
      logOR_ABG = abg$estimate,
      var_logOR_ABG = abg$variance,
      logOR_VBG = vbg$estimate,
      var_logOR_VBG = vbg$variance,
      log_ror = ror$estimate,
      var_log_ror = ror$variance,
      ror_direction = "VBG/ABG"
    )
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(contrast_rows)
}
```

```{r stacked-ror-spline-readout-grids}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR spline readout grids and offset contrasts"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

make_stacked_spline_readout_grid <- function() {
  abg_centered <- grid_abg_mi$paco2 - ABG_CO2_REF
  vbg_centered <- grid_vbg_mi$vbg_co2 - VBG_CO2_REF
  common_min <- max(min(abg_centered, na.rm = TRUE), min(vbg_centered, na.rm = TRUE))
  common_max <- min(max(abg_centered, na.rm = TRUE), max(vbg_centered, na.rm = TRUE))
  lo <- ceiling(common_min / 5) * 5
  hi <- floor(common_max / 5) * 5
  grid <- seq(lo, hi, by = 5)
  if (common_min <= 0 && common_max >= 0 && !0 %in% grid) {
    grid <- sort(unique(c(grid, 0)))
  }
  if (length(grid) < 3L) {
    stop("Stacked spline ROR readout grid has fewer than three common-support values.")
  }
  grid
}

stacked_spline_readout_grid <- make_stacked_spline_readout_grid()
make_stacked_local_interval_grid <- function(centered_grid, interval_width = 5) {
  stopifnot(is.numeric(centered_grid), length(centered_grid) >= 2L)
  centered_grid <- sort(unique(centered_grid[is.finite(centered_grid)]))
  centered_start <- centered_grid[centered_grid + interval_width <= max(centered_grid, na.rm = TRUE)]
  if (!length(centered_start)) {
    stop("Stacked local interval ROR grid has no intervals within common support.")
  }
  tibble::tibble(
    centered_start = centered_start,
    centered_end = centered_start + interval_width,
    interval_width_mmHg = interval_width,
    abg_start_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + centered_start,
    abg_end_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + centered_start + interval_width,
    abg_midpoint_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + centered_start + interval_width / 2,
    vbg_start_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + centered_start,
    vbg_end_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + centered_start + interval_width,
    vbg_midpoint_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + centered_start + interval_width / 2,
    pairing_rule = "VBG interval is ABG interval plus 5 mmHg"
  )
}
stacked_local_interval_grid <- make_stacked_local_interval_grid(
  stacked_spline_readout_grid,
  interval_width = 5
)
write_csv_safely(
  tibble::tibble(
    centered_pco2 = stacked_spline_readout_grid,
    abg_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + stacked_spline_readout_grid,
    vbg_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + stacked_spline_readout_grid,
    correction = "ABG value pairs with VBG value 5 mmHg higher",
    support_rule = "every 5 mmHg over overlapping centered ABG/VBG spline-grid support"
  ),
  results_path("stacked_ror_spline_readout_grid.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_local_interval_grid,
  results_path("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_grid.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

extract_stacked_spline_contrasts <- function(fit, stacked_df, outcome_var, imp_index,
                                             centered_grid) {
  ref_profile <- make_ref_profile(stacked_df, adj_core)
  centers <- sort(unique(c(0, centered_grid)))
  make_row <- function(gas, centered) {
    row <- ref_profile
    row$gas_type <- factor(gas, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
    row$pco2_centered <- centered
    row
  }
  new_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(c("ABG", "VBG"), function(gas) {
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(centers, function(centered) {
      dplyr::mutate(
        make_row(gas, centered),
        row_id = paste(gas, format(centered, scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE), sep = "_")
      )
    }))
  }))
  comp <- stacked_contrast_components(fit, new_data, "stacked spline ROR contrast")
  row_index <- stats::setNames(seq_len(nrow(new_data)), new_data$row_id)
  contrast_rows <- lapply(centered_grid, function(centered) {
    centered_key <- format(centered, scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
    c_abg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("ABG_", centered_key)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[["ABG_0"]], , drop = FALSE]
    c_vbg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("VBG_", centered_key)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[["VBG_0"]], , drop = FALSE]
    abg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    vbg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    ror <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg - c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    tibble::tibble(
      imputation = as.integer(imp_index),
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = stacked_ror_label_outcome(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]),
      centered_pco2 = centered,
      abg_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + centered,
      vbg_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + centered,
      logOR_ABG = abg$estimate,
      var_logOR_ABG = abg$variance,
      logOR_VBG = vbg$estimate,
      var_logOR_VBG = vbg$variance,
      log_ror = ror$estimate,
      var_log_ror = ror$variance,
      ror_direction = "VBG/ABG"
    )
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(contrast_rows)
}

extract_stacked_local_spline_contrasts <- function(fit, stacked_df, outcome_var, imp_index,
                                                   interval_grid) {
  ref_profile <- make_ref_profile(stacked_df, adj_core)
  centers <- sort(unique(c(interval_grid$centered_start, interval_grid$centered_end)))
  make_row <- function(gas, centered) {
    row <- ref_profile
    row$gas_type <- factor(gas, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
    row$pco2_centered <- centered
    row
  }
  new_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(c("ABG", "VBG"), function(gas) {
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(centers, function(centered) {
      dplyr::mutate(
        make_row(gas, centered),
        row_id = paste(gas, format(centered, scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE), sep = "_")
      )
    }))
  }))
  comp <- stacked_contrast_components(fit, new_data, "stacked local spline ROR contrast")
  row_index <- stats::setNames(seq_len(nrow(new_data)), new_data$row_id)
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(interval_grid)), function(idx) {
    row <- interval_grid[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    start_key <- format(row$centered_start[[1]], scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
    end_key <- format(row$centered_end[[1]], scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
    c_abg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("ABG_", end_key)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("ABG_", start_key)]], , drop = FALSE]
    c_vbg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("VBG_", end_key)]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("VBG_", start_key)]], , drop = FALSE]
    abg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    vbg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    ror <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg - c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    tibble::tibble(
      imputation = as.integer(imp_index),
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = stacked_ror_label_outcome(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]),
      centered_start = row$centered_start[[1]],
      centered_end = row$centered_end[[1]],
      interval_width_mmHg = row$interval_width_mmHg[[1]],
      abg_start_pco2 = row$abg_start_pco2[[1]],
      abg_end_pco2 = row$abg_end_pco2[[1]],
      abg_midpoint_pco2 = row$abg_midpoint_pco2[[1]],
      vbg_start_pco2 = row$vbg_start_pco2[[1]],
      vbg_end_pco2 = row$vbg_end_pco2[[1]],
      vbg_midpoint_pco2 = row$vbg_midpoint_pco2[[1]],
      logOR_ABG = abg$estimate,
      var_logOR_ABG = abg$variance,
      logOR_VBG = vbg$estimate,
      var_logOR_VBG = vbg$variance,
      log_ror = ror$estimate,
      var_log_ror = ror$variance,
      ror_direction = "VBG/ABG"
    )
  }))
}

empty_stacked_offset_scan_contrasts <- function() {
  tibble::tibble(
    imputation = integer(),
    outcome = character(),
    outcome_label = character(),
    offset_mmHg = integer(),
    abg_pco2 = numeric(),
    vbg_pco2 = numeric(),
    abg_reference_pco2 = numeric(),
    vbg_reference_pco2 = numeric(),
    abg_bin = integer(),
    vbg_bin = integer(),
    support_weight = integer(),
    logOR_ABG = numeric(),
    var_logOR_ABG = numeric(),
    logOR_VBG = numeric(),
    var_logOR_VBG = numeric(),
    log_ror = numeric(),
    var_log_ror = numeric(),
    ror_direction = character()
  )
}

make_stacked_offset_scan_grid <- function(stacked_df, offsets = 0:10) {
  gas_values <- stacked_df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$gas_type %in% c("ABG", "VBG"), is.finite(.data$pco2_value)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(gas_type = as.character(.data$gas_type))
  if (!all(c("ABG", "VBG") %in% unique(gas_values$gas_type))) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  support_ranges <- gas_values |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$gas_type) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      p02 = as.numeric(stats::quantile(.data$pco2_value, probs = 0.02, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)),
      p98 = as.numeric(stats::quantile(.data$pco2_value, probs = 0.98, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  abg_range <- support_ranges |> dplyr::filter(.data$gas_type == "ABG")
  vbg_range <- support_ranges |> dplyr::filter(.data$gas_type == "VBG")
  if (nrow(abg_range) != 1L || nrow(vbg_range) != 1L) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  support_bins <- gas_values |>
    dplyr::mutate(pco2_bin = as.integer(round(.data$pco2_value))) |>
    dplyr::count(.data$gas_type, .data$pco2_bin, name = "n_rows")
  support_lookup <- stats::setNames(
    support_bins$n_rows,
    paste(support_bins$gas_type, support_bins$pco2_bin, sep = ":")
  )
  lookup_count <- function(gas, bins) {
    keys <- paste(gas, bins, sep = ":")
    out <- as.integer(unname(support_lookup[keys]))
    out[is.na(out)] <- 0L
    out
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(offsets, function(offset) {
    abg_lo <- ceiling(max(abg_range$p02, vbg_range$p02 - offset, na.rm = TRUE))
    abg_hi <- floor(min(abg_range$p98, vbg_range$p98 - offset, na.rm = TRUE))
    if (!is.finite(abg_lo) || !is.finite(abg_hi) || abg_lo > abg_hi) {
      return(tibble::tibble())
    }
    abg_pco2 <- seq(abg_lo, abg_hi, by = 1)
    vbg_pco2 <- abg_pco2 + offset
    abg_bin <- as.integer(round(abg_pco2))
    vbg_bin <- as.integer(round(vbg_pco2))
    support_weight <- pmin(lookup_count("ABG", abg_bin), lookup_count("VBG", vbg_bin))
    tibble::tibble(
      offset_mmHg = as.integer(offset),
      abg_pco2 = as.numeric(abg_pco2),
      vbg_pco2 = as.numeric(vbg_pco2),
      abg_reference_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF,
      vbg_reference_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + as.numeric(offset),
      abg_centered = as.numeric(abg_pco2 - ABG_CO2_REF),
      vbg_centered = as.numeric(vbg_pco2 - VBG_CO2_REF),
      vbg_reference_centered = as.numeric(ABG_CO2_REF + as.numeric(offset) - VBG_CO2_REF),
      abg_bin = abg_bin,
      vbg_bin = vbg_bin,
      support_weight = support_weight
    ) |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$support_weight > 0L)
  })) |>
    dplyr::mutate(grid_id = dplyr::row_number())
}

extract_stacked_offset_scan_contrasts <- function(fit, stacked_df, outcome_var, imp_index,
                                                  offsets = 0:10) {
  offset_grid <- make_stacked_offset_scan_grid(stacked_df, offsets = offsets)
  if (!nrow(offset_grid)) {
    return(empty_stacked_offset_scan_contrasts())
  }
  ref_profile <- make_ref_profile(stacked_df, adj_core)
  make_row <- function(gas, centered, row_id) {
    row <- ref_profile
    row$gas_type <- factor(gas, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
    row$pco2_centered <- centered
    row$row_id <- row_id
    row
  }
  new_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(offset_grid)), function(idx) {
    row <- offset_grid[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    gid <- row$grid_id[[1]]
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      make_row("ABG", 0, paste0("g", gid, "_ABG_ref")),
      make_row("ABG", row$abg_centered[[1]], paste0("g", gid, "_ABG_target")),
      make_row("VBG", row$vbg_reference_centered[[1]], paste0("g", gid, "_VBG_ref")),
      make_row("VBG", row$vbg_centered[[1]], paste0("g", gid, "_VBG_target"))
    )
  }))
  comp <- stacked_contrast_components(fit, new_data, "stacked spline offset-scan ROR contrast")
  row_index <- stats::setNames(seq_len(nrow(new_data)), new_data$row_id)
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(offset_grid)), function(idx) {
    row <- offset_grid[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    gid <- row$grid_id[[1]]
    c_abg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("g", gid, "_ABG_target")]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("g", gid, "_ABG_ref")]], , drop = FALSE]
    c_vbg <- comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("g", gid, "_VBG_target")]], , drop = FALSE] -
      comp$model_matrix[row_index[[paste0("g", gid, "_VBG_ref")]], , drop = FALSE]
    abg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    vbg <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    ror <- estimate_from_contrast(c_vbg - c_abg, comp$beta, comp$vcov)
    tibble::tibble(
      imputation = as.integer(imp_index),
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = stacked_ror_label_outcome(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]),
      offset_mmHg = row$offset_mmHg[[1]],
      abg_pco2 = row$abg_pco2[[1]],
      vbg_pco2 = row$vbg_pco2[[1]],
      abg_reference_pco2 = row$abg_reference_pco2[[1]],
      vbg_reference_pco2 = row$vbg_reference_pco2[[1]],
      abg_bin = row$abg_bin[[1]],
      vbg_bin = row$vbg_bin[[1]],
      support_weight = row$support_weight[[1]],
      logOR_ABG = abg$estimate,
      var_logOR_ABG = abg$variance,
      logOR_VBG = vbg$estimate,
      var_logOR_VBG = vbg$variance,
      log_ror = ror$estimate,
      var_log_ror = ror$variance,
      ror_direction = "VBG/ABG"
    )
  }))
}
```

```{r stacked-ror-pooling-validation-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR Rubin pooling and Table 2 validation helpers"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

pool_stacked_scalar <- function(q, u) {
  ok <- is.finite(q) & is.finite(u) & u >= 0
  q <- q[ok]
  u <- u[ok]
  m <- length(q)
  if (m == 0L) {
    return(tibble::tibble(estimate = NA_real_, variance = NA_real_, SE = NA_real_, m_used = 0L))
  }
  qbar <- mean(q)
  ubar <- mean(u)
  b <- if (m > 1L) stats::var(q) else 0
  tvar <- ubar + (1 + 1 / m) * b
  tibble::tibble(estimate = qbar, variance = max(tvar, 0), SE = sqrt(max(tvar, 0)), m_used = m)
}

pool_stacked_ror_group <- function(df) {
  pooled_abg <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$logOR_ABG, df$var_logOR_ABG)
  pooled_vbg <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$logOR_VBG, df$var_logOR_VBG)
  pooled_ror <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$log_ror, df$var_log_ror)
  z_value <- if (is.finite(pooled_ror$SE) && pooled_ror$SE > 0) {
    pooled_ror$estimate / pooled_ror$SE
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }
  tibble::tibble(
    logOR_ABG = pooled_abg$estimate,
    SE_ABG = pooled_abg$SE,
    OR_ABG = exp(pooled_abg$estimate),
    LCL_ABG = exp(pooled_abg$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_abg$SE),
    UCL_ABG = exp(pooled_abg$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_abg$SE),
    logOR_VBG = pooled_vbg$estimate,
    SE_VBG = pooled_vbg$SE,
    OR_VBG = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate),
    LCL_VBG = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_vbg$SE),
    UCL_VBG = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_vbg$SE),
    log_ror = pooled_ror$estimate,
    se_log_ror = pooled_ror$SE,
    ror = exp(pooled_ror$estimate),
    ror_lcl = exp(pooled_ror$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_ror$SE),
    ror_ucl = exp(pooled_ror$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_ror$SE),
    z = z_value,
    p_value = if (is.finite(z_value)) 2 * stats::pnorm(abs(z_value), lower.tail = FALSE) else NA_real_,
    m_used = min(pooled_abg$m_used, pooled_vbg$m_used, pooled_ror$m_used),
    ror_direction = "VBG/ABG"
  )
}

normalize_table2_cat_input <- function(df, group_label) {
  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = group_label,
      outcome = dplyr::recode(
        as.character(.data$outcome),
        `Death (60d)` = "Death60d",
        `Hypercapnic RF` = "HCRF",
        .default = as.character(.data$outcome)
      ),
      contrast = dplyr::case_when(
        grepl("Low$", .data$term) ~ "Low vs normal",
        grepl("High$", .data$term) ~ "High vs normal",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$contrast)) |>
    dplyr::select(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$contrast, table2_OR = .data$OR)
}

validate_stacked_ror_vs_table2 <- function(stacked_pooled, abg_results, vbg_results) {
  table2_ref <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    normalize_table2_cat_input(abg_results, "ABG"),
    normalize_table2_cat_input(vbg_results, "VBG")
  )
  stacked_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    stacked_pooled |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        group = "ABG",
        outcome = .data$outcome,
        contrast = .data$contrast,
        stacked_OR = .data$OR_ABG
      ),
    stacked_pooled |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        group = "VBG",
        outcome = .data$outcome,
        contrast = .data$contrast,
        stacked_OR = .data$OR_VBG
      )
  )
  dplyr::left_join(
    stacked_long,
    table2_ref,
    by = c("group", "outcome", "contrast")
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pct_diff = 100 * abs(.data$stacked_OR - .data$table2_OR) / .data$table2_OR,
      validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(.data$table2_OR) | !is.finite(.data$pct_diff) ~ "FAIL",
        .data$pct_diff <= 5 ~ "PASS",
        .data$pct_diff <= 10 ~ "WARN",
        TRUE ~ "FAIL"
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels),
      factor(.data$group, levels = c("ABG", "VBG")),
      factor(.data$contrast, levels = stacked_ror_contrast_levels)
    )
}
```

```{r stacked-ror-imputation-execution}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR imputation execution loop"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

stacked_ror_first_imp_raw <- get_imp(1)
stacked_ror_id_availability_audit <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  summarize_stacked_ror_id_source("imputation_input", stacked_ror_first_imp_raw, nrow(stacked_ror_first_imp_raw)),
  summarize_stacked_ror_id_source(
    "subset_data",
    if (exists("subset_data", inherits = TRUE)) subset_data else NULL,
    nrow(stacked_ror_first_imp_raw)
  ),
  summarize_stacked_ror_id_source(
    "subset_data_raw",
    if (exists("subset_data_raw", inherits = TRUE)) subset_data_raw else NULL,
    nrow(stacked_ror_first_imp_raw)
  )
)
stacked_ror_selected_id_source <- choose_stacked_ror_id_source(stacked_ror_id_availability_audit)
stacked_ror_id_availability_audit <- stacked_ror_id_availability_audit |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    stacked_ror_selected_id_source |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        source_name,
        id_role,
        selected_candidate,
        selected_for_clustering = TRUE,
        carry_required,
        selection_detail
      ),
    by = c("source_name", "id_role")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    selected_for_clustering = dplyr::coalesce(.data$selected_for_clustering, FALSE),
    carry_required = dplyr::coalesce(.data$carry_required, FALSE),
    selected_candidate = dplyr::coalesce(.data$selected_candidate, ""),
    selection_detail = dplyr::coalesce(.data$selection_detail, "")
  )
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_id_availability_audit,
  results_path("stacked_ror_id_availability_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
stacked_ror_first_imp <- attach_stacked_ror_id_columns(stacked_ror_first_imp_raw)
stacked_ror_id_vars_present <- intersect(stacked_ror_id_candidates, names(stacked_ror_first_imp))
stacked_ror_input_inventory <- tibble::tibble(
  item = c(
    "imputations",
    "outcomes",
    "adjustment_variables",
    "id_candidates_present",
    "selected_id_source",
    "cat3_category_levels",
    "spline_readout_rule",
    "ror_direction"
  ),
  value = c(
    as.character(imp_n),
    paste(cat3_outcomes, collapse = "; "),
    paste(adj_core, collapse = "; "),
    if (length(stacked_ror_id_vars_present)) paste(stacked_ror_id_vars_present, collapse = "; ") else "none",
    paste0(
      stacked_ror_selected_id_source$source_name[[1L]],
      ":",
      stacked_ror_selected_id_source$id_role[[1L]],
      ":",
      dplyr::coalesce(stacked_ror_selected_id_source$selected_candidate[[1L]], "")
    ),
    paste(CO2_CAT_LEVELS, collapse = "; "),
    "Table S7 uses reference-anchored 5 mmHg paired readouts; Figure S9 uses local 5 mmHg interval RORs over common support.",
    "VBG/ABG"
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_input_inventory,
  results_path("stacked_ror_input_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

stacked_cat_by_imp_rows <- list()
stacked_spline_by_imp_rows <- list()
stacked_local_spline_by_imp_rows <- list()
stacked_offset_scan_by_imp_rows <- list()
stacked_dataset_summary_rows <- list()
stacked_cluster_strategy_rows <- list()
stacked_fit_diag_rows <- list()

for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_i <- attach_stacked_ror_id_columns(get_imp(imp_index))
  w_abg_i <- get_mi_weight("ABG", imp_index)
  w_vbg_i <- get_mi_weight("VBG", imp_index)

  for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
    stacked_df <- make_stacked_gas_dataset(
      d_i,
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      id_vars = stacked_ror_id_vars_present,
      w_abg = w_abg_i,
      w_vbg = w_vbg_i,
      imp_index = imp_index
    )
    cluster_result <- choose_stacked_cluster_var(stacked_df, stacked_ror_id_vars_present)
    stacked_df <- cluster_result$data
    cluster_info <- cluster_result$info
    cluster_var <- cluster_info$cluster_var[[1L]]

    stacked_dataset_summary_rows[[length(stacked_dataset_summary_rows) + 1L]] <-
      stacked_df |>
        dplyr::group_by(.data$imputation, .data$gas_type, .data$co2_cat) |>
        dplyr::summarise(
          n_rows = dplyr::n(),
          events = sum(.data$outcome == 1L, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]])

    stacked_cluster_strategy_rows[[length(stacked_cluster_strategy_rows) + 1L]] <-
      cluster_info |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          imputation = as.integer(imp_index),
          outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]
        )

    cat_fit <- fit_stacked_ror_cat3(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_core, cluster_var)
    stacked_fit_diag_rows[[length(stacked_fit_diag_rows) + 1L]] <-
      cat_fit$diag |>
        dplyr::mutate(imputation = as.integer(imp_index), cluster_var = cluster_var)
    stacked_cat_by_imp_rows[[length(stacked_cat_by_imp_rows) + 1L]] <-
      extract_stacked_cat3_contrasts(cat_fit$fit, stacked_df, outcome_var, imp_index)

    spline_fit <- fit_stacked_ror_spline(stacked_df, outcome_var, adj_core, cluster_var)
    stacked_fit_diag_rows[[length(stacked_fit_diag_rows) + 1L]] <-
      spline_fit$diag |>
        dplyr::mutate(imputation = as.integer(imp_index), cluster_var = cluster_var)
    stacked_spline_by_imp_rows[[length(stacked_spline_by_imp_rows) + 1L]] <-
      extract_stacked_spline_contrasts(
        spline_fit$fit,
        stacked_df,
        outcome_var,
        imp_index,
        stacked_spline_readout_grid
      )
    stacked_local_spline_by_imp_rows[[length(stacked_local_spline_by_imp_rows) + 1L]] <-
      extract_stacked_local_spline_contrasts(
        spline_fit$fit,
        stacked_df,
        outcome_var,
        imp_index,
        stacked_local_interval_grid
      )
    stacked_offset_scan_by_imp_rows[[length(stacked_offset_scan_by_imp_rows) + 1L]] <-
      extract_stacked_offset_scan_contrasts(
        spline_fit$fit,
        stacked_df,
        outcome_var,
        imp_index,
        offsets = 0:10
      )

    rm(stacked_df, cluster_result, cat_fit, spline_fit)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
  rm(d_i, w_abg_i, w_vbg_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

stacked_ror_dataset_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_dataset_summary_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imputation, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$gas_type, .data$co2_cat)
stacked_ror_cluster_strategy <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_cluster_strategy_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imputation, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels))
stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_fit_diag_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imputation, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$model_type)
stacked_ror_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_cat_by_imp_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imputation, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), factor(.data$contrast, levels = stacked_ror_contrast_levels))
stacked_ror_spline_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_spline_by_imp_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imputation, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$centered_pco2)
stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_local_spline_by_imp_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    .data$imputation,
    factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels),
    .data$centered_start
  )
stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(stacked_offset_scan_by_imp_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    .data$imputation,
    factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels),
    .data$offset_mmHg,
    .data$abg_pco2
  )

write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_dataset_summary, results_path("stacked_ror_dataset_summary.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy, results_path("stacked_ror_cluster_strategy.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics, results_path("stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_by_imputation, results_path("stacked_ror_by_imputation.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_spline_by_imputation, results_path("stacked_ror_spline_by_imputation.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_by_imputation,
  results_path("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation, results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

stacked_ror_pooled <- stacked_ror_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$contrast) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_stacked_ror_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), factor(.data$contrast, levels = stacked_ror_contrast_levels)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_ABG, .data$LCL_ABG, .data$UCL_ABG),
    vbg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_VBG, .data$LCL_VBG, .data$UCL_VBG),
    ror_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$ror, .data$ror_lcl, .data$ror_ucl)
  )

stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm <- stacked_ror_spline_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$centered_pco2, .data$abg_pco2, .data$vbg_pco2) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_stacked_ror_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$centered_pco2) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_ABG, .data$LCL_ABG, .data$UCL_ABG),
    vbg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_VBG, .data$LCL_VBG, .data$UCL_VBG),
    ror_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$ror, .data$ror_lcl, .data$ror_ucl)
  )
stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm <- stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(
    .data$outcome,
    .data$outcome_label,
    .data$centered_start,
    .data$centered_end,
    .data$interval_width_mmHg,
    .data$abg_start_pco2,
    .data$abg_end_pco2,
    .data$abg_midpoint_pco2,
    .data$vbg_start_pco2,
    .data$vbg_end_pco2,
    .data$vbg_midpoint_pco2
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_stacked_ror_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$centered_start) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_ABG, .data$LCL_ABG, .data$UCL_ABG),
    vbg_or_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$OR_VBG, .data$LCL_VBG, .data$UCL_VBG),
    ror_ci = format_or_ci_export(.data$ror, .data$ror_lcl, .data$ror_ucl),
    ci_width_log = log(.data$ror_ucl) - log(.data$ror_lcl),
    zero_width_ci = is.finite(.data$ci_width_log) & .data$ci_width_log <= sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
  )

write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_pooled, results_path("stacked_ror_pooled.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm, results_path("stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm,
  results_path("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r stacked-ror-output-export-validation}
#| code-block-title: "Stacked ROR output export and validation"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

format_fixed_value <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  ifelse(is.finite(x), formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits), "")
}

table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm <- stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `ABG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$abg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `VBG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$vbg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `ABG OR (95% CI)` = .data$abg_or_ci,
    `VBG OR (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_or_ci,
    `VBG/ABG ROR (95% CI)` = .data$ror_ci
  )
table_s7_panel_levels <- stacked_ror_label_outcome(stacked_ror_outcome_levels)
table_s7_panels <- split(
  table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm,
  factor(table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm$Outcome, levels = table_s7_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
ror_table_s7_note <- paste(
  "ROR = ratio of odds ratios, defined as the VBG odds ratio divided by the ABG odds ratio for the paired pCO2 contrast and outcome.",
  "Readouts are reference-anchored to ABG 40 mmHg and VBG 45 mmHg.",
  "The ABG 40 / VBG 45 row has OR = 1 and ROR = 1 by construction and is included only as the modality-specific reference.",
  "Estimates were obtained from stacked weighted spline interaction models within each imputed dataset and pooled on the log scale using Rubin's rules.",
  "These readouts compare association strength for pCO2 contrasts relative to reference values and are not paired-test agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority tests."
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  table_s7_panels,
  caption = "Reference-anchored VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios at 5 mmHg paired pCO2 spline readouts",
  file_stub = "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm",
  digits = 2,
  display_label = "Table S7",
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 7,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.9in",
    "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.75in",
    "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.75in",
    "ABG OR (95% CI)" = "1.15in",
    "VBG OR (95% CI)" = "1.15in",
    "VBG/ABG ROR (95% CI)" = "1.25in"
  ),
  note = ror_table_s7_note
)

figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis <- stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm |>
  dplyr::filter(
    is.finite(.data$abg_midpoint_pco2),
    is.finite(.data$vbg_midpoint_pco2),
    is.finite(.data$ror),
    is.finite(.data$ror_lcl),
    is.finite(.data$ror_ucl),
    .data$ror > 0,
    .data$ror_lcl > 0,
    .data$ror_ucl > 0
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = table_s7_panel_levels)
  )
ror_y_breaks <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.67, 0.8, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2, 4)
fig_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$abg_midpoint_pco2, y = .data$ror)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = .data$ror_lcl, ymax = .data$ror_ucl),
    fill = "#0072B2",
    alpha = MANUSCRIPT_RIBBON_ALPHA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 1.8) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    name = "ABG pCO2 interval midpoint (mmHg)",
    sec.axis = ggplot2::dup_axis(trans = ~ . + 5, name = "VBG pCO2 interval midpoint (mmHg; ABG + 5)")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_log10(
    breaks = ror_y_breaks,
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Local 5-mmHg VBG-to-ABG ratio of odds ratios across paired pCO2 intervals",
    x = "ABG pCO2 interval midpoint (mmHg)",
    y = "Local VBG/ABG ratio of odds ratios (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(fig_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis, "figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis", width = 9.5, height = 7.5)

stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc <- stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    local_interval_rows = dplyr::n(),
    zero_width_ci_n = sum(.data$zero_width_ci, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_log_ci_width = min(.data$ci_width_log, na.rm = TRUE),
    finite_positive_n = sum(
      is.finite(.data$ror) & is.finite(.data$ror_lcl) & is.finite(.data$ror_ucl) &
        .data$ror > 0 & .data$ror_lcl > 0 & .data$ror_ucl > 0,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$local_interval_rows <= 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$zero_width_ci_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$finite_positive_n != .data$local_interval_rows ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc,
  results_path("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

if (!nrow(stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation)) {
  stop("Stacked ROR offset scan produced no point-level rows.")
}
stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$imputation, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_log_ror = stats::weighted.mean(.data$log_ror, .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    geom_mean_ror = exp(mean_log_ror),
    abs_log_distance_from_1 = abs(mean_log_ror),
    mean_abs_log_ror = stats::weighted.mean(abs(.data$log_ror), .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    rmse_log_ror = sqrt(stats::weighted.mean(.data$log_ror^2, .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_support_weight = sum(.data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation,
  results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_log_ror = mean(.data$mean_log_ror, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_geometric_mean_ror = exp(mean_log_ror),
    absolute_log_distance_from_1 = abs(mean_log_ror),
    weighted_mean_abs_log_ror = mean(.data$mean_abs_log_ror, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rmse_log_ror = mean(.data$rmse_log_ror, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_support_weight = stats::median(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    imputations_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imputation),
    ci_status = "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan",
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    best_primary_rank = rank(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_ror, ties.method = "first"),
    best_geom_rank = rank(.data$absolute_log_distance_from_1, ties.method = "first"),
    best_rmse_rank = rank(.data$weighted_rmse_log_ror, ties.method = "first"),
    best_offset_primary = .data$best_primary_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_geom = .data$best_geom_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_rmse = .data$best_rmse_rank == 1L,
    prespecified_5mm_offset = .data$offset_mmHg == 5L
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary,
  results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    offset_n = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$offset_mmHg),
    min_offset = min(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_offset = max(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_total_support_weight = min(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    geom_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_geom, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_prespecified_5mm_offset = any(.data$prespecified_5mm_offset),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$offset_n != 11L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_offset != 0L | .data$max_offset != 10L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_grid_points <= 0L | .data$min_total_support_weight <= 0 ~ "FAIL",
      .data$primary_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$geom_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      !.data$has_prespecified_5mm_offset ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit,
  results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

format_offset_flags <- function(primary, secondary, prespecified, primary_label, secondary_label) {
  purrr::pmap_chr(
    list(primary, secondary, prespecified),
    function(primary_i, secondary_i, prespecified_i) {
      flags <- c(
        if (isTRUE(primary_i)) primary_label else character(0),
        if (isTRUE(secondary_i)) secondary_label else character(0),
        if (isTRUE(prespecified_i)) "Prespecified 5 mmHg" else character(0)
      )
      if (length(flags)) paste(unique(flags), collapse = "; ") else ""
    }
  )
}

select_offset_display_rows <- function(df, primary_col, secondary_col, prespecified_col = "prespecified_5mm_offset") {
  df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[primary_col]] | .data[[secondary_col]] | .data[[prespecified_col]])
}

table_s8_offset_scan_summary <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Geom mean ROR` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_geometric_mean_ror, digits = 2),
    `|log geom ROR|` = format_fixed_value(.data$absolute_log_distance_from_1, digits = 3),
    `Mean |log ROR|` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_ror, digits = 3),
    `RMSE log ROR` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_log_ror, digits = 3),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_geom,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best primary",
      secondary_label = "Best geometric mean"
    )
  )
table_s8_offset_scan_summary_display <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary |>
  select_offset_display_rows("best_offset_primary", "best_offset_geom") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Geom mean ROR` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_geometric_mean_ror, digits = 2),
    `|log geom ROR|` = format_fixed_value(.data$absolute_log_distance_from_1, digits = 3),
    `Mean |log ROR|` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_ror, digits = 3),
    `RMSE log ROR` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_log_ror, digits = 3),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_geom,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best primary",
      secondary_label = "Best geometric mean"
    )
  )
table_s8_panels <- split(
  table_s8_offset_scan_summary_display,
  factor(table_s8_offset_scan_summary_display$Outcome, levels = table_s7_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
ror_table_s8_note <- paste(
  "Exploratory offset scan values are point estimates from the same stacked weighted spline interaction models used for Table S7 and Figure S9.",
  "For offset d, ABG value x was compared with VBG value x + d, relative to ABG 40 mmHg and VBG 40 + d mmHg.",
  "Grid points were restricted to common central support and weighted by the minimum rounded-bin support across ABG and VBG.",
  "The weighted geometric mean ROR describes the average signed association-strength ratio on the log scale.",
  "The primary best offset minimizes the support-weighted mean absolute log ROR across grid points.",
  "This can differ from the offset whose geometric mean ROR is closest to 1 because positive and negative log deviations can cancel in the geometric mean.",
  "The full offset scan from 0 to 10 mmHg is available in the accompanying CSV; displayed rows include the prespecified 5-mmHg offset and offsets selected by the primary and secondary summary criteria.",
  "This descriptive scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction and is not an agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority analysis.",
  "RORs compare relative association strength on the odds-ratio scale and do not directly compare absolute predicted risk."
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  table_s8_panels,
  caption = "Exploratory ABG-to-VBG offset scan for spline ROR parity",
  file_stub = "table_s8_offset_scan_summary",
  digits = 3,
  display_label = "Table S8",
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = table_s8_offset_scan_summary,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.85in",
    "Offset" = "0.45in",
    "Geom mean ROR" = "0.75in",
    "|log geom ROR|" = "0.75in",
    "Mean |log ROR|" = "0.75in",
    "RMSE log ROR" = "0.65in",
    "Support" = "0.58in",
    "Grid n" = "0.42in",
    "Flags" = "1.35in"
  ),
  note = ror_table_s8_note
)

figure_s10_offset_scan <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = table_s7_panel_levels)
  )
fig_s10_geom_mean_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s10_offset_scan,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_geometric_mean_ror)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(figure_s10_offset_scan, .data$best_offset_geom),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_geometric_mean_ror),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:10) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_log10(
    breaks = ror_y_breaks,
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "A. Weighted geometric mean ROR by offset",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Weighted geometric mean VBG/ABG ROR (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

fig_s10_primary_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s10_offset_scan,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_log_ror)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(figure_s10_offset_scan, .data$best_offset_primary),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_log_ror),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:10) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "B. Primary criterion: support-weighted mean absolute log ROR",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Support-weighted mean absolute log ROR"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

fig_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend <- fig_s10_geom_mean_panel / fig_s10_primary_panel +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    title = "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG ROR parity"
  )
print_plot_once(fig_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend, "figure_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend", width = 9.5, height = 10.5)

stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc <- stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    geom_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_geom, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    geom_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_geom], collapse = "; "),
    primary_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_primary], collapse = "; "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$geom_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$primary_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    detail = paste0(
      "Geometric-mean panel highlights offset ", .data$geom_best_offset,
      "; primary-criterion panel highlights offset ", .data$primary_best_offset, "."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc,
  results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "offsets_present",
    "support_positive",
    "one_primary_best_per_outcome",
    "one_geometric_best_per_outcome",
    "figure_s10_display_highlights",
    "prespecified_5mm_present",
    "ci_policy"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$offset_n == 11L) &&
        all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$min_offset == 0L) &&
        all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$max_offset == 10L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$min_grid_points > 0L) &&
        all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$min_total_support_weight > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$primary_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$geom_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_support_audit$has_prespecified_5mm_offset)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary$ci_status == "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Each outcome must have candidate offsets 0 through 10.",
    "Each retained offset must have at least one grid point and positive support weight.",
    "The primary criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "The geometric-mean-closest-to-1 criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "Figure S10 highlights must match the metric displayed in each panel.",
    "The prespecified 5 mmHg offset remains present as a comparator.",
    "Offset-scan CIs are intentionally not estimated in this exploratory first pass."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation,
  results_path("stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation <- validate_stacked_ror_vs_table2(
  stacked_ror_pooled,
  abg_cat_results,
  vbg_cat_results
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation,
  results_path("stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3 <- stacked_ror_pooled |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `pCO2 contrast` = .data$contrast,
    `ABG OR (95% CI)` = .data$abg_or_ci,
    `VBG OR (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_or_ci,
    `VBG/ABG ROR (95% CI)` = .data$ror_ci
  )
ror_table_s6_note <- paste(
  "ROR = ratio of odds ratios, defined as the VBG odds ratio divided by the ABG odds ratio for the same pCO2 contrast and outcome.",
  "RORs were estimated from stacked weighted interaction models within each imputed dataset and pooled on the log scale using Rubin's rules.",
  "Confidence intervals use the stacked model covariance and Rubin pooling, not ratios of printed confidence limits.",
  "Values near 1 indicate similar association strength by modality.",
  "These descriptive analyses compare association strength and are not paired-test agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority tests."
)
write_publication_table_csv(
  table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3,
  results_path("table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_standalone_table_pdf(
  table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3,
  caption = "VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios for pCO2 category-outcome associations",
  file_stub = "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 5,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = "Table S6",
  note = ror_table_s6_note
)

read_current_qmd_lines <- function() {
  readLines(resolve_current_qmd(), warn = FALSE)
}

extract_r_chunk_block <- function(source_lines, chunk_label) {
  start_pattern <- paste0("^```\\{r\\s+", chunk_label, "([,}\\s]|$)")
  starts <- grep(start_pattern, source_lines)
  if (!length(starts)) {
    return(character())
  }
  start <- starts[[1L]]
  following_ends <- grep("^```\\s*$", source_lines[(start + 1L):length(source_lines)])
  if (!length(following_ends)) {
    return(source_lines[start:length(source_lines)])
  }
  end <- start + following_ends[[1L]]
  source_lines[start:end]
}

chunk_has_echo_true <- function(source_lines, chunk_label) {
  block <- extract_r_chunk_block(source_lines, chunk_label)
  length(block) > 0L && any(grepl("^#\\|\\s*echo:\\s*true\\s*$", block))
}

chunk_contains_token <- function(source_lines, chunk_label, token) {
  block <- extract_r_chunk_block(source_lines, chunk_label)
  length(block) > 0L && any(grepl(token, block, fixed = TRUE))
}

current_qmd_lines <- read_current_qmd_lines()
retired_eval_false_chunk <- paste0("stacked-ror-", "scientific-code-visible")
retired_monolithic_chunk <- paste0("stacked-ror-", "mi-ipw-cat3-spline")
visible_scientific_chunks <- c(
  "stacked-ror-data-clustering",
  "stacked-ror-model-contrasts",
  "stacked-ror-spline-readout-grids",
  "stacked-ror-pooling-validation-helpers",
  "stacked-ror-imputation-execution"
)
stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  check_name = c(
    "eval_false_excerpt_removed",
    "monolithic_hidden_scientific_chunk_removed",
    paste0("visible_chunk_", visible_scientific_chunks),
    "visible_make_stacked_gas_dataset",
    "visible_choose_stacked_cluster_var",
    "visible_fit_stacked_ror_model",
    "visible_local_interval_contrasts",
    "visible_offset_scan_contrasts",
    "visible_imputation_loop"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (!any(grepl(retired_eval_false_chunk, current_qmd_lines, fixed = TRUE))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (!any(grepl(retired_monolithic_chunk, current_qmd_lines, fixed = TRUE))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    vapply(visible_scientific_chunks, function(label) {
      if (chunk_has_echo_true(current_qmd_lines, label)) "PASS" else "FAIL"
    }, character(1L)),
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-data-clustering", "make_stacked_gas_dataset <- function")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-data-clustering", "choose_stacked_cluster_var <- function")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-model-contrasts", "fit_stacked_ror_model <- function")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-spline-readout-grids", "extract_stacked_local_spline_contrasts <- function")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-spline-readout-grids", "extract_stacked_offset_scan_contrasts <- function")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (chunk_contains_token(current_qmd_lines, "stacked-ror-imputation-execution", "for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n))")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "The prior non-executed visible excerpt must be absent.",
    "The prior monolithic hidden scientific chunk label must be absent.",
    paste0("Chunk `", visible_scientific_chunks, "` must be executable and echo visible."),
    "Visible data assembly chunk must define make_stacked_gas_dataset().",
    "Visible data assembly chunk must define choose_stacked_cluster_var().",
    "Visible model chunk must define fit_stacked_ror_model().",
    "Visible spline grid chunk must define local interval spline contrasts for Figure S9.",
    "Visible spline grid chunk must define offset-scan contrasts for Table S8/Figure S10.",
    "Visible execution chunk must run the imputation loop."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit,
  results_path("stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

table2_status_counts <- table(stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation$validation_status)
cluster_fail_n <- sum(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$strategy_status == "FAIL", na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_warn_n <- sum(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$strategy_status %in% c("WARN", "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS"), na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_strategy_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  cluster_fail_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
  cluster_warn_n > 0L ~ "WARN",
  TRUE ~ "PASS"
)
cluster_strategy_counts <- table(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$strategy_status)
cluster_final_missing_n <- sum(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$final_missing_cluster_id_n, na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_unclustered_dual_n <- sum(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$dual_tested_unclustered_n, na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_source_row_strategy_n <- sum(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$strategy == "source_row_id_fallback", na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_max_size <- max(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$max_cluster_size, na.rm = TRUE)
selected_id_role <- stacked_ror_selected_id_source$id_role[[1L]]
selected_id_candidate <- stacked_ror_selected_id_source$selected_candidate[[1L]]
id_carry_validation_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  selected_id_role == "patient" &&
    any(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$selected_source_type == "patient_id") ~ "PASS",
  selected_id_role == "encounter" &&
    any(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$selected_source_type == "encounter_id") ~ "WARN",
  selected_id_role == "source_row_id" &&
    all(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$selected_source_type == "source_row_id") ~ "WARN",
  TRUE ~ "FAIL"
)
id_carry_validation_detail <- dplyr::case_when(
  id_carry_validation_status == "PASS" ~ paste0(
    "Selected patient ID candidate `", selected_id_candidate,
    "` was carried into stacked data and used for clustering."
  ),
  selected_id_role == "encounter" && id_carry_validation_status == "WARN" ~ paste0(
    "Selected encounter ID candidate `", selected_id_candidate,
    "` was carried into stacked data and used because patient IDs were unavailable."
  ),
  selected_id_role == "source_row_id" && id_carry_validation_status == "WARN" ~
    "No row-aligned patient/encounter ID candidate was available; source-row clustering remains documented.",
  TRUE ~ paste0(
    "Selected ID source was `", selected_id_role,
    "` but cluster strategy selected: ",
    paste(unique(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$selected_source_type), collapse = ", "),
    "."
  )
)
fit_nonconverged_n <- sum(!(stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics$converged %in% TRUE), na.rm = TRUE)
fit_warning_n_total <- sum(stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics$warning_n, na.rm = TRUE)
fit_top_warnings <- stacked_ror_fit_diagnostics$top_warning
fit_top_warnings <- unique(fit_top_warnings[!is.na(fit_top_warnings) & nzchar(fit_top_warnings)])
fit_diagnostics_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  fit_nonconverged_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
  fit_warning_n_total > 0L ~ "WARN",
  TRUE ~ "PASS"
)
code_visibility_status <- if (all(stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
stacked_ror_validation_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "legacy_independent_method_quarantined",
    "input_inventory",
    "code_visibility",
    "id_carry_validation",
    "cluster_strategy",
    "cat3_ror_rows",
    "spline_readout_rows",
    "local_interval_spline",
    "offset_scan",
    "fit_diagnostics",
    "table2_validation",
    "ror_direction"
  ),
  status = c(
    "PASS",
    if (nrow(stacked_ror_input_inventory) > 0L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    code_visibility_status,
    id_carry_validation_status,
    cluster_strategy_status,
    if (nrow(stacked_ror_pooled) == stacked_ror_required_cat_rows) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm) >= stacked_ror_required_cat_rows) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm) > 0L &&
        all(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    fit_diagnostics_status,
    dplyr::case_when(
      any(stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation$validation_status == "FAIL", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "FAIL",
      any(stacked_ror_vs_table2_validation$validation_status == "WARN", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "WARN",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    if (all(stacked_ror_pooled$ror_direction == "VBG/ABG") &&
        all(stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm$ror_direction == "VBG/ABG") &&
        all(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm$ror_direction == "VBG/ABG") &&
        all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_by_imputation$ror_direction == "VBG/ABG")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Deprecated separate-variance output is not manuscript-facing; replacement artifacts are stacked covariance-aware outputs.",
    paste0("Recorded ", nrow(stacked_ror_input_inventory), " inventory rows."),
    paste0(
      "Visible stacked-ROR code checks: ",
      paste(stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit$check_name, stacked_ror_code_visibility_audit$status, collapse = "; "),
      "."
    ),
    id_carry_validation_detail,
    paste0(
      "Used cluster strategies: ", paste(unique(stacked_ror_cluster_strategy$strategy), collapse = ", "),
      "; selected ID source: ", stacked_ror_selected_id_source$selection_detail[[1L]],
      "; strategy statuses: ", paste(names(cluster_strategy_counts), as.integer(cluster_strategy_counts), collapse = "; "),
      "; source-row fallback strategy rows: ", cluster_source_row_strategy_n,
      "; final missing cluster IDs: ", cluster_final_missing_n,
      "; unclustered duplicated source rows: ", cluster_unclustered_dual_n,
      "; max cluster size: ", cluster_max_size, "."
    ),
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(stacked_ror_pooled), " categorical pooled ROR rows."),
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm), " reference-anchored spline readout rows on the 5 mmHg common-support grid."),
    paste0(
      "Computed ", nrow(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_5mm),
      " local 5-mmHg interval ROR rows; zero-width CI rows: ",
      sum(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc$zero_width_ci_n, na.rm = TRUE), "."
    ),
    paste0(
      "Computed ", nrow(stacked_ror_offset_scan_summary),
      " exploratory offset-summary rows; validation statuses: ",
      paste(stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation$component, stacked_ror_offset_scan_validation$status, collapse = "; "),
      "."
    ),
    paste0(
      "Non-converged fits: ", fit_nonconverged_n,
      "; total captured warnings: ", fit_warning_n_total,
      if (length(fit_top_warnings)) paste0("; examples: ", paste(utils::head(fit_top_warnings, 3), collapse = " | ")) else "."
    ),
    paste0("Table 2 validation statuses: ", paste(names(table2_status_counts), as.integer(table2_status_counts), collapse = "; ")),
    "ROR is consistently defined as VBG/ABG."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  stacked_ror_validation_status,
  results_path("stacked_ror_validation_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

if (any(stacked_ror_validation_status$status == "FAIL")) {
  stop(
    "Stacked ROR validation failed: ",
    paste(stacked_ror_validation_status$component[stacked_ror_validation_status$status == "FAIL"], collapse = ", ")
  )
}
```

### Summary: adjusted CO2-category associations across analysis tracks

```{r table-summary-adjusted-threelevel}
#| code-block-title: "Summary: adjusted CO2-category ORs (unweighted, IPW, IPW+MI)"
#| include: false
#| message: false

# Purpose: table summary adjusted threelevel.
# Build the canonical categorical key-results table across all requested tracks,
# while retaining the narrower adjusted-only legacy summary outputs.
label_outcome <- function(x) {
  dplyr::recode(
    x,
    imv_proc = "IMV",
    niv_proc = "NIV",
    death_60d = "Death (60d)",
    hypercap_resp_failure = "Hypercapnic RF",
    IMV = "IMV",
    NIV = "NIV",
    Death60d = "Death (60d)",
    HCRF = "Hypercapnic RF"
  )
}

# helper: format one categorical OR and confidence interval for compact table
# display.
format_cat3_ci <- function(estimate, lcl, ucl) {
  sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", estimate, lcl, ucl)
}

# helper: count the effective modeled sample and number of events for one
# complete-case categorical model specification.
count_model <- function(data, outcome, exposure, adj_vars = NULL,
                        treat_var = NULL, weight_var = NULL) {
  d <- data
  if (!is.null(treat_var)) d <- d[d[[treat_var]] == 1, , drop = FALSE]
  vars <- unique(c(outcome, exposure, adj_vars, weight_var))
  if (!is.null(weight_var)) vars <- c(vars, weight_var)
  d <- d[, vars, drop = FALSE]
  d <- d[complete.cases(d), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!is.null(weight_var)) {
    w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[weight_var]]))
    d <- d[is.finite(w) & w > 0, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (nrow(d) == 0L) {
    return(tibble::tibble(n_model = 0L, events = 0L))
  }
  d[[outcome]] <- to01(d[[outcome]])
  tibble::tibble(
    n_model = nrow(d),
    events = sum(d[[outcome]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# helper: count complete-case modeled rows/events for the non-MI categorical
# tracks so the summary table reports the right denominator for each cohort.
count_group <- function(group, method) {
  exp_var   <- if (group == "ABG") "pco2_cat_abg" else "pco2_cat_vbg"
  treat_var <- if (group == "ABG") "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
  adj_vars <- switch(
    method,
    "Crude" = NULL,
    "Adjusted" = adj_core,
    "GBM-weighted" = adj_core,
    stop("Unsupported non-MI count method: ", method)
  )
  weight_var <- switch(
    method,
    "Crude" = NULL,
    "Adjusted" = NULL,
    "GBM-weighted" = if (group == "ABG") "w_abg" else "w_vbg",
    stop("Unsupported non-MI count method: ", method)
  )
  outcomes <- c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure")
  purrr::map_dfr(outcomes, function(outcome) {
    cnt <- count_model(subset_data, outcome, exp_var, adj_vars,
                       treat_var = treat_var, weight_var = weight_var)
    dplyr::mutate(cnt,
                  method = method,
                  group = group,
                  outcome = label_outcome(outcome))
  })
}

# helper: return zero-row MI count summaries for one cohort when an imputation
# contributes no analyzable tested encounters after the required filtering.
empty_mi_count_rows <- function(group, outcomes) {
  tidyr::expand_grid(
    method = c("Imputed", "Weighted and adjusted"),
    outcome = label_outcome(outcomes)
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = group,
      n_model = 0L,
      events = 0L
    ) |>
    dplyr::relocate(method, group, outcome, n_model, events)
}

# helper: compute MI modeled counts for both the imputed-only and weighted MI
# categorical tracks in one pass for one cohort within one imputed dataset.
# This avoids reloading the same full imputation hundreds of times inside the
# manuscript table summary chunk.
compute_mi_count_group_all_methods <- function(d, group, weights, outcomes) {
  if (group == "ABG") {
    co2_var <- "paco2"
    treat_var <- "has_abg"
    low_cut <- ABG_CO2_LOW
    high_cut <- ABG_CO2_HIGH
  } else {
    co2_var <- "vbg_co2"
    treat_var <- "has_vbg"
    low_cut <- VBG_CO2_LOW
    high_cut <- VBG_CO2_HIGH
  }

  d[[co2_var]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[co2_var]]))
  keep <- d[[treat_var]] == 1 & is.finite(d[[co2_var]])
  if (!any(keep)) {
    return(empty_mi_count_rows(group, outcomes))
  }

  d2 <- d[keep, c(outcomes, adj_core, co2_var), drop = FALSE]
  w2 <- weights[keep]
  d2$co2_cat <- make_co2_cat3(d2[[co2_var]], low_cut, high_cut)

  keep2 <- !is.na(d2$co2_cat)
  d2 <- d2[keep2, , drop = FALSE]
  w2 <- w2[keep2]
  if (nrow(d2) == 0L) {
    return(empty_mi_count_rows(group, outcomes))
  }

  purrr::map_dfr(outcomes, function(outcome) {
    outcome_complete <- complete.cases(d2[, c(outcome, adj_core, "co2_cat"), drop = FALSE])
    outcome_vals <- to01(d2[[outcome]])
    weighted_keep <- outcome_complete & is.finite(w2) & w2 > 0

    tibble::tibble(
      method = c("Imputed", "Weighted and adjusted"),
      group = group,
      outcome = label_outcome(outcome),
      n_model = c(
        sum(outcome_complete),
        sum(weighted_keep)
      ),
      events = c(
        sum(outcome_vals[outcome_complete] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        sum(outcome_vals[weighted_keep] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    )
  })
}

# helper: summarize MI modeled sample size and events across imputations for all
# categorical outcomes and both cohorts using a single pass over each imputed
# dataset. This preserves the original median-across-imputations definition
# while removing a major full-run bottleneck.
build_mi_counts_cat3 <- function() {
  outcomes <- c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure")
  per_imp_counts <- vector("list", imp$m)

  for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
    d <- get_imp(i)
    w_abg <- get_mi_weight("ABG", i)
    w_vbg <- get_mi_weight("VBG", i)

    per_imp_counts[[i]] <- dplyr::bind_rows(
      compute_mi_count_group_all_methods(d, "ABG", w_abg, outcomes),
      compute_mi_count_group_all_methods(d, "VBG", w_vbg, outcomes)
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(imp = i)

    rm(d, w_abg, w_vbg)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(per_imp_counts) |>
    dplyr::group_by(method, group, outcome) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_model = round(stats::median(n_model, na.rm = TRUE)),
      events = round(stats::median(events, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# helper: build one harmonized predicted-probability export for a full
# categorical analysis track across both ABG and VBG cohorts.
predict_cat3_track_probs <- function(fit_list_abg, fit_list_vbg, method,
                                     ref_abg, ref_vbg,
                                     adj_vars = adj_core,
                                     cat_var_abg = "pco2_cat_abg",
                                     cat_var_vbg = "pco2_cat_vbg") {
  prob_abg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(fit_list_abg), function(outcome_var) {
    predict_cat3_prob_from_fit(
      fit_list_abg[[outcome_var]],
      ref_df = ref_abg,
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      cat_var = cat_var_abg,
      adj_vars = adj_vars
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "ABG")
  }))
  prob_vbg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(fit_list_vbg), function(outcome_var) {
    predict_cat3_prob_from_fit(
      fit_list_vbg[[outcome_var]],
      ref_df = ref_vbg,
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      cat_var = cat_var_vbg,
      adj_vars = adj_vars
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = "VBG")
  }))

  normalize_cat3_key_results_prob_df(
    dplyr::bind_rows(prob_abg, prob_vbg),
    method = method,
    outcome_col = "outcome",
    group_col = "group",
    category_col = "category",
    p_col = "p",
    lcl_col = "p_LCL",
    ucl_col = "p_UCL",
    context = paste0("categorical track probabilities: ", method)
  )
}

predict_cat3_track_probs_marginal_standardized <- function(fit_list_abg, fit_list_vbg, method,
                                                           source_df,
                                                           adj_vars = adj_core,
                                                           cat_var_abg = "pco2_cat_abg",
                                                           cat_var_vbg = "pco2_cat_vbg") {
  prob_one_group <- function(fit_list, group_label, cat_var) {
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(fit_list), function(outcome_var) {
      fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(fit_list[[outcome_var]])
      if (is.null(fit_compact)) {
        stop("Missing compact categorical fit for ", method, " ", group_label, " ", outcome_var)
      }
      predict_prob_cat3_marginal_standardized(
        fit_compact,
        source_df = source_df,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        cat_var = cat_var,
        adj_vars = adj_vars
      ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          eta = .data$eta_imp,
          SE_eta = sqrt(pmax(.data$var_eta_imp, 0)),
          var_eta = .data$var_eta_imp,
          p = .data$p_imp,
          p_LCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta_imp - 1.96 * .data$SE_eta),
          p_UCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta_imp + 1.96 * .data$SE_eta)
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(outcome = outcome_var, group = group_label)
    }))
  }

  normalize_cat3_key_results_prob_df(
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      prob_one_group(fit_list_abg, "ABG", cat_var_abg),
      prob_one_group(fit_list_vbg, "VBG", cat_var_vbg)
    ),
    method = method,
    outcome_col = "outcome",
    group_col = "group",
    category_col = "category",
    p_col = "p",
    lcl_col = "p_LCL",
    ucl_col = "p_UCL",
    context = paste0("categorical marginal probabilities: ", method)
  )
}

crude_cat3_results <- normalize_cat3_key_results_or_df(
  unw_results_crude,
  method = "Crude",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  term_col = "term",
  or_col = "estimate",
  lcl_col = "conf.low",
  ucl_col = "conf.high",
  context = "categorical crude ORs"
)
adjusted_cat3_results <- normalize_cat3_key_results_or_df(
  unw_results_adj,
  method = "Adjusted",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  term_col = "term",
  or_col = "estimate",
  lcl_col = "conf.low",
  ucl_col = "conf.high",
  context = "categorical adjusted ORs"
)
gbm_cat3_results <- normalize_cat3_key_results_or_df(
  ipw_threelevel_results,
  method = "GBM-weighted",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  term_col = "term",
  or_col = "estimate",
  lcl_col = "conf.low",
  ucl_col = "conf.high",
  context = "categorical GBM-weighted ORs"
)
main_cat3_results <- normalize_cat3_key_results_or_df(
  mi_threelevel_results,
  method = "Weighted and adjusted",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  term_col = "term",
  or_col = "OR",
  lcl_col = "LCL",
  ucl_col = "UCL",
  context = "categorical main ORs"
)
imputed_cat3_results <- normalize_cat3_key_results_or_df(
  dplyr::bind_rows(mi_unweighted_abg_cat_results, mi_unweighted_vbg_cat_results),
  method = "Imputed",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  term_col = "term",
  or_col = "OR",
  lcl_col = "LCL",
  ucl_col = "UCL",
  context = "categorical imputed ORs"
)

gbm_common_std_source_df <- build_common_std_source_df(subset_data, imp_index = 0L)

crude_cat3_probs <- predict_cat3_track_probs(
  crude_cat3_fits_abg,
  crude_cat3_fits_vbg,
  method = "Crude",
  ref_abg = data.frame(.ref = 1),
  ref_vbg = data.frame(.ref = 1),
  adj_vars = NULL
)
adjusted_cat3_probs <- predict_cat3_track_probs(
  adjusted_cat3_fits_abg,
  adjusted_cat3_fits_vbg,
  method = "Adjusted",
  ref_abg = x_ref_abg,
  ref_vbg = x_ref_vbg,
  adj_vars = adj_core
)
gbm_cat3_probs <- predict_cat3_track_probs(
  gbm_cat3_fits_abg,
  gbm_cat3_fits_vbg,
  method = "GBM-weighted",
  ref_abg = x_ref_abg,
  ref_vbg = x_ref_vbg,
  adj_vars = adj_core
)
gbm_cat3_probs_conditional_xref <- gbm_cat3_probs
gbm_cat3_probs <- predict_cat3_track_probs_marginal_standardized(
  gbm_cat3_fits_abg,
  gbm_cat3_fits_vbg,
  method = "GBM-weighted",
  source_df = gbm_common_std_source_df,
  adj_vars = adj_core
)
main_cat3_probs <- normalize_cat3_key_results_prob_df(
  dplyr::bind_rows(abg_cat_prob_curves, vbg_cat_prob_curves),
  method = "Weighted and adjusted",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  category_col = "category",
  p_col = "p",
  lcl_col = "p_LCL",
  ucl_col = "p_UCL",
  context = "categorical main probabilities"
)
main_cat3_probs_conditional_xref <- normalize_cat3_key_results_prob_df(
  dplyr::bind_rows(abg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref, vbg_cat_prob_curves_conditional_xref),
  method = "Weighted and adjusted",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  category_col = "category",
  p_col = "p",
  lcl_col = "p_LCL",
  ucl_col = "p_UCL",
  context = "categorical main conditional X_ref probabilities"
)
imputed_cat3_probs <- normalize_cat3_key_results_prob_df(
  dplyr::bind_rows(mi_unweighted_abg_cat_prob_curves, mi_unweighted_vbg_cat_prob_curves),
  method = "Imputed",
  outcome_col = "outcome",
  group_col = "group",
  category_col = "category",
  p_col = "p",
  lcl_col = "p_LCL",
  ucl_col = "p_UCL",
  context = "categorical imputed probabilities"
)

mi_counts_cat3_all <- build_mi_counts_cat3()

counts_tbl_cat3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  count_group("ABG", "Crude"),
  count_group("VBG", "Crude"),
  count_group("ABG", "Adjusted"),
  count_group("VBG", "Adjusted"),
  count_group("ABG", "GBM-weighted"),
  count_group("VBG", "GBM-weighted"),
  dplyr::filter(mi_counts_cat3_all, method == "Imputed"),
  dplyr::filter(mi_counts_cat3_all, method == "Weighted and adjusted")
)

cat3_or_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  crude_cat3_results,
  adjusted_cat3_results,
  imputed_cat3_results,
  main_cat3_results,
  gbm_cat3_results
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome = as.character(outcome)) |>
  dplyr::left_join(counts_tbl_cat3, by = c("method", "group", "outcome"))

cat3_prob_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  crude_cat3_probs,
  adjusted_cat3_probs,
  imputed_cat3_probs,
  main_cat3_probs,
  gbm_cat3_probs
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome = as.character(outcome)) |>
  dplyr::left_join(counts_tbl_cat3, by = c("method", "group", "outcome"))

cat3_key_results_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  cat3_or_all |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      method,
      group,
      outcome,
      metric_type = "OR",
      level = as.character(contrast),
      estimate = OR,
      lcl = LCL,
      ucl = UCL,
      n_model,
      events
    ),
  cat3_prob_all |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      method,
      group,
      outcome,
      metric_type = "Probability",
      level = as.character(category),
      estimate = p,
      lcl = p_LCL,
      ucl = p_UCL,
      n_model,
      events
    )
)
write_csv_safely(cat3_key_results_long, results_path("cat3_key_results_long.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

cat3_or_display <- cat3_or_all |>
  dplyr::mutate(display = format_cat3_ci(OR, LCL, UCL)) |>
  dplyr::select(method, group, outcome, n_model, events, contrast, display) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = contrast,
    values_from = display,
    names_glue = "{contrast} OR (95% CI)"
  )

cat3_prob_display <- cat3_prob_all |>
  dplyr::mutate(display = format_cat3_ci(p, p_LCL, p_UCL)) |>
  dplyr::select(method, group, outcome, category, display) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = category,
    values_from = display,
    names_glue = "{category} probability (95% CI)"
  )

table_summary_key_results_cat3 <- counts_tbl_cat3 |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    dplyr::select(cat3_or_display, -n_model, -events),
    by = c("method", "group", "outcome")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(cat3_prob_display, by = c("method", "group", "outcome")) |>
  arrange_key_results_outcome_group(
    factor(method, levels = CAT3_KEY_RESULTS_METHOD_LEVELS)
  )

write_csv_safely(
  table_summary_key_results_cat3,
  results_path("table_summary_key_results_cat3.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

table_2_weighted_categorical_wide <- table_summary_key_results_cat3 |>
  dplyr::filter(method == "Weighted and adjusted") |>
  dplyr::select(
    group,
    outcome,
    n_model,
    events,
    `Low vs normal OR (95% CI)`,
    `High vs normal OR (95% CI)`,
    `Normal probability (95% CI)`,
    `Low probability (95% CI)`,
    `High probability (95% CI)`
  )

table_2_weighted_or_panel <- table_2_weighted_categorical_wide |>
  dplyr::select(
    group,
    outcome,
    n_model,
    events,
    `Low vs normal OR (95% CI)`,
    `High vs normal OR (95% CI)`
  ) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `Gas type` = group,
    Outcome = outcome,
    `Analysis N` = n_model,
    Events = events
  )

table_2_weighted_probability_panel <- table_2_weighted_categorical_wide |>
  dplyr::select(
    group,
    outcome,
    `Normal probability (95% CI)`,
    `Low probability (95% CI)`,
    `High probability (95% CI)`
  ) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `Gas type` = group,
    Outcome = outcome
  )

table_2_weighted_or_panel_display <- table_2_weighted_or_panel |>
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = stringr::str_wrap(as.character(.data$Outcome), width = 18)) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `Low OR (95% CI)` = `Low vs normal OR (95% CI)`,
    `High OR (95% CI)` = `High vs normal OR (95% CI)`
  )

table_2_weighted_probability_panel_display <- table_2_weighted_probability_panel |>
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = stringr::str_wrap(as.character(.data$Outcome), width = 18)) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `Normal prob. (95% CI)` = `Normal probability (95% CI)`,
    `Low prob. (95% CI)` = `Low probability (95% CI)`,
    `High prob. (95% CI)` = `High probability (95% CI)`
  )

table_2_weighted_display_panels <- list(
  "Odds ratios" = table_2_weighted_or_panel_display,
  "Predicted probabilities" = table_2_weighted_probability_panel_display
)

table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  table_2_weighted_or_panel |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = dplyr::ends_with("OR (95% CI)"),
      names_to = "measure",
      values_to = "estimate"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(panel = "Odds ratios", .before = 1L),
  table_2_weighted_probability_panel |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = dplyr::ends_with("probability (95% CI)"),
      names_to = "measure",
      values_to = "estimate"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      panel = "Predicted probabilities",
      `Analysis N` = NA_integer_,
      Events = NA_integer_,
      .before = 1L
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(panel, `Gas type`, Outcome, `Analysis N`, Events, measure, estimate)
)

write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  table_2_weighted_display_panels,
  caption = paste0(
    "MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-weighted 3-level categorical results for ABG and VBG; ",
    "predicted probabilities are marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
  ),
  file_stub = "table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes",
  digits = 2,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = "Table 2",
  csv_df = table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes
)

table_summary_key_results_cat3_abg <- table_summary_key_results_cat3 |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "ABG")
table_summary_key_results_cat3_vbg <- table_summary_key_results_cat3 |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "VBG")

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  table_summary_key_results_cat3_abg,
  caption = paste0(
    "Categorical key results for the ABG cohort across crude, unweighted adjusted, imputed non-weighted, ",
    "MI-logistic IPSW-weighted, and GBM IPSW-weighted analyses; MI-logistic IPSW and GBM probabilities are ",
    "marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution, adjusted/imputed ",
    "non-weighted probabilities are conditional on X_ref, and crude probabilities are crude model-implied."
  ),
  file_stub = "table_summary_key_results_cat3_abg",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  show = FALSE
)

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  table_summary_key_results_cat3_vbg,
  caption = paste0(
    "Categorical key results for the VBG cohort across crude, unweighted adjusted, imputed non-weighted, ",
