```{r table-summary-adjusted-threelevel}
    "MI-logistic IPSW-weighted, and GBM IPSW-weighted analyses; MI-logistic IPSW and GBM probabilities are ",
    "marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution, adjusted/imputed ",
    "non-weighted probabilities are conditional on X_ref, and crude probabilities are crude model-implied."
  ),
  file_stub = "table_summary_key_results_cat3_vbg",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  show = FALSE
)

legacy_counts_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  counts_tbl_cat3 |>
    dplyr::filter(method == "Adjusted") |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "Unweighted adjusted"),
  counts_tbl_cat3 |>
    dplyr::filter(method == "GBM-weighted") |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "IPW adjusted"),
  counts_tbl_cat3 |>
    dplyr::filter(method == "Weighted and adjusted") |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "IPW + MI adjusted")
)

table_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  adjusted_cat3_results |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "Unweighted adjusted", outcome = as.character(outcome)),
  gbm_cat3_results |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "IPW adjusted", outcome = as.character(outcome)),
  main_cat3_results |>
    dplyr::mutate(method = "IPW + MI adjusted", outcome = as.character(outcome))
) |>
  dplyr::left_join(legacy_counts_tbl, by = c("method", "group", "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(or_ci = format_cat3_ci(OR, LCL, UCL)) |>
  dplyr::select(method, group, outcome, n_model, events, contrast, or_ci) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = contrast, values_from = or_ci) |>
  arrange_key_results_outcome_group(
    factor(method, levels = c("Unweighted adjusted", "IPW adjusted", "IPW + MI adjusted"))
  )

write_csv_safely(table_summary, results_path("table_summary_adjusted_threelevel.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

table_summary_abg <- table_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "ABG")
table_summary_vbg <- table_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "VBG")

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  table_summary_abg,
  caption = "Adjusted odds ratios (low/high vs normal) across unweighted adjusted, GBM IPSW-weighted, and MI-logistic IPSW-weighted analysis tracks for the ABG cohort; n/events reflect model sample size (median across imputations for MI-based tracks).",
  file_stub = "table_summary_adjusted_threelevel_abg",
  digits = 2,
  show = FALSE
)

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  table_summary_vbg,
  caption = "Adjusted odds ratios (low/high vs normal) across unweighted adjusted, GBM IPSW-weighted, and MI-logistic IPSW-weighted analysis tracks for the VBG cohort; n/events reflect model sample size (median across imputations for MI-based tracks).",
  file_stub = "table_summary_adjusted_threelevel_vbg",
  digits = 2,
  show = FALSE
)
```

## Canonical Categorical Key-Results Figures Across Analysis Tracks

```{r key-results-cat3-track-prep}
#| message: false
# Purpose: prepare canonical categorical key-results figure objects across analysis tracks.
key_results_cat3_caption_crude <- paste0(
  "Crude, unadjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. ",
  "Predicted probabilities are crude model-implied category probabilities within the tested cohorts."
)
key_results_cat3_caption_adjusted <- paste0(
  "Odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. ",
  "Predicted probabilities are conditional on the reference covariate profile X_ref within each test-specific cohort."
)
key_results_cat3_caption_imputed <- paste0(
  "MI-pooled categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. ",
  "Predicted probabilities are pooled on the link scale and are conditional on X_ref within each test-specific cohort."
)
key_results_cat3_caption_main <- paste0(
  "MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-adjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. ",
  "Predicted probabilities are pooled on the link scale and marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
)
key_results_cat3_caption_gbm <- paste0(
  "GBM-IPSW-adjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. ",
  "Predicted probabilities are marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
)

key_results_cat3_crude_plot <- assemble_cat3_key_results_figure(
  crude_cat3_results,
  crude_cat3_probs,
  figure_title = "Crude categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category",
  figure_caption = key_results_cat3_caption_crude
)
key_results_cat3_adjusted_plot <- assemble_cat3_key_results_figure(
  adjusted_cat3_results,
  adjusted_cat3_probs,
  figure_title = "Adjusted categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category",
  figure_caption = key_results_cat3_caption_adjusted
)
key_results_cat3_imputed_plot <- assemble_cat3_key_results_figure(
  imputed_cat3_results,
  imputed_cat3_probs,
  figure_title = "MI-pooled categorical associations (non-weighted): ABG vs VBG CO2 category",
  figure_caption = key_results_cat3_caption_imputed
)
key_results_cat3_main_plot <- assemble_cat3_key_results_figure(
  main_cat3_results,
  main_cat3_probs,
  figure_title = "MI-logistic IPSW-weighted categorical associations of pCO2 category with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG",
  figure_caption = NULL
)
key_results_cat3_gbm_plot <- assemble_cat3_key_results_figure(
  gbm_cat3_results,
  gbm_cat3_probs,
  figure_title = "GBM-IPSW-adjusted categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category",
  figure_caption = key_results_cat3_caption_gbm
)
```

```{r stage1-cleanup}
#| include: false
# Purpose: stage1 cleanup.
append_mem_snapshot("stage1", "end", "post")
stage1_rm <- c(
  "unw_results_crude", "unw_results_adj", "unw_threelevel_results",
  "unw_combined_or_df", "unw_plot_df", "unw_p_or", "unw_axis_spec", "outcomes_unw"
)
missing_stage1 <- setdiff(stage1_rm, ls())
stopifnot(length(missing_stage1) == 0)
rm(list = stage1_rm)
invisible(gc())
append_mem_snapshot("stage1", "cleanup", "post")
```

## Observed outcome rates by CO2 bin (MI-logistic IPSW)

```{r co2-binned-rates-mi-ipw}
#| code-block-title: "Observed outcome rates by CO2 bin (MI-logistic IPSW)"
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: pool weighted 1-mmHg bin rates across imputations using summary-only objects.
stopifnot(exists("imp"), imp$m > 0)
stopifnot(exists("get_imp"), exists("get_mi_weight"))

co2_rate_mi_rows_abg <- vector("list", imp$m)
co2_rate_mi_rows_vbg <- vector("list", imp$m)

for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
  d_i <- get_imp(i)
  w_abg_i <- get_mi_weight("ABG", i)
  w_vbg_i <- get_mi_weight("VBG", i)

  d_abg_i <- d_i[, c("has_abg", "paco2", CO2_RATE_OUTCOMES), drop = FALSE]
  d_abg_i$w_rate <- w_abg_i
  d_vbg_i <- d_i[, c("has_vbg", "vbg_co2", CO2_RATE_OUTCOMES), drop = FALSE]
  d_vbg_i$w_rate <- w_vbg_i

  co2_rate_mi_rows_abg[[i]] <- compute_co2_bin_rates(
    df = d_abg_i |> dplyr::filter(has_abg == 1),
    co2_var = "paco2",
    outcomes = CO2_RATE_OUTCOMES,
    outcome_labels = CO2_RATE_OUTCOME_LABELS,
    weight_var = "w_rate",
    q = c(0.02, 0.98),
    bin_width = 1,
    cohort_label = "ABG"
  ) |> dplyr::mutate(imp = i)

  co2_rate_mi_rows_vbg[[i]] <- compute_co2_bin_rates(
    df = d_vbg_i |> dplyr::filter(has_vbg == 1),
    co2_var = "vbg_co2",
    outcomes = CO2_RATE_OUTCOMES,
    outcome_labels = CO2_RATE_OUTCOME_LABELS,
    weight_var = "w_rate",
    q = c(0.02, 0.98),
    bin_width = 1,
    cohort_label = "VBG"
  ) |> dplyr::mutate(imp = i)

  rm(d_i, d_abg_i, d_vbg_i, w_abg_i, w_vbg_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

co2_rate_mi_abg <- pool_mi_bin_rates(dplyr::bind_rows(co2_rate_mi_rows_abg))
co2_rate_mi_vbg <- pool_mi_bin_rates(dplyr::bind_rows(co2_rate_mi_rows_vbg))

write_csv_safely(co2_rate_mi_abg, results_path("co2_binned_rates_mi_ipw_abg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(co2_rate_mi_vbg, results_path("co2_binned_rates_mi_ipw_vbg.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

p_co2_rate_mi_abg <- plot_co2_bin_rate_panel(
  co2_rate_mi_abg,
  title = paste0("Observed outcome rates by ABG CO2 bin (MI-logistic IPSW, m = ", imp$m, ")"),
  x_label = "ABG CO2 (mmHg)",
  vline_at = 45
)
p_co2_rate_mi_vbg <- plot_co2_bin_rate_panel(
  co2_rate_mi_vbg,
  title = paste0("Observed outcome rates by VBG CO2 bin (MI-logistic IPSW, m = ", imp$m, ")"),
  x_label = "VBG CO2 (mmHg)",
  vline_at = 50
)

print_plot_once(p_co2_rate_mi_abg, "co2-binned-rates-mi-ipw-abg", width = 8.5, height = 6.0)
print_plot_once(p_co2_rate_mi_vbg, "co2-binned-rates-mi-ipw-vbg", width = 8.5, height = 6.0)

rm(co2_rate_mi_rows_abg, co2_rate_mi_rows_vbg, co2_rate_mi_abg, co2_rate_mi_vbg,
   p_co2_rate_mi_abg, p_co2_rate_mi_vbg)
invisible(gc(FALSE))
```

## Manuscript outputs summary

```{r manuscript-outputs}
#| code-block-title: "Manuscript outputs (compact)"
#| results: "asis"
# Use full-cohort flow counts here so manuscript-facing sample sizes remain
# stable in pilot renders and stay synchronized with Figure 1.
flow_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Extracted encounter cohort",
    "Ambulatory encounters excluded",
    "Analytic ED/inpatient cohort",
    "ABG-tested encounters",
    "VBG-tested encounters",
    "Both ABG and VBG",
    "ABG only",
    "VBG only",
    "Neither ABG nor VBG",
    "ABG with observed PaCO2",
    "VBG with observed CO2"
  ),
  n = c(
    cohort_flow_counts$total_extracted,
    cohort_flow_counts$excluded_ambulatory,
    cohort_flow_counts$analytic_ed_inpatient,
    cohort_flow_counts$abg_tested,
    cohort_flow_counts$vbg_tested,
    cohort_flow_counts$both_abg_vbg,
    cohort_flow_counts$abg_only,
    cohort_flow_counts$vbg_only,
    cohort_flow_counts$neither_abg_nor_vbg,
    cohort_flow_counts$abg_with_paco2,
    cohort_flow_counts$vbg_with_vbg_co2
  )
)
render_table_pdf_maybe(flow_tbl, "Cohort flow summary", "cohort_flow_summary",
                       digits = 0, show = FALSE)

# Event counts by cohort
outcome_vars <- c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure")
outcome_labels <- c(
  imv_proc = "IMV",
  niv_proc = "NIV",
  death_60d = "Death (60d)",
  hypercap_resp_failure = "Hypercapnic RF"
)
event_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(outcome_vars, function(o) {
    dplyr::tibble(
      outcome = outcome_labels[[o]],
      group = "ABG",
      n = sum(subset_data$has_abg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data[[o]]), na.rm = TRUE),
      events = sum(subset_data$has_abg == 1 & subset_data[[o]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }),
  lapply(outcome_vars, function(o) {
    dplyr::tibble(
      outcome = outcome_labels[[o]],
      group = "VBG",
      n = sum(subset_data$has_vbg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data[[o]]), na.rm = TRUE),
      events = sum(subset_data$has_vbg == 1 & subset_data[[o]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })
)
event_tbl <- event_tbl |>
  dplyr::mutate(pct = ifelse(n > 0, 100 * events / n, NA_real_))
render_table_pdf_maybe(event_tbl,
                       "Outcome counts by cohort (ABG/VBG tested)",
                       "outcome_counts_by_cohort",
                       digits = 1, show = FALSE)

# Weighting diagnostics (non-MI weights)
stopifnot(all(c("w_abg", "w_vbg", "ps_abg", "ps_vbg") %in% names(subset_data)))
wt_abg <- subset_data$w_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
wt_vbg <- subset_data$w_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]
ps_abg <- subset_data$ps_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
ps_vbg <- subset_data$ps_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]
trunc_abg <- subset_data$trunc_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
trunc_vbg <- subset_data$trunc_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]

wt_sum <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  weight_summary(wt_abg, ps = ps_abg, ps_floor = ps_floor_abg,
                 truncated = trunc_abg) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group = "ABG"),
  weight_summary(wt_vbg, ps = ps_vbg, ps_floor = ps_floor_vbg,
                 truncated = trunc_vbg) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group = "VBG")
)
wt_sum_display <- wt_sum |>
  dplyr::select(group, n, ess, min, p99, max, trunc_rate, ps_p01) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    trunc = trunc_rate,
    p01_ps = ps_p01
  )
render_table_pdf_maybe(wt_sum_display,
                       "GBM IPSW weighting diagnostics summary (non-MI)",
                       "weighting_diagnostics_non_mi",
                       wide = TRUE,
                       digits = 3,
                       show = FALSE)

# Missingness + MI spec summary
miss_vars <- c(covars_ps, "paco2", "vbg_co2",
               "imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure")
miss_vars <- intersect(miss_vars, names(subset_data_raw))
miss_tbl <- subset_data_raw |>
  dplyr::summarise(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(miss_vars), ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(dplyr::everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing") |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(pct_missing))
render_table_pdf_maybe(miss_tbl,
                       "Variables by missingness (pre-imputation)",
                       "missingness_all",
                       digits = 1,
                       show = FALSE)

mi_spec_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  m = imp$m,
  maxit = MAXIT_MI,
  methods = paste(unique(imp$method[imp$method != ""]), collapse = ", "),
  ps_model = MI_PS_METHOD,
  ps_spline_k = MI_PS_SPLINE_K,
  ps_glm_maxit = MI_GLM_MAXIT
)
render_table_pdf_maybe(mi_spec_tbl,
                       "MI specification (methods used)",
                       "mi_specification",
                       show = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: mi-threelevel-sanity
#| include: false
# Purpose: chunk.
stopifnot(exists("imp"))
imp_n <- imp$m
# helper: pull one completed imputation back into the normalized type schema used
# by downstream assertions so diagnostics are checking the same structure as the
# analysis code.
get_imp <- function(i, imp_obj = imp) { normalize_types(mice::complete(imp_obj, action = i), levels_ref) }

# 1) must exist and be numeric
d1 <- get_imp(1)
stopifnot(all(c("paco2","vbg_co2") %in% names(d1)))
stopifnot(is.numeric(d1$paco2), is.numeric(d1$vbg_co2))

# 2) confirm at least two PaCO2 levels among those with ABG in each imputation
table(vapply(seq_len(imp_n), function(i) {
  d <- get_imp(i)
  dplyr::n_distinct(d$paco2[d$has_abg == 1 & is.finite(d$paco2)])
}, integer(1)) > 1)

# 3) light sanity check: ensure pooled MI cat3 results exist
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"), nrow(abg_cat_results) > 0)
```

### Visualization: pooled three-level ORs

```{r}
#| label: ipw-three-level-pco2-mi-abg-vbg
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-pos: "H"

# Purpose: chunk.
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_results"), exists("vbg_cat_results"))

mi_combined_or_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome = factor(outcome,
                     levels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death60d", "HCRF"),
                     labels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death (60d)", "Hypercapnic RF")),
    group = factor(group, levels = c("ABG", "VBG"))
  )

mi_combined_or_df <- map_or_exposure(mi_combined_or_df, "or-plot-mi-weighted")
mi_plot_df <- mi_combined_or_df |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate = OR, conf.low = LCL, conf.high = UCL) |>
  dplyr::select(-OR, -LCL, -UCL)

mi_plot_df <- build_or_plot_df(
  mi_plot_df,
  "or-plot-mi-weighted",
  expected_exposure_levels = CO2_CAT_CONTRAST_LEVELS
)
mi_axis_spec <- compute_or_axis_spec(list(mi_plot_df), lo_col = "conf.low", hi_col = "conf.high")

mi_p_or <- plot_or_safe(
  mi_plot_df,
  plot_name = "or-plot-mi-weighted",
  axis_spec = mi_axis_spec,
  title = "MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-adjusted odds ratios by PCO2 category (ABG vs VBG)"
)
print_plot_once(mi_p_or, "or-plot-mi-weighted", width = 7.5, height = 4.8)
```

### Visualization: pooled three-level predicted probabilities

```{r}
#| label: ipw-three-level-pco2-mi-abg-vbg-prob
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 7.8
#| fig-height: 4.9
#| fig-pos: "H"

# Purpose: plot MI-pooled adjusted probabilities by categorical CO2 exposure.
stopifnot(exists("abg_cat_prob_curves"), exists("vbg_cat_prob_curves"))

mi_cat_prob_plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  abg_cat_prob_curves,
  vbg_cat_prob_curves
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = c("ABG", "VBG")),
    co2_cat = factor(co2_cat, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS),
    outcome = factor(
      outcome,
      levels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death60d", "HCRF"),
      labels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death (60d)", "Hypercapnic RF")
    )
  )

axis_mi_cat_prob <- compute_prob_axis_spec(list(mi_cat_prob_plot_df), lo_col = "p_LCL", hi_col = "p_UCL")
dodge_cat_prob <- ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45)

mi_cat_prob_plot <- ggplot(
  mi_cat_prob_plot_df,
  aes(x = co2_cat, y = p, color = group)
) +
  geom_pointrange(
    aes(ymin = p_LCL, ymax = p_UCL),
    position = dodge_cat_prob,
    fatten = 1.2,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  prob_axis_scale(axis_mi_cat_prob) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome) +
  labs(
    title = "MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-adjusted predicted probabilities by PCO2 category (ABG vs VBG)",
    x = "PCO2 category",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    caption = "Marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

print_plot_once(mi_cat_prob_plot, "ipw-three-level-mi-abg-vbg-prob", width = 7.8, height = 4.9)
```

```{r mi-propensity-histograms-logistic}
#| code-block-title: "MI logistic propensity score distributions (imputation-averaged)"
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 8.5
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: manuscript Figure S2 propensity-score overlap under the MI logistic IPSW models.
# Build an imputation-averaged propensity histogram for ABG and VBG.
# This mirrors the non-MI propensity display while respecting MI variability.
stopifnot(exists("imp"))
stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"), exists("mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list"))

bin_edges <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 31)
bin_width <- diff(bin_edges)[1]
bin_centers <- head(bin_edges, -1) + bin_width / 2
treat_abg_all <- to01(imp$data$has_abg)
treat_vbg_all <- to01(imp$data$has_vbg)

# helper: collapse one imputation's propensity scores into comparable histogram
# bins so the manuscript figure can average densities across imputations without
# overplotting dozens of raw curves.
mi_ps_hist_one <- function(ps_vec, treat_vec, score_type, imp_index) {
  # Use integer bin IDs to avoid floating-point matching issues during complete().
  df <- data.frame(
    ps = as.numeric(ps_vec),
    treat = as.integer(treat_vec),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(ps), !is.na(treat), ps >= 0, ps <= 1) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      treat = factor(treat, levels = c(0L, 1L), labels = c("No Test", "Test")),
      bin_id = cut(
        ps,
        breaks = bin_edges,
        include.lowest = TRUE,
        right = FALSE,
        labels = FALSE
      )
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0 || all(is.na(df$bin_id))) return(data.frame())

  df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(bin_id)) |>
    dplyr::count(treat, bin_id, .drop = FALSE, name = "n") |>
    tidyr::complete(treat, bin_id = seq_along(bin_centers), fill = list(n = 0L)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(treat) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      n_total = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE),
      density = dplyr::if_else(n_total > 0, n / (n_total * bin_width), 0)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      ScoreType = score_type,
      imp = imp_index,
      bin_mid = bin_centers[bin_id]
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(ScoreType, imp, treat, bin_mid, density)
}

mi_ps_hist_rows <- vector("list", imp$m * 2L)
row_idx <- 0L
for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
  # Aggregate ABG and VBG bin-level densities for each imputation.
  row_idx <- row_idx + 1L
  mi_ps_hist_rows[[row_idx]] <- mi_ps_hist_one(get_mi_ps("ABG", i), treat_abg_all, "ABG", i)
  row_idx <- row_idx + 1L
  mi_ps_hist_rows[[row_idx]] <- mi_ps_hist_one(get_mi_ps("VBG", i), treat_vbg_all, "VBG", i)
}

# Average densities across imputations to avoid overplotting 80+ curves.
mi_ps_hist <- dplyr::bind_rows(mi_ps_hist_rows) |>
  dplyr::group_by(ScoreType, treat, bin_mid) |>
  dplyr::summarise(density = mean(density, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::mutate(ScoreType = factor(ScoreType, levels = c("ABG", "VBG")))

if (nrow(mi_ps_hist) > 0 && any(is.finite(mi_ps_hist$density) & mi_ps_hist$density > 0)) {
  # Render side-by-side ABG/VBG density histograms with shared x-range [0,1].
  mi_ps_hist_plot <- ggplot(mi_ps_hist, aes(x = bin_mid, y = density, fill = treat)) +
    geom_col(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, width = bin_width * 0.95) +
    facet_wrap(~ ScoreType, scales = "free_y") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("No Test" = "steelblue", "Test" = "tomato")) +
    labs(
      title = "Propensity-score overlap for MI logistic ABG and VBG test-ordering models",
      subtitle = paste0(
        "Averaged across ", imp$m, " imputations",
        if (IS_PILOT) " (pilot runtime setting; full runs use 80)" else ""
      ),
      x = "Propensity score",
      y = "Density",
      fill = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_pub(base_size = 12)

  print_plot_once(mi_ps_hist_plot, "propensity-histograms-mi-logistic", width = 8.5, height = 5)
} else {
  warning("MI propensity histogram has no positive density values; inspect mi_logistic_ps_* artifacts.", call. = FALSE)
}
```

```{r loveplot-mi-logistic}
#| code-block-title: "MI logistic IPSW love plot (Raw vs IPW)"
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: manuscript Figure S1 covariate balance after the primary MI logistic IPSW analysis.
# Build pooled (median across imputations) raw vs weighted |SMD|
# so MI balance can be read with the same visual grammar as non-MI.
stopifnot(exists("bal_imp_abg"), exists("bal_imp_vbg"))

lov_mi <- dplyr::bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$bal_long, bal_imp_vbg$bal_long) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    term = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level)),
    abs_smd_raw = abs(smd_pre),
    abs_smd_ipw = abs(smd_post)
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, term) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    abs_smd_raw = median(abs_smd_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    abs_smd_ipw = median(abs_smd_ipw, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lov_mi_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lov_mi |>
    dplyr::transmute(group, term, sample = "Raw", abs_smd = abs_smd_raw, abs_smd_raw),
  lov_mi |>
    dplyr::transmute(group, term, sample = "IPW", abs_smd = abs_smd_ipw, abs_smd_raw)
)
lov_mi_long <- add_overall_love_rows(lov_mi_long)

# Export plotting data and then draw the two-panel love plot.
write_csv_safely(lov_mi_long, results_path("loveplot_mi_logistic_data.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
p_lov_mi <- loveplot_style(
  lov_mi_long,
  "Covariate balance after MI logistic inverse-probability weighting for ABG and VBG test-ordering models",
  label_width = 28,
  base_size = MANUSCRIPT_BALANCE_DENSE_BASE_SIZE
)
print_plot_once(
  p_lov_mi,
  "loveplot-mi-logistic-abg-vbg",
  width = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_S1_WIDTH,
  height = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_S1_HEIGHT
)
```

```{r shap-top10-mi-logistic-display}
#| code-block-title: "MI logistic IPSW SHAP top contributors (ABG vs VBG)"
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: manuscript Figure S3 SHAP-style contribution summaries for the MI logistic IPSW models.
# Read precomputed top-10 SHAP values and re-plot deterministically.
shap_abg_file <- results_path("shap_top10_mi_logistic_abg.csv")
shap_vbg_file <- results_path("shap_top10_mi_logistic_vbg.csv")

shap_abg <- utils::read.csv(shap_abg_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
shap_vbg <- utils::read.csv(shap_vbg_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
shap_abg$group <- "ABG"
shap_vbg$group <- "VBG"

shap_plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(shap_abg, shap_vbg) |>
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(mean_abs_shap)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mean_abs_shap), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10L) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

stopifnot(nrow(shap_plot_df) > 0)

p_shap <- plot_shap_top10_two_panel(
  shap_plot_df,
  "SHAP-style contribution summaries for MI logistic ABG and VBG test-ordering models",
  "Mean |SHAP value|"
)
print_plot_force(p_shap, "shap-top10-mi-logistic-abg-vbg", width = 9, height = 5)
```

```{r float-barrier-mi-or-plot}
#| echo: true
#| results: "asis"
# Purpose: float barrier mi or plot.
float_barrier("section")
```

### Visualization

```{r}
#| label: ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 8.5
#| fig-height: 6.5
#| fig-pos: "H"

# Purpose: chunk.

mi_ipw_rcs_forms <- list(
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) ABG: IMV ~ CO2 spline + X"      = make_spline_fml("imv_proc", "paco2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) ABG: NIV ~ CO2 spline + X"      = make_spline_fml("niv_proc", "paco2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) ABG: Death60d ~ CO2 spline + X" = make_spline_fml("death_60d", "paco2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) ABG: HCRF ~ CO2 spline + X"     = make_spline_fml("hypercap_resp_failure", "paco2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) VBG: IMV ~ CO2 spline + X"      = make_spline_fml("imv_proc", "vbg_co2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) VBG: NIV ~ CO2 spline + X"      = make_spline_fml("niv_proc", "vbg_co2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) VBG: Death60d ~ CO2 spline + X" = make_spline_fml("death_60d", "vbg_co2", adj_core),
  "MI IPW spline (adjusted) VBG: HCRF ~ CO2 spline + X"     = make_spline_fml("hypercap_resp_failure", "vbg_co2", adj_core)
)
register_model_diagrams(mi_ipw_rcs_forms)

stopifnot(exists("abg_curves"), exists("vbg_curves"))

curve_abg <- abg_curves |>
  mutate(co2 = paco2) |>
  select(-paco2)
curve_vbg <- vbg_curves |>
  mutate(co2 = vbg_co2) |>
  select(-vbg_co2)
curve_all <- bind_rows(curve_abg, curve_vbg) |>
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome,
                          levels = c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure"),
                          labels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death (60d)", "Hypercapnic RF")))
axis_mi_ipw <- compute_or_axis_spec(list(curve_abg, curve_vbg), lo_col = "LCL", hi_col = "UCL")

mi_or_overlay <- ggplot(curve_all, aes(x = co2, y = OR, color = group, fill = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = LCL, ymax = UCL), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  or_axis_scale(axis_mi_ipw) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = expression(
      paste("MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-adjusted spline odds ratios: ABG vs VBG CO"[2])
    ),
    x = expression(CO[2]~"(mmHg)"),
    y = paste0("Odds ratio (ref: ABG ", ABG_CO2_REF, ", VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF, "; log scale)"),
    caption = paste0("Reference CO2: ABG ", ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF, " mmHg")
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

print_plot_once(mi_or_overlay, "ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg", width = 8.5, height = 6.5)
```

```{r}
#| label: ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg-prob
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 8.5
#| fig-height: 6.5
#| fig-pos: "H"
# Purpose: MI pooled IPSW spline probability overlay.
stopifnot(exists("abg_prob_curves"), exists("vbg_prob_curves"))

curve_abg_prob <- abg_prob_curves |>
  mutate(co2 = paco2) |>
  select(-paco2)
curve_vbg_prob <- vbg_prob_curves |>
  mutate(co2 = vbg_co2) |>
  select(-vbg_co2)
curve_all_prob <- bind_rows(curve_abg_prob, curve_vbg_prob) |>
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome,
                          levels = c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure"),
                          labels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death (60d)", "Hypercapnic RF")))
axis_mi_ipw_prob <- compute_prob_axis_spec(
  list(curve_abg_prob, curve_vbg_prob),
  lo_col = "p_LCL", hi_col = "p_UCL"
)

mi_prob_overlay <- ggplot(curve_all_prob, aes(x = co2, y = p, color = group, fill = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = p_LCL, ymax = p_UCL), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  prob_axis_scale(axis_mi_ipw_prob) +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = expression(
      paste("MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-adjusted spline predicted probabilities: ABG vs VBG CO"[2])
    ),
    x = expression(CO[2]~"(mmHg)"),
    y = "Predicted probability",
    caption = "Marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

print_plot_once(mi_prob_overlay, "ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg-prob", width = 8.5, height = 6.5)
```

## Canonical Key-Results Figures Across Analysis Tracks

The following 4 x 2 figures are the canonical manuscript-facing spline displays across crude, adjusted, imputed, and weighted analyses.

```{r}
#| label: key-results-track-prep
#| message: false
# Purpose: prepare canonical key-results figure data across analysis tracks.
stopifnot(
  exists("fit_spline_glm"),
  exists("subset_data_abg"), exists("subset_data_vbg"),
  exists("grid_abg_unw"), exists("grid_vbg_unw"),
  exists("ref_idx_abg_unw"), exists("ref_idx_vbg_unw"),
  exists("pred_imv"), exists("pred_niv"), exists("pred_death"), exists("pred_hcrf"),
  exists("pred_imv_vbg"), exists("pred_niv_vbg"), exists("pred_death_vbg"), exists("pred_hcrf_vbg"),
  exists("ipw_curve_overlay"), exists("ipw_curve_overlay_prob"),
  exists("abg_curves"), exists("vbg_curves"),
  exists("abg_prob_curves"), exists("vbg_prob_curves"),
  exists("mi_unweighted_abg_curves"), exists("mi_unweighted_vbg_curves"),
  exists("mi_unweighted_abg_prob_curves"), exists("mi_unweighted_vbg_prob_curves")
)

crude_spline_forms <- list(
  "ABG spline (crude): IMV ~ CO2 spline"      = make_spline_fml("imv_proc", "paco2", NULL),
  "ABG spline (crude): NIV ~ CO2 spline"      = make_spline_fml("niv_proc", "paco2", NULL),
  "ABG spline (crude): Death60d ~ CO2 spline" = make_spline_fml("death_60d", "paco2", NULL),
  "ABG spline (crude): HCRF ~ CO2 spline"     = make_spline_fml("hypercap_resp_failure", "paco2", NULL),
  "VBG spline (crude): IMV ~ CO2 spline"      = make_spline_fml("imv_proc", "vbg_co2", NULL),
  "VBG spline (crude): NIV ~ CO2 spline"      = make_spline_fml("niv_proc", "vbg_co2", NULL),
  "VBG spline (crude): Death60d ~ CO2 spline" = make_spline_fml("death_60d", "vbg_co2", NULL),
  "VBG spline (crude): HCRF ~ CO2 spline"     = make_spline_fml("hypercap_resp_failure", "vbg_co2", NULL)
)
register_model_diagrams(crude_spline_forms)

fit_imv_crude_abg <- fit_spline_glm("imv_proc", "paco2", subset_data_abg, "ABG",
                                    adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_niv_crude_abg <- fit_spline_glm("niv_proc", "paco2", subset_data_abg, "ABG",
                                    adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_death_crude_abg <- fit_spline_glm("death_60d", "paco2", subset_data_abg, "ABG",
                                      adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_hcrf_crude_abg <- fit_spline_glm("hypercap_resp_failure", "paco2", subset_data_abg, "ABG",
                                     adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_imv_crude_vbg <- fit_spline_glm("imv_proc", "vbg_co2", subset_data_vbg, "VBG",
                                    adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_niv_crude_vbg <- fit_spline_glm("niv_proc", "vbg_co2", subset_data_vbg, "VBG",
                                    adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_death_crude_vbg <- fit_spline_glm("death_60d", "vbg_co2", subset_data_vbg, "VBG",
                                      adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")
fit_hcrf_crude_vbg <- fit_spline_glm("hypercap_resp_failure", "vbg_co2", subset_data_vbg, "VBG",
                                     adj_vars = NULL, analysis_variant = "crude")

if (any(vapply(
  list(
    fit_imv_crude_abg, fit_niv_crude_abg, fit_death_crude_abg, fit_hcrf_crude_abg,
    fit_imv_crude_vbg, fit_niv_crude_vbg, fit_death_crude_vbg, fit_hcrf_crude_vbg
  ),
  is.null,
  logical(1)
))) {
  stop("Crude key-results spline fits failed; see model_fit_diagnostics.csv.")
}

pred_imv_crude_abg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_imv_crude_abg, grid_abg_unw, ref_idx_abg_unw, "paco2")
pred_niv_crude_abg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_niv_crude_abg, grid_abg_unw, ref_idx_abg_unw, "paco2")
pred_death_crude_abg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_death_crude_abg, grid_abg_unw, ref_idx_abg_unw, "paco2")
pred_hcrf_crude_abg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_hcrf_crude_abg, grid_abg_unw, ref_idx_abg_unw, "paco2")
pred_imv_crude_vbg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_imv_crude_vbg, grid_vbg_unw, ref_idx_vbg_unw, "vbg_co2")
pred_niv_crude_vbg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_niv_crude_vbg, grid_vbg_unw, ref_idx_vbg_unw, "vbg_co2")
pred_death_crude_vbg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_death_crude_vbg, grid_vbg_unw, ref_idx_vbg_unw, "vbg_co2")
pred_hcrf_crude_vbg <- predict_or_curve_from_fit(fit_hcrf_crude_vbg, grid_vbg_unw, ref_idx_vbg_unw, "vbg_co2")

key_results_crude_or_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  bind_key_results_or_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_crude_abg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_crude_abg,
      death_60d = pred_death_crude_abg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_crude_abg
    ),
    group = "ABG",
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results crude OR"
  ),
  bind_key_results_or_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_crude_vbg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_crude_vbg,
      death_60d = pred_death_crude_vbg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_crude_vbg
    ),
    group = "VBG",
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results crude OR"
  )
)
key_results_crude_prob_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  bind_key_results_prob_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_crude_abg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_crude_abg,
      death_60d = pred_death_crude_abg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_crude_abg
    ),
    group = "ABG",
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results crude probability"
  ),
  bind_key_results_prob_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_crude_vbg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_crude_vbg,
      death_60d = pred_death_crude_vbg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_crude_vbg
    ),
    group = "VBG",
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results crude probability"
  )
)

key_results_adjusted_or_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  bind_key_results_or_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv,
      niv_proc = pred_niv,
      death_60d = pred_death,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf
    ),
    group = "ABG",
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results adjusted OR"
  ),
  bind_key_results_or_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_vbg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_vbg,
      death_60d = pred_death_vbg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_vbg
    ),
    group = "VBG",
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results adjusted OR"
  )
)
key_results_adjusted_prob_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  bind_key_results_prob_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv,
      niv_proc = pred_niv,
      death_60d = pred_death,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf
    ),
    group = "ABG",
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results adjusted probability"
  ),
  bind_key_results_prob_curves(
    list(
      imv_proc = pred_imv_vbg,
      niv_proc = pred_niv_vbg,
      death_60d = pred_death_vbg,
      hypercap_resp_failure = pred_hcrf_vbg
    ),
    group = "VBG",
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results adjusted probability"
  )
)

key_results_imputed_or_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  normalize_key_results_or_df(
    mi_unweighted_abg_curves,
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results imputed OR"
  ),
  normalize_key_results_or_df(
    mi_unweighted_vbg_curves,
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results imputed OR"
  )
)
key_results_imputed_prob_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  normalize_key_results_prob_df(
    mi_unweighted_abg_prob_curves,
    co2_col = "paco2",
    context = "key-results imputed probability"
  ),
  normalize_key_results_prob_df(
    mi_unweighted_vbg_prob_curves,
    co2_col = "vbg_co2",
    context = "key-results imputed probability"
  )
)

key_results_main_mi_ipw_or_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  normalize_key_results_or_df(abg_curves, co2_col = "paco2", context = "key-results main MI IPW OR"),
  normalize_key_results_or_df(vbg_curves, co2_col = "vbg_co2", context = "key-results main MI IPW OR")
)
key_results_main_mi_ipw_prob_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  normalize_key_results_prob_df(abg_prob_curves, co2_col = "paco2", context = "key-results main MI IPW probability"),
  normalize_key_results_prob_df(vbg_prob_curves, co2_col = "vbg_co2", context = "key-results main MI IPW probability")
)

key_results_gbm_weighted_or_df <- normalize_key_results_or_df(
  ipw_curve_overlay,
  context = "key-results GBM-weighted OR"
)

stopifnot(exists("gbm_spline_fit_lookup"))

build_gbm_spline_marginal_prob_df <- function() {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(gbm_spline_fit_lookup), function(group_label) {
    co2_var <- if (identical(group_label, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(gbm_spline_fit_lookup[[group_label]]), function(outcome_var) {
      fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(gbm_spline_fit_lookup[[group_label]][[outcome_var]])
      if (is.null(fit_compact)) {
        stop("Missing compact GBM spline fit for ", group_label, " ", outcome_var)
      }
      co2_values <- ipw_curve_overlay_prob |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$group == group_label, .data$outcome == as.character(normalize_key_results_outcome(outcome_var))) |>
        dplyr::arrange(.data$co2) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data$co2)
      if (!length(co2_values)) {
        stop("Missing GBM spline probability grid for ", group_label, " ", outcome_var)
      }
      predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
        fit_compact,
        source_df = gbm_common_std_source_df,
        co2_var = co2_var,
        co2_values = co2_values,
        outcome_var = outcome_var
      ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          eta = .data$eta_imp,
          SE_eta = sqrt(pmax(.data$var_eta_imp, 0)),
          var_eta = .data$var_eta_imp,
          p = .data$p_imp,
          p_LCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta_imp - 1.96 * .data$SE_eta),
          p_UCL = stats::plogis(.data$eta_imp + 1.96 * .data$SE_eta),
          group = group_label,
          outcome = outcome_var,
          co2 = .data$co2_value,
          probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized"
        )
    }))
  }))
}

ipw_curve_overlay_prob_conditional_xref <- ipw_curve_overlay_prob
ipw_curve_overlay_prob <- build_gbm_spline_marginal_prob_df()

key_results_gbm_weighted_prob_df <- normalize_key_results_prob_df(
  ipw_curve_overlay_prob,
  context = "key-results GBM-weighted probability"
)

key_results_caption_crude <- paste0(
  "Odds ratio curves are relative to the test-specific reference CO2 values (ABG ",
  ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF,
  " mmHg). Predicted probability curves are unadjusted model-based probabilities within the tested cohorts."
)
key_results_caption_adjusted <- paste0(
  "Odds ratio curves are relative to the test-specific reference CO2 values (ABG ",
  ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF,
  " mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X_ref within each test-specific cohort."
)
key_results_caption_imputed <- paste0(
  "Odds ratio curves are relative to the test-specific reference CO2 values (ABG ",
  ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF,
  " mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X_ref within each test-specific cohort."
)
key_results_caption_main <- paste0(
  "These curves come from the primary MI-logistic IPSW analysis. ",
  "Odds ratio curves are relative to the test-specific reference CO2 values (ABG ",
  ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF,
  " mmHg). Predicted probability curves are marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
)
key_results_caption_gbm <- paste0(
  "These curves come from the non-MI GBM IPSW sensitivity analysis. ",
  "Odds ratio curves are relative to the test-specific reference CO2 values (ABG ",
  ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF,
  " mmHg). Predicted probability curves are marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution."
)

key_results_crude_plot <- build_key_results_figure(
  key_results_crude_or_df,
  key_results_crude_prob_df,
  figure_title = "Crude spline associations: ABG vs VBG CO2",
  figure_caption = key_results_caption_crude
)
key_results_adjusted_plot <- build_key_results_figure(
  key_results_adjusted_or_df,
  key_results_adjusted_prob_df,
  figure_title = "Unweighted covariate-adjusted spline associations of pCO2 with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG",
  figure_caption = NULL
)
key_results_imputed_plot <- build_key_results_figure(
  key_results_imputed_or_df,
  key_results_imputed_prob_df,
  figure_title = "MI-pooled adjusted spline associations (non-weighted): ABG vs VBG CO2",
  figure_caption = key_results_caption_imputed
)
key_results_main_mi_ipw_plot <- build_key_results_figure(
  key_results_main_mi_ipw_or_df,
  key_results_main_mi_ipw_prob_df,
  figure_title = "Primary MI-logistic IPSW-weighted spline associations of pCO2 with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG",
  figure_caption = NULL
)
key_results_gbm_weighted_plot <- build_key_results_figure(
  key_results_gbm_weighted_or_df,
  key_results_gbm_weighted_prob_df,
  figure_title = "GBM-IPSW-adjusted spline associations (non-MI): ABG vs VBG CO2",
  figure_caption = key_results_caption_gbm
)
```

```{r poster-and-probability-audits}
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Purpose: write lightweight poster visual and probability-standardization audits.
markdown_bool <- function(x) if (isTRUE(x)) "PASS" else "FAIL"
poster_status <- function(x, warn = FALSE) {
  if (isTRUE(x)) return("PASS")
  if (isTRUE(warn)) return("WARN")
  "FAIL"
}
markdown_table <- function(df) {
  if (!nrow(df)) return(character())
  header <- paste(names(df), collapse = " | ")
  sep <- paste(rep("---", ncol(df)), collapse = " | ")
  body <- apply(df, 1, function(row) paste(row, collapse = " | "))
  c(paste0("| ", header, " |"), paste0("| ", sep, " |"), paste0("| ", body, " |"))
}
read_text_if_exists <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return("")
  paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), collapse = " ")
}
file_nonzero <- function(path) isTRUE(file.exists(path) && file.info(path)$size > 0)

poster_fig1_svg <- unlist(cohort_flow_poster_paths[["svg"]], use.names = FALSE)
poster_fig2_svg <- unlist(key_results_main_mi_ipw_poster_paths[["svg"]], use.names = FALSE)
poster_fig1_svg_text <- read_text_if_exists(poster_fig1_svg)
poster_fig2_svg_text <- read_text_if_exists(poster_fig2_svg)
poster_fig1_svg_available <- !is.na(poster_fig1_svg) && file_nonzero(poster_fig1_svg)
poster_fig2_svg_available <- !is.na(poster_fig2_svg) && file_nonzero(poster_fig2_svg)
poster_fig1_layout_audit <- audit_cohort_flow_poster_layout(
  build_cohort_flow_poster_layout(cohort_flow_counts)
)
poster_axis_audit <- audit_key_results_or_poster_axis(key_results_main_mi_ipw_or_df)
poster_axis_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  isTRUE(poster_axis_audit$central_ci_truncated[[1]]) ~ "FAIL",
  isTRUE(poster_axis_audit$any_ci_truncated[[1]]) ~ "WARN",
  TRUE ~ "PASS"
)
poster_caption_text_lines <- c(
  "# Poster Caption Text",
  "",
  "## Figure 2",
  "",
  paste(
    "Primary MI-logistic IPSW spline odds ratios of pCO2 with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG.",
    "Curves are visual comparisons of model-based associations and are not formal equivalence tests.",
    "Bands show 95% confidence intervals; OR reference values are ABG 40 mmHg and VBG 45 mmHg."
  ),
  if (isTRUE(poster_axis_audit$any_ci_truncated[[1]])) {
    "Confidence intervals may be truncated in sparse tails for readability; central-range truncation is audited separately in Results/poster_visual_qc.md."
  } else {
    "No confidence-interval truncation was required by the poster Figure 2 axis audit."
  }
)
writeLines(poster_caption_text_lines, results_path("poster_caption_text.md"), useBytes = TRUE)
poster_caption_text <- paste(poster_caption_text_lines, collapse = " ")

poster_qc_rows <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  poster_fig1_layout_audit,
  tibble::tribble(
  ~check, ~status, ~detail,
  "figure1_png_nonzero", markdown_bool(file_nonzero(cohort_flow_poster_paths$png)), cohort_flow_poster_paths$png,
  "figure1_pdf_nonzero", markdown_bool(file_nonzero(cohort_flow_poster_paths$pdf)), cohort_flow_poster_paths$pdf,
  "figure1_svg_nonzero_or_skipped", markdown_bool(is.na(poster_fig1_svg) || file_nonzero(poster_fig1_svg)), dplyr::coalesce(poster_fig1_svg, "SVG skipped"),
  "figure1_ambulatory_label_present", markdown_bool(!poster_fig1_svg_available || (grepl("Ambulatory encounters", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE) && grepl("excluded", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE))), "Ambulatory exclusion label",
  "figure1_hypercapnia_criteria_present", markdown_bool(!poster_fig1_svg_available || grepl("Criteria for hypercapnia suspicion", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE)), "Criteria label under extracted cohort",
  "figure1_day_of_admit_label_present", markdown_bool(!poster_fig1_svg_available || grepl("Blood gas ordered on day of admit", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE)), "Branch header",
  "figure1_analysis_labels_present", markdown_bool(!poster_fig1_svg_available || (grepl("ABG Analysis cohort", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE) && grepl("VBG Analysis cohort", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE))), "Bottom analysis boxes",
  "figure1_removed_overlap_label", markdown_bool(!poster_fig1_svg_available || !grepl("Test-specific cohorts overlap", poster_fig1_svg_text, fixed = TRUE)), "Old overlap annotation absent",
  "figure2_png_nonzero", markdown_bool(file_nonzero(key_results_main_mi_ipw_poster_paths$png)), key_results_main_mi_ipw_poster_paths$png,
  "figure2_pdf_nonzero", markdown_bool(file_nonzero(key_results_main_mi_ipw_poster_paths$pdf)), key_results_main_mi_ipw_poster_paths$pdf,
  "figure2_svg_nonzero_or_skipped", markdown_bool(is.na(poster_fig2_svg) || file_nonzero(poster_fig2_svg)), dplyr::coalesce(poster_fig2_svg, "SVG skipped"),
  "figure2_has_large_legend_labels", markdown_bool(!poster_fig2_svg_available || (grepl(">ABG<|ABG", poster_fig2_svg_text) && grepl(">VBG<|VBG", poster_fig2_svg_text))), "ABG/VBG legend labels",
  "figure2_no_concatenated_direct_labels", markdown_bool(!poster_fig2_svg_available || !grepl("VBGABG|ABGVBG", poster_fig2_svg_text)), "No overlapped direct labels",
  "figure2_non_equivalence_caveat_not_embedded", markdown_bool(!poster_fig2_svg_available || !grepl("equivalence tests|visual comparisons", poster_fig2_svg_text, ignore.case = TRUE)), "Caveat belongs outside image canvas",
  "figure2_external_caption_caveat_present", markdown_bool(grepl("not formal equivalence tests", poster_caption_text, fixed = TRUE)), "Results/poster_caption_text.md",
  "figure2_axis_truncation_disclosed", poster_axis_status, poster_axis_audit$rationale[[1]],
  "manual_visual_review_required", "WARN", "Manual review remains required for final poster clipping/readability at placement size."
  )
)
poster_visual_qc_lines <- c(
  "# Poster Visual QC",
  "",
  paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
  paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
  paste0("- Run ID: ", diag_run_id),
  "- Status semantics: FAIL stops the render; WARN records allowed manual-review or tail-truncation items.",
  "",
  "## Automated Checks",
  markdown_table(poster_qc_rows),
  "",
  "## Figure 2 OR Axis Audit",
  markdown_table(poster_axis_audit |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
  "",
  "Manual visual review is still required for final clipping/readability decisions."
)
writeLines(poster_visual_qc_lines, results_path("poster_visual_qc.md"), useBytes = TRUE)
if (any(poster_qc_rows$status == "FAIL")) {
  stop("Poster visual QC automated checks failed; see Results/poster_visual_qc.md")
}

figure2_prob_methods <- unique(c(
  if ("probability_method" %in% names(abg_prob_curves)) as.character(abg_prob_curves$probability_method) else character(),
  if ("probability_method" %in% names(vbg_prob_curves)) as.character(vbg_prob_curves$probability_method) else character()
))
figure2_prob_audit_rows <- tibble::tibble(
  check = c(
    "primary_probability_method",
    "imv_probability_rows_present",
    "manuscript_inventory_current_method",
    "manuscript_output_map_method"
  ),
  status = c(
    markdown_bool(length(figure2_prob_methods) == 1L && figure2_prob_methods == "common_source_marginal_standardized"),
    markdown_bool(any(key_results_main_mi_ipw_prob_df$outcome == "IMV")),
    markdown_bool(all(probability_generation_inventory$current_method[probability_generation_inventory$manuscript_facing] == "common_source_marginal_standardized")),
    markdown_bool(all(manuscript_probability_output_map$new_probability_method[manuscript_probability_output_map$manuscript_facing] == "common_source_marginal_standardized"))
  ),
  detail = c(
    paste(figure2_prob_methods, collapse = "; "),
    paste0(sum(key_results_main_mi_ipw_prob_df$outcome == "IMV"), " IMV rows"),
    paste(unique(probability_generation_inventory$current_method[probability_generation_inventory$manuscript_facing]), collapse = "; "),
    paste(unique(manuscript_probability_output_map$new_probability_method[manuscript_probability_output_map$manuscript_facing]), collapse = "; ")
  )
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Figure 2 Probability Standardization Audit",
    "",
    "Primary Figure 2 predicted-probability curves are audited against the common eligible source-population standardization target.",
    "",
    markdown_table(figure2_prob_audit_rows)
  ),
  results_path("figure2_probability_standardization_audit.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
if (any(figure2_prob_audit_rows$status == "FAIL")) {
  stop("Figure 2 probability standardization audit failed; see Results/figure2_probability_standardization_audit.md")
}

gbm_prob_methods <- unique(as.character(ipw_curve_overlay_prob$probability_method))
gbm_prob_audit_rows <- tibble::tibble(
  check = c(
    "gbm_spline_probability_method",
    "gbm_spline_rows_present",
    "gbm_categorical_rows_present",
    "conditional_gbm_debug_retained"
  ),
  status = c(
    markdown_bool(length(gbm_prob_methods) == 1L && gbm_prob_methods == "common_source_marginal_standardized"),
    markdown_bool(nrow(key_results_gbm_weighted_prob_df) > 0L),
    markdown_bool(nrow(gbm_cat3_probs) > 0L),
    markdown_bool(exists("ipw_curve_overlay_prob_conditional_xref") && exists("gbm_cat3_probs_conditional_xref"))
  ),
  detail = c(
    paste(gbm_prob_methods, collapse = "; "),
    paste0(nrow(key_results_gbm_weighted_prob_df), " spline probability rows"),
    paste0(nrow(gbm_cat3_probs), " categorical probability rows"),
    "Conditional X_ref GBM probability objects retained as explicitly named debug/sensitivity objects."
  )
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# GBM Probability Standardization Audit",
    "",
    "GBM sensitivity-analysis predicted probabilities are marginally standardized to the same eligible source-cohort covariate distribution used by the primary probability outputs.",
    "",
    markdown_table(gbm_prob_audit_rows)
  ),
  results_path("gbm_probability_standardization_audit.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
if (any(gbm_prob_audit_rows$status == "FAIL")) {
  stop("GBM probability standardization audit failed; see Results/gbm_probability_standardization_audit.md")
}
```

```{r ipw-output-parity}
#| code-block-title: "IPSW output parity audit (non-MI vs MI)"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Purpose: ipw output parity.
non_mi_ipw_outputs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~parity_key, ~artifact_type, ~artifact_name,
  "threelevel_or", "figure", "or-plot-three-level-weighted.png",
  "key_results_figure", "figure", "key-results-spline-gbm-weighted-abg-vbg.png",
  "categorical_key_results_figure", "figure", "key-results-cat3-gbm-weighted-abg-vbg.png",
  "abg_spline_panel", "figure", "spline-ipw-abg-trimmed.png",
  "vbg_spline_panel", "figure", "spline-ipw-vbg.png",
  "abg_shared_spline", "figure", "spline-ipw-abg-shared.png",
  "overlay_spline", "figure", "spline-ipw-overlay-abg-vbg.png",
  "abg_spline_panel_prob", "figure", "spline-ipw-abg-trimmed-prob.png",
  "vbg_spline_panel_prob", "figure", "spline-ipw-vbg-prob.png",
  "abg_shared_spline_prob", "figure", "spline-ipw-abg-shared-prob.png",
  "overlay_spline_prob", "figure", "spline-ipw-overlay-abg-vbg-prob.png",
  "propensity_hist_tested", "figure", "propensity-histograms-conditional.png",
  "shap_top10_plot", "figure", "shap-top10-ipw-gbm-abg-vbg.png",
  "shap_top10_abg", "table_csv", "shap_top10_ipw_gbm_abg.csv",
  "shap_top10_vbg", "table_csv", "shap_top10_ipw_gbm_vbg.csv",
  "love_plot", "figure", "loveplot-ipw-gbm-abg-vbg.png",
  "love_plot_data", "table_csv", "loveplot_ipw_gbm_data.csv",
  "threelevel_table", "table_csv", "table_summary_adjusted_threelevel.csv",
  "categorical_key_results_table", "table_csv", "table_summary_key_results_cat3.csv",
  "weighting_diag", "table_csv", "weighting_diagnostics_non_mi.csv"
)

mi_ipw_outputs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~parity_key, ~artifact_type, ~artifact_name,
  "threelevel_or", "figure", "or-plot-mi-weighted.png",
  "threelevel_prob", "figure", "ipw-three-level-mi-abg-vbg-prob.png",
  "key_results_figure", "figure", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg.png",
  "categorical_key_results_figure", "figure", "key-results-cat3-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg.png",
  "overlay_spline", "figure", "ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg.png",
  "overlay_spline_prob", "figure", "ipw-rcs-overlay-mi-abg-vbg-prob.png",
  "mi_cat3_prob_curve_abg", "table_csv", "mi_cat3_prob_curve_abg.csv",
  "mi_cat3_prob_curve_vbg", "table_csv", "mi_cat3_prob_curve_vbg.csv",
  "mi_spline_curve_abg", "table_csv", "mi_spline_curve_abg.csv",
  "mi_spline_curve_vbg", "table_csv", "mi_spline_curve_vbg.csv",
  "mi_spline_prob_curve_abg", "table_csv", "mi_spline_prob_curve_abg.csv",
  "mi_spline_prob_curve_vbg", "table_csv", "mi_spline_prob_curve_vbg.csv",
  "propensity_hist_tested", "figure", "propensity-histograms-mi-logistic.png",
  "shap_top10_plot", "figure", "shap-top10-mi-logistic-abg-vbg.png",
  "shap_top10_abg", "table_csv", "shap_top10_mi_logistic_abg.csv",
  "shap_top10_vbg", "table_csv", "shap_top10_mi_logistic_vbg.csv",
  "love_plot", "figure", "loveplot-mi-logistic-abg-vbg.png",
  "love_plot_data", "table_csv", "loveplot_mi_logistic_data.csv",
  "threelevel_table", "table_csv", "mi_threelevel_results.csv",
  "categorical_key_results_table", "table_csv", "table_summary_key_results_cat3.csv",
  "ps_model_store_abg", "diagnostic_rds", "mi_logistic_ps_abg_list.rds",
  "ps_model_store_vbg", "diagnostic_rds", "mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list.rds"
)

# helper: test whether one parity-audit artifact is present in the expected
# figures or results directory.
artifact_exists <- function(name, type) {
  if (is.na(name) || !nzchar(name)) return(FALSE)
  if (type == "figure") {
    fig_path <- results_path("figs", name)
    if (grepl("[*?\\[]", name)) return(length(Sys.glob(fig_path)) > 0)
    return(file.exists(fig_path))
  }
  file.exists(results_path(name))
}

parity_tbl <- dplyr::full_join(
  dplyr::rename(non_mi_ipw_outputs, non_mi_artifact = artifact_name, artifact_type_non_mi = artifact_type),
  dplyr::rename(mi_ipw_outputs, mi_artifact = artifact_name, artifact_type_mi = artifact_type),
  by = "parity_key"
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    artifact_type = dplyr::coalesce(artifact_type_non_mi, artifact_type_mi),
    present_non_mi = mapply(artifact_exists, non_mi_artifact, artifact_type, USE.NAMES = FALSE),
    present_mi = mapply(artifact_exists, mi_artifact, artifact_type, USE.NAMES = FALSE),
    parity_status = dplyr::case_when(
      present_non_mi & present_mi ~ "both",
      present_non_mi & !present_mi ~ "non_mi_only",
      !present_non_mi & present_mi ~ "mi_only",
      TRUE ~ "unknown"
    ),
    recommended_action = dplyr::case_when(
      parity_status == "both" ~ "none",
      parity_status == "non_mi_only" ~ "add MI equivalent output",
      parity_status == "mi_only" ~ "add non-MI equivalent output",
      TRUE ~ "review manually"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(artifact_type, parity_key) |>
  dplyr::select(parity_key, artifact_type, non_mi_artifact, mi_artifact,
                present_non_mi, present_mi, parity_status, recommended_action)

write_csv_safely(parity_tbl, results_path("ipw_output_parity.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

parity_unknown <- parity_tbl |>
  dplyr::filter(parity_status == "unknown")
write_csv_safely(parity_unknown, results_path("ipw_output_parity_unknown.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
if (RUN_MODE == "full" && nrow(parity_unknown) > 0) {
  stop("Parity audit has unknown rows; see ", results_path("ipw_output_parity_unknown.csv"))
}

parity_one_sided <- parity_tbl |>
  dplyr::filter(parity_status != "both")

write_csv_safely(parity_one_sided, results_path("ipw_output_parity_diffs.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

render_table_pdf_maybe(
  parity_one_sided,
  caption = "GBM IPSW vs MI-logistic IPSW output parity (artifacts present in only one track)",
  file_stub = "ipw_output_parity_one_sided",
  digits = 0,
  show = FALSE
)
```

```{r key-results-output-audit}
#| code-block-title: "Canonical key-results artifact audit"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: verify the additional canonical key-results artifacts across spline and categorical tracks.
key_results_outputs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~family, ~track, ~artifact_type, ~artifact_name,
  "Spline", "Crude", "figure", "key-results-spline-crude-abg-vbg.png",
  "Spline", "Adjusted", "figure", "key-results-spline-adjusted-abg-vbg.png",
  "Spline", "Imputed", "figure", "key-results-spline-imputed-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "Crude", "figure", "key-results-cat3-crude-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "Adjusted", "figure", "key-results-cat3-adjusted-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "Imputed", "figure", "key-results-cat3-imputed-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "Weighted and adjusted", "figure", "key-results-cat3-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "GBM-weighted", "figure", "key-results-cat3-gbm-weighted-abg-vbg.png",
  "Categorical", "Master table", "table_csv", "table_summary_key_results_cat3.csv",
  "Categorical", "ABG table", "table_csv", "table_summary_key_results_cat3_abg.csv",
  "Categorical", "VBG table", "table_csv", "table_summary_key_results_cat3_vbg.csv",
  "Categorical", "Long-form extract", "table_csv", "cat3_key_results_long.csv"
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    artifact_file = dplyr::if_else(
      artifact_type == "figure",
      results_path("figs", artifact_name),
      results_path(artifact_name)
    ),
    artifact_path = pretty_path(artifact_file),
    exists = file.exists(artifact_file)
  )

write_csv_safely(
  key_results_outputs |> dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of("artifact_file")),
  results_path("key_results_output_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r manuscript-supplement-tables-additional}
#| code-block-title: "Additional manuscript-facing supplement tables"
#| include: false
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: generate Supplementary Tables S1, S4, and S5 from notebook state.
source_extract_fields <- function(fields) {
  present <- intersect(fields, names(subset_data_raw))
  missing <- setdiff(fields, present)
  out <- present
  if (length(missing)) out <- c(out, paste0(missing, " (not present in extract)"))
  if (!length(out)) return("Not present in analysis extract")
  paste(out, collapse = "; ")
}

s1_code_row <- function(phenotype_input, code_system, source_value, analysis_fields,
                        role, source_code_status, notes) {
  tibble::tibble(
    `Phenotype input` = phenotype_input,
    `Code system` = code_system,
    `Source code/value or extract field` = source_value,
    `Analysis field(s)` = source_extract_fields(analysis_fields),
    Role = role,
    `Source code status` = source_code_status,
    Notes = notes
  )
}

table_s1_inclusion_criteria <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  s1_code_row(
    "Arterial blood gas measurement",
    "LOINC-derived laboratory field",
    "value_highest_20198",
    c("value_highest_20198", "paco2", "has_abg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; ABG exposure definition",
    "available extract concept identifier; upstream LOINC code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Imported ABG-related concept field used in the arterial CO2 derivation."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Arterial blood gas measurement",
    "LOINC-derived laboratory field",
    "value_highest_115576",
    c("value_highest_115576", "abg_ph", "has_abg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; ABG exposure definition",
    "available extract concept identifier; upstream LOINC code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Imported ABG-related concept field retained with the arterial gas measurement set."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Arterial blood gas measurement",
    "LOINC-derived laboratory field",
    "value_highest_327718",
    c("value_highest_327718", "abg_hco3", "abg_o2sat", "has_abg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; ABG exposure definition",
    "available extract concept identifier; upstream LOINC code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Imported ABG-related concept field retained with arterial bicarbonate/O2-saturation fields."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Arterial blood gas procedure",
    "LOINC/procedure-derived flag",
    "meas_arterial_gas_proc; meas_art_gas_proc_first_date",
    c("meas_arterial_gas_proc", "meas_art_gas_proc_first_date", "has_abg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; ABG exposure definition; timing diagnostics",
    "collapsed derived procedure flag; upstream source code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Procedure-date field is an encounter-day offset when present."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Venous blood gas measurement",
    "LOINC-derived laboratory field",
    "vbg_co2; vbg_ph; vbg_hco3; vbg_o2sat",
    c("vbg_co2", "vbg_ph", "vbg_hco3", "vbg_o2sat", "has_vbg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; VBG exposure definition",
    "collapsed derived measurement fields; upstream LOINC code list not available in analysis extract",
    "The de-identified analysis extract stores VBG measurement variables rather than row-level LOINC code rows."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Venous blood gas procedure",
    "LOINC/procedure-derived flag",
    "meas_venous_o2_proc; meas_venous_o2_proc_first_date",
    c("meas_venous_o2_proc", "meas_venous_o2_proc_first_date", "has_vbg"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; VBG exposure definition; timing diagnostics",
    "collapsed derived procedure flag; upstream source code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Procedure-date field is an encounter-day offset when present."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Hypercapnic respiratory failure and related respiratory diagnoses",
    "ICD-10-CM-derived diagnosis flags",
    "hypercap_resp_failure; resp_acid_dx; other_resp_failure; resp_abnormality; resp_dep_compl; RESPFAIL_rfs",
    c("hypercap_resp_failure", "resp_acid_dx", "other_resp_failure", "resp_abnormality", "resp_dep_compl", "RESPFAIL_rfs"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; hypercapnic respiratory failure outcome definition",
    "collapsed derived diagnosis flags; upstream ICD-10-CM code list not available in analysis extract",
    "These fields identify respiratory-failure phenotypes after upstream code grouping."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Severe obesity, OHS, and sleep-hypoventilation criteria",
    "ICD-10-CM-derived flags and measured BMI fields",
    "ohs_code; sleep_hypovent_dx; other_sleep_hypovent_dx; curr_bmi; working_bmi; bmi; ats_ohs_flag; pos_ohs_flag; OBESITY_rfs",
    c("ohs_code", "sleep_hypovent_dx", "other_sleep_hypovent_dx", "curr_bmi", "working_bmi", "bmi", "ats_ohs_flag", "pos_ohs_flag", "OBESITY_rfs"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; covariate definition",
    "mixed measured fields and collapsed derived diagnosis flags; upstream ICD-10-CM code list not available in analysis extract",
    "BMI is retained as a baseline covariate; OHS and obesity flags support enriched-cohort construction."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Non-invasive ventilation procedure",
    "CPT/PCS/procedure-derived flag",
    "niv_proc; niv_proc_first_date",
    c("niv_proc", "niv_proc_first_date", "VENTSUPPORT_rfs"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; NIV outcome definition; timing diagnostics",
    "collapsed derived procedure flag; upstream CPT/PCS/procedure code list not available in analysis extract",
    "The date field is an encounter-day offset and is used only for diagnostic timing sensitivity."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Invasive mechanical ventilation procedure",
    "CPT/PCS/procedure-derived flag",
    "imv_proc; imv_proc_first_date",
    c("imv_proc", "imv_proc_first_date", "VENTSUPPORT_rfs"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; IMV outcome definition; timing diagnostics",
    "collapsed derived procedure flag; upstream CPT/PCS/procedure code list not available in analysis extract",
    "The date field is an encounter-day offset and is used only for diagnostic timing sensitivity."
  ),
  s1_code_row(
    "Any ventilatory support procedure",
    "CPT/PCS/procedure-derived flag",
    "vent_proc; vent_proc_first_date; VENTSUPPORT_rfs",
    c("vent_proc", "vent_proc_first_date", "VENTSUPPORT_rfs"),
    "Source-cohort enrichment; ventilatory-support phenotype definition",
    "collapsed derived procedure flag; upstream CPT/PCS/procedure code list not available in analysis extract",
    "Composite ventilatory-support fields combine NIV and IMV-related upstream procedure groupings."
  )
)

table_s1_inclusion_criteria <- table_s1_inclusion_criteria |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    `Table section` = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(.data$`Phenotype input`, "Arterial|Venous") ~
        "S1A. Blood gas measurement and exposure inputs",
      stringr::str_detect(.data$`Phenotype input`, "Non-invasive|Invasive|ventilatory|Hypercapnic respiratory failure") ~
        "S1C. Outcome and procedure definitions",
      TRUE ~ "S1B. Hypercapnia-suspicion phenotype inputs"
    ),
    .before = 1L
  )

table_s1_panel_order <- c(
  "S1A. Blood gas measurement and exposure inputs",
  "S1B. Hypercapnia-suspicion phenotype inputs",
  "S1C. Outcome and procedure definitions"
)

table_s1_display <- table_s1_inclusion_criteria |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    `Table section` = factor(.data$`Table section`, levels = table_s1_panel_order),
    `Criterion / variable` = .data$`Phenotype input`,
    `Code/source field` = paste(.data$`Code system`, .data$`Source code/value or extract field`, sep = ": "),
    `Role in analysis` = .data$Role,
    Note = .data$Notes
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$`Table section`, .data$`Phenotype input`) |>
  dplyr::select(`Table section`, `Criterion / variable`, `Code/source field`, `Role in analysis`, Note)

table_s1_display_panels <- setNames(
  lapply(table_s1_panel_order, function(panel_name) {
    table_s1_display |>
      dplyr::filter(as.character(.data$`Table section`) == panel_name) |>
      dplyr::select(`Criterion / variable`, `Code/source field`, `Role in analysis`, Note)
  }),
  table_s1_panel_order
)

write_standalone_definition_table_pdf(
  table_s1_display_panels,
  caption = "Inclusion criteria into the enriched sample",
  file_stub = "table_s1_inclusion_criteria",
  display_label = "Table S1",
  csv_df = table_s1_inclusion_criteria,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE
)

baseline_role_vars <- intersect(covars_ps, names(subset_data_raw))
baseline_role_labels <- c(
  age_at_encounter = "Age",
  curr_bmi = "BMI",
  sex = "Sex",
  race_ethnicity = "Race/ethnicity",
  location = "Location",
  encounter_type = "Encounter type",
  copd = "COPD",
  asthma = "Asthma",
  osa = "OSA",
  chf = "CHF",
  acute_nmd = "Neuromuscular disease",
  phtn = "Pulmonary hypertension",
  ckd = "Chronic kidney disease",
  dm = "Diabetes",
  temp_new = "Temperature",
  sbp = "Systolic blood pressure",
  dbp = "Diastolic blood pressure",
  hr = "Heart rate",
  sodium = "Sodium",
  serum_cr = "Serum creatinine",
  serum_hco3 = "Serum bicarbonate",
  serum_cl = "Serum chloride",
  serum_lac = "Serum lactate",
  serum_k = "Serum potassium",
  wbc = "White blood cell count",
  plt = "Platelet count",
  serum_phos = "Serum phosphate",
  serum_ca = "Serum calcium"
)

role_for_var <- function(v) {
  roles <- character()
  if (v %in% adj_core) roles <- c(roles, "direct adjustment")
  if (v %in% covars_ps) roles <- c(roles, "PS model")
  if (!length(roles)) roles <- "auxiliary"
  paste(unique(roles), collapse = "; ")
}

missing_lookup <- miss_tbl |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variable, .data$pct_missing)

mi_predictor_row_n <- function(v) {
  if (!exists("pred") || is.null(pred) || !v %in% rownames(pred)) return(0L)
  sum(pred[v, , drop = TRUE] != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
}

mi_predictor_col_n <- function(v) {
  if (!exists("pred") || is.null(pred) || !v %in% colnames(pred)) return(0L)
  sum(pred[, v, drop = TRUE] != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
}

table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis <- tibble::tibble(variable = baseline_role_vars) |>
  dplyr::left_join(missing_lookup, by = "variable") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    display_variable = dplyr::recode(.data$variable, !!!baseline_role_labels, .default = .data$variable),
    `Analysis role` = vapply(.data$variable, role_for_var, character(1L)),
    pct_missing_num = dplyr::coalesce(.data$pct_missing, 0),
    `% missing` = sprintf("%.1f%%", .data$pct_missing_num),
    mi_method = dplyr::coalesce(meth[.data$variable], ""),
    predictor_row_n = vapply(.data$variable, mi_predictor_row_n, integer(1L)),
    predictor_col_n = vapply(.data$variable, mi_predictor_col_n, integer(1L)),
    `Included in MI model` = dplyr::if_else(
      .data$variable %in% names(meth) &
        (nzchar(.data$mi_method) | .data$predictor_row_n > 0L | .data$predictor_col_n > 0L),
      "Yes",
      "No"
    ),
    `Imputed if missing` = dplyr::if_else(
      nzchar(.data$mi_method) & .data$pct_missing_num > 0,
      "Yes",
      "No"
    ),
    `Observed complete` = dplyr::if_else(.data$pct_missing_num == 0, "Yes", "No"),
    Notes = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$pct_missing_num == 0 & .data$`Included in MI model` == "Yes" ~
        "Complete in this render; used as MI predictor or model variable.",
      .data$`Imputed if missing` == "Yes" ~
        paste0("Eligible for MICE method: ", .data$mi_method, "."),
      .data$`Included in MI model` == "Yes" ~
        "Included as a predictor but not itself imputed.",
      TRUE ~ "Not included in the primary MI model."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    Variable = .data$display_variable,
    .data$`Analysis role`,
    .data$`% missing`,
    .data$`Included in MI model`,
    .data$`Imputed if missing`,
    .data$`Observed complete`,
    .data$Notes
  )

write_standalone_table_pdf(
  table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis,
  caption = "Missingness of baseline covariates used in the primary analysis",
  file_stub = "table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis",
  wide = FALSE,
  digits = 1,
  max_cols = 7,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = "Table S4"
)

diag_df_for_s5 <- enrich_model_diagnostic_flags(mi_outcome_diag)
diag_df_for_s5$phat_extreme <- diag_df_for_s5$phat_low_flag | diag_df_for_s5$phat_high_flag

mi_variants_for_s5 <- intersect(c("mi_ipw", "weighted_imputed"), unique(diag_df_for_s5$analysis_variant))
if (!length(mi_variants_for_s5)) mi_variants_for_s5 <- unique(diag_df_for_s5$analysis_variant)

issue_summary <- diag_df_for_s5 |>
  dplyr::filter(analysis_variant %in% mi_variants_for_s5) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, outcome, component, analysis_variant) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_fits = dplyr::n(),
    n_nonconv = sum(nonconv_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sep_warn = sum(sep_warn_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_phat_extreme = sum(phat_extreme %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sep_flag = sum(sep_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_fail = sum(diagnostic_class == "fail", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_warn = sum(diagnostic_class == "warn", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(issue_summary, results_path("mi_fit_issue_summary.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

safe_max <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_real_)
  max(x)
}

render_scope_note <- if (IS_PILOT) {
  paste0(
    "Pilot validation render settings shown (pilot_frac = ", PILOT_FRAC,
    "); final manuscript Table S5 should be regenerated from the full run."
  )
} else {
  "Full-analysis render settings shown."
}

status_from_counts <- function(fail_n = 0L, warn_n = 0L) {
  if (is.finite(fail_n) && fail_n > 0) return("fail")
  if (is.finite(warn_n) && warn_n > 0) return("warning")
  "resolved"
}

mc_ratio_max <- safe_max(mc_tab$mc_err_over_se)
chain_drift_n <- sum(chain_diag$flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
logged_event_n <- sum(log_events_summary$n, na.rm = TRUE)
warning_row_n <- nrow(mi_warn_log)
nonconv_n <- sum(diag_df_for_s5$nonconv_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
sep_warn_n <- sum(diag_df_for_s5$sep_warn_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
phat_warn_n <- sum(diag_df_for_s5$diagnostic_class == "warn", na.rm = TRUE)
diagnostic_fail_n <- sum(diag_df_for_s5$diagnostic_class == "fail", na.rm = TRUE)

table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  Domain = c(
    "Render scope",
    "Render scope",
    "Imputation run",
    "Imputation run",
    "Imputation run",
    "Monte Carlo error",
    "Chain diagnostics",
    "Chain diagnostics",
    "MICE logged events",
    "Captured warnings",
    "Outcome fit diagnostics",
    "Outcome fit diagnostics",
    "Outcome fit diagnostics",
    "Outcome fit diagnostics"
  ),
  Metric = c(
    "Current render",
    "Final manuscript target",
    "Completed imputations",
    "Iterations per imputation",
    "Variables imputed",
    "Maximum MC error / SE in diagnostic model",
    "Variables with available chain diagnostics",
    "Variables flagged for drift",
    "Total logged events",
    "Captured warning rows",
    "MI model fits audited",
    "Fits with nonconvergence flags",
    "Fits with explicit separation warnings",
    "Fits with tail-only fitted-probability warnings"
  ),
  Value = c(
    paste0(RUN_MODE, " (pilot_frac=", PILOT_FRAC, ")"),
    "full (m=80; maxit=20)",
    as.character(imp$m),
    as.character(MAXIT_RUN),
    as.character(length(impute_vars)),
    ifelse(is.finite(mc_ratio_max), sprintf("%.3f", mc_ratio_max), "Not estimable"),
    as.character(nrow(chain_diag)),
    as.character(chain_drift_n),
    as.character(logged_event_n),
    as.character(warning_row_n),
    as.character(nrow(diag_df_for_s5)),
    as.character(nonconv_n),
    as.character(sep_warn_n),
    as.character(phat_warn_n)
  ),
  Status = c(
    ifelse(IS_PILOT, "warning", "resolved"),
    ifelse(IS_PILOT, "not applicable", "resolved"),
    "resolved",
    "resolved",
    ifelse(length(impute_vars) > 0, "resolved", "warning"),
    ifelse(is.finite(mc_ratio_max) && mc_ratio_max <= 0.25, "resolved", "warning"),
    ifelse(nrow(chain_diag) > 0, "resolved", "warning"),
    status_from_counts(warn_n = chain_drift_n),
    status_from_counts(warn_n = logged_event_n),
    status_from_counts(warn_n = warning_row_n),
    "resolved",
    status_from_counts(fail_n = nonconv_n),
    status_from_counts(fail_n = sep_warn_n),
    status_from_counts(fail_n = diagnostic_fail_n, warn_n = phat_warn_n)
  ),
  Interpretation = c(
    render_scope_note,
    "Full manuscript settings remain the target for final manuscript-facing diagnostics.",
    "Imputation count used in the current render.",
    "Configured MICE iteration count for this render.",
    "Variables with non-empty MICE imputation methods and observed missingness.",
    "Diagnostic model ratio; lower values indicate less simulation noise relative to model SE.",
    "Imputed variables with traceable chain-mean diagnostics.",
    "Variables exceeding drift/slope screening thresholds.",
    "Rows reported by mice::loggedEvents across batches.",
    "Warnings captured by notebook-level diagnostics wrappers.",
    "Outcome-model diagnostic rows captured for MI analyses.",
    "Potential convergence problems requiring review if nonzero.",
    "Explicit fitted-probability or separation warnings are treated as manuscript-critical failures if present.",
    "Tail-only fitted-probability extremes are warnings unless they affect manuscript-facing plotted curves."
  )
)

write_standalone_table_pdf(
  table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary,
  caption = "Multiple-imputation diagnostic summary",
  file_stub = "table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 3,
  max_cols = 5,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = "Table S5"
)
```

### Standardized predicted-risk differences

The standardized risk-difference outputs below use the same common eligible source-population marginal standardization used for the manuscript-facing predicted probabilities. Risk differences are defined as VBG predicted risk minus ABG predicted risk and are reported in percentage points. These are descriptive comparisons of standardized predicted risk, not agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration tests.

```{r risk-difference-standardized-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "Standardized risk-difference helper functions"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

risk_difference_direction <- "VBG - ABG"
risk_difference_outcome_levels <- stacked_ror_outcome_levels
risk_difference_outcome_display <- stacked_ror_outcome_display
risk_difference_panel_levels <- KEY_RESULTS_OUTCOME_LEVELS
risk_difference_offset_values <- 0:10

label_risk_difference_outcome <- function(x) {
  as.character(normalize_key_results_outcome(x, context = "risk difference outcome"))
}

format_risk_pct_ci <- function(estimate, lcl, ucl, digits = 1) {
  estimate <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(estimate))
  lcl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(lcl))
  ucl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ucl))
  out <- rep("", length(estimate))
  ok <- is.finite(estimate) & is.finite(lcl) & is.finite(ucl)
  out[ok] <- sprintf(
    paste0("%.", digits, "f (%.", digits, "f, %.", digits, "f)"),
    100 * estimate[ok], 100 * lcl[ok], 100 * ucl[ok]
  )
  out
}

format_risk_difference_pp_ci <- function(estimate, lcl, ucl, digits = 1) {
  estimate <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(estimate))
  lcl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(lcl))
  ucl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ucl))
  out <- rep("", length(estimate))
  ok <- is.finite(estimate) & is.finite(lcl) & is.finite(ucl)
  out[ok] <- sprintf(
    paste0("%.", digits, "f (%.", digits, "f, %.", digits, "f)"),
    100 * estimate[ok], 100 * lcl[ok], 100 * ucl[ok]
  )
  out
}

pool_risk_difference_group <- function(df) {
  pooled <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$risk_difference, df$var_risk_difference)
  tibble::tibble(
    risk_difference = pooled$estimate,
    se_risk_difference = pooled$SE,
    rd_lcl = pooled$estimate - 1.96 * pooled$SE,
    rd_ucl = pooled$estimate + 1.96 * pooled$SE,
    rd_pp = 100 * pooled$estimate,
    rd_lcl_pp = 100 * (pooled$estimate - 1.96 * pooled$SE),
    rd_ucl_pp = 100 * (pooled$estimate + 1.96 * pooled$SE),
    m_used = pooled$m_used,
    risk_difference_direction = risk_difference_direction,
    variance_policy = "within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG); modality-specific prediction models are separate fits"
  )
}

make_risk_difference_spline_readout_grid <- function(centered_grid = stacked_spline_readout_grid) {
  centered_grid <- sort(unique(centered_grid[is.finite(centered_grid)]))
  if (length(centered_grid) < 3L) {
    stop("Risk-difference spline readout grid has fewer than three centered values.")
  }
  tibble::tibble(
    centered_pco2 = centered_grid,
    abg_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF + centered_grid,
    vbg_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF + centered_grid,
    correction_mmHg = VBG_CO2_REF - ABG_CO2_REF,
    pairing_rule = "VBG pCO2 equals ABG pCO2 plus 5 mmHg"
  )
}

predict_risk_difference_spline_values <- function(fit_compact, source_df, co2_var,
                                                   co2_values, outcome_var, group_label,
                                                   imp_index) {
  if (is.null(fit_compact)) {
    stop("Missing compact spline fit for ", group_label, " / ", outcome_var, " / imputation ", imp_index)
  }
  co2_values <- sort(unique(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(co2_values))))
  co2_values <- co2_values[is.finite(co2_values)]
  if (!length(co2_values)) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
    fit_compact,
    source_df = source_df,
    co2_var = co2_var,
    co2_values = co2_values,
```
