```{r risk-difference-standardized-helpers}
    outcome_var = outcome_var
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      imp = as.integer(imp_index),
      group = group_label,
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = label_risk_difference_outcome(outcome_var),
      co2_scale = co2_var,
      probability_method = "common_source_marginal_standardized"
    )
}

pair_risk_difference_predictions <- function(pair_grid, prediction_df,
                                             abg_value_col, vbg_value_col) {
  pair_has_ids <- all(c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label") %in% names(pair_grid))
  abg_pred <- prediction_df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == "ABG") |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      imp,
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      abg_pco2 = .data$co2_value,
      p_abg = .data$p_imp,
      var_p_abg = .data$var_p_imp,
      n_available_abg = .data$n_available,
      n_standardized_abg = .data$n_standardized,
      standardization_sample_cap_abg = .data$standardization_sample_cap
    )
  vbg_pred <- prediction_df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == "VBG") |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      imp,
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      vbg_pco2 = .data$co2_value,
      p_vbg = .data$p_imp,
      var_p_vbg = .data$var_p_imp,
      n_available_vbg = .data$n_available,
      n_standardized_vbg = .data$n_standardized,
      standardization_sample_cap_vbg = .data$standardization_sample_cap
    )

  pair_df <- pair_grid |>
    dplyr::rename(
      abg_pco2 = dplyr::all_of(abg_value_col),
      vbg_pco2 = dplyr::all_of(vbg_value_col)
    )

  paired <- if (isTRUE(pair_has_ids)) {
    pair_df |>
      dplyr::left_join(abg_pred, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label", "abg_pco2")) |>
      dplyr::left_join(vbg_pred, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label", "vbg_pco2"))
  } else {
    pair_df |>
      dplyr::left_join(abg_pred, by = "abg_pco2") |>
      dplyr::left_join(vbg_pred, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label", "vbg_pco2"))
  }

  paired |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      risk_difference = .data$p_vbg - .data$p_abg,
      var_risk_difference = .data$var_p_vbg + .data$var_p_abg,
      risk_difference_direction = risk_difference_direction
    )
}
```

```{r risk-difference-standardized-execution}
#| code-block-title: "Standardized risk-difference execution"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

risk_difference_spline_readout_grid <- make_risk_difference_spline_readout_grid()
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_spline_readout_grid,
  results_path("risk_difference_spline_readout_grid.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_cat3_by_imputation <- std_cat3_imp |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = as.character(.data$group),
    outcome = dplyr::recode(
      as.character(.data$outcome),
      imv_proc = "IMV",
      niv_proc = "NIV",
      death_60d = "Death60d",
      hypercap_resp_failure = "HCRF",
      .default = as.character(.data$outcome)
    ),
    outcome_label = label_risk_difference_outcome(.data$outcome),
    category = as.character(.data$category)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    imp, group, outcome, outcome_label, category, probability_method,
    p_imp, var_p_imp, n_available, n_standardized, standardization_sample_cap
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = c(p_imp, var_p_imp, n_available, n_standardized, standardization_sample_cap, probability_method),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{group}"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_difference = .data$p_imp_VBG - .data$p_imp_ABG,
    var_risk_difference = .data$var_p_imp_VBG + .data$var_p_imp_ABG,
    risk_difference_direction = risk_difference_direction,
    variance_policy = "within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG)"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), factor(.data$category, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS))

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_cat3_by_imputation,
  results_path("risk_difference_cat3_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_cat3_prob_long <- prob_cat3_marginal_standardized_all |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = as.character(.data$group),
    outcome = dplyr::recode(
      as.character(.data$outcome),
      imv_proc = "IMV",
      niv_proc = "NIV",
      death_60d = "Death60d",
      hypercap_resp_failure = "HCRF",
      .default = as.character(.data$outcome)
    ),
    outcome_label = label_risk_difference_outcome(.data$outcome),
    category = as.character(.data$category)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(group, outcome, outcome_label, category, p, p_LCL, p_UCL, probability_method)

risk_difference_cat3_prob_wide <- risk_difference_cat3_prob_long |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = c(p, p_LCL, p_UCL, probability_method),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{group}"
  )

risk_difference_cat3_pooled <- risk_difference_cat3_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$category) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_risk_difference_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    risk_difference_cat3_prob_wide,
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "category")
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), factor(.data$category, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$p_ABG, .data$p_LCL_ABG, .data$p_UCL_ABG),
    vbg_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$p_VBG, .data$p_LCL_VBG, .data$p_UCL_VBG),
    risk_difference_ci = format_risk_difference_pp_ci(.data$risk_difference, .data$rd_lcl, .data$rd_ucl)
  )

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_cat3_pooled,
  results_path("risk_difference_cat3_pooled.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation <- risk_difference_cat3_prob_long |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    group = as.character(.data$group),
    outcome = as.character(.data$outcome_label),
    category = as.character(.data$category),
    rd_source_probability = .data$p
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    main_cat3_probs |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        group = as.character(.data$group),
        outcome = as.character(.data$outcome),
        category = as.character(.data$category),
        table2_probability = .data$p
      ),
    by = c("group", "outcome", "category")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abs_probability_difference = abs(.data$rd_source_probability - .data$table2_probability),
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(.data$table2_probability) | !is.finite(.data$abs_probability_difference) ~ "FAIL",
      .data$abs_probability_difference <= 1e-6 ~ "PASS",
      .data$abs_probability_difference <= 0.005 ~ "WARN",
      TRUE ~ "FAIL"
    )
  )

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation,
  results_path("risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows <- list()
risk_difference_offset_scan_grid_rows <- list()

for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_i <- attach_stacked_ror_id_columns(get_imp(imp_index))
  std_source_df <- build_common_std_source_df(d_i, imp_index)
  w_abg_i <- get_mi_weight("ABG", imp_index)
  w_vbg_i <- get_mi_weight("VBG", imp_index)

  for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
    stacked_df <- make_stacked_gas_dataset(
      d_i,
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      id_vars = stacked_ror_id_vars_present,
      w_abg = w_abg_i,
      w_vbg = w_vbg_i,
      imp_index = imp_index
    )
    offset_grid_i <- make_stacked_offset_scan_grid(stacked_df, offsets = risk_difference_offset_values) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        imp = as.integer(imp_index),
        outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
        outcome_label = label_risk_difference_outcome(outcome_var),
        .before = 1L
      )
    risk_difference_offset_scan_grid_rows[[length(risk_difference_offset_scan_grid_rows) + 1L]] <- offset_grid_i

    abg_values <- sort(unique(c(risk_difference_spline_readout_grid$abg_pco2, offset_grid_i$abg_pco2)))
    vbg_values <- sort(unique(c(risk_difference_spline_readout_grid$vbg_pco2, offset_grid_i$vbg_pco2)))

    risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows[[length(risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows) + 1L]] <-
      predict_risk_difference_spline_values(
        compact_spline_fit(spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]]),
        source_df = std_source_df,
        co2_var = "paco2",
        co2_values = abg_values,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        group_label = "ABG",
        imp_index = imp_index
      )
    risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows[[length(risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows) + 1L]] <-
      predict_risk_difference_spline_values(
        compact_spline_fit(spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]]),
        source_df = std_source_df,
        co2_var = "vbg_co2",
        co2_values = vbg_values,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        group_label = "VBG",
        imp_index = imp_index
      )

    rm(stacked_df, offset_grid_i)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }

  rm(d_i, std_source_df, w_abg_i, w_vbg_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(risk_difference_spline_prediction_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$group, .data$co2_value)
risk_difference_offset_scan_grid <- dplyr::bind_rows(risk_difference_offset_scan_grid_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$offset_mmHg, .data$abg_pco2)

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation,
  results_path("risk_difference_spline_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_grid,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_support_grid.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_spline_readout_by_imputation <- pair_risk_difference_predictions(
  risk_difference_spline_readout_grid,
  risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation,
  abg_value_col = "abg_pco2",
  vbg_value_col = "vbg_pco2"
) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$centered_pco2)

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_spline_readout_by_imputation,
  results_path("risk_difference_spline_readouts_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_spline_prob_pooled <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation,
  group_vars = c("group", "outcome", "outcome_label", "co2_scale", "co2_value", "probability_method"),
  context = "risk-difference exact-grid spline probabilities"
)

risk_difference_spline_prob_wide <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  risk_difference_spline_prob_pooled |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == "ABG") |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome, outcome_label, abg_pco2 = .data$co2_value, p_abg = .data$p, p_lcl_abg = .data$p_LCL, p_ucl_abg = .data$p_UCL),
  risk_difference_spline_prob_pooled |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == "VBG") |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome, outcome_label, vbg_pco2 = .data$co2_value, p_vbg = .data$p, p_lcl_vbg = .data$p_LCL, p_ucl_vbg = .data$p_UCL)
)

risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm <- risk_difference_spline_readout_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$centered_pco2, .data$abg_pco2, .data$vbg_pco2, .data$correction_mmHg, .data$pairing_rule) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_risk_difference_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    risk_difference_spline_prob_wide |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$abg_pco2)) |>
      dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_label, abg_pco2, p_abg, p_lcl_abg, p_ucl_abg),
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "abg_pco2")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    risk_difference_spline_prob_wide |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$vbg_pco2)) |>
      dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_label, vbg_pco2, p_vbg, p_lcl_vbg, p_ucl_vbg),
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "vbg_pco2")
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$centered_pco2) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$p_abg, .data$p_lcl_abg, .data$p_ucl_abg),
    vbg_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$p_vbg, .data$p_lcl_vbg, .data$p_ucl_vbg),
    risk_difference_ci = format_risk_difference_pp_ci(.data$risk_difference, .data$rd_lcl, .data$rd_ucl),
    ci_width_pp = .data$rd_ucl_pp - .data$rd_lcl_pp,
    zero_width_ci = is.finite(.data$ci_width_pp) & .data$ci_width_pp <= sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
  )

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm,
  results_path("risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation <- pair_risk_difference_predictions(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_grid,
  risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation,
  abg_value_col = "abg_pco2",
  vbg_value_col = "vbg_pco2"
) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$offset_mmHg, .data$abg_pco2)

write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r risk-difference-output-export-validation}
#| code-block-title: "Standardized risk-difference output export and validation"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

table_s9_category_risk_differences <- risk_difference_cat3_pooled |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `pCO2 category` = .data$category,
    `ABG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$abg_risk_ci,
    `VBG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_risk_ci,
    `VBG - ABG risk difference, pp (95% CI)` = .data$risk_difference_ci
  )
risk_difference_table_note <- paste(
  "Predicted risks are marginally standardized to the common eligible source-population covariate distribution.",
  "Risk differences are VBG predicted risk minus ABG predicted risk and are reported in percentage points.",
  "Risk differences compare standardized absolute predicted risks for paired ABG and VBG pCO2 values and complement ROR analyses, which compare relative association strength on the odds-ratio scale.",
  "Confidence intervals for risk differences use a pragmatic variance approximation based on the sum of modality-specific prediction variances within each imputation, pooled across imputations.",
  "This approximation does not incorporate covariance between modality-specific predictions and should be interpreted descriptively.",
  "These descriptive standardized risk differences are not agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration tests."
)
write_standalone_table_pdf(
  table_s9_category_risk_differences,
  caption = "Standardized predicted-risk differences by pCO2 category and blood gas type",
  file_stub = "table_s9_category_risk_differences",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 1,
  max_cols = 5,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = "Table S9",
  note = risk_difference_table_note
)

table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm <- risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `ABG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$abg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `VBG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$vbg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `ABG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$abg_risk_ci,
    `VBG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_risk_ci,
    `VBG - ABG risk difference, pp (95% CI)` = .data$risk_difference_ci
  )
table_s10_panels <- split(
  table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm,
  factor(table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm$Outcome, levels = risk_difference_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
risk_difference_table_s10_note <- paste(
  "Spline readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG pCO2 value 5 mmHg higher.",
  risk_difference_table_note
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  table_s10_panels,
  caption = "Standardized predicted-risk differences at 5 mmHg paired pCO2 spline readouts",
  file_stub = "table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm",
  digits = 1,
  display_label = "Table S10",
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 7,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.9in",
    "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.65in",
    "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.65in",
    "ABG risk, % (95% CI)" = "1.05in",
    "VBG risk, % (95% CI)" = "1.05in",
    "VBG - ABG risk difference, pp (95% CI)" = "1.35in"
  ),
  note = risk_difference_table_s10_note
)

figure_s11_spline_risk_difference <- risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::filter(
    is.finite(.data$abg_pco2),
    is.finite(.data$vbg_pco2),
    is.finite(.data$rd_pp),
    is.finite(.data$rd_lcl_pp),
    is.finite(.data$rd_ucl_pp)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = risk_difference_panel_levels)
  )
fig_s11_spline_risk_difference <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s11_spline_risk_difference,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$abg_pco2, y = .data$rd_pp)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = .data$rd_lcl_pp, ymax = .data$rd_ucl_pp),
    fill = "#0072B2",
    alpha = MANUSCRIPT_RIBBON_ALPHA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 1.8) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    name = "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)",
    sec.axis = ggplot2::dup_axis(trans = ~ . + 5, name = "VBG pCO2 (mmHg; ABG + 5)")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Standardized VBG-minus-ABG predicted-risk differences across paired pCO2 values",
    x = "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)",
    y = "VBG - ABG predicted-risk difference (percentage points)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(fig_s11_spline_risk_difference, "figure_s11_spline_risk_difference_dual_axis", width = 9.5, height = 7.5)

risk_difference_spline_figure_qc <- risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    readout_rows = dplyr::n(),
    finite_rd_rows = sum(is.finite(.data$rd_pp) & is.finite(.data$rd_lcl_pp) & is.finite(.data$rd_ucl_pp), na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_width_ci_n = sum(.data$zero_width_ci, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_ci_width_pp = min(.data$ci_width_pp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$readout_rows <= 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$finite_rd_rows != .data$readout_rows ~ "FAIL",
      .data$zero_width_ci_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_spline_figure_qc,
  results_path("risk_difference_spline_figure_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation <- risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$imp, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_mean_rd = stats::weighted.mean(.data$risk_difference, .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_mean_abs_rd = stats::weighted.mean(abs(.data$risk_difference), .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rmse_rd = sqrt(stats::weighted.mean(.data$risk_difference^2, .data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_support_weight = sum(.data$support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_offset_scan_summary <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_mean_rd = mean(.data$weighted_mean_rd, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_mean_abs_rd = mean(.data$weighted_mean_abs_rd, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rmse_rd = mean(.data$weighted_rmse_rd, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_support_weight = stats::median(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    imputations_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    ci_status = "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan",
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = risk_difference_outcome_levels), .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_mean_rd_pp = 100 * .data$weighted_mean_rd,
    absolute_mean_rd_pp = abs(.data$weighted_mean_rd_pp),
    weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp = 100 * .data$weighted_mean_abs_rd,
    weighted_rmse_rd_pp = 100 * .data$weighted_rmse_rd,
    best_signed_rank = rank(.data$absolute_mean_rd_pp, ties.method = "first"),
    best_primary_rank = rank(.data$weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp, ties.method = "first"),
    best_rmse_rank = rank(.data$weighted_rmse_rd_pp, ties.method = "first"),
    best_offset_signed_mean = .data$best_signed_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_primary = .data$best_primary_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_rmse = .data$best_rmse_rank == 1L,
    prespecified_5mm_offset = .data$offset_mmHg == 5L
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_summary,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    offset_n = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$offset_mmHg),
    min_offset = min(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_offset = max(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_total_support_weight = min(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    signed_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_signed_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_prespecified_5mm_offset = any(.data$prespecified_5mm_offset),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$offset_n != 11L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_offset != 0L | .data$max_offset != 10L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_grid_points <= 0L | .data$min_total_support_weight <= 0 ~ "FAIL",
      .data$primary_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$signed_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      !.data$has_prespecified_5mm_offset ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Mean RD, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    `Mean |RD|, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    `RMSE RD, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_signed_mean,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best absolute RD",
      secondary_label = "Best signed RD"
    )
  )
table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference_display <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary |>
  select_offset_display_rows("best_offset_primary", "best_offset_signed_mean") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Mean RD, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    `Mean |RD|, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    `RMSE RD, pp` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_rd_pp, digits = 2),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_signed_mean,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best absolute RD",
      secondary_label = "Best signed RD"
    )
  )
table_s11_panels <- split(
  table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference_display,
  factor(table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference_display$Outcome, levels = risk_difference_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
risk_difference_table_s11_note <- paste(
  "The offset scan is exploratory and uses point estimates from the same standardized spline prediction functions used for Table S10 and Figure S11.",
  "For candidate offset d, ABG value x is paired with VBG value x + d over common central support.",
  "Grid points are weighted by the minimum rounded-bin support across ABG and VBG.",
  "The primary best offset minimizes the support-weighted mean absolute risk difference in percentage points.",
  "The signed weighted mean risk difference can select a different offset because positive and negative differences can cancel.",
  "The full offset scan from 0 to 10 mmHg is available in the accompanying CSV; displayed rows include the prespecified 5-mmHg offset and offsets selected by the primary and signed-mean summary criteria.",
  "This scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction and is not an agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration analysis."
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  table_s11_panels,
  caption = "Exploratory ABG-to-VBG offset scan for standardized predicted-risk parity",
  file_stub = "table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference",
  digits = 2,
  display_label = "Table S11",
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.8in",
    "Offset" = "0.45in",
    "Mean RD, pp" = "0.7in",
    "Mean |RD|, pp" = "0.72in",
    "RMSE RD, pp" = "0.65in",
    "Support" = "0.58in",
    "Grid n" = "0.42in",
    "Flags" = "1.45in"
  ),
  note = risk_difference_table_s11_note
)

figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = risk_difference_panel_levels))
fig_s12_signed_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_rd_pp)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference, .data$best_offset_signed_mean),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_rd_pp),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = risk_difference_offset_values) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "A. Weighted mean VBG-minus-ABG risk difference by offset",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Weighted mean RD (percentage points)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

fig_s12_primary_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference, .data$best_offset_primary),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_rd_pp),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = risk_difference_offset_values) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "B. Primary criterion: support-weighted mean absolute RD",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Support-weighted mean absolute RD (percentage points)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

fig_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference <- fig_s12_signed_panel / fig_s12_primary_panel +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    title = "Exploratory offset scan for standardized predicted-risk parity"
  )
print_plot_once(fig_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference, "figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference_trend", width = 9.5, height = 10.5)

risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc <- risk_difference_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    signed_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_signed_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    signed_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_signed_mean], collapse = "; "),
    primary_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_primary], collapse = "; "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$signed_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$primary_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    detail = paste0(
      "Signed-mean panel highlights offset ", .data$signed_best_offset,
      "; primary mean-absolute-RD panel highlights offset ", .data$primary_best_offset, "."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_offset_scan_validation <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "offsets_present",
    "support_positive",
    "one_primary_best_per_outcome",
    "one_signed_best_per_outcome",
    "figure_s12_display_highlights",
    "prespecified_5mm_present",
    "ci_policy"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$offset_n == 11L) &&
        all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$min_offset == 0L) &&
        all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$max_offset == 10L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$min_grid_points > 0L) &&
        all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$min_total_support_weight > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$primary_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$signed_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_support_audit$has_prespecified_5mm_offset)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_summary$ci_status == "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Each outcome must have candidate offsets 0 through 10.",
    "Each retained offset must have at least one grid point and positive support weight.",
    "The primary criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "The signed-mean closest-to-zero criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "Figure S12 highlights must match the metric displayed in each panel.",
    "The prespecified 5 mmHg offset remains present as a comparator.",
    "Offset-scan CIs are intentionally not estimated in this exploratory first pass."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_offset_scan_validation,
  results_path("risk_difference_offset_scan_validation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

risk_difference_standardization_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "estimand_direction",
    "cat3_probability_method",
    "spline_probability_method",
    "variance_policy",
    "table2_probability_match",
    "manuscript_wording"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(risk_difference_cat3_pooled$risk_difference_direction == risk_difference_direction) &&
        all(risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm$risk_difference_direction == risk_difference_direction)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_cat3_pooled$probability_method_ABG == "common_source_marginal_standardized") &&
        all(risk_difference_cat3_pooled$probability_method_VBG == "common_source_marginal_standardized")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_spline_prediction_by_imputation$probability_method == "common_source_marginal_standardized")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    "PASS",
    if (all(risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    "PASS"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Risk differences are VBG predicted risk minus ABG predicted risk.",
    "Categorical risk-difference inputs are the same common-source marginal standardized probabilities used for Table 2/Figure S4.",
    "Spline risk-difference inputs are exact-grid common-source marginal standardized predictions from the primary spline fits.",
    "Within-imputation RD variance uses Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG); this descriptive approximation does not incorporate ABG/VBG prediction covariance and printed confidence limits are never subtracted.",
    paste0(
      "Maximum absolute probability difference versus Table 2 source probabilities = ",
      format_fixed_value(max(risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation$abs_probability_difference, na.rm = TRUE), digits = 8),
      "."
    ),
    "Risk-difference captions/notes use descriptive risk-difference language and explicitly avoid agreement/equivalence/noninferiority claims."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_standardization_audit,
  results_path("risk_difference_standardization_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Standardized Risk Difference Audit",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "- Estimand: VBG predicted risk minus ABG predicted risk, reported in percentage points.",
    "- Standardization: common eligible source-population marginal standardization.",
    "- Variance: within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG), followed by Rubin pooling on the RD scale; this descriptive approximation does not incorporate covariance between modality-specific predictions.",
    "- Interpretation: descriptive standardized predicted-risk difference, not agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration.",
    "",
    "## Audit Rows",
    markdown_table(risk_difference_standardization_audit |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  results_path("risk_difference_standardization_audit.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

risk_difference_validation_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "cat3_rows",
    "table2_probability_match",
    "spline_readout_rows",
    "figure_s11_ci",
    "offset_scan",
    "direction",
    "standardization_audit"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (nrow(risk_difference_cat3_pooled) == length(cat3_outcomes) * length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm) >= length(cat3_outcomes) * 3L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_spline_figure_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_offset_scan_validation$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_cat3_pooled$risk_difference_direction == risk_difference_direction) &&
        all(risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm$risk_difference_direction == risk_difference_direction) &&
        all(risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation$risk_difference_direction == risk_difference_direction)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(risk_difference_standardization_audit$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(risk_difference_cat3_pooled), " pooled categorical risk-difference rows."),
    paste0("Table 2 comparison statuses: ", paste(names(table(risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation$validation_status)), as.integer(table(risk_difference_cat3_table2_validation$validation_status)), collapse = "; "), "."),
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm), " pooled spline readout rows."),
    paste0("Figure S11 zero-width CI rows: ", sum(risk_difference_spline_figure_qc$zero_width_ci_n, na.rm = TRUE), "."),
    paste0("Offset scan statuses: ", paste(risk_difference_offset_scan_validation$component, risk_difference_offset_scan_validation$status, collapse = "; "), "."),
    "All risk-difference outputs use VBG - ABG direction.",
    paste0("Standardization audit statuses: ", paste(risk_difference_standardization_audit$component, risk_difference_standardization_audit$status, collapse = "; "), ".")
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  risk_difference_validation_status,
  results_path("risk_difference_validation_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

### Likelihood-ratio outputs

The likelihood-ratio outputs below summarize pCO2-conditioned predicted outcome odds divided by the common weighted target-population baseline odds for each outcome.

```{r baseline-relative-predicted-odds-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "Baseline-relative predicted odds helper functions"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

baseline_relative_odds_direction <- "VBG/ABG"
baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels <- risk_difference_outcome_levels
baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels <- risk_difference_panel_levels
baseline_relative_odds_offset_values <- risk_difference_offset_values
baseline_relative_odds_probability_eps <- 1e-6

safe_probability <- function(p, eps = baseline_relative_odds_probability_eps) {
  p <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(p))
  pmin(pmax(p, eps), 1 - eps)
}

probability_to_odds <- function(p) {
  p <- safe_probability(p)
  p / (1 - p)
}

probability_var_to_logit_var <- function(p, var_p) {
  p <- safe_probability(p)
  var_p <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(var_p))
  var_p <- pmax(var_p, 0, na.rm = FALSE)
  var_p / (p * (1 - p))^2
}

weighted_mean_finite <- function(x, weights) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  weights <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(weights))
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(weights) & weights > 0
  if (!any(ok)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  stats::weighted.mean(x[ok], weights[ok])
}

median_finite <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  stats::median(x)
}

weighted_binary_summary <- function(y, weights = NULL) {
  y <- to01(y)
  if (is.null(weights)) {
    ok <- !is.na(y)
    n <- sum(ok)
    events <- sum(y[ok] == 1L)
    risk <- if (n > 0L) events / n else NA_real_
    var_p <- if (n > 0L && is.finite(risk)) risk * (1 - risk) / n else NA_real_
    effective_n <- n
    weight_sum <- n
  } else {
    weights <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(weights))
    ok <- !is.na(y) & is.finite(weights) & weights > 0
    n <- sum(ok)
    events <- sum(y[ok] == 1L)
    weight_sum <- sum(weights[ok])
    risk <- if (weight_sum > 0) sum(weights[ok] * y[ok]) / weight_sum else NA_real_
    effective_n <- if (sum(weights[ok]^2) > 0) weight_sum^2 / sum(weights[ok]^2) else NA_real_
    var_p <- if (is.finite(effective_n) && effective_n > 0 && is.finite(risk)) risk * (1 - risk) / effective_n else NA_real_
  }
  risk_safe <- safe_probability(risk)
  tibble::tibble(
    events = as.integer(events),
    n = as.integer(n),
    risk = risk,
    odds = probability_to_odds(risk),
    eta = stats::qlogis(risk_safe),
    var_p = var_p,
    var_eta = probability_var_to_logit_var(risk, var_p),
    effective_n = as.numeric(effective_n),
    weight_sum = as.numeric(weight_sum)
  )
}

format_event_n <- function(events, n) {
  ifelse(is.finite(events) & is.finite(n), paste0(format_count(events), "/", format_count(n)), "")
}

format_percent_value <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  ifelse(is.finite(x), sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), 100 * x), "")
}

format_baseline_relative_odds_ci <- function(estimate, lcl, ucl, digits = 2) {
  estimate <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(estimate))
  lcl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(lcl))
  ucl <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ucl))
  out <- rep("", length(estimate))
  ok <- is.finite(estimate) & is.finite(lcl) & is.finite(ucl)
  out[ok] <- sprintf(
    paste0("%.", digits, "f (%.", digits, "f, %.", digits, "f)"),
    estimate[ok], lcl[ok], ucl[ok]
  )
  out
}

pool_logit_probability_row <- function(q, u, prefix) {
  pooled <- pool_stacked_scalar(q, u)
  eta <- pooled$estimate
  se <- pooled$SE
  tibble::tibble(
    !!paste0(prefix, "_risk") := stats::plogis(eta),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_risk_lcl") := stats::plogis(eta - 1.96 * se),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_risk_ucl") := stats::plogis(eta + 1.96 * se),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_odds") := exp(eta),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_odds_lcl") := exp(eta - 1.96 * se),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_odds_ucl") := exp(eta + 1.96 * se),
    !!paste0(prefix, "_logit_se") := se,
    !!paste0(prefix, "_m_used") := pooled$m_used
  )
}

pool_prognostic_baseline_group <- function(df) {
  dplyr::bind_cols(
    tibble::tibble(
      source_events = dplyr::first(df$source_events),
      source_n = dplyr::first(df$source_n),
      source_risk = dplyr::first(df$source_risk),
      source_odds = dplyr::first(df$source_odds),
      abg_tested_events = dplyr::first(df$abg_tested_events),
      abg_tested_n = dplyr::first(df$abg_tested_n),
      abg_tested_risk = dplyr::first(df$abg_tested_risk),
      abg_tested_odds = dplyr::first(df$abg_tested_odds),
      vbg_tested_events = dplyr::first(df$vbg_tested_events),
      vbg_tested_n = dplyr::first(df$vbg_tested_n),
      vbg_tested_risk = dplyr::first(df$vbg_tested_risk),
      vbg_tested_odds = dplyr::first(df$vbg_tested_odds),
      abg_weighted_target_events = median_finite(df$abg_weighted_target_events),
      abg_weighted_target_n = median_finite(df$abg_weighted_target_n),
      abg_weighted_target_weighted_events = median_finite(df$abg_weighted_target_weighted_events),
      abg_weighted_target_weight_sum = median_finite(df$abg_weighted_target_weight_sum),
      abg_weighted_target_effective_n = median_finite(df$abg_weighted_target_effective_n),
      vbg_weighted_target_events = median_finite(df$vbg_weighted_target_events),
      vbg_weighted_target_n = median_finite(df$vbg_weighted_target_n),
      vbg_weighted_target_weighted_events = median_finite(df$vbg_weighted_target_weighted_events),
      vbg_weighted_target_weight_sum = median_finite(df$vbg_weighted_target_weight_sum),
      vbg_weighted_target_effective_n = median_finite(df$vbg_weighted_target_effective_n)
    ),
    pool_logit_probability_row(df$abg_weighted_target_eta, df$abg_weighted_target_var_eta, "abg_weighted_target"),
    pool_logit_probability_row(df$vbg_weighted_target_eta, df$vbg_weighted_target_var_eta, "vbg_weighted_target"),
    pool_logit_probability_row(df$target_baseline_eta, df$target_baseline_var_eta, "target_baseline")
  )
}

add_baseline_relative_odds_columns <- function(df, abg_prob_col, abg_var_col, vbg_prob_col, vbg_var_col) {
  p_abg <- safe_probability(df[[abg_prob_col]])
  p_vbg <- safe_probability(df[[vbg_prob_col]])
  var_eta_abg <- probability_var_to_logit_var(p_abg, df[[abg_var_col]])
  var_eta_vbg <- probability_var_to_logit_var(p_vbg, df[[vbg_var_col]])
  eta_abg <- stats::qlogis(p_abg)
  eta_vbg <- stats::qlogis(p_vbg)
  target_eta <- df$target_baseline_eta
  target_var_eta <- df$target_baseline_var_eta
  dplyr::bind_cols(
    df,
    tibble::tibble(
      logit_p_abg = eta_abg,
      var_logit_p_abg = var_eta_abg,
      logit_p_vbg = eta_vbg,
      var_logit_p_vbg = var_eta_vbg,
      log_lr_abg = eta_abg - target_eta,
      var_log_lr_abg = var_eta_abg + target_var_eta,
      log_lr_vbg = eta_vbg - target_eta,
      var_log_lr_vbg = var_eta_vbg + target_var_eta,
      log_lr_ratio = eta_vbg - eta_abg,
      var_log_lr_ratio = var_eta_vbg + var_eta_abg,
      abg_lr_imp = exp(eta_abg - target_eta),
      vbg_lr_imp = exp(eta_vbg - target_eta),
      lr_ratio_imp = exp(eta_vbg - eta_abg),
      baseline_relative_odds_direction = baseline_relative_odds_direction,
      baseline_relative_odds_interpretation = "Likelihood ratio summary; VBG/ABG ratio compares blood-gas modalities"
    )
  )
}

pool_baseline_relative_odds_group <- function(df) {
  pooled_abg <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$log_lr_abg, df$var_log_lr_abg)
  pooled_vbg <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$log_lr_vbg, df$var_log_lr_vbg)
  pooled_ratio <- pool_stacked_scalar(df$log_lr_ratio, df$var_log_lr_ratio)
  tibble::tibble(
    log_lr_abg = pooled_abg$estimate,
    se_log_lr_abg = pooled_abg$SE,
    abg_lr = exp(pooled_abg$estimate),
    abg_lr_lcl = exp(pooled_abg$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_abg$SE),
    abg_lr_ucl = exp(pooled_abg$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_abg$SE),
    log_lr_vbg = pooled_vbg$estimate,
    se_log_lr_vbg = pooled_vbg$SE,
    vbg_lr = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate),
    vbg_lr_lcl = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_vbg$SE),
    vbg_lr_ucl = exp(pooled_vbg$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_vbg$SE),
    log_lr_ratio = pooled_ratio$estimate,
    se_log_lr_ratio = pooled_ratio$SE,
    lr_ratio = exp(pooled_ratio$estimate),
    lr_ratio_lcl = exp(pooled_ratio$estimate - 1.96 * pooled_ratio$SE),
    lr_ratio_ucl = exp(pooled_ratio$estimate + 1.96 * pooled_ratio$SE),
    m_used = min(pooled_abg$m_used, pooled_vbg$m_used, pooled_ratio$m_used),
    baseline_relative_odds_direction = baseline_relative_odds_direction
  )
}
```

```{r baseline-relative-predicted-odds-execution}
#| code-block-title: "Baseline-relative predicted odds execution"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

baseline_relative_odds_baseline_rows <- list()

for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_i <- attach_stacked_ror_id_columns(get_imp(imp_index))
  w_abg_i <- get_mi_weight("ABG", imp_index)
  w_vbg_i <- get_mi_weight("VBG", imp_index)
  abg_idx <- !is.na(to01(d_i$has_abg)) & to01(d_i$has_abg) == 1L
  vbg_idx <- !is.na(to01(d_i$has_vbg)) & to01(d_i$has_vbg) == 1L

  baseline_relative_odds_baseline_rows[[length(baseline_relative_odds_baseline_rows) + 1L]] <- purrr::map_dfr(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    y <- to01(d_i[[outcome_var]])
    source_summary <- weighted_binary_summary(y)
    abg_tested_summary <- weighted_binary_summary(y[abg_idx])
    vbg_tested_summary <- weighted_binary_summary(y[vbg_idx])
    abg_target_summary <- weighted_binary_summary(y[abg_idx], w_abg_i[abg_idx])
    vbg_target_summary <- weighted_binary_summary(y[vbg_idx], w_vbg_i[vbg_idx])
    baseline_components <- c(abg_target_summary$risk, vbg_target_summary$risk)
    baseline_variance_components <- c(abg_target_summary$var_p, vbg_target_summary$var_p)
    if (!all(is.finite(baseline_components)) || !all(is.finite(baseline_variance_components))) {
      stop(
        "Baseline-relative predicted odds require finite ABG and VBG weighted target risk and variance components for outcome ",
        outcome_var,
        " in imputation ",
        imp_index,
        "."
      )
    }
    target_baseline_risk <- mean(baseline_components)
    target_baseline_var_p <- sum(baseline_variance_components) / 4
    tibble::tibble(
      imp = as.integer(imp_index),
      outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_label = label_risk_difference_outcome(outcome_var),
      source_denominator = "eligible analytic source population after encounter-type filtering",
      baseline_definition = "equal-weighted average of ABG and VBG MI-logistic IPSW weighted target risks",
      source_events = source_summary$events,
      source_n = source_summary$n,
      source_risk = source_summary$risk,
      source_odds = source_summary$odds,
      abg_tested_events = abg_tested_summary$events,
      abg_tested_n = abg_tested_summary$n,
      abg_tested_risk = abg_tested_summary$risk,
      abg_tested_odds = abg_tested_summary$odds,
      vbg_tested_events = vbg_tested_summary$events,
      vbg_tested_n = vbg_tested_summary$n,
      vbg_tested_risk = vbg_tested_summary$risk,
      vbg_tested_odds = vbg_tested_summary$odds,
      abg_weighted_target_risk = abg_target_summary$risk,
      abg_weighted_target_events = abg_target_summary$events,
      abg_weighted_target_n = abg_target_summary$n,
      abg_weighted_target_weighted_events = abg_target_summary$risk * abg_target_summary$weight_sum,
      abg_weighted_target_weight_sum = abg_target_summary$weight_sum,
      abg_weighted_target_effective_n = abg_target_summary$effective_n,
      abg_weighted_target_odds = abg_target_summary$odds,
      abg_weighted_target_eta = abg_target_summary$eta,
      abg_weighted_target_var_p = abg_target_summary$var_p,
      abg_weighted_target_var_eta = abg_target_summary$var_eta,
      vbg_weighted_target_risk = vbg_target_summary$risk,
      vbg_weighted_target_events = vbg_target_summary$events,
      vbg_weighted_target_n = vbg_target_summary$n,
      vbg_weighted_target_weighted_events = vbg_target_summary$risk * vbg_target_summary$weight_sum,
      vbg_weighted_target_weight_sum = vbg_target_summary$weight_sum,
      vbg_weighted_target_effective_n = vbg_target_summary$effective_n,
      vbg_weighted_target_odds = vbg_target_summary$odds,
      vbg_weighted_target_eta = vbg_target_summary$eta,
      vbg_weighted_target_var_p = vbg_target_summary$var_p,
      vbg_weighted_target_var_eta = vbg_target_summary$var_eta,
      target_baseline_risk = target_baseline_risk,
      target_baseline_odds = probability_to_odds(target_baseline_risk),
      target_baseline_eta = stats::qlogis(safe_probability(target_baseline_risk)),
      target_baseline_var_p = target_baseline_var_p,
      target_baseline_var_eta = probability_var_to_logit_var(target_baseline_risk, target_baseline_var_p)
    )
  })

  rm(d_i, w_abg_i, w_vbg_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation <- dplyr::bind_rows(baseline_relative_odds_baseline_rows) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels))
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$source_denominator, .data$baseline_definition) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_prognostic_baseline_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    source_risk_ci = format_percent_value(.data$source_risk),
    abg_tested_risk_ci = format_percent_value(.data$abg_tested_risk),
    vbg_tested_risk_ci = format_percent_value(.data$vbg_tested_risk),
    abg_weighted_target_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$abg_weighted_target_risk, .data$abg_weighted_target_risk_lcl, .data$abg_weighted_target_risk_ucl),
    vbg_weighted_target_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$vbg_weighted_target_risk, .data$vbg_weighted_target_risk_lcl, .data$vbg_weighted_target_risk_ucl),
    target_baseline_risk_ci = format_risk_pct_ci(.data$target_baseline_risk, .data$target_baseline_risk_lcl, .data$target_baseline_risk_ucl)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_odds_baseline_join <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::select(imp, outcome, outcome_label, target_baseline_risk, target_baseline_odds, target_baseline_eta, target_baseline_var_eta)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation <- risk_difference_cat3_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::left_join(baseline_relative_odds_baseline_join, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  add_baseline_relative_odds_columns(
    abg_prob_col = "p_imp_ABG",
    abg_var_col = "var_p_imp_ABG",
    vbg_prob_col = "p_imp_VBG",
    vbg_var_col = "var_p_imp_VBG"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_lr_formula_error = abs(.data$abg_lr_imp - probability_to_odds(.data$p_imp_ABG) / .data$target_baseline_odds),
    vbg_lr_formula_error = abs(.data$vbg_lr_imp - probability_to_odds(.data$p_imp_VBG) / .data$target_baseline_odds),
    lr_ratio_formula_error = abs(.data$lr_ratio_imp - .data$vbg_lr_imp / .data$abg_lr_imp)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$category) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_baseline_relative_odds_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    risk_difference_cat3_pooled |>
      dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_label, category, p_ABG, p_LCL_ABG, p_UCL_ABG, p_VBG, p_LCL_VBG, p_UCL_VBG, abg_risk_ci, vbg_risk_ci),
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "category")
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels), factor(.data$category, levels = CO2_CAT_LEVELS)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_lr_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$abg_lr, .data$abg_lr_lcl, .data$abg_lr_ucl),
    vbg_lr_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$vbg_lr, .data$vbg_lr_lcl, .data$vbg_lr_ucl),
    lr_ratio_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$lr_ratio, .data$lr_ratio_lcl, .data$lr_ratio_ucl)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation <- risk_difference_spline_readout_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::left_join(baseline_relative_odds_baseline_join, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  add_baseline_relative_odds_columns(
    abg_prob_col = "p_abg",
    abg_var_col = "var_p_abg",
    vbg_prob_col = "p_vbg",
    vbg_var_col = "var_p_vbg"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_lr_formula_error = abs(.data$abg_lr_imp - probability_to_odds(.data$p_abg) / .data$target_baseline_odds),
    vbg_lr_formula_error = abs(.data$vbg_lr_imp - probability_to_odds(.data$p_vbg) / .data$target_baseline_odds),
    lr_ratio_formula_error = abs(.data$lr_ratio_imp - .data$vbg_lr_imp / .data$abg_lr_imp)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$centered_pco2, .data$abg_pco2, .data$vbg_pco2, .data$correction_mmHg, .data$pairing_rule) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pool_baseline_relative_odds_group(.x)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm |>
      dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_label, centered_pco2, abg_pco2, vbg_pco2, p_abg, p_lcl_abg, p_ucl_abg, p_vbg, p_lcl_vbg, p_ucl_vbg, abg_risk_ci, vbg_risk_ci),
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "centered_pco2", "abg_pco2", "vbg_pco2")
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels), .data$centered_pco2) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_lr_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$abg_lr, .data$abg_lr_lcl, .data$abg_lr_ucl),
    vbg_lr_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$vbg_lr, .data$vbg_lr_lcl, .data$vbg_lr_ucl),
    lr_ratio_ci = format_baseline_relative_odds_ci(.data$lr_ratio, .data$lr_ratio_lcl, .data$lr_ratio_ucl),
    abg_lr_ci_width = .data$abg_lr_ucl - .data$abg_lr_lcl,
    vbg_lr_ci_width = .data$vbg_lr_ucl - .data$vbg_lr_lcl,
    lr_ratio_ci_width = .data$lr_ratio_ucl - .data$lr_ratio_lcl
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_by_imputation <- risk_difference_offset_scan_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::left_join(baseline_relative_odds_baseline_join, by = c("imp", "outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  add_baseline_relative_odds_columns(
    abg_prob_col = "p_abg",
    abg_var_col = "var_p_abg",
    vbg_prob_col = "p_vbg",
    vbg_var_col = "var_p_vbg"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_by_imputation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$imp, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_mean_log_lr_ratio = weighted_mean_finite(.data$log_lr_ratio, .data$support_weight),
    weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio = weighted_mean_finite(abs(.data$log_lr_ratio), .data$support_weight),
    weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio = sqrt(weighted_mean_finite(.data$log_lr_ratio^2, .data$support_weight)),
    total_support_weight = sum(.data$support_weight[is.finite(.data$support_weight) & .data$support_weight > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = sum(is.finite(.data$log_lr_ratio) & is.finite(.data$support_weight) & .data$support_weight > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio = exp(.data$weighted_mean_log_lr_ratio),
    absolute_log_distance_geometric_mean = abs(.data$weighted_mean_log_lr_ratio)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary_by_imputation |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio = exp(mean(.data$weighted_mean_log_lr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)),
    absolute_log_distance_geometric_mean = abs(mean(.data$weighted_mean_log_lr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)),
    weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio = mean(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio = mean(.data$weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_support_weight = stats::median(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    imputations_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    ci_status = "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan",
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels), .data$offset_mmHg) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    best_geometric_rank = rank(.data$absolute_log_distance_geometric_mean, ties.method = "first"),
    best_primary_rank = rank(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio, ties.method = "first"),
    best_rmse_rank = rank(.data$weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio, ties.method = "first"),
    best_offset_geometric_mean = .data$best_geometric_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_primary = .data$best_primary_rank == 1L,
    best_offset_rmse = .data$best_rmse_rank == 1L,
    prespecified_5mm_offset = .data$offset_mmHg == 5L
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    offset_n = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$offset_mmHg),
    min_offset = min(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_offset = max(.data$offset_mmHg, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_grid_points = min(.data$n_grid_points, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_total_support_weight = min(.data$total_support_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometric_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_geometric_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_best_offset_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_prespecified_5mm_offset = any(.data$prespecified_5mm_offset),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$offset_n != 11L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_offset != 0L | .data$max_offset != 10L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$min_grid_points <= 0L | .data$min_total_support_weight <= 0 ~ "FAIL",
      .data$geometric_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$primary_best_offset_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
      !.data$has_prespecified_5mm_offset ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation}
#| code-block-title: "Baseline-relative predicted odds output export and validation"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"

likelihood_ratio_table_note <- paste(
  "Likelihood ratios are defined as pCO2-conditioned predicted outcome odds divided by the common weighted target-population baseline odds for that outcome.",
  "LR = pCO2-conditioned predicted outcome odds / common baseline odds.",
  "Values above 1 indicate higher predicted outcome odds than the common target-population baseline; values below 1 indicate lower odds.",
  "Baseline odds are the equal-weighted average of ABG and VBG MI-logistic IPSW weighted target risks within imputation, pooled on the logit scale.",
  "VBG/ABG LR ratios are VBG likelihood ratios divided by ABG likelihood ratios; the common baseline cancels on the logit scale."
)

internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `Source events/N` = format_event_n(.data$source_events, .data$source_n),
    `Source risk, %` = .data$source_risk_ci,
    `Source odds` = format_fixed_value(.data$source_odds, digits = 3),
    `ABG tested events/N` = format_event_n(.data$abg_tested_events, .data$abg_tested_n),
    `ABG tested risk, %` = .data$abg_tested_risk_ci,
    `ABG weighted target risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$abg_weighted_target_risk_ci,
    `VBG tested events/N` = format_event_n(.data$vbg_tested_events, .data$vbg_tested_n),
    `VBG tested risk, %` = .data$vbg_tested_risk_ci,
    `VBG weighted target risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_weighted_target_risk_ci,
    `Common baseline risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$target_baseline_risk_ci,
    `Common baseline odds` = format_fixed_value(.data$target_baseline_odds, digits = 3)
  )
write_standalone_table_pdf(
  internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds,
  caption = "Baseline outcome rates and odds in source, tested, and weighted target populations",
  file_stub = "internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 12,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = NULL,
  note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
)

internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `pCO2 category` = .data$category,
    `ABG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$abg_risk_ci,
    `ABG LR (95% CI)` = .data$abg_lr_ci,
    `VBG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_risk_ci,
    `VBG LR (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_lr_ci,
    `VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)` = .data$lr_ratio_ci
  )
write_standalone_table_pdf(
  internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
  caption = "Likelihood ratios by pCO2 category and blood-gas modality",
  file_stub = "internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 7,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = NULL,
  note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
)

internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    `ABG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$abg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `VBG pCO2 (mmHg)` = format_fixed_value(.data$vbg_pco2, digits = 0),
    `ABG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$abg_risk_ci,
    `ABG LR (95% CI)` = .data$abg_lr_ci,
    `VBG risk, % (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_risk_ci,
    `VBG LR (95% CI)` = .data$vbg_lr_ci,
    `VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)` = .data$lr_ratio_ci
  )
internal_bro_spline_panels <- split(
  internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm,
  factor(internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm$Outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
internal_bro_spline_note <- paste(
  "Spline readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG pCO2 value 5 mmHg higher.",
  likelihood_ratio_table_note
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  internal_bro_spline_panels,
  caption = "Likelihood ratios at paired 5 mmHg pCO2 spline readouts",
  file_stub = "internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm",
  digits = 2,
  display_label = NULL,
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.75in",
    "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
    "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
    "ABG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
    "ABG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
    "VBG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
    "VBG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
    "VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)" = "0.95in"
  ),
  note = internal_bro_spline_note
)

internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      abg_pco2,
      vbg_pco2,
      gas_type = "ABG",
      lr = .data$abg_lr,
      lr_lcl = .data$abg_lr_lcl,
      lr_ucl = .data$abg_lr_ucl
    ),
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      abg_pco2,
      vbg_pco2,
      gas_type = "VBG",
      lr = .data$vbg_lr,
      lr_lcl = .data$vbg_lr_lcl,
      lr_ucl = .data$vbg_lr_ucl
    )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    gas_type = factor(.data$gas_type, levels = c("ABG", "VBG")),
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels)
  )

internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$abg_pco2, y = .data$lr, color = .data$gas_type, fill = .data$gas_type, linetype = .data$gas_type)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = .data$lr_lcl, ymax = .data$lr_ucl),
    alpha = 0.14,
    color = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 1.7) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LINETYPES) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_log10() +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    name = "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)",
    sec.axis = ggplot2::dup_axis(trans = ~ . + 5, name = "VBG pCO2 (mmHg; ABG + 5)")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Likelihood ratios across paired ABG and VBG pCO2 values",
    x = "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)",
    y = "Likelihood ratio (log scale)",
    color = "Gas",
    fill = "Gas",
    linetype = "Gas"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot, "internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds", width = 9.5, height = 7.5)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    readout_rows = dplyr::n(),
    finite_lr_rows = sum(
      is.finite(.data$abg_lr) & is.finite(.data$abg_lr_lcl) & is.finite(.data$abg_lr_ucl) &
        is.finite(.data$vbg_lr) & is.finite(.data$vbg_lr_lcl) & is.finite(.data$vbg_lr_ucl),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    zero_width_ci_n = sum(
      (.data$abg_lr_ci_width <= sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)) |
        (.data$vbg_lr_ci_width <= sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)) |
        (.data$lr_ratio_ci_width <= sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    min_lr_ci_width = min(c(.data$abg_lr_ci_width, .data$vbg_lr_ci_width), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$readout_rows <= 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$finite_lr_rows != .data$readout_rows ~ "FAIL",
      .data$zero_width_ci_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )

internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Geom mean LR ratio` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio, digits = 2),
    `Mean |log LR ratio|` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio, digits = 3),
    `RMSE log LR ratio` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio, digits = 3),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_geometric_mean,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best primary",
      secondary_label = "Best geometric mean"
    )
  )
internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_display <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary |>
  select_offset_display_rows("best_offset_primary", "best_offset_geometric_mean") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Outcome = .data$outcome_label,
    Offset = .data$offset_mmHg,
    `Geom mean LR ratio` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio, digits = 2),
    `Mean |log LR ratio|` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio, digits = 3),
    `RMSE log LR ratio` = format_fixed_value(.data$weighted_rmse_log_lr_ratio, digits = 3),
    Support = format_fixed_value(.data$total_support_weight, digits = 0),
    `Grid n` = .data$n_grid_points,
    Flags = format_offset_flags(
      .data$best_offset_primary,
      .data$best_offset_geometric_mean,
      .data$prespecified_5mm_offset,
      primary_label = "Best primary",
      secondary_label = "Best geometric mean"
    )
  )
internal_bro_offset_scan_panels <- split(
  internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_display,
  factor(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_display$Outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels),
  drop = TRUE
)
internal_bro_offset_note <- paste(
  "The offset scan is exploratory and uses point estimates from the same standardized spline prediction functions used for the likelihood-ratio readouts and figure.",
  "For candidate offset d, ABG value x is paired with VBG value x + d over common central support.",
  "Grid points are weighted by the minimum rounded-bin support across ABG and VBG.",
  "The primary best offset minimizes the support-weighted mean absolute log VBG/ABG LR ratio.",
  "The weighted geometric mean ratio can select a different offset because signed log ratios can cancel.",
  "The full offset scan from 0 to 10 mmHg is available in the accompanying CSV; displayed rows include the prespecified 5-mmHg offset and offsets selected by the primary and secondary summary criteria.",
  "This scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction and is not an agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority analysis."
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  internal_bro_offset_scan_panels,
  caption = "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG likelihood-ratio parity",
  file_stub = "internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds",
  digits = 3,
  display_label = NULL,
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.8in",
    "Offset" = "0.45in",
    "Geom mean LR ratio" = "0.75in",
    "Mean |log LR ratio|" = "0.75in",
    "RMSE log LR ratio" = "0.68in",
    "Support" = "0.58in",
    "Grid n" = "0.42in",
    "Flags" = "1.35in"
  ),
  note = internal_bro_offset_note
)

internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels))
internal_bro_geometric_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey35", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data, .data$best_offset_geometric_mean),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_geometric_mean_lr_ratio),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = baseline_relative_odds_offset_values) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_log10() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "A. Weighted geometric mean VBG/ABG LR ratio by offset",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Weighted geometric mean LR ratio (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

internal_bro_primary_panel <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_SPLINE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 2.0) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot_data, .data$best_offset_primary),
    ggplot2::aes(x = .data$offset_mmHg, y = .data$weighted_mean_abs_log_lr_ratio),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.7,
    color = "black",
    fill = "#D55E00"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, ncol = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = baseline_relative_odds_offset_values) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "B. Primary criterion: support-weighted mean absolute log LR ratio",
    x = "Candidate VBG minus ABG offset (mmHg)",
    y = "Support-weighted mean absolute log LR ratio"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)

internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot <- internal_bro_geometric_panel / internal_bro_primary_panel +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    title = "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG likelihood-ratio parity"
  )
print_plot_once(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_plot, "internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds", width = 9.5, height = 10.5)

write_standalone_table_pdf(
  internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds,
  caption = "Baseline outcome rates and common baseline odds for likelihood-ratio outputs",
  file_stub = "table_s12_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 12,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = NULL,
  note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
)
write_standalone_table_pdf(
  internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
  caption = "Categorical likelihood ratios by pCO2 category and blood-gas modality",
  file_stub = "table_s13_categorical_likelihood_ratios",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 7,
  landscape = TRUE,
  display_label = NULL,
  note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  internal_bro_spline_panels,
  caption = "Likelihood ratios at paired 5 mmHg pCO2 spline readouts",
  file_stub = "table_s14_spline_likelihood_ratios_5mm",
  digits = 2,
  display_label = NULL,
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.75in",
    "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
    "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
    "ABG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
    "ABG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
    "VBG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
    "VBG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
    "VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)" = "0.95in"
  ),
  note = internal_bro_spline_note
)
write_standalone_panel_table_pdf(
  internal_bro_offset_scan_panels,
  caption = "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG likelihood-ratio parity",
  file_stub = "table_s15_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio",
  digits = 3,
  display_label = NULL,
  landscape = TRUE,
  csv_df = internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
  panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
  scale_down = TRUE,
  font_size = 6.5,
  column_widths = c(
    "Outcome" = "0.8in",
    "Offset" = "0.45in",
    "Geom mean LR ratio" = "0.75in",
    "Mean |log LR ratio|" = "0.75in",
    "RMSE log LR ratio" = "0.68in",
    "Support" = "0.58in",
    "Grid n" = "0.42in",
    "Flags" = "1.35in"
  ),
  note = internal_bro_offset_note
)
write_plot_alias("internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds", "figure_s13_spline_likelihood_ratios", "figs", "figs")
write_plot_alias("internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds", "figure_s14_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio", "figs", "figs")

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    geometric_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_geometric_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_panel_highlight_n = sum(.data$best_offset_primary, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometric_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_geometric_mean], collapse = "; "),
    primary_best_offset = paste(.data$offset_mmHg[.data$best_offset_primary], collapse = "; "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
	dplyr::mutate(
	  validation_status = dplyr::case_when(
	    .data$geometric_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
	    .data$primary_panel_highlight_n != 1L ~ "FAIL",
	    TRUE ~ "PASS"
	  ),
	  detail = paste0(
	    "Geometric-mean panel highlights offset ", .data$geometric_best_offset,
	    "; primary mean-absolute-log-ratio panel highlights offset ", .data$primary_best_offset, "."
	  )
	)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc <- dplyr::bind_rows(
	  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc |>
	    dplyr::transmute(
      asset_label = "Figure S13",
	      outcome,
	      outcome_label,
	      check_name = "spline_baseline_relative_odds_nonzero_uncertainty",
	      status = .data$validation_status,
	      detail = paste0("Readout rows: ", .data$readout_rows, "; zero-width CI rows: ", .data$zero_width_ci_n, ".")
	    ),
	  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc |>
	    dplyr::transmute(
      asset_label = "Figure S14",
	      outcome,
	      outcome_label,
	      check_name = "offset_scan_displayed_metric_highlights",
      status = .data$validation_status,
      detail = .data$detail
    )
)
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```
