```{r baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation}
baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc <- tibble::tibble(
  asset_label = c(
    "Table S12",
    "Table S13",
    "Table S14",
    "Table S15"
  ),
  expected_rows_min = c(length(cat3_outcomes), length(cat3_outcomes) * length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS), length(cat3_outcomes) * 3L, length(cat3_outcomes) * length(baseline_relative_odds_offset_values)),
  observed_rows = c(
    nrow(internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds),
    nrow(internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds),
    nrow(internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm),
    nrow(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds)
  ),
  required_identifier_status = c(
    if (all(c("Outcome", "Common baseline odds") %in% names(internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("Outcome", "pCO2 category", "VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)") %in% names(internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("Outcome", "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)", "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)", "VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)") %in% names(internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("Outcome", "Offset", "Mean |log LR ratio|", "Flags") %in% names(internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$observed_rows < .data$expected_rows_min ~ "FAIL",
      .data$required_identifier_status != "PASS" ~ "FAIL",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    detail = paste0("Observed ", .data$observed_rows, " rows; minimum expected ", .data$expected_rows_min, ".")
  )
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "offsets_present",
    "support_positive",
    "one_geometric_best_per_outcome",
    "one_primary_best_per_outcome",
    "internal_offset_display_highlights",
    "prespecified_5mm_present",
    "ci_policy"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$offset_n == 11L) &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$min_offset == 0L) &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$max_offset == 10L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$min_grid_points > 0L) &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$min_total_support_weight > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$geometric_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$primary_best_offset_n == 1L)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_support_audit$has_prespecified_5mm_offset)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_summary$ci_status == "Not estimated for exploratory point-estimate offset scan")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Each outcome must have candidate offsets 0 through 10.",
    "Each retained offset must have at least one grid point and positive support weight.",
    "The geometric-mean criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "The primary mean-absolute-log criterion must select exactly one best offset per outcome.",
    "Internal offset-scan figure highlights must match the metric displayed in each panel.",
    "The prespecified 5 mmHg offset remains present as a comparator.",
    "Offset-scan CIs are intentionally not estimated in this exploratory first pass."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_formula_error_max <- max(
  c(
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error,
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error,
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error,
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error,
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error,
    baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error
  ),
  na.rm = TRUE
)
baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "baseline_common_to_modalities",
    "baseline_two_modality_components_finite",
    "baseline_source_denominator",
    "cat3_formula_recompute",
    "spline_formula_recompute",
    "offset_scan_support",
    "table_qc",
    "figure_qc",
    "interpretation_language"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(is.finite(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$target_baseline_odds)) &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$target_baseline_odds > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(is.finite(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$abg_weighted_target_risk)) &&
        all(is.finite(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$vbg_weighted_target_risk)) &&
        all(is.finite(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$abg_weighted_target_var_p)) &&
        all(is.finite(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$vbg_weighted_target_var_p))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation$source_denominator == "eligible analytic source population after encounter-type filtering")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (max(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error, na.rm = TRUE) <= 1e-8) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (max(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error, na.rm = TRUE) <= 1e-8) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    "PASS"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "The same equal-weighted target baseline odds are joined to ABG and VBG conditioned predictions within outcome/imputation.",
    "Both ABG and VBG weighted target risk and variance components must be finite; no one-modality fallback is allowed.",
    "Baseline denominators use the eligible analytic source population after encounter-type filtering.",
    paste0("Maximum categorical baseline-relative odds formula recomputation error = ", format_fixed_value(max(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error, na.rm = TRUE), digits = 10), "."),
    paste0("Maximum spline baseline-relative odds formula recomputation error = ", format_fixed_value(max(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$abg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$vbg_lr_formula_error, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_by_imputation$lr_ratio_formula_error, na.rm = TRUE), digits = 10), "."),
    paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$component, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$status, collapse = "; "),
    paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$asset_label, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$status, collapse = "; "),
    paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$asset_label, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$status, collapse = "; "),
    "Captions and notes use plain likelihood-ratio terminology and define the common baseline odds."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Likelihood Ratio Audit",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "- Estimand: pCO2-conditioned predicted outcome odds divided by common weighted target-population baseline odds.",
    "- Baseline odds: equal-weighted average of ABG and VBG MI-logistic IPSW weighted target risks within imputation, pooled on the logit scale.",
    "- Ratio: VBG LR divided by ABG LR; the common baseline cancels on the logit scale.",
    "- Interpretation: likelihood-ratio outcome-risk summary, not an agreement test, equivalence test, or noninferiority test.",
    "",
    "## Audit Rows",
    markdown_table(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

baseline_relative_predicted_odds_validation_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "baseline_rows",
    "cat3_rows",
    "spline_readout_rows",
    "offset_scan",
    "table_qc",
    "figure_qc",
    "formula_audit",
    "interpretation"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled) == length(cat3_outcomes)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled) == length(cat3_outcomes) * length(CO2_CAT_LEVELS)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm) >= length(cat3_outcomes) * 3L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_audit$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    "PASS"
  ),
  detail = c(
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled), " baseline rows."),
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_cat3_pooled), " categorical baseline-relative odds rows."),
    paste0("Computed ", nrow(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_readouts_5mm), " spline baseline-relative odds readout rows."),
    paste0("Offset scan statuses: ", paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$component, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_validation$status, collapse = "; "), "."),
    paste0("Table QC statuses: ", paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$asset_label, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_table_qc$status, collapse = "; "), "."),
    paste0("Figure QC statuses: ", paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$asset_label, baseline_relative_predicted_odds_figure_qc$status, collapse = "; "), "."),
    paste0("Maximum baseline-relative odds formula recomputation error = ", format_fixed_value(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_formula_error_max, digits = 10), "."),
    "Likelihood-ratio language defines the common baseline odds and distinguishes these outputs from agreement/equivalence/noninferiority tests."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  baseline_relative_predicted_odds_validation_status,
  results_path("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_validation_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
```

```{r outcome-rate-reference-risk-diagnostics}
#| code-block-title: "Weighted outcome-rate and reference-risk diagnostics"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"

diagnostic_note_weighted_rates <- paste(
  "Weighted outcome-rate differences are diagnostic checks, not formal evidence of failure.",
  "Weighting standardizes measured covariates but does not force equality of outcomes or pCO2 distributions."
)
diagnostic_note_reference_risks <- paste(
  "These model-implied reference risks are not constrained to be equal.",
  "Separate ABG and VBG outcome models may have different intercepts even after standardizing measured covariates to the same eligible source population."
)
diagnostic_note_distinction <- paste(
  "Overall weighted outcome rates evaluate whether the two weighted tested cohorts have similar unconditional outcome burden.",
  "Model-implied reference risks evaluate predicted risk at paired pCO2 reference values under separate outcome models.",
  "Differences in the latter do not necessarily imply failure of weighting."
)

diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp <- function(abs_pp) {
  abs_pp <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(abs_pp))
  dplyr::case_when(
    !is.finite(abs_pp) ~ "FAIL",
    abs_pp <= 2.5 ~ "PASS",
    abs_pp <= 5 ~ "REVIEW",
    TRUE ~ "WARN"
  )
}

diagnostic_status_rank <- c(PASS = 0L, REVIEW = 1L, WARN = 2L, FAIL = 3L)
max_diagnostic_status <- function(status) {
  status <- as.character(status)
  status <- status[status %in% names(diagnostic_status_rank)]
  if (!length(status)) {
    return("FAIL")
  }
  names(which.max(diagnostic_status_rank[status]))
}

diagnostic_status_to_severity <- function(status) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    status == "PASS" ~ "none",
    status == "REVIEW" ~ "low",
    status == "WARN" ~ "medium",
    TRUE ~ "high"
  )
}

diagnostic_status_to_audit_status <- function(status) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    status == "PASS" ~ "pass",
    status %in% c("REVIEW", "WARN") ~ "warn",
    TRUE ~ "fail"
  )
}

weighted_outcome_rate_comparison <- baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    outcome,
    outcome_label,
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = 100 * (.data$vbg_weighted_target_risk - .data$abg_weighted_target_risk),
    weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(
      is.finite(.data$abg_weighted_target_risk) & .data$abg_weighted_target_risk > 1e-6,
      .data$vbg_weighted_target_risk / .data$abg_weighted_target_risk,
      NA_real_
    ),
    absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct = abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct),
    diagnostic_status = diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(.data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct)
  )

make_weighted_outcome_rate_rows <- function(baseline_df, modality) {
  modality <- match.arg(modality, c("ABG", "VBG"))
  prefix <- tolower(modality)
  tibble::tibble(
    outcome = baseline_df$outcome,
    outcome_label = baseline_df$outcome_label,
    modality = modality,
    unweighted_n = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_tested_n")]],
    unweighted_events = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_tested_events")]],
    unweighted_rate_pct = 100 * baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_tested_risk")]],
    weighted_events_raw = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_events")]],
    weighted_n_raw = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_n")]],
    weighted_numerator = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_weighted_events")]],
    weighted_weight_sum = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_weight_sum")]],
    weighted_rate_pct = 100 * baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_risk")]],
    weighted_rate_lcl_pct = 100 * baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_risk_lcl")]],
    weighted_rate_ucl_pct = 100 * baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_risk_ucl")]],
    weighted_rate_se_pct = 100 *
      baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_risk")]] *
      (1 - baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_risk")]]) *
      baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_logit_se")]],
    effective_sample_size = baseline_df[[paste0(prefix, "_weighted_target_effective_n")]],
    comparison_modality = dplyr::if_else(modality == "ABG", "VBG", "ABG")
  )
}

weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  make_weighted_outcome_rate_rows(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled, "ABG"),
  make_weighted_outcome_rate_rows(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled, "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    weighted_outcome_rate_comparison,
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = diagnostic_note_weighted_rates,
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels), .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = as.character(.data$outcome_label),
    modality = as.character(.data$modality)
  )

weighted_outcome_rate_values_possible <- nrow(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic) == length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L &&
  all(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$modality %in% c("ABG", "VBG")) &&
  all(is.finite(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$weighted_rate_pct)) &&
  all(dplyr::between(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100)) &&
  all(is.finite(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$unweighted_rate_pct)) &&
  all(dplyr::between(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$unweighted_rate_pct, 0, 100))

write_csv_safely(
  weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic,
  results_path("weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

weighted_outcome_rate_plot_data <- weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS)
  )
weighted_outcome_rate_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  weighted_outcome_rate_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_label, y = weighted_rate_pct, color = modality)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = weighted_rate_lcl_pct, ymax = weighted_rate_ucl_pct),
    width = 0.18,
    linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_INTERVAL_LINEWIDTH,
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    size = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_POINT_SIZE,
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Weighted outcome-rate diagnostic",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Weighted outcome rate (%)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(weighted_outcome_rate_plot, "weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic", width = 7.5, height = 4.8)

reference_risk_source <- risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm |>
  dplyr::filter(
    abs(.data$abg_pco2 - ABG_CO2_REF) < 1e-8,
    abs(.data$vbg_pco2 - VBG_CO2_REF) < 1e-8
  )
if (!"variance_policy" %in% names(reference_risk_source)) {
  reference_risk_source$variance_policy <- "Rubin pooling on the risk-difference scale; modality-specific prediction variances summed within imputation"
}
missing_reference_outcomes <- setdiff(baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels, reference_risk_source$outcome)
if (length(missing_reference_outcomes) || nrow(reference_risk_source) != length(baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels)) {
  stop(
    "Model-implied reference-risk diagnostic requires one ABG 40 / VBG 45 row for each outcome; missing or duplicate outcomes: ",
    paste(missing_reference_outcomes, collapse = ", "),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic <- reference_risk_source |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    outcome,
    outcome_label,
    abg_ref_pco2 = .data$abg_pco2,
    vbg_ref_pco2 = .data$vbg_pco2,
    abg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_abg,
    abg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_lcl_abg,
    abg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_ucl_abg,
    vbg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_vbg,
    vbg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_lcl_vbg,
    vbg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_ucl_vbg,
    risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$rd_pp,
    risk_difference_lcl_pct = .data$rd_lcl_pp,
    risk_difference_ucl_pct = .data$rd_ucl_pp,
    risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_abg > 1e-6, .data$p_vbg / .data$p_abg, NA_real_),
    prediction_method = "primary MI-logistic IPSW spline",
    standardization_target = "common eligible source-population covariate distribution",
    uncertainty_method = .data$variance_policy,
    diagnostic_status = diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)),
    diagnostic_note = diagnostic_note_reference_risks
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels))

reference_risk_values_possible <- nrow(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic) == length(cat3_outcomes) &&
  all(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$abg_ref_pco2 == ABG_CO2_REF) &&
  all(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$vbg_ref_pco2 == VBG_CO2_REF) &&
  all(is.finite(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$abg_predicted_risk_pct)) &&
  all(is.finite(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$vbg_predicted_risk_pct)) &&
  all(dplyr::between(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$abg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100)) &&
  all(dplyr::between(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$vbg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100))

write_csv_safely(
  model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic,
  results_path("model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

reference_risk_plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      modality = "ABG 40",
      risk_pct = .data$abg_predicted_risk_pct,
      risk_lcl_pct = .data$abg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct,
      risk_ucl_pct = .data$abg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct
    ),
  model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      outcome_label,
      modality = "VBG 45",
      risk_pct = .data$vbg_predicted_risk_pct,
      risk_lcl_pct = .data$vbg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct,
      risk_ucl_pct = .data$vbg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct
    )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = baseline_relative_odds_panel_levels),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = c("ABG 40", "VBG 45"))
  )
reference_risk_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  reference_risk_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_label, y = risk_pct, color = modality)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = risk_lcl_pct, ymax = risk_ucl_pct),
    width = 0.18,
    linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_INTERVAL_LINEWIDTH,
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    size = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_POINT_SIZE,
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = c("ABG 40" = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS[["ABG"]], "VBG 45" = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS[["VBG"]])) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Model-implied reference-risk diagnostic",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Standardized predicted risk (%)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(reference_risk_plot, "model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic", width = 7.5, height = 4.8)

weighted_reference_comparison <- weighted_outcome_rate_comparison |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome,
    outcome_label,
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
    weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
    weighted_status = diagnostic_status
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
      dplyr::select(
        outcome,
        reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
        reference_risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg = risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
        reference_status = diagnostic_status
      ),
    by = "outcome"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    caution_level = vapply(
      Map(c, .data$weighted_status, .data$reference_status),
      max_diagnostic_status,
      character(1)
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = baseline_relative_odds_outcome_levels))

weighted_outcome_rate_max_status <- if (weighted_outcome_rate_values_possible) {
  max_diagnostic_status(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic$diagnostic_status)
} else {
  "FAIL"
}
reference_risk_max_status <- if (reference_risk_values_possible) {
  max_diagnostic_status(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic$diagnostic_status)
} else {
  "FAIL"
}
combined_outcome_reference_status <- max_diagnostic_status(c(weighted_outcome_rate_max_status, reference_risk_max_status))

outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "diagnostic_inventory",
    "weighted_outcome_rate_rows",
    "weighted_outcome_rate_values_possible",
    "weighted_outcome_rate_comparison_status",
    "reference_risk_rows",
    "reference_risk_values_possible",
    "reference_risk_comparison_status",
    "comparison_summary",
    "diagnostic_figures"
  ),
  status = c(
    "PASS",
    if (nrow(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic) == length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (weighted_outcome_rate_values_possible) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    weighted_outcome_rate_max_status,
    if (nrow(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic) == length(cat3_outcomes)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (reference_risk_values_possible) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    reference_risk_max_status,
    if (nrow(weighted_reference_comparison) == length(cat3_outcomes)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic.png"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Existing diagnostics were inventoried and canonical diagnostic outputs are listed in outcome_rate_reference_risk_diagnostic_inventory.md.",
    paste0("Observed ", nrow(weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic), " weighted-rate diagnostic rows; expected ", length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L, "."),
    "Weighted and unweighted outcome rates are finite and between 0% and 100%.",
    paste0("Maximum weighted outcome-rate diagnostic status: ", weighted_outcome_rate_max_status, "."),
    paste0("Observed ", nrow(model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic), " reference-risk rows; expected ", length(cat3_outcomes), "."),
    "Reference ABG 40 / VBG 45 predicted risks are finite and between 0% and 100%.",
    paste0("Maximum model-implied reference-risk diagnostic status: ", reference_risk_max_status, "."),
    "Weighted outcome-rate and model-implied reference-risk diagnostics were compared in weighted_rates_vs_reference_risks_interpretation.md.",
    "Compact QA figures were generated for weighted outcome rates and model-implied reference risks."
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    severity = diagnostic_status_to_severity(.data$status),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit,
  results_path("outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Outcome-Rate and Reference-Risk Diagnostic Inventory",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "",
    "## Existing Diagnostics Found",
    "",
    "- `co2_binned_rates_mi_ipw_abg.csv` and `co2_binned_rates_mi_ipw_vbg.csv` describe binned observed outcome rates after MI-logistic IPSW, but they do not answer the requested overall ABG/VBG pseudo-population outcome-rate comparison.",
    "- `baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_by_imputation.csv` and `baseline_relative_predicted_odds_baseline_pooled.csv` already contain raw tested outcome rates and ABG/VBG MI-logistic IPSW weighted target outcome rates. These are the canonical source objects for the new weighted outcome-rate diagnostic.",
    "- `risk_difference_spline_readouts_5mm.csv` already contains the ABG 40 / VBG 45 paired standardized predicted-risk row generated by the same common-source marginal standardization workflow used for Figure 2 and the standardized risk-difference outputs. This is the canonical source object for the model-implied reference-risk diagnostic.",
    "",
    "## Canonical Diagnostic Artifacts",
    "",
    "- `weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic.csv` and `.md` directly compare raw and weighted outcome rates by modality and outcome.",
    "- `model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv` and `.md` compare standardized predicted risks at ABG pCO2 = 40 mmHg and VBG pCO2 = 45 mmHg.",
    "- `weighted_rates_vs_reference_risks_interpretation.md` distinguishes unconditional weighted outcome rates from model-implied reference risks.",
    "- `outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv` integrates diagnostic status into the QA path.",
    "",
    paste0("- New implementation required: ", if (all(outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit$status != "FAIL")) "yes; canonical exports and QA status were added from existing validated objects." else "yes; canonical exports were attempted but at least one structural check failed.")
  ),
  con = results_path("outcome_rate_reference_risk_diagnostic_inventory.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Weighted Outcome-Rate Diagnostic",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Overall diagnostic status: ", weighted_outcome_rate_max_status),
    "",
    diagnostic_note_weighted_rates,
    "",
    "## Weighted Rate Comparison",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label,
          modality,
          unweighted_n,
          unweighted_events,
          unweighted_rate_pct,
          weighted_rate_pct,
          weighted_rate_se_pct,
          effective_sample_size,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = results_path("weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Model-Implied Reference-Risk Diagnostic",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Overall diagnostic status: ", reference_risk_max_status),
    "",
    diagnostic_note_reference_risks,
    "",
    "## ABG 40 / VBG 45 Reference Risks",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label,
          abg_ref_pco2,
          vbg_ref_pco2,
          abg_predicted_risk_pct,
          vbg_predicted_risk_pct,
          risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          prediction_method,
          standardization_target,
          uncertainty_method,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = results_path("model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

caution_outcomes <- weighted_reference_comparison |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$caution_level %in% c("REVIEW", "WARN")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(line = paste0("- ", .data$outcome_label, ": weighted-rate status ", .data$weighted_status, "; reference-risk status ", .data$reference_status, ".")) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$line)
if (!length(caution_outcomes)) {
  caution_outcomes <- "- No outcome exceeded the review thresholds in either diagnostic."
}

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Weighted Rates Versus Reference Risks Interpretation",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Combined diagnostic status: ", combined_outcome_reference_status),
    "",
    diagnostic_note_distinction,
    "",
    "## Side-by-Side Summary",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      weighted_reference_comparison |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          weighted_status,
          reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          reference_risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          reference_status,
          caution_level
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Outcomes Needing Interpretive Caution",
    "",
    caution_outcomes,
    "",
    "## Suggested Interpretation Language",
    "",
    "Weighting standardized the measured covariate distributions of ABG- and VBG-tested cohorts to the same eligible source population, but it did not constrain the modality-specific outcome models to have equal reference risks. We therefore examined both overall weighted outcome rates and model-implied reference risks at ABG 40 and VBG 45 mmHg. Differences in absolute standardized risks were interpreted as scale-dependent evidence about absolute prognostic similarity, not as automatic failure of weighting.",
    "",
    "ROR analyses compare relative association strength, whereas risk-difference analyses compare absolute standardized predicted risks. These quantities can diverge when relative pCO2-outcome associations are similar but model-implied reference risks differ."
  ),
  con = results_path("weighted_rates_vs_reference_risks_interpretation.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
```

## Reverse-timing and severity sensitivity program

The following sections implement a staged diagnostic sensitivity program from the source tickets listed in `Results/reverse_timing_severity_ticket_references.md`. These outputs are diagnostic and do not replace the primary ROR, risk-difference, likelihood-ratio, weighted-rate, or reference-risk analyses.

```{r reverse-timing-ticket-references-and-helpers}
#| code-block-title: "Reverse-timing sensitivity ticket references and helpers"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Purpose: shared setup for the reverse-timing / latent-severity sensitivity program.

SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REPO_DIR <- fs::path("Code Drafts", "ticket_snapshots", "reverse_timing_severity")
SENSITIVITY_TICKET_DOWNLOAD_DIR <- fs::path_home("Downloads")
SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILENAMES <- c(
  overall = "codex_ticket_overall_reverse_timing_sensitivity_program.md",
  ticket_1_timing = "codex_ticket_1_timing_diagnostic_gas_vs_imv_niv.md",
  ticket_2_timing_weighted_rates = "codex_ticket_2_timing_stratified_weighted_rates.md",
  ticket_3_no_lactate = "codex_ticket_3_no_lactate_propensity_sensitivity.md",
  ticket_4_pregas = "codex_ticket_4_pregas_covariate_propensity_model.md",
  ticket_5_acute_workflow = "codex_ticket_5_acute_severity_workflow_proxy_sensitivity.md"
)

SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS <- tibble::tibble(
  ticket = names(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILENAMES),
  filename = unname(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILENAMES),
  repo_path = fs::path(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REPO_DIR, unname(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILENAMES)),
  downloads_path = fs::path(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_DOWNLOAD_DIR, unname(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILENAMES))
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    repo_exists = file.exists(.data$repo_path),
    downloads_exists = file.exists(.data$downloads_path),
    selected_path = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$repo_exists ~ .data$repo_path,
      .data$downloads_exists ~ .data$downloads_path,
      TRUE ~ .data$repo_path
    ),
    reference_source = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$repo_exists ~ "repo_snapshot",
      .data$downloads_exists ~ "downloads_fallback",
      TRUE ~ "missing"
    ),
    exists = .data$repo_exists | .data$downloads_exists,
    traceability_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$reference_source == "repo_snapshot" ~ "PASS",
      .data$reference_source == "downloads_fallback" ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "WARN"
    ),
    traceability_note = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$reference_source == "repo_snapshot" ~ "Repo-local ticket snapshot selected.",
      .data$reference_source == "downloads_fallback" ~ "Downloads fallback selected; add/update repo-local snapshot for portable review.",
      TRUE ~ "Ticket markdown missing from repo-local snapshot and Downloads fallback."
    )
  )

SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILES <- stats::setNames(
  SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS$selected_path,
  SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS$ticket
)

sensitivity_ticket_reference_status <- function(ticket_names = names(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILES)) {
  selected <- SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$ticket %in% ticket_names)
  if (!nrow(selected) || any(selected$reference_source == "missing")) {
    return("WARN")
  }
  if (any(selected$reference_source == "downloads_fallback")) {
    return("REVIEW")
  }
  "PASS"
}

sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail <- function(ticket_names = names(SENSITIVITY_TICKET_FILES)) {
  selected <- SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$ticket %in% ticket_names)
  if (!nrow(selected)) {
    return("No matching ticket references were configured.")
  }
  paste0(
    selected$ticket,
    "=",
    selected$reference_source,
    collapse = "; "
  )
}

sensitivity_family_dirs <- c(
  reverse_timing = "sensitivity_reverse_timing",
  timing_stratified_rates = "sensitivity_timing_stratified_rates",
  no_lactate = "sensitivity_no_lactate",
  pregas_covariates = "sensitivity_pregas_covariates",
  acute_workflow = "sensitivity_acute_workflow"
)

sensitivity_path <- function(family, ...) {
  family <- match.arg(family, names(sensitivity_family_dirs))
  fs::dir_create(results_path(sensitivity_family_dirs[[family]]))
  results_path(sensitivity_family_dirs[[family]], ...)
}

sensitivity_status_rank <- c(PASS = 0L, REVIEW = 1L, WARN = 2L, SKIPPED = 2L, FAIL = 3L)
sensitivity_max_status <- function(status) {
  status <- as.character(status)
  status <- status[status %in% names(sensitivity_status_rank)]
  if (!length(status)) return("FAIL")
  names(which.max(sensitivity_status_rank[status]))
}

sensitivity_status_severity <- function(status) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    status == "PASS" ~ "none",
    status == "REVIEW" ~ "low",
    status %in% c("WARN", "SKIPPED") ~ "medium",
    TRUE ~ "high"
  )
}

sensitivity_write_status <- function(rows, family) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(rows))
  rows <- rows |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      severity = sensitivity_status_severity(.data$status),
      run_id = diag_run_id,
      run_ts = diag_run_ts
    )
  write_csv_safely(
    rows,
    sensitivity_path(family, paste0(sensitivity_family_dirs[[family]], "_validation_status.csv")),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  rows
}

sensitivity_first_existing_col <- function(candidates, data_names) {
  hit <- candidates[candidates %in% data_names]
  if (length(hit)) hit[[1L]] else NA_character_
}

sensitivity_candidate_cols <- function(data_names, pattern, max_n = Inf) {
  hits <- data_names[grepl(pattern, data_names, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  unique(utils::head(hits, max_n))
}

sensitivity_day_numeric <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "Date")) return(as.numeric(x))
  if (inherits(x, "POSIXt")) return(as.numeric(as.Date(x)))
  if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) return(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[!nzchar(x_chr)] <- NA_character_
  numeric_like <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
  parsed <- rep(NA_real_, length(x_chr))
  use_numeric <- !is.na(numeric_like) & !grepl("[/-]", x_chr)
  parsed[use_numeric] <- numeric_like[use_numeric]
  needs_date <- which(!use_numeric & !is.na(x_chr))
  if (length(needs_date)) {
    date_formats <- c("%Y-%m-%d", "%m/%d/%Y", "%Y/%m/%d", "%m-%d-%Y")
    parsed_date <- rep(as.Date(NA), length(needs_date))
    for (fmt in date_formats) {
      missing_idx <- which(is.na(parsed_date))
      if (!length(missing_idx)) break
      parsed_date[missing_idx] <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x_chr[needs_date][missing_idx], format = fmt))
    }
    parsed[needs_date] <- as.numeric(parsed_date)
  }
  parsed
}

sensitivity_rate_status_from_abs_pp <- function(abs_pp) {
  abs_pp <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(abs_pp))
  dplyr::case_when(
    !is.finite(abs_pp) ~ "FAIL",
    abs_pp <= 2.5 ~ "PASS",
    abs_pp <= 5 ~ "REVIEW",
    TRUE ~ "WARN"
  )
}

sensitivity_weighted_mean_safe <- function(x, w) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(w))
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
  sum(w[ok] * x[ok], na.rm = TRUE) / sum(w[ok], na.rm = TRUE)
}

sensitivity_weighted_ess <- function(w) {
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(w))
  w <- w[is.finite(w) & w > 0]
  if (!length(w)) return(NA_real_)
  sum(w)^2 / sum(w^2)
}

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Reverse-Timing and Severity Sensitivity Ticket References",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "",
    "These markdown tickets remain the specification authority for this staged diagnostic program.",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      SENSITIVITY_TICKET_REFERENCE_STATUS |>
        dplyr::select(
          ticket,
          selected_path,
          reference_source,
          exists,
          traceability_status,
          traceability_note
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = results_path("reverse_timing_severity_ticket_references.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
```

```{r sensitivity-ticket-1-reverse-timing}
#| code-block-title: "Ticket 1: timing diagnostic for gas measurement vs IMV/NIV"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Purpose: classify IMV/NIV first-date timing relative to ABG/VBG gas day.

ticket1_names <- names(subset_data_raw)
ticket1_gas_candidates <- sensitivity_candidate_cols(
  ticket1_names,
  "(abg|vbg|arterial|venous|blood_gas|gas|paco2|co2).*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)",
  max_n = 80
)
ticket1_proc_candidates <- sensitivity_candidate_cols(
  ticket1_names,
  "(imv|niv|vent).*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)",
  max_n = 80
)

ticket1_field_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  modality = c("ABG", "VBG"),
  treat_var = c("has_abg", "has_vbg"),
  gas_day_field = c(
    sensitivity_first_existing_col(
      c(
        "paco2_date", "abg_co2_date", "abg_ph_date", "abg_hco3_date",
        "meas_art_gas_proc_first_date", "art_punct_proc_first_date",
        ticket1_gas_candidates[grepl("abg|arterial|art|paco2", ticket1_gas_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]
      ),
      ticket1_names
    ),
    sensitivity_first_existing_col(
      c(
        "vbg_co2_date", "vbg_ph_date", "vbg_hco3_date",
        "meas_venous_o2_proc_first_date",
        ticket1_gas_candidates[grepl("vbg|venous", ticket1_gas_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]
      ),
      ticket1_names
    )
  )
)

ticket1_outcome_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  outcome = c("IMV", "NIV"),
  outcome_var = c("imv_proc", "niv_proc"),
  outcome_day_field = c(
    sensitivity_first_existing_col(
      c("imv_proc_first_date", "imv_first_date", ticket1_proc_candidates[grepl("imv", ticket1_proc_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
      ticket1_names
    ),
    sensitivity_first_existing_col(
      c("niv_proc_first_date", "niv_first_date", ticket1_proc_candidates[grepl("niv", ticket1_proc_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
      ticket1_names
    )
  )
)

ticket1_field_inventory <- tidyr::crossing(
  ticket1_field_specs,
  ticket1_outcome_specs
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    gas_field_available = !is.na(.data$gas_day_field),
    outcome_field_available = !is.na(.data$outcome_day_field),
    status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$gas_field_available & .data$outcome_field_available ~ "PASS",
      TRUE ~ "WARN"
    ),
    note = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$gas_field_available & .data$outcome_field_available ~ "Timing fields available for classification.",
      !.data$gas_field_available & !.data$outcome_field_available ~ "Gas and outcome date fields unavailable; timing rows will be missing-field diagnostics.",
      !.data$gas_field_available ~ "Gas date field unavailable; timing rows will be missing-gas diagnostics.",
      TRUE ~ "Outcome date field unavailable; timing rows will be missing-outcome diagnostics."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  ticket1_field_inventory,
  sensitivity_path("reverse_timing", "timing_field_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket1_timing_levels <- c(
  "outcome_before_gas",
  "outcome_same_day_as_gas",
  "outcome_after_gas",
  "no_outcome",
  "missing_gas_day",
  "missing_outcome_day"
)

classify_ticket1_timing <- function(gas_day, outcome_day, outcome_flag) {
  outcome_flag <- !is.na(outcome_flag) & outcome_flag == 1
  dplyr::case_when(
    !outcome_flag ~ "no_outcome",
    is.na(gas_day) ~ "missing_gas_day",
    is.na(outcome_day) ~ "missing_outcome_day",
    outcome_day < gas_day ~ "outcome_before_gas",
    outcome_day == gas_day ~ "outcome_same_day_as_gas",
    outcome_day > gas_day ~ "outcome_after_gas",
    TRUE ~ "missing_outcome_day"
  )
}

ticket1_rows <- list()
if (nrow(subset_data_raw) != nrow(subset_data)) {
  stop("Ticket 1 timing diagnostic requires subset_data_raw and subset_data to remain row-aligned.", call. = FALSE)
}

for (row_idx in seq_len(nrow(ticket1_field_inventory))) {
  spec <- ticket1_field_inventory[row_idx, ]
  tested <- !is.na(subset_data[[spec$treat_var]]) & subset_data[[spec$treat_var]] == 1
  event <- to01(subset_data[[spec$outcome_var]])
  gas_day <- if (!is.na(spec$gas_day_field)) {
    sensitivity_day_numeric(subset_data_raw[[spec$gas_day_field]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(subset_data))
  }
  outcome_day <- if (!is.na(spec$outcome_day_field)) {
    sensitivity_day_numeric(subset_data_raw[[spec$outcome_day_field]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(subset_data))
  }
  timing_class <- classify_ticket1_timing(gas_day, outcome_day, event)
  d <- tibble::tibble(
    modality = spec$modality,
    outcome = spec$outcome,
    outcome_var = spec$outcome_var,
    timing_class = factor(timing_class, levels = ticket1_timing_levels),
    tested = tested,
    event = !is.na(event) & event == 1,
    gas_day_field = dplyr::coalesce(spec$gas_day_field, ""),
    outcome_day_field = dplyr::coalesce(spec$outcome_day_field, "")
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$tested)
  total_tested <- nrow(d)
  total_event <- sum(d$event, na.rm = TRUE)
  ticket1_rows[[length(ticket1_rows) + 1L]] <- d |>
    dplyr::count(.data$modality, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_var, .data$timing_class,
                 .data$gas_day_field, .data$outcome_day_field, name = "n") |>
    tidyr::complete(
      timing_class = factor(ticket1_timing_levels, levels = ticket1_timing_levels),
      fill = list(n = 0L)
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      modality = spec$modality,
      outcome = spec$outcome,
      outcome_var = spec$outcome_var,
      gas_day_field = dplyr::coalesce(spec$gas_day_field, ""),
      outcome_day_field = dplyr::coalesce(spec$outcome_day_field, ""),
      tested_n = total_tested,
      outcome_positive_n = total_event,
      percent_of_tested = if (total_tested > 0) 100 * .data$n / total_tested else NA_real_,
      percent_of_outcome_positive = if (total_event > 0) {
        dplyr::if_else(.data$timing_class != "no_outcome", 100 * .data$n / total_event, NA_real_)
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      missingness_note = dplyr::case_when(
        !nzchar(.data$gas_day_field) ~ "No gas-day field available.",
        !nzchar(.data$outcome_day_field) ~ "No outcome-day field available.",
        TRUE ~ "Date fields available; same-day is temporally ambiguous."
      )
    )
}

timing_classification_counts <- dplyr::bind_rows(ticket1_rows) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    timing_class = as.character(.data$timing_class),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$modality, .data$outcome, factor(.data$timing_class, levels = ticket1_timing_levels))

write_csv_safely(
  timing_classification_counts,
  sensitivity_path("reverse_timing", "timing_classification_counts.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

timing_classification_by_modality_outcome <- timing_classification_counts |>
  dplyr::select(
    modality, outcome, outcome_var, timing_class, n, percent_of_tested,
    percent_of_outcome_positive, gas_day_field, outcome_day_field, missingness_note
  )
write_csv_safely(
  timing_classification_by_modality_outcome,
  sensitivity_path("reverse_timing", "timing_classification_by_modality_outcome.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket1_summary <- timing_classification_counts |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$timing_class %in% c("outcome_before_gas", "outcome_same_day_as_gas", "outcome_after_gas")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$modality, .data$outcome) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    outcome_positive_n = dplyr::first(.data$outcome_positive_n),
    before_or_same_day_pct_of_positive = sum(.data$percent_of_outcome_positive[
      .data$timing_class %in% c("outcome_before_gas", "outcome_same_day_as_gas")
    ], na.rm = TRUE),
    after_gas_pct_of_positive = sum(.data$percent_of_outcome_positive[
      .data$timing_class == "outcome_after_gas"
    ], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ticket1_plot <- timing_classification_counts |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$timing_class != "no_outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    timing_class = factor(.data$timing_class, levels = ticket1_timing_levels),
    outcome = factor(.data$outcome, levels = c("IMV", "NIV"))
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = modality, y = percent_of_outcome_positive, fill = timing_class)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.72, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome, nrow = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", na.translate = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Timing diagnostic for gas measurement vs IMV/NIV",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percent among outcome-positive tested encounters",
    fill = "Timing class"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(ticket1_plot, "timing_classification_by_modality_outcome", width = 8.0, height = 4.8)

ticket1_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "ticket_references",
    "field_mapping",
    "classification_rows",
    "modality_outcome_coverage",
    "timing_classes_complete",
    "figure_output"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(c("overall", "ticket_1_timing")),
    if (all(ticket1_field_inventory$status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "WARN",
    if (nrow(timing_classification_counts) == 2L * 2L * length(ticket1_timing_levels)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("ABG", "VBG") %in% timing_classification_counts$modality) &&
        all(c("IMV", "NIV") %in% timing_classification_counts$outcome)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(ticket1_timing_levels %in% timing_classification_counts$timing_class)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "timing_classification_by_modality_outcome.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "timing_classification_by_modality_outcome.pdf"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(c("overall", "ticket_1_timing")),
    "Gas-day and outcome-day fields were selected using the ticket priority list plus candidate field search.",
    "Timing classification counts contain every modality/outcome/timing-class combination.",
    "Both gas modalities and both ventilatory-support outcomes are represented.",
    "All requested timing classes are materialized, including zero-count rows.",
    "Compact timing diagnostic figure was generated as a QA aid."
  )
)
ticket1_status <- sensitivity_write_status(ticket1_status, "reverse_timing")

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Timing Classification Method Note",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "",
    "This diagnostic classifies IMV and NIV first-date timing relative to the selected ABG or VBG gas-day field among tested encounters.",
    "Same-day events are labeled as temporally ambiguous because the available fields are encounter-day offsets rather than reliable within-day timestamps.",
    "The diagnostic is not used to redefine primary outcomes or primary analyses.",
    "",
    "## Field Map",
    "",
    markdown_table(ticket1_field_inventory |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("reverse_timing", "timing_classification_method_note.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Timing Classification Counts",
    "",
    paste0("- Overall status: ", sensitivity_max_status(ticket1_status$status)),
    "",
    "Rows include zero-count timing classes so downstream checks can distinguish absence of events from missing categories.",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      timing_classification_counts |>
        dplyr::select(
          modality, outcome, timing_class, n, percent_of_tested,
          percent_of_outcome_positive, gas_day_field, outcome_day_field, missingness_note
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Compact Summary",
    "",
    markdown_table(ticket1_summary |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("reverse_timing", "timing_classification_counts.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
```

```{r sensitivity-ticket-2-timing-stratified-rates}
#| code-block-title: "Ticket 2: timing-stratified weighted outcome-rate diagnostics"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Purpose: quantify whether weighted absolute-risk differences concentrate in pre/same-day ventilatory-support timing contexts.

ticket2_definition_note <- paste(
  "Timing-stratified rates are diagnostic checks.",
  "Same-day ventilatory support is temporally ambiguous and is not treated as proof that gas occurred after the outcome.",
  "These outputs do not redefine primary outcomes."
)

ticket2_class_for_spec <- function(spec, d_imp) {
  event <- to01(d_imp[[spec$outcome_var]])
  gas_day <- if (!is.na(spec$gas_day_field) && nzchar(spec$gas_day_field)) {
    sensitivity_day_numeric(subset_data_raw[[spec$gas_day_field]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(d_imp))
  }
  outcome_day <- if (!is.na(spec$outcome_day_field) && nzchar(spec$outcome_day_field)) {
    sensitivity_day_numeric(subset_data_raw[[spec$outcome_day_field]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(d_imp))
  }
  classify_ticket1_timing(gas_day, outcome_day, event)
}

ticket2_timing_distribution_by_imp <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (row_idx in seq_len(nrow(ticket1_field_inventory))) {
    spec <- ticket1_field_inventory[row_idx, ]
    tested <- !is.na(d_imp[[spec$treat_var]]) & d_imp[[spec$treat_var]] == 1
    event <- to01(d_imp[[spec$outcome_var]]) == 1
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(spec$modality, imp_index)
    timing_class <- factor(ticket2_class_for_spec(spec, d_imp), levels = ticket1_timing_levels)
    d <- tibble::tibble(
      timing_class = timing_class,
      tested = tested,
      event = event,
      w = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(weights_i))
    ) |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$tested, is.finite(.data$w), .data$w > 0)
    tested_weight_sum <- sum(d$w, na.rm = TRUE)
    event_weight_sum <- sum(d$w[d$event], na.rm = TRUE)
    ticket2_timing_distribution_by_imp[[length(ticket2_timing_distribution_by_imp) + 1L]] <- d |>
      dplyr::group_by(.data$timing_class) |>
      dplyr::summarise(
        unweighted_n = dplyr::n(),
        weighted_n = sum(.data$w, na.rm = TRUE),
        weighted_event_n = sum(.data$w[.data$event], na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      tidyr::complete(
        timing_class = factor(ticket1_timing_levels, levels = ticket1_timing_levels),
        fill = list(unweighted_n = 0L, weighted_n = 0, weighted_event_n = 0)
      ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        imp = imp_index,
        modality = spec$modality,
        timing_outcome = spec$outcome,
        timing_outcome_var = spec$outcome_var,
        weighted_percent = if (tested_weight_sum > 0) 100 * .data$weighted_n / tested_weight_sum else NA_real_,
        percent_among_outcome_positive = dplyr::if_else(
          event_weight_sum > 0 & .data$timing_class != "no_outcome",
          100 * .data$weighted_event_n / event_weight_sum,
          NA_real_
        )
      )
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

weighted_timing_class_distribution <- dplyr::bind_rows(ticket2_timing_distribution_by_imp) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$modality, .data$timing_outcome, .data$timing_outcome_var, .data$timing_class) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_percent = mean(.data$weighted_percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_among_outcome_positive = mean(.data$percent_among_outcome_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    timing_class = as.character(.data$timing_class),
    weight_type = "primary_mi_logistic_ipsw",
    diagnostic_note = ticket2_definition_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$modality, .data$timing_outcome, factor(.data$timing_class, levels = ticket1_timing_levels))

write_csv_safely(
  weighted_timing_class_distribution,
  sensitivity_path("timing_stratified_rates", "weighted_timing_class_distribution.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket2_post_gas_specs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~outcome_definition, ~timing_outcome, ~timing_outcome_var, ~event_classes, ~eligibility_restriction,
  "strict_post_gas_imv", "IMV", "imv_proc", list("outcome_after_gas"), "Tested cohort denominator; event requires IMV first day > gas day.",
  "same_day_or_after_imv", "IMV", "imv_proc", list(c("outcome_same_day_as_gas", "outcome_after_gas")), "Tested cohort denominator; event requires IMV first day >= gas day.",
  "strict_post_gas_niv", "NIV", "niv_proc", list("outcome_after_gas"), "Tested cohort denominator; event requires NIV first day > gas day.",
  "same_day_or_after_niv", "NIV", "niv_proc", list(c("outcome_same_day_as_gas", "outcome_after_gas")), "Tested cohort denominator; event requires NIV first day >= gas day."
)

ticket2_weighted_rate_one <- function(event, denominator, w) {
  ok <- denominator & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  if (!any(ok)) return(c(weighted_rate_pct = NA_real_, weighted_n = NA_real_, ess = NA_real_, unweighted_n = 0))
  c(
    weighted_rate_pct = 100 * sensitivity_weighted_mean_safe(as.numeric(event[ok]), w[ok]),
    weighted_n = sum(w[ok], na.rm = TRUE),
    ess = sensitivity_weighted_ess(w[ok]),
    unweighted_n = sum(ok, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

ticket2_post_gas_by_imp <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (modality_i in c("ABG", "VBG")) {
    spec_rows <- ticket1_field_inventory |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$modality == modality_i)
    treat_var <- unique(spec_rows$treat_var)
    tested <- !is.na(d_imp[[treat_var]]) & d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(modality_i, imp_index)
    for (rate_idx in seq_len(nrow(ticket2_post_gas_specs))) {
      rate_spec <- ticket2_post_gas_specs[rate_idx, ]
      timing_spec <- spec_rows |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$outcome == rate_spec$timing_outcome) |>
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 1)
      timing_class <- ticket2_class_for_spec(timing_spec, d_imp)
      event <- timing_class %in% unlist(rate_spec$event_classes)
      vals <- ticket2_weighted_rate_one(event, tested, weights_i)
      ticket2_post_gas_by_imp[[length(ticket2_post_gas_by_imp) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        imp = imp_index,
        outcome_definition = rate_spec$outcome_definition,
        timing_outcome = rate_spec$timing_outcome,
        modality = modality_i,
        weighted_rate_pct = vals[["weighted_rate_pct"]],
        weighted_n = vals[["weighted_n"]],
        effective_sample_size = vals[["ess"]],
        unweighted_n = vals[["unweighted_n"]],
        eligibility_restriction = rate_spec$eligibility_restriction
      )
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

ticket2_post_gas_pooled_base <- dplyr::bind_rows(ticket2_post_gas_by_imp) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome_definition, .data$timing_outcome, .data$modality, .data$eligibility_restriction) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_se_pct = stats::sd(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    weighted_n = stats::median(.data$weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    effective_sample_size = stats::median(.data$effective_sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ticket2_post_gas_comparison <- ticket2_post_gas_pooled_base |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome_definition, .data$modality, .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$VBG - .data$ABG,
    rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$ABG > 1e-6, .data$VBG / .data$ABG, NA_real_),
    diagnostic_status = sensitivity_rate_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome_definition, .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
                .data$rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg, .data$diagnostic_status)

weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates <- ticket2_post_gas_pooled_base |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket2_post_gas_comparison, by = "outcome_definition") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = ticket2_definition_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$outcome_definition, factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))

write_csv_safely(
  weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates,
  sensitivity_path("timing_stratified_rates", "weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket2_excluding_presame_by_imp <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (modality_i in c("ABG", "VBG")) {
    spec_rows <- ticket1_field_inventory |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$modality == modality_i)
    imv_spec <- spec_rows |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$outcome == "IMV") |>
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 1)
    treat_var <- unique(spec_rows$treat_var)
    tested <- !is.na(d_imp[[treat_var]]) & d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(modality_i, imp_index)
    imv_timing_class <- ticket2_class_for_spec(imv_spec, d_imp)
    eligible <- tested & imv_timing_class %in% c("no_outcome", "outcome_after_gas")
    for (outcome_i in cat3_outcomes) {
      y <- to01(d_imp[[outcome_i]]) == 1
      vals <- ticket2_weighted_rate_one(y, eligible, weights_i)
      ticket2_excluding_presame_by_imp[[length(ticket2_excluding_presame_by_imp) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        imp = imp_index,
        outcome = outcome_i,
        outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(CO2_RATE_OUTCOME_LABELS[[outcome_i]]), outcome_i),
        modality = modality_i,
        weighted_rate_pct = vals[["weighted_rate_pct"]],
        weighted_rate_se_pct = NA_real_,
        weighted_n = vals[["weighted_n"]],
        effective_sample_size = vals[["ess"]],
        unweighted_n = vals[["unweighted_n"]],
        eligibility_restriction = "Exclude encounters with IMV before gas, IMV same day as gas, or missing IMV/gas timing."
      )
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

ticket2_excluding_presame_base <- dplyr::bind_rows(ticket2_excluding_presame_by_imp) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$eligibility_restriction) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    weighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_se_pct = stats::sd(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    weighted_n = stats::median(.data$weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    effective_sample_size = stats::median(.data$effective_sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ticket2_excluding_presame_comparison <- ticket2_excluding_presame_base |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome, .data$modality, .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$VBG - .data$ABG,
    rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$ABG > 1e-6, .data$VBG / .data$ABG, NA_real_),
    diagnostic_status = sensitivity_rate_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome, .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
                .data$rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg, .data$diagnostic_status)

weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv <- ticket2_excluding_presame_base |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket2_excluding_presame_comparison, by = "outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = ticket2_definition_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = cat3_outcomes), factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))

write_csv_safely(
  weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv,
  sensitivity_path("timing_stratified_rates", "weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket2_timing_plot <- weighted_timing_class_distribution |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$timing_class != "no_outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    timing_class = factor(.data$timing_class, levels = ticket1_timing_levels),
    timing_outcome = factor(.data$timing_outcome, levels = c("IMV", "NIV"))
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = modality, y = percent_among_outcome_positive, fill = timing_class)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.72, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ timing_outcome, nrow = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", na.translate = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Weighted timing-class distribution",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Weighted percent among outcome-positive tested encounters",
    fill = "Timing class"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(ticket2_timing_plot, "weighted_timing_class_distribution", width = 8.0, height = 4.8)

ticket2_post_gas_plot <- weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_definition = factor(.data$outcome_definition, levels = unique(.data$outcome_definition)),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS)
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_definition, y = weighted_rate_pct, color = modality)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    size = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_POINT_SIZE,
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Post-gas weighted outcome-rate sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Weighted outcome rate (%)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(ticket2_post_gas_plot, "post_gas_outcome_rate_comparison", width = 8.0, height = 4.8)

ticket2_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "ticket_references",
    "timing_distribution_rows",
    "post_gas_rates",
    "excluding_presame_imv_rates",
    "value_ranges",
    "figure_outputs"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(c("overall", "ticket_2_timing_weighted_rates")),
    if (nrow(weighted_timing_class_distribution) == 2L * 2L * length(ticket1_timing_levels)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("strict_post_gas_imv", "same_day_or_after_imv", "strict_post_gas_niv", "same_day_or_after_niv") %in% weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates$outcome_definition)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(cat3_outcomes %in% weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv$outcome)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(dplyr::between(weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE) &&
        all(dplyr::between(weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "weighted_timing_class_distribution.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "weighted_timing_class_distribution.pdf")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "post_gas_outcome_rate_comparison.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "post_gas_outcome_rate_comparison.pdf"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(c("overall", "ticket_2_timing_weighted_rates")),
    "Weighted timing-class distribution contains every modality/outcome/timing-class combination.",
    "Strict post-gas and same-day-or-after IMV/NIV weighted outcome-rate definitions were generated.",
    "Weighted rates after excluding pre/same-day IMV timing were generated for all four outcomes.",
    "Generated weighted rates are within 0-100 percent when finite.",
    "Compact timing distribution and post-gas outcome-rate figures were generated as QA aids."
  )
)
ticket2_status <- sensitivity_write_status(ticket2_status, "timing_stratified_rates")

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Timing-Stratified Weighted Rate Summary",
    "",
    paste0("- Overall status: ", sensitivity_max_status(ticket2_status$status)),
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "",
    ticket2_definition_note,
    "",
    "## Post-Gas Outcome Rates",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_definition, modality, weighted_rate_pct, weighted_rate_se_pct,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct, rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          eligibility_restriction, diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Rates Excluding Pre/Same-Day IMV Context",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label, modality, weighted_rate_pct, weighted_rate_se_pct,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct, rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          eligibility_restriction, diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("timing_stratified_rates", "timing_stratified_rates_summary.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)
```

```{r sensitivity-ticket-3-no-lactate-propensity}
#| code-block-title: "Ticket 3 no-lactate propensity-weighting sensitivity"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: refit ABG/VBG MI logistic propensity weights after removing lactate variables from the sampling model.

ticket3_note <- paste(
  "No-lactate propensity weighting is a diagnostic sensitivity.",
  "Lactate is removed only from the ABG/VBG test-ordering propensity models;",
  "it remains available to the imputation model as an auxiliary variable when already present there.",
  "Pilot numerical differences are structural QA outputs, not substantive estimates."
)

ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp <- function(abs_pp) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    !is.finite(abs_pp) ~ "WARN",
    abs_pp <= 2.5 ~ "PASS",
    abs_pp <= 5 ~ "REVIEW",
    TRUE ~ "WARN"
  )
}
ticket3_outcome_label_to_var <- stats::setNames(
  names(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label),
  unname(stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label)
)

ticket3_lactate_pattern <- "(^|_)lac($|_)|lactate"
ticket3_all_source_names <- unique(c(
  names(subset_data_raw),
  names(subset_data),
  names(get_imp(1)),
  covars_ps,
  if (exists("miss_vars", inherits = TRUE)) miss_vars else character(),
  if (exists("meth", inherits = TRUE)) names(meth) else character()
))
ticket3_lactate_vars <- sort(unique(ticket3_all_source_names[
  grepl(ticket3_lactate_pattern, ticket3_all_source_names, ignore.case = TRUE)
]))
if (!length(ticket3_lactate_vars)) {
  ticket3_lactate_vars <- "no_lactate_variables_detected"
}

ticket3_date_field_for <- function(variable) {
  if (identical(variable, "no_lactate_variables_detected")) return(NA_character_)
  candidates <- unique(c(
    paste0(variable, "_date"),
    paste0(variable, "_first_date"),
    sub("(_date|_first_date)$", "", variable)
  ))
  present <- intersect(candidates, names(subset_data_raw))
  if (length(present)) present[[1L]] else NA_character_
}

ticket3_likely_source <- function(variable) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    identical(variable, "no_lactate_variables_detected") ~ "none",
    grepl("^abg", variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "ABG-specific lactate field",
    grepl("^vbg", variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "VBG-specific lactate field",
    grepl("_date$|_first_date$", variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "lactate timing field",
    grepl("serum", variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "serum lactate field",
    TRUE ~ "lactate-like field"
  )
}

lactate_variable_inventory <- tibble::tibble(variable = ticket3_lactate_vars) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    included_in_primary_ps = .data$variable %in% covars_ps,
    included_in_mi_model = if (exists("meth", inherits = TRUE)) {
      .data$variable %in% names(meth) | .data$variable %in% names(get_imp(1))
    } else {
      .data$variable %in% names(get_imp(1))
    },
    imputed_if_missing = if (exists("meth", inherits = TRUE)) {
      .data$variable %in% names(meth) & nzchar(dplyr::coalesce(meth[.data$variable], ""))
    } else {
      FALSE
    },
    date_field_available = vapply(.data$variable, ticket3_date_field_for, character(1L)),
    likely_source = vapply(.data$variable, ticket3_likely_source, character(1L)),
    notes = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$variable == "no_lactate_variables_detected" ~ "No lactate-like variables were detected in the available notebook objects.",
      .data$included_in_primary_ps ~ "Removed from the no-lactate test-ordering propensity model.",
      .data$included_in_mi_model ~ "Retained in imputation or completed data, but not used in the no-lactate propensity model.",
      TRUE ~ "Present in source data or metadata but not used by the primary propensity model."
    )
  )

write_csv_safely(
  lactate_variable_inventory,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "lactate_variable_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Lactate Variable Inventory",
    "",
    paste0("- Lactate-like variables detected: ", paste(lactate_variable_inventory$variable, collapse = ", ")),
    paste0("- Primary PS variables removed: ", paste(lactate_variable_inventory$variable[lactate_variable_inventory$included_in_primary_ps], collapse = ", ")),
    "",
    ticket3_note,
    "",
    markdown_table(lactate_variable_inventory |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "lactate_variable_inventory.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

ticket3_lactate_ps_vars <- intersect(lactate_variable_inventory$variable[lactate_variable_inventory$included_in_primary_ps], covars_ps)
no_lactate_covars_ps <- setdiff(covars_ps, ticket3_lactate_ps_vars)
if (!length(no_lactate_covars_ps)) {
  stop("No covariates remain after removing lactate variables from the propensity model.")
}

ticket3_fit_weight_one <- function(d_imp, modality, imp_index, covars) {
  treat_var <- if (identical(modality, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
  d_ps <- d_imp[, c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars), drop = FALSE]
  d_ps <- normalize_types(d_ps, levels_ref)
  d_ps <- droplevels_all(d_ps)
  assert_no_na_covars(d_ps, covars, context = paste0("No-lactate ", modality, " MI PS"))
  ps_fit <- fit_mi_ps_glm(
    d_ps,
    treat_var,
    covars,
    k = MI_PS_SPLINE_K,
    maxit = MI_GLM_MAXIT,
    context = make_context(
      stage = "sensitivity",
      component = "no_lactate_mi_ps_glm",
      analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate",
      model_type = "ps",
      group = modality,
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  if (!is.null(ps_fit$error)) {
    stop("No-lactate PS model failed (", modality, ", imp ", imp_index, "): ", ps_fit$error)
  }
  ipow <- compute_ipow_weights(
    ps_fit,
    treat = to01(d_ps[[treat_var]]),
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    stabilize = TRUE
  )
  assert_finite_weights(ipow$weights[d_ps[[treat_var]] == 1], paste0("no_lactate_w_", tolower(modality)))
  ps_fit_summary <- list(
    method = ps_fit$method,
    converged = ps_fit$converged,
    n = ps_fit$n,
    p = ps_fit$p,
    formula = ps_fit$formula
  )
  rm(ps_fit, d_ps)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
  list(ps_fit = ps_fit_summary, ipow = ipow, treat_var = treat_var)
}

ticket3_weight_diag <- function(fit_obj, modality, imp_index, d_imp) {
  treat <- to01(d_imp[[fit_obj$treat_var]]) == 1L
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fit_obj$ipow$weights))
  ps <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fit_obj$ipow$ps))
  w_t <- w[treat & is.finite(w)]
  ps_t <- ps[treat & is.finite(ps)]
  tibble::tibble(
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    modality = modality,
    covariate_n = length(no_lactate_covars_ps),
    lactate_removed_n = length(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars),
    model_method = fit_obj$ps_fit$method,
    converged = isTRUE(fit_obj$ps_fit$converged),
    n = fit_obj$ps_fit$n,
    p = fit_obj$ps_fit$p,
    ps_min = if (length(ps_t)) min(ps_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    ps_p01 = if (length(ps_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(ps_t, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    ps_p99 = if (length(ps_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(ps_t, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    ps_max = if (length(ps_t)) max(ps_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    weight_min = if (length(w_t)) min(w_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    weight_p99 = if (length(w_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(w_t, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    weight_max = if (length(w_t)) max(w_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    effective_sample_size = sensitivity_weighted_ess(w_t),
    ps_floor = fit_obj$ipow$ps_floor,
    weight_cap = fit_obj$ipow$cap,
    trunc_rate = mean(fit_obj$ipow$truncated[treat], na.rm = TRUE),
    formula = fit_obj$ps_fit$formula,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
}

ticket3_weighted_rate_one <- function(d_imp, weights, modality, outcome_var, imp_index) {
  treat_var <- if (identical(modality, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
  y <- to01(d_imp[[outcome_var]])
  tested <- to01(d_imp[[treat_var]]) == 1L
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(weights))
  ok <- tested & !is.na(y) & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  outcome_label <- CO2_RATE_OUTCOME_LABELS[[outcome_var]]
  if (is.null(outcome_label) || is.na(outcome_label)) outcome_label <- outcome_var
  tibble::tibble(
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    outcome = outcome_var,
    outcome_label = outcome_label,
    modality = modality,
    unweighted_n = sum(ok, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_events = sum(y[ok] == 1L, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_rate_pct = if (any(ok)) 100 * mean(y[ok] == 1L, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    weighted_n = sum(w[ok], na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_events = sum(w[ok] * y[ok], na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_pct = 100 * sensitivity_weighted_mean_safe(y[ok], w[ok]),
    effective_sample_size = sensitivity_weighted_ess(w[ok])
  )
}

ticket3_pool_scalar <- function(est, var) {
  ok <- is.finite(est) & is.finite(var) & var >= 0
  est <- est[ok]
  var <- var[ok]
  if (!length(est)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(estimate = NA_real_, SE = NA_real_, lcl = NA_real_, ucl = NA_real_, m_used = 0L))
  }
  m <- length(est)
  qbar <- mean(est)
  ubar <- mean(var)
  bvar <- if (m > 1L) stats::var(est) else 0
  total_var <- ubar + (1 + 1 / m) * bvar
  se <- sqrt(max(total_var, 0))
  tibble::tibble(
    estimate = qbar,
    SE = se,
    lcl = qbar - 1.96 * se,
    ucl = qbar + 1.96 * se,
    m_used = m
  )
}

ticket3_init_fit_bank <- function() {
  setNames(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(x) vector("list", imp_n)), cat3_outcomes)
}
ticket3_slim_fit_for_pooling <- function(fit) {
  if (inherits(fit, "svyglm")) {
    return(list(coef = stats::coef(fit), vcov = stats::vcov(fit)))
  }
  if (is.list(fit) && !is.null(fit$coef) && !is.null(fit$vcov)) {
    return(list(coef = fit$coef, vcov = fit$vcov))
  }
  NULL
}
ticket3_component_dir <- sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "components")
```
