```{r sensitivity-ticket-3-no-lactate-propensity}
fs::dir_create(ticket3_component_dir)
ticket3_existing_components <- fs::dir_ls(
  ticket3_component_dir,
  type = "file",
  fail = FALSE
)
ticket3_existing_components <- ticket3_existing_components[
  grepl("^no_lactate_.*\\.csv$", fs::path_file(ticket3_existing_components))
]
if (length(ticket3_existing_components)) {
  fs::file_delete(ticket3_existing_components)
}
ticket3_write_component <- function(x, component_name, imp_index) {
  component_path <- fs::path(
    ticket3_component_dir,
    sprintf("no_lactate_%s_imp_%03d.csv", component_name, as.integer(imp_index))
  )
  write_csv_safely(dplyr::bind_rows(x), component_path, row_names = FALSE)
  component_path
}
ticket3_read_components <- function(component_paths, component_name) {
  component_paths <- component_paths[file.exists(component_paths)]
  if (!length(component_paths)) {
    stop("No no-lactate component files found for ", component_name, ".", call. = FALSE)
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(component_paths, readr::read_csv, show_col_types = FALSE))
}
no_lactate_cat3_fits_abg <- ticket3_init_fit_bank()
no_lactate_cat3_fits_vbg <- ticket3_init_fit_bank()
no_lactate_component_files <- list(
  weight_diagnostics = character(),
  balance_long = character(),
  rates_by_imp = character(),
  ref_by_imp = character(),
  fit_diag = character()
)

for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  std_source_df <- build_common_std_source_df(d_imp, imp_index)
  abg_weight_fit <- ticket3_fit_weight_one(d_imp, "ABG", imp_index, no_lactate_covars_ps)
  vbg_weight_fit <- ticket3_fit_weight_one(d_imp, "VBG", imp_index, no_lactate_covars_ps)
  w_abg_no_lac <- abg_weight_fit$ipow$weights
  w_vbg_no_lac <- vbg_weight_fit$ipow$weights
  no_lactate_weight_diag_rows <- list()
  no_lactate_balance_rows <- list()
  no_lactate_rate_rows <- list()
  no_lactate_ref_pred_rows <- list()
  no_lactate_cat_diag_rows <- list()
  no_lactate_spline_diag_rows <- list()

  no_lactate_weight_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_weight_diag_rows) + 1L]] <-
    ticket3_weight_diag(abg_weight_fit, "ABG", imp_index, d_imp)
  no_lactate_weight_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_weight_diag_rows) + 1L]] <-
    ticket3_weight_diag(vbg_weight_fit, "VBG", imp_index, d_imp)
  rm(abg_weight_fit, vbg_weight_fit)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))

  no_lactate_balance_rows[[length(no_lactate_balance_rows) + 1L]] <-
    target_balance_table(d_imp, "has_abg", w_abg_no_lac, covars_ps, levels_ref) |>
      dplyr::mutate(modality = "ABG", imp = imp_index)
  no_lactate_balance_rows[[length(no_lactate_balance_rows) + 1L]] <-
    target_balance_table(d_imp, "has_vbg", w_vbg_no_lac, covars_ps, levels_ref) |>
      dplyr::mutate(modality = "VBG", imp = imp_index)

  for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
    no_lactate_rate_rows[[length(no_lactate_rate_rows) + 1L]] <-
      ticket3_weighted_rate_one(d_imp, w_abg_no_lac, "ABG", outcome_var, imp_index)
    no_lactate_rate_rows[[length(no_lactate_rate_rows) + 1L]] <-
      ticket3_weighted_rate_one(d_imp, w_vbg_no_lac, "VBG", outcome_var, imp_index)

    fit_abg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d_imp, w_abg_no_lac, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH, "ABG", imp_index,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate"
    )
    no_lactate_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- ticket3_slim_fit_for_pooling(fit_abg_cat$fit)
    if (!is.null(fit_abg_cat$diag)) no_lactate_cat_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_cat_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_cat$diag

    fit_vbg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
      d_imp, w_vbg_no_lac, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH, "VBG", imp_index,
      adj_vars = adj_core,
      analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate"
    )
    no_lactate_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- ticket3_slim_fit_for_pooling(fit_vbg_cat$fit)
    if (!is.null(fit_vbg_cat$diag)) no_lactate_cat_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_cat_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_cat$diag

    fit_abg_spline <- fit_spline_imp(
      d_imp, w_abg_no_lac, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      imp_index = imp_index,
      analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate"
    )
    if (!is.null(fit_abg_spline$diag)) no_lactate_spline_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_spline_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_spline$diag
    if (is.list(fit_abg_spline$fit)) {
      no_lactate_ref_pred_rows[[length(no_lactate_ref_pred_rows) + 1L]] <-
        predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
          fit_abg_spline$fit,
          std_source_df,
          co2_var = "paco2",
          co2_values = ABG_CO2_REF,
          outcome_var = outcome_var
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          imp = imp_index,
          outcome = outcome_var,
          outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]]), outcome_var),
          modality = "ABG",
          ref_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF
        )
    }

    fit_vbg_spline <- fit_spline_imp(
      d_imp, w_vbg_no_lac, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
      adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
      imp_index = imp_index,
      analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate"
    )
    if (!is.null(fit_vbg_spline$diag)) no_lactate_spline_diag_rows[[length(no_lactate_spline_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_spline$diag
    if (is.list(fit_vbg_spline$fit)) {
      no_lactate_ref_pred_rows[[length(no_lactate_ref_pred_rows) + 1L]] <-
        predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
          fit_vbg_spline$fit,
          std_source_df,
          co2_var = "vbg_co2",
          co2_values = VBG_CO2_REF,
          outcome_var = outcome_var
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          imp = imp_index,
          outcome = outcome_var,
          outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]]), outcome_var),
          modality = "VBG",
          ref_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF
        )
    }
    rm(fit_abg_cat, fit_vbg_cat, fit_abg_spline, fit_vbg_spline)
  }

  no_lactate_component_files$weight_diagnostics <- c(
    no_lactate_component_files$weight_diagnostics,
    ticket3_write_component(no_lactate_weight_diag_rows, "weight_diagnostics", imp_index)
  )
  no_lactate_component_files$balance_long <- c(
    no_lactate_component_files$balance_long,
    ticket3_write_component(no_lactate_balance_rows, "balance_long", imp_index)
  )
  no_lactate_component_files$rates_by_imp <- c(
    no_lactate_component_files$rates_by_imp,
    ticket3_write_component(no_lactate_rate_rows, "rates_by_imp", imp_index)
  )
  no_lactate_component_files$ref_by_imp <- c(
    no_lactate_component_files$ref_by_imp,
    ticket3_write_component(no_lactate_ref_pred_rows, "ref_by_imp", imp_index)
  )
  no_lactate_component_files$fit_diag <- c(
    no_lactate_component_files$fit_diag,
    ticket3_write_component(
      dplyr::bind_rows(no_lactate_cat_diag_rows, no_lactate_spline_diag_rows),
      "fit_diag",
      imp_index
    )
  )

  rm(
    d_imp, std_source_df, w_abg_no_lac, w_vbg_no_lac,
    no_lactate_weight_diag_rows, no_lactate_balance_rows, no_lactate_rate_rows,
    no_lactate_ref_pred_rows, no_lactate_cat_diag_rows, no_lactate_spline_diag_rows
  )
  invisible(gc(full = TRUE))
}

no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics <- ticket3_read_components(
  no_lactate_component_files$weight_diagnostics,
  "weight_diagnostics"
) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

no_lactate_balance_long <- ticket3_read_components(
  no_lactate_component_files$balance_long,
  "balance_long"
)
no_lactate_balance_imp_summary <- no_lactate_balance_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$modality, .data$imp) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_post = max(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_post = mean(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    variable_level_n = dplyr::n(),
    variables_gt_0_10 = sum(abs(.data$smd_post) > 0.10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
primary_balance_imp_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  bal_imp_abg$bal_imp_summary,
  bal_imp_vbg$bal_imp_summary
) |>
  dplyr::rename(modality = group) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$modality, .data$imp, primary_max_abs_post = .data$max_abs_post,
                primary_mean_abs_post = .data$mean_abs_post)
no_lactate_balance_summary <- no_lactate_balance_imp_summary |>
  dplyr::left_join(primary_balance_imp_summary, by = c("modality", "imp")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    no_lactate_median_max_abs_post = stats::median(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    no_lactate_max_abs_post = max(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    no_lactate_median_mean_abs_post = stats::median(.data$mean_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    no_lactate_median_variables_gt_0_10 = stats::median(.data$variables_gt_0_10, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_median_max_abs_post = stats::median(.data$primary_max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_max_abs_post = max(.data$primary_max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_median_max_abs_post = .data$no_lactate_median_max_abs_post - .data$primary_median_max_abs_post,
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$no_lactate_max_abs_post > 0.20 ~ "WARN",
      .data$no_lactate_max_abs_post > 0.10 ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    diagnostic_note = ticket3_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_balance_summary,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_balance_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

no_lactate_rates_by_imp <- ticket3_read_components(
  no_lactate_component_files$rates_by_imp,
  "rates_by_imp"
)
no_lactate_rate_base <- no_lactate_rates_by_imp |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_events = stats::median(.data$unweighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$unweighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_events = mean(.data$weighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_n = stats::median(.data$weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_se_pct = stats::sd(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    effective_sample_size = stats::median(.data$effective_sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
no_lactate_rate_comparison <- no_lactate_rate_base |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome, .data$modality, .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$VBG - .data$ABG,
    weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$ABG > 1e-6, .data$VBG / .data$ABG, NA_real_),
    absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct = abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct),
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(.data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome, .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
                .data$weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg, .data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct,
                .data$diagnostic_status)
no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates <- no_lactate_rate_base |>
  dplyr::left_join(no_lactate_rate_comparison, by = "outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = ticket3_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = cat3_outcomes), factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

no_lactate_abg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(no_lactate_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]], group = "ABG")
}))
no_lactate_vbg_cat_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
  pool_terms(no_lactate_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]], group = "VBG")
}))
no_lactate_primary_categorical_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  no_lactate_abg_cat_results,
  no_lactate_vbg_cat_results
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    contrast = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$term == "co2_catLow" ~ "Low vs normal",
      .data$term == "co2_catHigh" ~ "High vs normal",
      TRUE ~ .data$term
    ),
    outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome),
    OR = .data$estimate,
    analysis_variant = "sensitivity_no_lactate",
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    .data$analysis_variant, .data$group, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label,
    .data$contrast, .data$term, .data$logOR, .data$SE, .data$OR,
    .data$LCL, .data$UCL, .data$run_id, .data$run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), factor(.data$group, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS), .data$contrast)
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_primary_categorical_results,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_primary_categorical_results.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

no_lactate_reference_predictions_by_imp <- ticket3_read_components(
  no_lactate_component_files$ref_by_imp,
  "ref_by_imp"
) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$imp, factor(.data$outcome, levels = cat3_outcomes), factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_reference_risk_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
no_lactate_reference_prob_pooled <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  no_lactate_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  group_vars = c("outcome", "outcome_label", "modality", "ref_pco2"),
  context = "no-lactate reference-risk marginal probabilities"
)
no_lactate_reference_risk_diff <- no_lactate_reference_predictions_by_imp |>
  dplyr::select(.data$imp, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_difference = .data$p_imp_VBG - .data$p_imp_ABG,
    var_risk_difference = .data$var_p_imp_VBG + .data$var_p_imp_ABG
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ ticket3_pool_scalar(.x$risk_difference, .x$var_risk_difference)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
no_lactate_reference_wide <- no_lactate_reference_prob_pooled |>
  dplyr::select(.data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL))
no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic <- no_lactate_reference_wide |>
  dplyr::left_join(no_lactate_reference_risk_diff, by = c("outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    outcome = .data$outcome,
    outcome_label = .data$outcome_label,
    abg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_ABG,
    vbg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_VBG,
    abg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_ABG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_VBG,
    risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = 100 * .data$estimate,
    risk_difference_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$lcl,
    risk_difference_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$ucl,
    risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_ABG > 1e-8, .data$p_VBG / .data$p_ABG, NA_real_),
    prediction_method = "no-lactate MI-logistic IPSW spline",
    standardization_target = "common eligible source-population covariate distribution",
    uncertainty_method = "within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG); pooled on the risk-difference scale",
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)),
    diagnostic_note = ticket3_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket3_primary_rates <- weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)
  ) |>
  dplyr::distinct(
    outcome = .data$outcome_var,
    primary_weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  )
ticket3_no_lac_rates <- no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates |>
  dplyr::distinct(
    outcome,
    no_lactate_weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  )
ticket3_rate_comparison <- ticket3_no_lac_rates |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket3_primary_rates, by = "outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric_type = "weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    no_lactate_value = .data$no_lactate_weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
    primary_value = .data$primary_weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
    delta = .data$no_lactate_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$metric_type, .data$comparison_key, .data$no_lactate_value, .data$primary_value, .data$delta, .data$diagnostic_status)

ticket3_primary_ref <- model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)
  ) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    outcome = .data$outcome_var,
    primary_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  )
ticket3_ref_comparison <- no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    metric_type = "reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    no_lactate_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket3_primary_ref, by = c("comparison_key" = "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$no_lactate_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  )

ticket3_primary_cat <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    primary_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$comparison_key, .data$primary_value)
ticket3_cat_comparison <- no_lactate_primary_categorical_results |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric_type = "categorical_log_or",
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    no_lactate_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket3_primary_cat, by = "comparison_key") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$no_lactate_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.50) ~ "WARN",
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.20) ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$metric_type, .data$comparison_key, .data$no_lactate_value, .data$primary_value, .data$delta, .data$diagnostic_status)

no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  ticket3_rate_comparison,
  ticket3_ref_comparison,
  ticket3_cat_comparison
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = "Change thresholds are review prompts, not inferential cutoffs.",
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

no_lactate_balance_plot_df <- no_lactate_balance_summary |>
  dplyr::select(.data$modality, .data$primary_median_max_abs_post, .data$no_lactate_median_max_abs_post) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = dplyr::all_of(c("primary_median_max_abs_post", "no_lactate_median_max_abs_post")),
    names_to = "weighting_model",
    values_to = "median_max_abs_smd"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighting_model = dplyr::recode(
      .data$weighting_model,
      primary_median_max_abs_post = "Primary",
      no_lactate_median_max_abs_post = "No lactate"
    )
  )
no_lactate_balance_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  no_lactate_balance_plot_df,
  ggplot2::aes(x = weighting_model, y = median_max_abs_smd, color = modality, group = modality)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0.10, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_BALANCE_SEGMENT_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2.6) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "No-lactate balance sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Median max absolute SMD across imputations",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(no_lactate_balance_plot, "no_lactate_balance_plot", width = 6.5, height = 4.5)

no_lactate_rate_plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome_label, modality, weighting_model = "Primary", weighted_rate_pct),
  no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome_label, modality, weighting_model = "No lactate", weighted_rate_pct)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = KEY_RESULTS_OUTCOME_LEVELS),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS)
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_label, y = weighted_rate_pct, color = modality, shape = weighting_model)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    size = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_POINT_SIZE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "No-lactate weighted outcome-rate sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Weighted outcome rate (%)",
    color = NULL,
    shape = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(no_lactate_rate_plot, "no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison", width = 7.5, height = 4.8)

no_lactate_fit_diag <- ticket3_read_components(
  no_lactate_component_files$fit_diag,
  "fit_diag"
)
write_csv_safely(
  no_lactate_fit_diag,
  sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_fit_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket3_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "ticket_references",
    "lactate_inventory",
    "lactate_removed_from_ps",
    "ps_models_fit",
    "weights_valid",
    "balance_summary",
    "weighted_rates",
    "categorical_results",
    "reference_risks",
    "figures"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(c("overall", "ticket_3_no_lactate")),
    if (nrow(lactate_variable_inventory) > 0L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (length(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars) > 0L && !any(no_lactate_covars_ps %in% ticket3_lactate_ps_vars)) "PASS" else "REVIEW",
    if (all(no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics$converged %in% TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(is.finite(no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min)) &&
        all(is.finite(no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics$weight_max)) &&
        all(no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    sensitivity_max_status(no_lactate_balance_summary$diagnostic_status),
    if (nrow(no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates) == length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L &&
        all(dplyr::between(no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(no_lactate_primary_categorical_results) == length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L * 2L &&
        all(is.finite(no_lactate_primary_categorical_results$OR))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic) == length(cat3_outcomes) &&
        all(dplyr::between(no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic$abg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE) &&
        all(dplyr::between(no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic$vbg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "no_lactate_balance_plot.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "no_lactate_balance_plot.pdf")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison.pdf"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(c("overall", "ticket_3_no_lactate")),
    "Lactate-like variables were inventoried across source, completed, propensity, and MI objects.",
    paste0("Removed from PS: ", if (length(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars)) paste(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars, collapse = ", ") else "none detected in primary PS"),
    "No-lactate ABG/VBG propensity models converged in all imputations.",
    "No-lactate weights are finite and positive among tested rows.",
    "No-lactate target-balance summaries were generated and compared with primary balance.",
    "No-lactate weighted outcome rates were generated for all four outcomes and both modalities.",
    "No-lactate categorical outcome associations were generated for all four outcomes, both modalities, and Low/High contrasts.",
    "No-lactate ABG 40/VBG 45 model-implied reference risks were generated using common-source marginal standardization.",
    "Compact no-lactate balance and weighted-rate QA figures were generated."
  )
)
ticket3_status <- sensitivity_write_status(ticket3_status, "no_lactate")

writeLines(
  c(
    "# No-Lactate Propensity Sensitivity Summary",
    "",
    paste0("- Overall status: ", sensitivity_max_status(ticket3_status$status)),
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Propensity covariates removed: ", if (length(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars)) paste(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars, collapse = ", ") else "none"),
    "",
    ticket3_note,
    "",
    "## Weighted Outcome-Rate Differences",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label, modality, weighted_rate_pct,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Reference Risks at ABG 40 / VBG 45",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
        dplyr::select(
          outcome_label, abg_predicted_risk_pct, vbg_predicted_risk_pct,
          risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct, risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Largest Changes Versus Primary",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison |>
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(.data$delta))) |>
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 12L) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("no_lactate", "no_lactate_interpretation_summary.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

rm(list = intersect(
  c(
    "no_lactate_cat3_fits_abg",
    "no_lactate_cat3_fits_vbg",
    "no_lactate_component_files",
    "ticket3_component_dir",
    "ticket3_existing_components"
  ),
  ls(envir = .GlobalEnv)
), envir = .GlobalEnv)
rm(list = intersect(
  c(
    "no_lactate_weighting_diagnostics",
    "no_lactate_balance_long",
    "no_lactate_balance_imp_summary",
    "no_lactate_balance_summary",
    "no_lactate_rates_by_imp",
    "no_lactate_rate_base",
    "no_lactate_rate_comparison",
    "no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates",
    "no_lactate_abg_cat_results",
    "no_lactate_vbg_cat_results",
    "no_lactate_primary_categorical_results",
    "no_lactate_reference_predictions_by_imp",
    "no_lactate_reference_prob_pooled",
    "no_lactate_reference_risk_diff",
    "no_lactate_reference_wide",
    "no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic",
    "ticket3_primary_rates",
    "ticket3_no_lac_rates",
    "ticket3_rate_comparison",
    "ticket3_primary_ref",
    "ticket3_ref_comparison",
    "ticket3_primary_cat",
    "ticket3_cat_comparison",
    "no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison",
    "no_lactate_balance_plot",
    "no_lactate_rate_plot",
    "no_lactate_fit_diag"
  ),
  ls(envir = .GlobalEnv)
), envir = .GlobalEnv)
invisible(gc(full = TRUE))
```

```{r sensitivity-ticket-4-pregas-covariates}
#| code-block-title: "Ticket 4 pre-gas covariate propensity sensitivity"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: fit temporally conservative ABG/VBG test-ordering propensity models and compare absolute-risk diagnostics.

ticket4_note <- paste(
  "Pre-gas covariate propensity models are diagnostic sensitivities.",
  "They restrict the test-ordering model to baseline demographics/comorbidities, with a second model adding plausible initial vitals when available.",
  "They do not replace the primary weighting model and should not be interpreted substantively from the 1% pilot."
)

ticket4_core_candidates <- c(
  "age_at_encounter", "sex", "race_ethnicity", "location", "encounter_type",
  "curr_bmi", "working_bmi", "bmi",
  "copd", "asthma", "osa", "chf", "acute_nmd", "phtn", "ckd", "dm",
  "ohs_code", "sleep_hypovent_dx", "other_sleep_hypovent_dx"
)
ticket4_vital_candidates <- c(
  "temp_new", "sbp", "dbp", "hr", "rr", "resp_rate", "respiratory_rate", "spo2"
)
pregas_core_covars <- intersect(ticket4_core_candidates, covars_ps)
pregas_vital_covars <- intersect(ticket4_vital_candidates, covars_ps)
pregas_core_plus_vitals_covars <- unique(c(pregas_core_covars, pregas_vital_covars))
if (!length(pregas_core_covars)) {
  stop("Ticket 4 pre-gas core covariate set is empty.")
}

ticket4_covariate_timing_inventory <- tibble::tibble(variable = covars_ps) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    primary_ps_included = TRUE,
    timing_evidence = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$variable %in% pregas_core_covars ~ "Baseline demographic, encounter descriptor, BMI, or comorbidity field.",
      .data$variable %in% pregas_vital_covars ~ "Vital sign field; exact pre-gas timestamp is not verified in this notebook.",
      grepl(ticket3_lactate_pattern, .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Lactate field; excluded because it may encode test pathway or co-measured severity.",
      grepl("^serum_|^sodium$|^wbc$|^plt$", .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Same-encounter laboratory field without verified pre-gas timing.",
      grepl("paco2|vbg|abg|co2|ph|hco3|o2", .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Gas-derived or gas-adjacent field.",
      TRUE ~ "Timing not established for conservative pre-gas propensity model."
    ),
    pregas_core = .data$variable %in% pregas_core_covars,
    pregas_plus_vitals = .data$variable %in% pregas_core_plus_vitals_covars,
    excluded_reason = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$pregas_core ~ "",
      .data$variable %in% pregas_vital_covars ~ "Excluded from core model; included only in plus-vitals sensitivity.",
      grepl(ticket3_lactate_pattern, .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Lactate excluded from temporally conservative PS model.",
      grepl("^serum_|^sodium$|^wbc$|^plt$", .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Same-encounter lab excluded because pre-gas timing is unverified.",
      TRUE ~ "Excluded from conservative pre-gas propensity set."
    ),
    notes = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$pregas_core ~ "Included in demographics/comorbidities core model.",
      .data$pregas_plus_vitals ~ "Included only in core plus plausible initial vitals model.",
      TRUE ~ "Excluded from Ticket 4 conservative propensity models."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  ticket4_covariate_timing_inventory,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "covariate_timing_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Pre-Gas Covariate Timing Inventory",
    "",
    ticket4_note,
    "",
    markdown_table(ticket4_covariate_timing_inventory |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "covariate_timing_inventory.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

pregas_model_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  variant = c("pregas_core", "pregas_core_plus_vitals"),
  variant_label = c("Pre-gas core", "Pre-gas core + vitals"),
  covariates = list(pregas_core_covars, pregas_core_plus_vitals_covars),
  covariate_n = c(length(pregas_core_covars), length(pregas_core_plus_vitals_covars)),
  added_vitals = c("", paste(pregas_vital_covars, collapse = "; ")),
  status = c(
    if (length(pregas_core_covars)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (length(pregas_vital_covars)) "PASS" else "SKIPPED"
  ),
  notes = c(
    "Demographics, encounter descriptors, BMI, and comorbidities.",
    if (length(pregas_vital_covars)) {
      "Core model plus plausible initial vital signs; exact pre-gas timestamps are unavailable."
    } else {
      "No primary-PS vital sign variables were available."
    }
  )
) |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$status != "SKIPPED")

pregas_covariate_sets <- pregas_model_specs |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant,
    variant_label,
    covariate_n,
    covariates = vapply(.data$covariates, paste, character(1L), collapse = "; "),
    added_vitals,
    status,
    notes,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_covariate_sets,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_covariate_sets.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket4_fit_weight_one <- function(d_imp, modality, imp_index, covars, variant) {
  treat_var <- if (identical(modality, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
  d_ps <- d_imp[, c("has_abg", "has_vbg", covars), drop = FALSE]
  d_ps <- normalize_types(d_ps, levels_ref)
  d_ps <- droplevels_all(d_ps)
  assert_no_na_covars(d_ps, covars, context = paste0(variant, " ", modality, " MI PS"))
  ps_fit <- fit_mi_ps_glm(
    d_ps,
    treat_var,
    covars,
    k = MI_PS_SPLINE_K,
    maxit = MI_GLM_MAXIT,
    context = make_context(
      stage = "sensitivity",
      component = paste0(variant, "_mi_ps_glm"),
      analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant),
      model_type = "ps",
      group = modality,
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = imp_index,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  if (!is.null(ps_fit$error)) {
    stop(variant, " PS model failed (", modality, ", imp ", imp_index, "): ", ps_fit$error)
  }
  ipow <- compute_ipow_weights(
    ps_fit,
    treat = to01(d_ps[[treat_var]]),
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    stabilize = TRUE
  )
  assert_finite_weights(ipow$weights[d_ps[[treat_var]] == 1], paste0(variant, "_w_", tolower(modality)))
  list(ps_fit = ps_fit, ipow = ipow, treat_var = treat_var)
}

ticket4_weight_diag <- function(fit_obj, modality, imp_index, d_imp, covars, variant, variant_label) {
  treat <- to01(d_imp[[fit_obj$treat_var]]) == 1L
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fit_obj$ipow$weights))
  ps <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fit_obj$ipow$ps))
  w_t <- w[treat & is.finite(w)]
  ps_t <- ps[treat & is.finite(ps)]
  tibble::tibble(
    variant = variant,
    variant_label = variant_label,
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    modality = modality,
    covariate_n = length(covars),
    model_method = fit_obj$ps_fit$method,
    converged = isTRUE(fit_obj$ps_fit$converged),
    n = fit_obj$ps_fit$n,
    p = fit_obj$ps_fit$p,
    ps_min = if (length(ps_t)) min(ps_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    ps_p01 = if (length(ps_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(ps_t, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    ps_p99 = if (length(ps_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(ps_t, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    ps_max = if (length(ps_t)) max(ps_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    weight_min = if (length(w_t)) min(w_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    weight_p99 = if (length(w_t)) as.numeric(stats::quantile(w_t, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_,
    weight_max = if (length(w_t)) max(w_t, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    effective_sample_size = sensitivity_weighted_ess(w_t),
    ps_floor = fit_obj$ipow$ps_floor,
    weight_cap = fit_obj$ipow$cap,
    trunc_rate = mean(fit_obj$ipow$truncated[treat], na.rm = TRUE),
    formula = fit_obj$ps_fit$formula,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
}

ticket4_slim_fit_for_pooling <- function(fit) {
  if (inherits(fit, "svyglm")) {
    return(list(coef = stats::coef(fit), vcov = stats::vcov(fit)))
  }
  if (is.list(fit) && !is.null(fit$coef) && !is.null(fit$vcov)) {
    return(list(coef = fit$coef, vcov = fit$vcov))
  }
  NULL
}

ticket4_run_variant <- function(variant, variant_label, covars, imp_getter = get_imp, balance_covars = covars_ps) {
  pregas_cat3_fits_abg <- ticket3_init_fit_bank()
  pregas_cat3_fits_vbg <- ticket3_init_fit_bank()
  weight_rows <- list()
  balance_rows <- list()
  rate_rows <- list()
  ref_pred_rows <- list()
  cat_diag_rows <- list()
  spline_diag_rows <- list()

  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    d_imp <- imp_getter(imp_index)
    std_source_df <- build_common_std_source_df(d_imp, imp_index)
    abg_fit <- ticket4_fit_weight_one(d_imp, "ABG", imp_index, covars, variant)
    vbg_fit <- ticket4_fit_weight_one(d_imp, "VBG", imp_index, covars, variant)
    w_abg <- abg_fit$ipow$weights
    w_vbg <- vbg_fit$ipow$weights

    weight_rows[[length(weight_rows) + 1L]] <- ticket4_weight_diag(abg_fit, "ABG", imp_index, d_imp, covars, variant, variant_label)
    weight_rows[[length(weight_rows) + 1L]] <- ticket4_weight_diag(vbg_fit, "VBG", imp_index, d_imp, covars, variant, variant_label)
    balance_rows[[length(balance_rows) + 1L]] <-
      target_balance_table(d_imp, "has_abg", w_abg, intersect(balance_covars, names(d_imp)), levels_ref) |>
        dplyr::mutate(variant = variant, variant_label = variant_label, modality = "ABG", imp = imp_index)
    balance_rows[[length(balance_rows) + 1L]] <-
      target_balance_table(d_imp, "has_vbg", w_vbg, intersect(balance_covars, names(d_imp)), levels_ref) |>
        dplyr::mutate(variant = variant, variant_label = variant_label, modality = "VBG", imp = imp_index)

    for (outcome_var in cat3_outcomes) {
      rate_rows[[length(rate_rows) + 1L]] <- ticket3_weighted_rate_one(d_imp, w_abg, "ABG", outcome_var, imp_index) |>
        dplyr::mutate(variant = variant, variant_label = variant_label)
      rate_rows[[length(rate_rows) + 1L]] <- ticket3_weighted_rate_one(d_imp, w_vbg, "VBG", outcome_var, imp_index) |>
        dplyr::mutate(variant = variant, variant_label = variant_label)

      fit_abg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
        d_imp, w_abg, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
        ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH, "ABG", imp_index,
        adj_vars = adj_core,
        analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant)
      )
      pregas_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- ticket4_slim_fit_for_pooling(fit_abg_cat$fit)
      if (!is.null(fit_abg_cat$diag)) cat_diag_rows[[length(cat_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_cat$diag

      fit_vbg_cat <- fit_cat3_imp(
        d_imp, w_vbg, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
        VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH, "VBG", imp_index,
        adj_vars = adj_core,
        analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant)
      )
      pregas_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]] <- ticket4_slim_fit_for_pooling(fit_vbg_cat$fit)
      if (!is.null(fit_vbg_cat$diag)) cat_diag_rows[[length(cat_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_cat$diag

      fit_abg_spline <- fit_spline_imp(
        d_imp, w_abg, outcome_var, "paco2", "has_abg",
        adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
        imp_index = imp_index,
        analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant)
      )
      if (!is.null(fit_abg_spline$diag)) spline_diag_rows[[length(spline_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_abg_spline$diag
      if (is.list(fit_abg_spline$fit)) {
        ref_pred_rows[[length(ref_pred_rows) + 1L]] <-
          predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
            fit_abg_spline$fit,
            std_source_df,
            co2_var = "paco2",
            co2_values = ABG_CO2_REF,
            outcome_var = outcome_var
          ) |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            variant = variant,
            variant_label = variant_label,
            imp = imp_index,
            outcome = outcome_var,
            outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]]), outcome_var),
            modality = "ABG",
            ref_pco2 = ABG_CO2_REF
          )
      }

      fit_vbg_spline <- fit_spline_imp(
        d_imp, w_vbg, outcome_var, "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
        adj_vars = adj_core, spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS,
        imp_index = imp_index,
        analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant)
      )
      if (!is.null(fit_vbg_spline$diag)) spline_diag_rows[[length(spline_diag_rows) + 1L]] <- fit_vbg_spline$diag
      if (is.list(fit_vbg_spline$fit)) {
        ref_pred_rows[[length(ref_pred_rows) + 1L]] <-
          predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
            fit_vbg_spline$fit,
            std_source_df,
            co2_var = "vbg_co2",
            co2_values = VBG_CO2_REF,
            outcome_var = outcome_var
          ) |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            variant = variant,
            variant_label = variant_label,
            imp = imp_index,
            outcome = outcome_var,
            outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]]]), outcome_var),
            modality = "VBG",
            ref_pco2 = VBG_CO2_REF
          )
      }
      rm(fit_abg_cat, fit_vbg_cat, fit_abg_spline, fit_vbg_spline)
    }

    rm(d_imp, std_source_df, abg_fit, vbg_fit, w_abg, w_vbg)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }

  cat_abg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_terms(pregas_cat3_fits_abg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]], group = "ABG")
  }))
  cat_vbg <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(cat3_outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    pool_terms(pregas_cat3_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]], term_prefix = "co2_cat") |>
      dplyr::mutate(outcome = stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[[outcome_var]], group = "VBG")
  }))

  list(
    weight_diagnostics = dplyr::bind_rows(weight_rows),
    balance_long = dplyr::bind_rows(balance_rows),
    rates_by_imp = dplyr::bind_rows(rate_rows),
    categorical = dplyr::bind_rows(cat_abg, cat_vbg) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        variant = variant,
        variant_label = variant_label,
        contrast = dplyr::case_when(
          .data$term == "co2_catLow" ~ "Low vs normal",
          .data$term == "co2_catHigh" ~ "High vs normal",
          TRUE ~ .data$term
        ),
        outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome),
        OR = .data$estimate,
        analysis_variant = paste0("sensitivity_", variant),
        run_id = diag_run_id,
        run_ts = diag_run_ts
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(
        .data$analysis_variant, .data$variant, .data$variant_label,
        .data$group, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$contrast,
        .data$term, .data$logOR, .data$SE, .data$OR, .data$LCL, .data$UCL,
        .data$run_id, .data$run_ts
      ),
    ref_by_imp = dplyr::bind_rows(ref_pred_rows),
    fit_diag = dplyr::bind_rows(dplyr::bind_rows(cat_diag_rows), dplyr::bind_rows(spline_diag_rows))
  )
}

pregas_variant_component_files <- list(
  weight_diagnostics = character(),
  balance_long = character(),
  rates_by_imp = character(),
  categorical = character(),
  ref_by_imp = character(),
  fit_diag = character()
)
for (row_idx in seq_len(nrow(pregas_model_specs))) {
  spec <- pregas_model_specs[row_idx, ]
  variant <- spec$variant[[1L]]
  variant_result <- ticket4_run_variant(
    variant,
    spec$variant_label[[1L]],
    spec$covariates[[1L]]
  )
  for (component_name in names(pregas_variant_component_files)) {
    component_path <- sensitivity_path(
      "pregas_covariates",
      paste0("pregas_", component_name, "_", variant, ".csv")
    )
    write_csv_safely(variant_result[[component_name]], component_path, row_names = FALSE)
    pregas_variant_component_files[[component_name]] <- c(
      pregas_variant_component_files[[component_name]],
      component_path
    )
  }
  rm(variant_result)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

read_pregas_component <- function(component_name) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(
    pregas_variant_component_files[[component_name]],
    readr::read_csv,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  ))
}

pregas_weighting_diagnostics <- read_pregas_component("weight_diagnostics")
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_weighting_diagnostics,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_weighting_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

pregas_balance_long <- read_pregas_component("balance_long")
pregas_balance_imp_summary <- pregas_balance_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$modality, .data$imp) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_post = max(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_post = mean(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    variables_gt_0_10 = sum(abs(.data$smd_post) > 0.10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
pregas_balance_summary <- pregas_balance_imp_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    median_max_abs_post = stats::median(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_post = max(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_mean_abs_post = stats::median(.data$mean_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_variables_gt_0_10 = stats::median(.data$variables_gt_0_10, na.rm = TRUE),
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$max_abs_post > 0.20 ~ "WARN",
      .data$max_abs_post > 0.10 ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    diagnostic_note = ticket4_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_balance_summary,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_balance_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

pregas_rates_by_imp <- read_pregas_component("rates_by_imp")
pregas_rate_base <- pregas_rates_by_imp |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_events = stats::median(.data$unweighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$unweighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_events = mean(.data$weighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_n = stats::median(.data$weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_se_pct = stats::sd(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    effective_sample_size = stats::median(.data$effective_sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
pregas_rate_comparison <- pregas_rate_base |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$outcome, .data$modality, .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$VBG - .data$ABG,
    weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$ABG > 1e-6, .data$VBG / .data$ABG, NA_real_),
    absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct = abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct),
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(.data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$outcome, .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
                .data$weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg, .data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct,
                .data$diagnostic_status)
pregas_weighted_outcome_rates <- pregas_rate_base |>
  dplyr::left_join(pregas_rate_comparison, by = c("variant", "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = ticket4_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$variant, factor(.data$outcome, levels = cat3_outcomes), factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_weighted_outcome_rates,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_weighted_outcome_rates.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

pregas_primary_categorical_results <- read_pregas_component("categorical") |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$variant, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), factor(.data$group, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS), .data$contrast)
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_primary_categorical_results,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_primary_categorical_results.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

pregas_reference_predictions_by_imp <- read_pregas_component("ref_by_imp")
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_reference_risk_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
pregas_reference_prob_pooled <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  pregas_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  group_vars = c("variant", "variant_label", "outcome", "outcome_label", "modality", "ref_pco2"),
  context = "pre-gas reference-risk marginal probabilities"
)
pregas_reference_risk_diff <- pregas_reference_predictions_by_imp |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$imp, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_difference = .data$p_imp_VBG - .data$p_imp_ABG,
    var_risk_difference = .data$var_p_imp_VBG + .data$var_p_imp_ABG
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ ticket3_pool_scalar(.x$risk_difference, .x$var_risk_difference)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
pregas_reference_wide <- pregas_reference_prob_pooled |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL))
pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic <- pregas_reference_wide |>
  dplyr::left_join(pregas_reference_risk_diff, by = c("variant", "variant_label", "outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant = .data$variant,
    variant_label = .data$variant_label,
    outcome = .data$outcome,
    outcome_label = .data$outcome_label,
    abg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_ABG,
    vbg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_VBG,
    abg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_ABG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_VBG,
    risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = 100 * .data$estimate,
    risk_difference_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$lcl,
    risk_difference_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$ucl,
    risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_ABG > 1e-8, .data$p_VBG / .data$p_ABG, NA_real_),
    prediction_method = paste0(.data$variant_label, " MI-logistic IPSW spline"),
    standardization_target = "common eligible source-population covariate distribution",
    uncertainty_method = "within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG); pooled on the risk-difference scale",
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)),
    diagnostic_note = ticket4_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket4_primary_rates <- weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)) |>
  dplyr::distinct(outcome = .data$outcome_var, primary_value = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)
pregas_rate_compare <- pregas_weighted_outcome_rates |>
  dplyr::distinct(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, no_lactate_value = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct) |>
  dplyr::rename(pregas_value = no_lactate_value) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket4_primary_rates, by = "outcome") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant,
    variant_label,
    metric_type = "weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    sensitivity_value = .data$pregas_value,
    primary_value,
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  )
ticket4_primary_ref <- model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)) |>
  dplyr::transmute(outcome = .data$outcome_var, primary_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)
pregas_ref_compare <- pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant,
    variant_label,
    metric_type = "reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    sensitivity_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket4_primary_ref, by = c("comparison_key" = "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  )
ticket4_primary_cat <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    primary_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$comparison_key, .data$primary_value)
pregas_cat_compare <- pregas_primary_categorical_results |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric_type = "categorical_log_or",
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    sensitivity_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket4_primary_cat, by = "comparison_key") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.50) ~ "WARN",
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.20) ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$metric_type, .data$comparison_key,
                .data$sensitivity_value, .data$primary_value, .data$delta, .data$diagnostic_status)

pregas_vs_primary_comparison <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  pregas_rate_compare,
  pregas_ref_compare,
  pregas_cat_compare
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = "Change thresholds are review prompts, not inferential cutoffs.",
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_vs_primary_comparison,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_vs_primary_comparison.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

pregas_balance_plot <- pregas_balance_summary |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = variant_label, y = median_max_abs_post, color = modality, group = modality)) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0.10, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_BALANCE_SEGMENT_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2.6) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Pre-gas covariate balance sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Median max absolute SMD across imputations",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(pregas_balance_plot, "pregas_balance_plot", width = 7.0, height = 4.5)

pregas_rate_plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome_label, modality, variant_label = "Primary", weighted_rate_pct),
  pregas_weighted_outcome_rates |>
    dplyr::transmute(outcome_label, modality, variant_label, weighted_rate_pct)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = KEY_RESULTS_OUTCOME_LEVELS),
    modality = factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS)
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_label, y = weighted_rate_pct, color = modality, shape = variant_label)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.55),
    size = MANUSCRIPT_CAT3_POINT_SIZE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Pre-gas weighted outcome-rate sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Weighted outcome rate (%)",
    color = NULL,
    shape = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(pregas_rate_plot, "pregas_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison", width = 8.0, height = 5.0)

pregas_fit_diagnostics <- read_pregas_component("fit_diag")
write_csv_safely(
  pregas_fit_diagnostics,
  sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_fit_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket4_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "ticket_references",
    "covariate_timing_inventory",
    "covariate_sets",
    "ps_models_fit",
    "weights_valid",
    "balance_summary",
    "weighted_rates",
    "categorical_results",
    "reference_risks",
    "figures"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(c("overall", "ticket_4_pregas")),
    if (nrow(ticket4_covariate_timing_inventory) == length(covars_ps)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(pregas_covariate_sets$covariate_n > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(pregas_weighting_diagnostics$converged %in% TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(is.finite(pregas_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min)) &&
        all(is.finite(pregas_weighting_diagnostics$weight_max)) &&
        all(pregas_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    sensitivity_max_status(pregas_balance_summary$diagnostic_status),
    if (nrow(pregas_weighted_outcome_rates) == nrow(pregas_covariate_sets) * length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L &&
        all(dplyr::between(pregas_weighted_outcome_rates$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(pregas_primary_categorical_results) == nrow(pregas_covariate_sets) * length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L * 2L &&
        all(is.finite(pregas_primary_categorical_results$OR))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic) == nrow(pregas_covariate_sets) * length(cat3_outcomes) &&
        all(dplyr::between(pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic$abg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE) &&
        all(dplyr::between(pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic$vbg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "pregas_balance_plot.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "pregas_balance_plot.pdf")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "pregas_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "pregas_weighted_outcome_rate_comparison.pdf"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(c("overall", "ticket_4_pregas")),
    "Primary PS covariates were classified by conservative pre-gas eligibility.",
    "At least one conservative pre-gas covariate set was nonempty.",
    "Pre-gas ABG/VBG propensity models converged in all imputations.",
    "Pre-gas weights are finite and positive among tested rows.",
    "Pre-gas target-balance summaries were generated.",
    "Pre-gas weighted outcome rates were generated for all four outcomes, both modalities, and all variants.",
    "Pre-gas categorical outcome associations were generated for all four outcomes, both modalities, Low/High contrasts, and all variants.",
    "Pre-gas ABG 40/VBG 45 reference risks were generated using common-source marginal standardization.",
    "Compact pre-gas balance and weighted-rate QA figures were generated."
  )
)
ticket4_status <- sensitivity_write_status(ticket4_status, "pregas_covariates")

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Pre-Gas Covariate Sensitivity Summary",
    "",
    paste0("- Overall status: ", sensitivity_max_status(ticket4_status$status)),
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    "",
    ticket4_note,
    "",
    "## Covariate Sets",
    "",
    markdown_table(pregas_covariate_sets |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
    "",
    "## Weighted Outcome-Rate Differences",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      pregas_weighted_outcome_rates |>
        dplyr::select(
          variant_label, outcome_label, modality, weighted_rate_pct,
          weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
          weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Reference Risks at ABG 40 / VBG 45",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
        dplyr::select(
          variant_label, outcome_label, abg_predicted_risk_pct, vbg_predicted_risk_pct,
          risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct, risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg,
          diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Largest Changes Versus Primary",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      pregas_vs_primary_comparison |>
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(.data$delta))) |>
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 12L) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("pregas_covariates", "pregas_interpretation_summary.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

rm(pregas_variant_component_files)
invisible(gc(FALSE))
```

```{r sensitivity-ticket-5-acute-workflow}
#| code-block-title: "Ticket 5 acute severity and workflow proxy sensitivity"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: add same-encounter acute severity/workflow proxies to the primary sampling model and compare absolute-risk diagnostics.

ticket5_note <- paste(
  "The acute workflow proxy model is an exploratory sensitivity analysis.",
  "It adds selected same-encounter severity or workflow proxies to the primary propensity model.",
  "These proxies may be post-baseline or collider-prone, so attenuation is interpreted as context sensitivity rather than proof of mechanism."
)

ticket5_candidate_specs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~variable, ~domain, ~likely_timing, ~candidate_role, ~notes,
  "cc_time_0", "critical_care_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Critical-care time/procedure indicator; exploratory workflow proxy.",
  "cc_time", "critical_care_workflow", "same_encounter_duration", "stratification_only",
  "Raw duration/count form kept out of PS unless converted to a stable binary indicator.",
  "blood_cx_proc_0", "sepsis_shock_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Blood culture indicator; exploratory sepsis/workflow proxy.",
  "ip_abx_0", "sepsis_shock_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Inpatient antibiotic indicator; exploratory infection/workflow proxy.",
  "sepsis_dx", "sepsis_shock_workflow", "diagnosis_by_encounter", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Sepsis diagnosis indicator; exploratory acute-severity proxy.",
  "paralytic_0", "airway_ventilator_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Paralytic medication indicator; exploratory airway/ventilator workflow proxy.",
  "po_steroid_0", "respiratory_treatment_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Steroid treatment indicator; exploratory respiratory treatment proxy.",
  "vasodilators_0", "hemodynamic_treatment_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Vasodilator medication indicator; exploratory hemodynamic treatment/workflow proxy.",
  "ctccon_0", "high_acuity_imaging_workflow", "same_encounter_proxy", "enhanced_ps_candidate",
  "Contrast CT indicator; exploratory imaging/workflow proxy.",
  "resp_acid_dx", "respiratory_diagnosis", "diagnosis_by_encounter", "stratification_only",
  "Respiratory-acidosis diagnosis is outcome-adjacent and not used in the enhanced PS.",
  "cchs_dx", "respiratory_diagnosis", "diagnosis_by_encounter", "stratification_only",
  "Central hypoventilation diagnosis is respiratory-pathway specific and not used in the enhanced PS.",
  "resp_abnormality", "respiratory_diagnosis", "diagnosis_by_encounter", "stratification_only",
  "Respiratory abnormality is outcome-adjacent and not used in the enhanced PS.",
  "spo2", "respiratory_severity", "same_encounter_measure", "stratification_only",
  "SpO2 has historically been ultra-missing and is not imputed for the primary workflow.",
  "bnp", "organ_dysfunction", "same_encounter_measure", "stratification_only",
  "BNP has historically been ultra-missing and is not imputed for the primary workflow.",
  "serum_lac", "acute_metabolic_severity", "same_encounter_lab", "already_primary_ps",
  "Lactate is already in the primary PS; Ticket 3 separately removes it.",
  "serum_cr", "organ_dysfunction", "same_encounter_lab", "already_primary_ps",
  "Creatinine is already in the primary PS.",
  "serum_hco3", "acute_metabolic_severity", "same_encounter_lab", "already_primary_ps",
  "Serum bicarbonate is already in the primary PS.",
  "wbc", "sepsis_shock_workflow", "same_encounter_lab", "already_primary_ps",
  "White blood cell count is already in the primary PS.",
  "plt", "organ_dysfunction", "same_encounter_lab", "already_primary_ps",
  "Platelet count is already in the primary PS.",
  "meas_arterial_gas_proc", "direct_test_workflow", "same_encounter_procedure", "excluded_direct_exposure",
  "Direct ABG measurement/procedure field; excluded as a descendant of the exposure.",
  "meas_venous_o2_proc", "direct_test_workflow", "same_encounter_procedure", "excluded_direct_exposure",
  "Direct VBG/venous oxygen procedure field; excluded as a descendant of the exposure.",
  "imv_proc", "outcome", "outcome", "excluded_outcome",
  "Primary outcome; never included in the enhanced propensity model.",
  "niv_proc", "outcome", "outcome", "excluded_outcome",
  "Primary outcome; never included in the enhanced propensity model.",
  "hypercap_resp_failure", "outcome", "outcome", "excluded_outcome",
  "Primary outcome; never included in the enhanced propensity model."
)

ticket5_date_field_for <- function(variable) {
  sensitivity_first_existing_col(c(
    paste0(variable, "_first_date"),
    paste0(variable, "_date"),
    paste0(variable, "_timestamp"),
    paste0(variable, "_datetime"),
    sub("_0$", "_first_date", variable),
    sub("_dur$", "_first_date", variable)
  ), names(subset_data_raw))
}

ticket5_value_info <- function(variable) {
  if (!variable %in% names(subset_data_raw)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      available = FALSE,
      class = NA_character_,
      n_nonmissing = 0L,
      missing_pct = NA_real_,
      binary_like = FALSE,
      prevalence = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  x <- subset_data_raw[[variable]]
  x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  vals <- sort(unique(x_num[is.finite(x_num)]))
  binary_like <- length(vals) > 0L && length(vals) <= 2L && all(vals %in% c(0, 1))
  tibble::tibble(
    available = TRUE,
    class = paste(class(x), collapse = "/"),
    n_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(x)),
    missing_pct = mean(is.na(x)) * 100,
    binary_like = binary_like,
    prevalence = if (binary_like) mean(x_num == 1, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_
  )
}

ticket5_proxy_inventory <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  ticket5_candidate_specs,
  purrr::map_dfr(ticket5_candidate_specs$variable, ticket5_value_info)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    included_in_primary_ps = .data$variable %in% covars_ps,
    date_field = vapply(.data$variable, ticket5_date_field_for, character(1L)),
    date_field_available = nzchar(.data$date_field),
    direct_outcome_or_exposure = .data$variable %in% cat3_outcomes |
      grepl("^(abg|vbg|paco2)|meas_arterial|meas_venous", .data$variable, ignore.case = TRUE),
    gas_derived_or_outcome_adjacent = grepl(
      "abg_|vbg_|paco2|po2_blood|ph_blood|sao2_blood|resp_acid|resp_abnormality|cchs",
      .data$variable,
      ignore.case = TRUE
    ),
    candidate_for_enhanced_ps = .data$available &
      .data$candidate_role == "enhanced_ps_candidate" &
      !.data$included_in_primary_ps &
      !.data$direct_outcome_or_exposure &
      !.data$gas_derived_or_outcome_adjacent &
      .data$binary_like &
      is.finite(.data$prevalence) &
      .data$prevalence >= 0.01 &
      .data$prevalence <= 0.99,
    candidate_for_stratification_only = .data$candidate_role == "stratification_only" |
      .data$direct_outcome_or_exposure |
      .data$gas_derived_or_outcome_adjacent,
    excluded_reason = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$candidate_for_enhanced_ps ~ "",
      !.data$available ~ "Variable not available in the analytic source data.",
      .data$included_in_primary_ps ~ "Already included in the primary propensity model.",
      .data$direct_outcome_or_exposure ~ "Outcome or direct ABG/VBG testing descendant.",
      .data$gas_derived_or_outcome_adjacent ~ "Gas-derived or respiratory outcome-adjacent field.",
      !.data$binary_like & .data$candidate_role == "enhanced_ps_candidate" ~ "Not binary-like enough for the current proxy PS implementation.",
      is.finite(.data$prevalence) & .data$prevalence < 0.01 ~ "Pilot prevalence below 1%; not selected for stable PS fitting.",
      TRUE ~ "Not selected for enhanced PS; retained as inventory/context."
    ),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  ticket5_proxy_inventory,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
writeLines(
  c(
    "# Acute Severity / Workflow Proxy Inventory",
    "",
    ticket5_note,
    "",
    "Candidate proxy fields are screened for availability, binary-like coding, prevalence, and outcome/exposure leakage.",
    "",
    markdown_table(ticket5_proxy_inventory |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_inventory.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

ticket5_selected_proxy_vars <- ticket5_proxy_inventory |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$candidate_for_enhanced_ps) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$variable) |>
  unique()
if (!length(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars)) {
  stop("Ticket 5 found no valid acute/workflow proxy variables for the enhanced PS model.")
}

ticket5_clean_proxy_frame <- function(proxy_vars) {
  proxy_frame <- lapply(proxy_vars, function(variable) {
    x <- subset_data_raw[[variable]]
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
    out <- as.integer(x_num == 1)
    out[is.na(out)] <- 0L
    out
  })
  proxy_frame <- as.data.frame(proxy_frame, optional = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  names(proxy_frame) <- proxy_vars
  proxy_frame
}

ticket5_proxy_frame <- ticket5_clean_proxy_frame(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars)
if (nrow(ticket5_proxy_frame) != nrow(subset_data_raw)) {
  stop("Ticket 5 proxy frame is not row-aligned with subset_data_raw.")
}

ticket5_get_imp_with_proxies <- function(imp_index) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  if (nrow(d_imp) != nrow(ticket5_proxy_frame)) {
    stop("Ticket 5 imputation frame is not row-aligned with proxy frame.")
  }
  for (variable in names(ticket5_proxy_frame)) {
    d_imp[[variable]] <- ticket5_proxy_frame[[variable]]
  }
  d_imp
}

acute_proxy_model_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  variant = "acute_workflow_enhanced",
  variant_label = "Primary + acute workflow proxies",
  proxy_variables = list(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars),
  covariates = list(unique(c(covars_ps, ticket5_selected_proxy_vars))),
  primary_covariate_n = length(covars_ps),
  proxy_covariate_n = length(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars),
  total_covariate_n = length(unique(c(covars_ps, ticket5_selected_proxy_vars))),
  proxy_summary = paste(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars, collapse = "; "),
  status = "PASS",
  notes = ticket5_note,
  run_id = diag_run_id,
  run_ts = diag_run_ts
)
acute_proxy_model_definitions <- acute_proxy_model_specs |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant,
    variant_label,
    primary_covariate_n,
    proxy_covariate_n,
    total_covariate_n,
    proxy_summary,
    covariates = vapply(.data$covariates, paste, character(1L), collapse = "; "),
    status,
    notes,
    run_id,
    run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_model_definitions,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_model_definitions.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_variant_results <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(acute_proxy_model_specs)), function(row_idx) {
  spec <- acute_proxy_model_specs[row_idx, ]
  ticket4_run_variant(
    spec$variant[[1L]],
    spec$variant_label[[1L]],
    spec$covariates[[1L]],
    imp_getter = ticket5_get_imp_with_proxies,
    balance_covars = spec$covariates[[1L]]
  )
})
names(acute_proxy_variant_results) <- acute_proxy_model_specs$variant

acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "weight_diagnostics"))
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_balance_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "balance_long"))
acute_proxy_balance_imp_summary <- acute_proxy_balance_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$modality, .data$imp) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_post = max(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_post = mean(abs(.data$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    proxy_max_abs_post = max(abs(.data$smd_post[.data$variable %in% ticket5_selected_proxy_vars]), na.rm = TRUE),
    variables_gt_0_10 = sum(abs(.data$smd_post) > 0.10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(proxy_max_abs_post = dplyr::if_else(is.infinite(.data$proxy_max_abs_post), NA_real_, .data$proxy_max_abs_post))
acute_proxy_balance_summary <- acute_proxy_balance_imp_summary |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    median_max_abs_post = stats::median(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_post = max(.data$max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_proxy_max_abs_post = stats::median(.data$proxy_max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_mean_abs_post = stats::median(.data$mean_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_variables_gt_0_10 = stats::median(.data$variables_gt_0_10, na.rm = TRUE),
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$max_abs_post > 0.25 ~ "WARN",
      .data$max_abs_post > 0.10 ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    diagnostic_note = ticket5_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_balance_summary,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_balance_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_rates_by_imp <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "rates_by_imp"))
acute_proxy_rate_base <- acute_proxy_rates_by_imp |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    unweighted_n = stats::median(.data$unweighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_events = stats::median(.data$unweighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    unweighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$unweighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_events = mean(.data$weighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_n = stats::median(.data$weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_pct = mean(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_rate_se_pct = stats::sd(.data$weighted_rate_pct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    effective_sample_size = stats::median(.data$effective_sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
acute_proxy_rate_comparison <- acute_proxy_rate_base |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$outcome, .data$modality, .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = .data$weighted_rate_pct) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = .data$VBG - .data$ABG,
    weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$ABG > 1e-6, .data$VBG / .data$ABG, NA_real_),
    absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct = abs(.data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct),
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(.data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$outcome, .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct,
                .data$weighted_rate_ratio_vbg_over_abg, .data$absolute_weighted_rate_difference_pct,
                .data$diagnostic_status)
acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates <- acute_proxy_rate_base |>
  dplyr::left_join(acute_proxy_rate_comparison, by = c("variant", "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = ticket5_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$variant, factor(.data$outcome, levels = cat3_outcomes), factor(.data$modality, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS))
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "categorical")) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$variant, factor(.data$outcome, levels = stacked_ror_outcome_levels), factor(.data$group, levels = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_LEVELS), .data$contrast)
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_reference_predictions_by_imp <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "ref_by_imp"))
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_reference_risks_by_imputation.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
acute_proxy_reference_prob_pooled <- pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
  acute_proxy_reference_predictions_by_imp,
  group_vars = c("variant", "variant_label", "outcome", "outcome_label", "modality", "ref_pco2"),
  context = "acute workflow reference-risk marginal probabilities"
)
acute_proxy_reference_risk_diff <- acute_proxy_reference_predictions_by_imp |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$imp, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$p_imp, .data$var_p_imp)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_difference = .data$p_imp_VBG - .data$p_imp_ABG,
    var_risk_difference = .data$var_p_imp_VBG + .data$var_p_imp_ABG
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label) |>
```
