```{r sensitivity-ticket-5-acute-workflow}
  dplyr::group_modify(~ ticket3_pool_scalar(.x$risk_difference, .x$var_risk_difference)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
acute_proxy_reference_wide <- acute_proxy_reference_prob_pooled |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, .data$outcome_label, .data$modality, .data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = .data$modality, values_from = c(.data$ref_pco2, .data$p, .data$p_LCL, .data$p_UCL))
acute_proxy_reference_risks <- acute_proxy_reference_wide |>
  dplyr::left_join(acute_proxy_reference_risk_diff, by = c("variant", "variant_label", "outcome", "outcome_label")) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant = .data$variant,
    variant_label = .data$variant_label,
    outcome = .data$outcome,
    outcome_label = .data$outcome_label,
    abg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_ABG,
    vbg_ref_pco2 = .data$ref_pco2_VBG,
    abg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_ABG,
    abg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_ABG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_pct = 100 * .data$p_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$p_LCL_VBG,
    vbg_predicted_risk_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$p_UCL_VBG,
    risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct = 100 * .data$estimate,
    risk_difference_lcl_pct = 100 * .data$lcl,
    risk_difference_ucl_pct = 100 * .data$ucl,
    risk_ratio_vbg_over_abg = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_ABG > 1e-8, .data$p_VBG / .data$p_ABG, NA_real_),
    prediction_method = paste0(.data$variant_label, " MI-logistic IPSW spline"),
    standardization_target = "common eligible source-population covariate distribution",
    uncertainty_method = "within-imputation Var(RD) = Var(P_VBG) + Var(P_ABG); pooled on the risk-difference scale",
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)),
    diagnostic_note = ticket5_note,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_reference_risks,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_reference_risks.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

ticket5_primary_rates <- weighted_outcome_rate_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)) |>
  dplyr::distinct(outcome = .data$outcome_var, primary_value = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)
acute_proxy_rate_compare <- acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates |>
  dplyr::distinct(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$outcome, sensitivity_value = .data$weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket5_primary_rates, by = "outcome") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric_type = "weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    signed_attenuation_pct = dplyr::if_else(abs(.data$primary_value) > 1e-8, 100 * (1 - .data$sensitivity_value / .data$primary_value), NA_real_),
    absolute_attenuation_pct = dplyr::if_else(abs(.data$primary_value) > 1e-8, 100 * (1 - abs(.data$sensitivity_value) / abs(.data$primary_value)), NA_real_),
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$metric_type, .data$comparison_key,
                .data$sensitivity_value, .data$primary_value, .data$delta,
                .data$signed_attenuation_pct, .data$absolute_attenuation_pct,
                .data$diagnostic_status)
ticket5_primary_ref <- model_implied_reference_risk_diagnostic |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = dplyr::coalesce(unname(ticket3_outcome_label_to_var[.data$outcome]), .data$outcome)) |>
  dplyr::transmute(outcome = .data$outcome_var, primary_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct)
acute_proxy_ref_compare <- acute_proxy_reference_risks |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    variant,
    variant_label,
    metric_type = "reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct",
    comparison_key = .data$outcome,
    sensitivity_value = .data$risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket5_primary_ref, by = c("comparison_key" = "outcome")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    signed_attenuation_pct = dplyr::if_else(abs(.data$primary_value) > 1e-8, 100 * (1 - .data$sensitivity_value / .data$primary_value), NA_real_),
    absolute_attenuation_pct = dplyr::if_else(abs(.data$primary_value) > 1e-8, 100 * (1 - abs(.data$sensitivity_value) / abs(.data$primary_value)), NA_real_),
    diagnostic_status = ticket3_diagnostic_status_from_abs_pp(abs(.data$delta))
  )
ticket5_primary_cat <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(abg_cat_results, group = "ABG"),
  dplyr::mutate(vbg_cat_results, group = "VBG")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    primary_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$comparison_key, .data$primary_value)
acute_proxy_cat_compare <- acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric_type = "categorical_log_or",
    comparison_key = paste(.data$group, .data$outcome, .data$term, sep = "|"),
    sensitivity_value = .data$logOR
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ticket5_primary_cat, by = "comparison_key") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    delta = .data$sensitivity_value - .data$primary_value,
    signed_attenuation_pct = NA_real_,
    absolute_attenuation_pct = NA_real_,
    diagnostic_status = dplyr::case_when(
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.50) ~ "WARN",
      abs(.data$delta) > log(1.20) ~ "REVIEW",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(.data$variant, .data$variant_label, .data$metric_type, .data$comparison_key,
                .data$sensitivity_value, .data$primary_value, .data$delta,
                .data$signed_attenuation_pct, .data$absolute_attenuation_pct,
                .data$diagnostic_status)

acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  acute_proxy_rate_compare,
  acute_proxy_ref_compare,
  acute_proxy_cat_compare
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    diagnostic_note = "Attenuation is a descriptive sensitivity summary, not causal proof.",
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_fit_diagnostics <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(acute_proxy_variant_results, `[[`, "fit_diag"))
write_csv_safely(
  acute_proxy_fit_diagnostics,
  sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_fit_diagnostics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

acute_proxy_balance_plot <- acute_proxy_balance_summary |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = variant_label, y = median_max_abs_post, color = modality, group = modality)) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0.10, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_BALANCE_SEGMENT_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2.6) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = KEY_RESULTS_GROUP_COLORS) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Acute workflow proxy balance sensitivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Median max absolute SMD across imputations",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(acute_proxy_balance_plot, "acute_proxy_balance_plot", width = 7.0, height = 4.5)

acute_proxy_attenuation_plot <- acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$metric_type == "weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_label = dplyr::coalesce(
      unname(stacked_ror_outcome_display[stacked_ror_outcome_var_to_label[.data$comparison_key]]),
      .data$comparison_key
    ),
    outcome_label = factor(.data$outcome_label, levels = KEY_RESULTS_OUTCOME_LEVELS)
  ) |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = outcome_label, y = absolute_attenuation_pct)) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = MANUSCRIPT_REFERENCE_LINEWIDTH) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(fill = "#0072B2", width = 0.62) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Acute workflow proxy attenuation of weighted outcome-rate gaps",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Absolute attenuation of VBG-ABG gap (%)"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = MANUSCRIPT_FIG_BASE_SIZE)
print_plot_once(acute_proxy_attenuation_plot, "acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rate_attenuation", width = 8.0, height = 4.8)

ticket5_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "ticket_references",
    "proxy_inventory",
    "selected_proxy_variables",
    "ps_models_fit",
    "weights_valid",
    "balance_summary",
    "weighted_rates",
    "reference_risks",
    "categorical_results",
    "attenuation_comparison",
    "figures"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(c("overall", "ticket_5_acute_workflow")),
    if (nrow(ticket5_proxy_inventory) == nrow(ticket5_candidate_specs)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (length(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars) > 0L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics$converged %in% TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(is.finite(acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min)) &&
        all(is.finite(acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics$weight_max)) &&
        all(acute_proxy_weighting_diagnostics$weight_min > 0)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    sensitivity_max_status(acute_proxy_balance_summary$diagnostic_status),
    if (nrow(acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates) == nrow(acute_proxy_model_definitions) * length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L &&
        all(dplyr::between(acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates$weighted_rate_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(acute_proxy_reference_risks) == nrow(acute_proxy_model_definitions) * length(cat3_outcomes) &&
        all(dplyr::between(acute_proxy_reference_risks$abg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE) &&
        all(dplyr::between(acute_proxy_reference_risks$vbg_predicted_risk_pct, 0, 100), na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results) == nrow(acute_proxy_model_definitions) * length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L * 2L &&
        all(is.finite(acute_proxy_primary_categorical_results$OR))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison) >= length(cat3_outcomes) * 2L &&
        !any(is.na(acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison$primary_value))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (file.exists(results_path("figs", "acute_proxy_balance_plot.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "acute_proxy_balance_plot.pdf")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rate_attenuation.png")) &&
        file.exists(results_path("figs", "acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rate_attenuation.pdf"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(c("overall", "ticket_5_acute_workflow")),
    "Candidate acute severity/workflow proxies were inventoried with missingness, prevalence, and leakage flags.",
    paste0("Selected proxy variables: ", paste(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars, collapse = "; ")),
    "Enhanced ABG/VBG propensity models converged in all imputations.",
    "Enhanced proxy weights are finite and positive among tested rows.",
    "Enhanced proxy target-balance summaries were generated.",
    "Weighted outcome rates were generated for all outcomes and both modalities.",
    "ABG 40/VBG 45 reference risks were generated using common-source marginal standardization.",
    "Categorical outcome associations were generated for all outcomes, both modalities, and Low/High contrasts.",
    "Primary-vs-enhanced attenuation/comparison rows were generated.",
    "Compact enhanced proxy balance and attenuation figures were generated."
  )
)
ticket5_status <- sensitivity_write_status(ticket5_status, "acute_workflow")

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Acute Severity / Workflow Proxy Sensitivity Summary",
    "",
    paste0("- Overall status: ", sensitivity_max_status(ticket5_status$status)),
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Selected proxy variables: ", paste(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars, collapse = "; ")),
    "",
    ticket5_note,
    "",
    "## Model Definition",
    "",
    markdown_table(acute_proxy_model_definitions |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
    "",
    "## Weighted Outcome-Rate Attenuation",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$metric_type == "weighted_rate_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct") |>
        dplyr::select(
          comparison_key, sensitivity_value, primary_value, delta,
          signed_attenuation_pct, absolute_attenuation_pct, diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Reference-Risk Attenuation",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$metric_type == "reference_risk_difference_vbg_minus_abg_pct") |>
        dplyr::select(
          comparison_key, sensitivity_value, primary_value, delta,
          signed_attenuation_pct, absolute_attenuation_pct, diagnostic_status
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    ),
    "",
    "## Largest Changes Versus Primary",
    "",
    markdown_table(
      acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison |>
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(.data$delta))) |>
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 12L) |>
        dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))
    )
  ),
  con = sensitivity_path("acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_interpretation_summary.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

rm(acute_proxy_variant_results)
invisible(gc(FALSE))
```

```{r reverse-timing-severity-combined-summary}
#| code-block-title: "Combined reverse-timing and severity sensitivity summary"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: summarize all five staged sensitivity modules and write the integrated structural gate.

combined_ticket_status <- tibble::tibble(
  module = c(
    "Ticket 1: gas vs IMV/NIV timing",
    "Ticket 2: timing-stratified weighted rates",
    "Ticket 3: no-lactate propensity sensitivity",
    "Ticket 4: pre-gas covariate propensity sensitivity",
    "Ticket 5: acute severity/workflow proxy sensitivity"
  ),
  family = c(
    "reverse_timing",
    "timing_stratified_rates",
    "no_lactate",
    "pregas_covariates",
    "acute_workflow"
  ),
  overall_status = c(
    sensitivity_max_status(ticket1_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(ticket2_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(ticket3_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(ticket4_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(ticket5_status$status)
  ),
  required_artifacts = c(
    "timing_field_inventory.csv; timing_classification_counts.csv; timing_classification_by_modality_outcome.csv",
    "weighted_timing_class_distribution.csv; weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates.csv; weighted_rates_excluding_presame_imv.csv",
    "lactate_variable_inventory.csv; no_lactate_weighted_outcome_rates.csv; no_lactate_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv",
    "covariate_timing_inventory.csv; pregas_weighted_outcome_rates.csv; pregas_reference_risk_diagnostic.csv",
    "acute_proxy_inventory.csv; acute_proxy_weighted_outcome_rates.csv; acute_proxy_reference_risks.csv"
  ),
  structural_interpretation = c(
    "Classifies gas timing relative to IMV/NIV, with same-day treated as temporally ambiguous rather than definitively post-outcome.",
    "Reuses timing classes to distinguish strict post-gas ventilatory support, same-day-or-after support, and broader rates excluding pre/same-day IMV context.",
    "Tests whether removing lactate from the sampling model materially changes balance, weighted outcome rates, reference risks, and categorical associations.",
    "Tests whether conservative pre-gas covariate sets preserve or change the absolute-risk diagnostics relative to the primary sampling model.",
    "Tests whether adding same-encounter acute/workflow proxies attenuates ABG-VBG absolute-risk and reference-risk gaps."
  ),
  pilot_selected_inputs = c(
    paste0(
      "Gas fields: ",
      paste(unique(ticket1_field_inventory$gas_day_field[ticket1_field_inventory$status == "PASS"]), collapse = "; "),
      "; outcome fields: ",
      paste(unique(ticket1_field_inventory$outcome_day_field[ticket1_field_inventory$status == "PASS"]), collapse = "; ")
    ),
    paste0(
      "Rate definitions: ",
      paste(unique(weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates$outcome_definition), collapse = "; ")
    ),
    paste0(
      "Removed lactate PS variables: ",
      if (length(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars)) paste(ticket3_lactate_ps_vars, collapse = "; ") else "none"
    ),
    paste0(
      "Pre-gas variants: ",
      paste(pregas_covariate_sets$variant, "(", pregas_covariate_sets$covariate_n, " covariates)", collapse = "; ")
    ),
    paste0("Selected proxy variables: ", paste(ticket5_selected_proxy_vars, collapse = "; "))
  ),
  diagnostic_scope = "Structural QA only in 1% pilot; full-run values are required for substantive interpretation.",
  run_id = diag_run_id,
  run_ts = diag_run_ts
)
write_csv_safely(
  combined_ticket_status,
  results_path("reverse_timing_severity_sensitivity_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

combined_primary_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "stacked_ror_validation",
    "risk_difference_validation",
    "likelihood_ratio_validation",
    "weighted_rate_reference_risk_diagnostics"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_max_status(stacked_ror_validation_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(risk_difference_validation_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_validation_status$status),
    sensitivity_max_status(outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit$status)
  ),
  detail = c(
    "Existing stacked-ROR validation status from the primary notebook path.",
    "Existing standardized risk-difference validation status from the primary notebook path.",
    "Existing likelihood-ratio validation status from the primary notebook path.",
    "Existing weighted outcome-rate and ABG 40/VBG 45 reference-risk diagnostic audit."
  )
)

combined_required_files <- c(
  results_path("sensitivity_reverse_timing", "sensitivity_reverse_timing_validation_status.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_timing_stratified_rates", "sensitivity_timing_stratified_rates_validation_status.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_no_lactate", "sensitivity_no_lactate_validation_status.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_pregas_covariates", "sensitivity_pregas_covariates_validation_status.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_acute_workflow", "sensitivity_acute_workflow_validation_status.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_reverse_timing", "timing_classification_counts.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_timing_stratified_rates", "weighted_post_gas_outcome_rates.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_no_lactate", "no_lactate_vs_primary_comparison.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_pregas_covariates", "pregas_vs_primary_comparison.csv"),
  results_path("sensitivity_acute_workflow", "acute_proxy_vs_primary_comparison.csv")
)
combined_missing_files <- combined_required_files[!file.exists(combined_required_files)]

combined_validation_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "source_ticket_files",
    "five_module_statuses",
    "primary_gates",
    "required_artifacts",
    "combined_summary_outputs"
  ),
  status = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_status(),
    if (any(combined_ticket_status$overall_status == "FAIL")) "FAIL" else sensitivity_max_status(combined_ticket_status$overall_status),
    if (any(combined_primary_status$status == "FAIL")) "FAIL" else sensitivity_max_status(combined_primary_status$status),
    if (length(combined_missing_files) == 0L) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    "PASS"
  ),
  detail = c(
    sensitivity_ticket_reference_detail(),
    paste0("Module statuses: ", paste(combined_ticket_status$family, combined_ticket_status$overall_status, sep = "=", collapse = "; ")),
    paste0("Primary gate statuses: ", paste(combined_primary_status$component, combined_primary_status$status, sep = "=", collapse = "; ")),
    if (length(combined_missing_files)) paste(combined_missing_files, collapse = "; ") else "All required sensitivity artifacts exist.",
    "Combined markdown and CSV summaries were written in this chunk."
  ),
  run_id = diag_run_id,
  run_ts = diag_run_ts
)
combined_validation_status <- combined_validation_status |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    status_rank = unname(sensitivity_status_rank[.data$status]),
    status_rank = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$status_rank), 99, .data$status_rank)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  combined_validation_status,
  results_path("reverse_timing_severity_sensitivity_validation_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

combined_caution_rows <- combined_ticket_status |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$overall_status %in% c("REVIEW", "WARN")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(line = paste0("- ", .data$module, ": ", .data$overall_status, " - ", .data$structural_interpretation)) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$line)
if (!length(combined_caution_rows)) {
  combined_caution_rows <- "- No module-level REVIEW/WARN statuses in this pilot; full-run values are still needed."
}

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Reverse-Timing / Severity Sensitivity Summary",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Integrated structural status: ", sensitivity_max_status(combined_validation_status$status)),
    "",
    "These diagnostics evaluate whether observed ABG-VBG absolute-risk differences are explained by timing, co-measured covariates, or residual clinical-context differences. They do not change the primary estimand unless they reveal a clear implementation flaw.",
    "",
    "## Module Statuses",
    "",
    markdown_table(combined_ticket_status |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
    "",
    "## Primary Gate Statuses",
    "",
    markdown_table(combined_primary_status |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
    "",
    "## Pilot Cautions",
    "",
    combined_caution_rows,
    "",
    "## Interpretation Framework",
    "",
    "Persistent absolute-risk differences after these sensitivity checks would suggest that ABG and VBG are ordered in different clinical contexts not fully captured by measured covariates, especially for broad severity outcomes such as IMV and mortality.",
    "",
    "Attenuation of ABG-VBG absolute-risk differences after timing restrictions or covariate-set changes would suggest that same-day/post-outcome testing or post-test covariates partially explain the risk-scale differences.",
    "",
    "The 1% pilot is structural QA only. Manuscript interpretation should use the full-run diagnostic values."
  ),
  con = results_path("reverse_timing_severity_sensitivity_summary.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

if (any(combined_validation_status$status == "FAIL")) {
  stop(
    "Integrated reverse-timing/severity sensitivity validation failed: ",
    paste(combined_validation_status$component[combined_validation_status$status == "FAIL"], collapse = ", ")
  )
}
```

```{r supplement-artifact-manifest}
#| code-block-title: "Manuscript asset manifests"
#| include: false
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Purpose: freeze manuscript-facing numbering, paths, aliases, and targeted duplicate cleanup.
# helper: delete only the known duplicate spill files for mapped supplement
# artifacts, leaving unrelated historical files untouched.
cleanup_targeted_supplement_duplicates <- function() {
  duplicate_map <- tibble::tribble(
    ~canonical_file, ~duplicate_file,
    results_path("figs", "propensity-histograms-conditional.png"), results_path("figs", "propensity-histograms-conditional-1.png"),
    results_path("figs", "shap-top10-ipw-gbm-abg-vbg.png"), results_path("figs", "shap-top10-ipw-gbm-display-1.png")
  )

  duplicate_map |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      remove_ok = file.exists(canonical_file) && file.exists(duplicate_file)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::filter(remove_ok) |>
    dplyr::pull(duplicate_file) |>
    unique() |>
    (\(paths) {
      if (length(paths)) fs::file_delete(paths)
      invisible(paths)
    })()
}

cleanup_targeted_supplement_duplicates()

# helper: convert an internal absolute artifact path into the shorter manifest
# path used in CSV audits and drafting.
format_manifest_path <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || is.na(path) || !nzchar(path)) return("")
  pretty_path(path)
}

# helper: split comma-separated extension declarations into a stable vector.
split_expected_extensions <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || is.na(x) || !nzchar(x)) return(character(0))
  trimws(strsplit(x, ",", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]) |>
    (\(vals) vals[nzchar(vals)])()
}

# helper: write markdown reports without prepending the diagnostics log header.
write_markdown_report <- function(lines, path) {
  writeLines(lines, con = path)
  invisible(TRUE)
}

# helper: collapse repeated strings for compact audit detail columns.
collapse_unique_text <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(as.character(x))
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & nzchar(x)]
  paste(x, collapse = "; ")
}

# Canonical artifact names stay analysis-oriented for code stability, while
# alias artifact names are manuscript-facing and numbered/titled for drafting.
# All provenance/check outputs are derived from this one registry so numbering,
# paths, and validation display cannot silently drift apart.
manuscript_asset_manifest_internal <- tibble::tribble(
  ~manuscript_label, ~numbering_slot, ~title, ~kind, ~section, ~chunk_label, ~status, ~source_type, ~required_in_validation, ~expected_extensions, ~pdf_display, ~deprecated_replacement, ~missing_artifact_severity, ~notes, ~analysis_family, ~canonical_subdir, ~canonical_stub, ~alias_subdir, ~alias_stub, ~primary_ext,
  "Figure 1", "Figure 1", "Cohort assembly and target population for inverse probability-of-sampling weighting", "figure", "main", "cohort-flow-figure", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Primary cohort-flow display; .pdf sidecar also generated.", "main", "", "cohort_flow", "figs", "figure_1_cohort_assembly_target_population_ipsw", "png",
  "Figure 2", "Figure 2", "Primary MI-logistic IPSW-weighted spline associations of pCO2 with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG", "figure", "main", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Combined manuscript-facing weighted spline figure from the primary MI-logistic IPSW analysis; predicted probabilities are common-source marginal standardized; .pdf sidecar also generated.", "main_mi_ipw_spline", "figs", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_2_primary_weighted_spline_associations_abg_vbg", "png",
  "Table 1", "Table 1", "Baseline characteristics of the analytic cohort overall and by receipt of arterial and venous blood gas testing", "table", "main", "table1-everyone-abg-vbg", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Rendered from the canonical tbl1/tbl1_combined_csv objects; paired CSV also generated.", "baseline", "", "table1_combined", "", "table_1_baseline_characteristics_analytic_cohort", "pdf",
  "Table 2", "Table 2", "MI-pooled, MI-logistic IPSW-weighted 3-level categorical results for ABG and VBG", "table", "main", "table2-weighted-categorical-outcomes", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Main manuscript table for weighted categorical ORs and common-source marginal standardized predicted probabilities across ABG and VBG.", "main_mi_weighted_categorical", "", "table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes", "", "table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes", "pdf",
  "Figure S1", "Figure S1", "Covariate balance after MI logistic inverse-probability weighting for ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "loveplot-mi-logistic", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Primary balance diagnostic for the MI logistic IPSW analysis.", "mi_logistic_primary", "figs", "loveplot-mi-logistic-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s1_covariate_balance_mi_logistic_ipsw", "png",
  "Figure S2", "Figure S2", "Propensity-score overlap for MI logistic ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "mi-propensity-histograms-logistic", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Imputation-averaged tested-versus-untested propensity-score distributions under the MI logistic IPSW models.", "mi_logistic_primary", "figs", "propensity-histograms-mi-logistic", "figs", "figure_s2_propensity_score_overlap_mi_logistic", "png",
  "Figure S3", "Figure S3", "SHAP-style contribution summaries for MI logistic ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "shap-top10-mi-logistic-display", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Mean absolute contribution summaries from the MI logistic IPSW test-ordering models.", "mi_logistic_primary", "figs", "shap-top10-mi-logistic-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s3_shap_style_contributions_mi_logistic", "png",
  "Figure S4", "Figure S4", "MI-logistic IPSW-weighted categorical associations of pCO2 category with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG", "figure", "supplement", "key-results-cat3-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "Figure 3", "fail", "Weighted categorical display from the primary MI-logistic IPSW analysis with common-source marginal standardized predicted probabilities, intentionally harmonized as Figure S4 rather than a main-text Figure 3.", "mi_weighted_categorical", "figs", "key-results-cat3-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s4_weighted_categorical_associations_abg_vbg", "png",
  "Figure S5", "Figure S5", "Unweighted covariate-adjusted spline associations of pCO2 with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG", "figure", "supplement", "key-results-spline-adjusted-abg-vbg", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Combined adjusted complete-case spline figure; .pdf sidecar also generated.", "unweighted_adjusted", "figs", "key-results-spline-adjusted-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s5_unweighted_adjusted_spline_abg_vbg", "png",
  "Table S2", "Table S2", "Crude associations of pCO2 category with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG", "table", "supplement", "supplement-table-s2-crude", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Standalone crude categorical odds-ratio table; paired CSV also generated.", "crude", "", "table_s2_crude_threelevel", "", "table_s2_crude_threelevel", "pdf",
  "Table S3", "Table S3", "GBM IPSW-weighted associations of pCO2 category with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG", "table", "supplement", "supplement-table-s3-gbm", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Standalone GBM IPSW-weighted categorical odds-ratio table; paired CSV also generated.", "gbm_sensitivity", "", "table_s3_gbm_threelevel", "", "table_s3_gbm_threelevel", "pdf",
  "Figure S6", "Figure S6", "Covariate balance after gradient-boosted propensity weighting for ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "loveplot-ipw-gbm", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Raw-versus-weighted absolute standardized mean differences; dashed line marks |SMD| = 0.1.", "gbm_sensitivity", "figs", "loveplot-ipw-gbm-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s6_covariate_balance_gbm_weighting", "png",
  "Figure S7", "Figure S7", "Propensity-score overlap for gradient-boosted ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "propensity-histograms-conditional", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Tested-versus-untested propensity-score distributions under the GBM sensitivity models.", "gbm_sensitivity", "figs", "propensity-histograms-conditional", "figs", "figure_s7_propensity_score_overlap_gbm", "png",
  "Figure S8", "Figure S8", "SHAP-style contribution summaries for gradient-boosted ABG and VBG test-ordering models", "figure", "supplement", "shap-top10-ipw-gbm-display", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Mean absolute SHAP value summaries; not interpreted as independent predictors.", "gbm_sensitivity", "figs", "shap-top10-ipw-gbm-abg-vbg", "figs", "figure_s8_shap_style_contributions_gbm", "png",
  "Table S1", "Table S1", "Inclusion criteria into the enriched sample", "table", "supplement", "manuscript-supplement-tables-additional", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Notebook-generated phenotype input/code-list table for enriched cohort, exposure, and outcome definitions.", "inclusion", "", "table_s1_inclusion_criteria", "", "table_s1_inclusion_criteria", "pdf",
  "Table S4", "Table S4", "Missingness of baseline covariates used in the primary analysis", "table", "supplement", "manuscript-supplement-tables-additional", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Notebook-generated missingness table for baseline covariates used in the primary PS/direct-adjustment analysis.", "missingness", "", "table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis", "", "table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis", "pdf",
  "Table S5", "Table S5", "Multiple-imputation diagnostic summary", "table", "supplement", "manuscript-supplement-tables-additional", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Compact manuscript-facing summary of MI execution, chain, Monte Carlo error, logged-event, warning, and outcome-fit diagnostics.", "mi_diagnostics", "", "table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary", "", "table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary", "pdf",
  "Table S6", "Table S6", "VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios for pCO2 category-outcome associations", "table", "supplement", "stacked-ror-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Categorical covariance-aware stacked weighted interaction model RORs; direction is VBG/ABG.", "stacked_ror_categorical", "", "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3", "", "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3", "pdf",
  "Table S7", "Table S7", "Reference-anchored VBG-to-ABG ratios of odds ratios at 5 mmHg paired pCO2 spline readouts", "table", "supplement", "stacked-ror-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Continuous spline readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG value 5 mmHg higher; ABG 40/VBG 45 is the constructed reference row; direction is VBG/ABG.", "stacked_ror_spline_readouts", "", "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm", "", "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm", "pdf",
  "Figure S9", "Figure S9", "Local 5-mmHg VBG-to-ABG ratio of odds ratios across paired pCO2 intervals", "figure", "supplement", "stacked-ror-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Dual-axis local interval spline ROR display using ABG interval midpoint and VBG interval midpoint = ABG + 5; RORs compare association strength, not agreement.", "stacked_ror_spline_local_interval", "figs", "figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis", "figs", "figure_s9_spline_ror_dual_axis", "png",
  "Table S8", "Table S8", "Exploratory ABG-to-VBG offset scan for spline ROR parity", "table", "supplement", "stacked-ror-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Exploratory point-estimate scan over candidate VBG minus ABG offsets 0-10 mmHg; does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction.", "stacked_ror_offset_scan", "", "table_s8_offset_scan_summary", "", "table_s8_offset_scan_summary", "pdf",
  "Figure S10", "Figure S10", "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG ROR parity", "figure", "supplement", "stacked-ror-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Two-panel offset-scan trend showing weighted geometric mean ROR and the primary support-weighted mean absolute log ROR criterion; highlighted points match the displayed metric.", "stacked_ror_offset_scan", "figs", "figure_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend", "figs", "figure_s10_offset_scan_ror_trend", "png",
  "Table S9", "Table S9", "Standardized predicted-risk differences by pCO2 category and blood gas type", "table", "supplement", "risk-difference-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Categorical common-source marginal standardized predicted-risk differences; direction is VBG minus ABG and units are percentage points.", "standardized_risk_difference_cat3", "", "table_s9_category_risk_differences", "", "table_s9_category_risk_differences", "pdf",
  "Table S10", "Table S10", "Standardized predicted-risk differences at 5 mmHg paired pCO2 spline readouts", "table", "supplement", "risk-difference-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Spline readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG value 5 mmHg higher; direction is VBG minus ABG and units are percentage points.", "standardized_risk_difference_spline_readouts", "", "table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm", "", "table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm", "pdf",
  "Figure S11", "Figure S11", "Standardized VBG-minus-ABG predicted-risk differences across paired pCO2 values", "figure", "supplement", "risk-difference-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Dual-axis spline risk-difference display using common-source marginal standardized predictions; y-axis is VBG minus ABG percentage points.", "standardized_risk_difference_spline", "figs", "figure_s11_spline_risk_difference_dual_axis", "figs", "figure_s11_spline_risk_difference_dual_axis", "png",
  "Table S11", "Table S11", "Exploratory ABG-to-VBG offset scan for standardized predicted-risk parity", "table", "supplement", "risk-difference-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Exploratory point-estimate scan over candidate VBG minus ABG offsets 0-10 mmHg; primary criterion is support-weighted mean absolute risk difference.", "standardized_risk_difference_offset_scan", "", "table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference", "", "table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference", "pdf",
  "Figure S12", "Figure S12", "Exploratory offset scan for standardized predicted-risk parity", "figure", "supplement", "risk-difference-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", TRUE, "", "fail", "Two-panel offset-scan trend showing signed mean VBG-minus-ABG risk difference and the primary support-weighted mean absolute risk-difference criterion.", "standardized_risk_difference_offset_scan", "figs", "figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference_trend", "figs", "figure_s12_offset_scan_risk_difference_trend", "png",
  "Table S12", "Table S12", "Baseline outcome rates and common baseline odds for likelihood-ratio outputs", "table", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Baseline rates and common baseline odds used for likelihood-ratio outputs.", "likelihood_ratio_baseline", "", "table_s12_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds", "", "table_s12_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds", "pdf",
  "Table S13", "Table S13", "Categorical likelihood ratios by pCO2 category and blood-gas modality", "table", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Categorical likelihood ratios are pCO2-conditioned predicted odds divided by common target-population baseline odds; VBG/ABG LR ratio divides VBG LR by ABG LR.", "likelihood_ratio_categorical", "", "table_s13_categorical_likelihood_ratios", "", "table_s13_categorical_likelihood_ratios", "pdf",
  "Table S14", "Table S14", "Likelihood ratios at paired 5 mmHg pCO2 spline readouts", "table", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Spline likelihood-ratio readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG value 5 mmHg higher and report modality-specific values plus VBG/ABG LR ratios.", "likelihood_ratio_spline_readouts", "", "table_s14_spline_likelihood_ratios_5mm", "", "table_s14_spline_likelihood_ratios_5mm", "pdf",
  "Figure S13", "Figure S13", "Spline likelihood ratios across paired ABG and VBG pCO2 values", "figure", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Dual-axis spline likelihood-ratio display using common weighted target-population baseline odds; values above 1 indicate higher predicted odds than baseline.", "likelihood_ratio_spline", "figs", "figure_s13_spline_likelihood_ratios", "figs", "figure_s13_spline_likelihood_ratios", "png",
  "Table S15", "Table S15", "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG likelihood-ratio parity", "table", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "csv,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Exploratory point-estimate scan over candidate VBG minus ABG offsets 0-10 mmHg; primary criterion is support-weighted mean absolute log VBG/ABG LR ratio.", "likelihood_ratio_offset_scan", "", "table_s15_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio", "", "table_s15_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio", "pdf",
  "Figure S14", "Figure S14", "Exploratory offset scan for VBG-to-ABG likelihood-ratio parity", "figure", "supplement", "baseline-relative-predicted-odds-output-export-validation", "generated", "notebook_generated", TRUE, "png,pdf", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT, "", "fail", "Two-panel offset-scan trend showing weighted geometric mean VBG/ABG LR ratio and the primary support-weighted mean absolute log LR ratio criterion.", "likelihood_ratio_offset_scan", "figs", "figure_s14_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio", "figs", "figure_s14_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio", "png",
  "Figure 3", "Figure 3", "Deprecated draft-only reference for weighted categorical results", "figure", "draft_only", "", "draft_only", "suppressed/deprecated", FALSE, "", FALSE, "Figure S4", "suppressed", "Weighted categorical display is intentionally harmonized as Figure S4; no Figure 3 alias is generated.", "deprecated", "", "", "", "", ""
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    manuscript_label_safe = safe_manuscript_text(manuscript_label),
    title_safe = safe_manuscript_text(title),
    caption_safe = manuscript_caption(manuscript_label, title),
    expected_extension_list = purrr::map(expected_extensions, split_expected_extensions),
    canonical_artifact_file = mapply(
      artifact_file_path,
      stub = canonical_stub,
      ext = primary_ext,
      subdir = canonical_subdir,
      USE.NAMES = FALSE
    ),
    alias_artifact_file = mapply(
      artifact_file_path,
      stub = alias_stub,
      ext = primary_ext,
      subdir = alias_subdir,
      USE.NAMES = FALSE
    )
  )

# helper: write the manuscript-facing alias file(s) for one registered asset.
materialize_manuscript_alias <- function(kind, canonical_stub, alias_stub,
                                         canonical_subdir, alias_subdir) {
  if (kind == "figure") {
    return(write_plot_alias(canonical_stub, alias_stub, canonical_subdir, alias_subdir))
  }
  if (kind == "table") {
    return(write_table_alias(canonical_stub, alias_stub, canonical_subdir, alias_subdir))
  }
  stop("Unsupported artifact kind for manuscript alias: ", kind)
}

manuscript_asset_manifest_internal <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    alias_written = list(
      if (
        identical(status, "generated") &&
        !is.na(alias_stub) && nzchar(alias_stub) &&
        !is.na(canonical_stub) && nzchar(canonical_stub)
      ) {
        materialize_manuscript_alias(kind, canonical_stub, alias_stub, canonical_subdir, alias_subdir)
      } else {
        character(0)
      }
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    canonical_artifact_path = vapply(canonical_artifact_file, format_manifest_path, character(1L)),
    alias_artifact_path = vapply(alias_artifact_file, format_manifest_path, character(1L))
  )

active_manuscript_assets <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::filter(status != "draft_only", .data$pdf_display)

internal_debug_assets <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::filter(status == "generated", !.data$pdf_display)

generated_manuscript_assets <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(status == "generated")

numbering_conflicts <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::count(numbering_slot, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_assets > 1L)

alias_conflicts <- generated_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(alias_stub), nzchar(alias_stub)) |>
  dplyr::count(alias_subdir, alias_stub, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_assets > 1L)

canonical_conflicts <- generated_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(canonical_stub), nzchar(canonical_stub)) |>
  dplyr::count(canonical_subdir, canonical_stub, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_assets > 1L)

canonical_path_conflicts <- generated_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(canonical_artifact_path), nzchar(canonical_artifact_path)) |>
  dplyr::count(canonical_artifact_path, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_assets > 1L)

alias_path_conflicts <- generated_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(alias_artifact_path), nzchar(alias_artifact_path)) |>
  dplyr::count(alias_artifact_path, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_assets > 1L)

label_output_conflicts <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    output_key = paste(canonical_artifact_path, alias_artifact_path, sep = " -> ")
  ) |>
  dplyr::count(manuscript_label_safe, output_key, name = "n_rows") |>
  dplyr::count(manuscript_label_safe, name = "n_outputs") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_outputs > 1L)

output_label_conflicts <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  generated_manuscript_assets |>
    dplyr::transmute(output_path = canonical_artifact_path, manuscript_label_safe),
  generated_manuscript_assets |>
    dplyr::transmute(output_path = alias_artifact_path, manuscript_label_safe)
) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(output_path), nzchar(output_path)) |>
  dplyr::distinct(output_path, manuscript_label_safe) |>
  dplyr::count(output_path, name = "n_labels") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_labels > 1L)

deprecated_numbering_conflicts <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(numbering_slot == "Figure 3")

plot_registry_current <- read_plot_registry() |>
  dplyr::filter(run_id == diag_run_id)

plot_registry_conflicts <- plot_registry_current |>
  dplyr::count(plot_name, name = "n_rows") |>
  dplyr::filter(n_rows > 1L)

duplicate_asset_audit <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "numbering_slot",
    audit_key = if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) numbering_conflicts$numbering_slot else "all_active_slots",
    status = if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) numbering_conflicts$n_assets else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) "Multiple active assets share one manuscript numbering slot." else "No contradictory active numbering slots detected."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "alias_stub",
    audit_key = if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) paste0(alias_conflicts$alias_subdir, "::", alias_conflicts$alias_stub) else "all_aliases",
    status = if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) alias_conflicts$n_assets else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) "Multiple active assets share one manuscript-facing alias." else "No conflicting manuscript alias stubs detected."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "canonical_stub",
    audit_key = if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) paste0(canonical_conflicts$canonical_subdir, "::", canonical_conflicts$canonical_stub) else "all_canonical_stubs",
    status = if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) canonical_conflicts$n_assets else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) "Multiple active assets share one canonical artifact stub." else "No conflicting canonical artifact stubs detected."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "canonical_path",
    audit_key = if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) canonical_path_conflicts$canonical_artifact_path else "all_canonical_paths",
    status = if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) canonical_path_conflicts$n_assets else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) "Multiple active assets share one canonical artifact path." else "No conflicting canonical artifact paths detected."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "alias_path",
    audit_key = if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) alias_path_conflicts$alias_artifact_path else "all_alias_paths",
    status = if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) alias_path_conflicts$n_assets else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) "Multiple active assets share one manuscript-facing alias path." else "No conflicting alias artifact paths detected."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "label_output",
    audit_key = if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) label_output_conflicts$manuscript_label_safe else "all_labels",
    status = if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) label_output_conflicts$n_outputs else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) "One active label maps to multiple output path pairs." else "No active label maps to multiple output path pairs."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "output_label",
    audit_key = if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) output_label_conflicts$output_path else "all_outputs",
    status = if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) output_label_conflicts$n_labels else 0L,
    detail = if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) "One output path is attached to multiple active manuscript labels." else "No output path is attached to multiple active labels."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "deprecated_slot",
    audit_key = "Figure 3",
    status = if (nrow(deprecated_numbering_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(deprecated_numbering_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = nrow(deprecated_numbering_conflicts),
    detail = if (nrow(deprecated_numbering_conflicts)) "Deprecated Figure 3 is still active in validation outputs." else "Deprecated Figure 3 numbering is suppressed."
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    audit_scope = "plot_registry",
    audit_key = if (nrow(plot_registry_conflicts)) plot_registry_conflicts$plot_name else "plot_registry_run",
    status = if (nrow(plot_registry_conflicts)) "conflict" else "pass",
    severity = if (nrow(plot_registry_conflicts)) "high" else "none",
    n_rows = if (nrow(plot_registry_conflicts)) plot_registry_conflicts$n_rows else nrow(plot_registry_current),
    detail = if (nrow(plot_registry_conflicts)) "plot_registry.csv contains duplicate figure names for the current run." else "plot_registry.csv has unique figure names for the current run."
  )
)

write_csv_safely(duplicate_asset_audit, results_path("duplicate_asset_audit.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

glyph_audit <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  active_manuscript_assets |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      manuscript_label = manuscript_label_safe,
      field_name = "caption",
      raw_text = paste0(manuscript_label, ". ", title),
      safe_text = caption_safe
    ),
  tibble::tibble(
    manuscript_label = "validation",
    field_name = "section_heading",
    raw_text = "Validation build summary",
    safe_text = safe_manuscript_text("Validation build summary")
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    manuscript_label = "validation",
    field_name = "section_heading",
    raw_text = "Diagnostics audit summary",
    safe_text = safe_manuscript_text("Diagnostics audit summary")
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    raw_is_ascii = is_ascii_text(raw_text),
    safe_is_ascii = is_ascii_text(safe_text),
    normalized = raw_text != safe_text,
    glyph_status = dplyr::if_else(safe_is_ascii, "pass", "fail"),
    severity = dplyr::if_else(safe_is_ascii, "none", "high")
  )

write_csv_safely(glyph_audit, results_path("glyph_audit.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

build_artifact_check_rows <- function(row) {
  row <- as.list(row)
  if (identical(row$status, "generated")) {
    roles <- list(
      canonical = list(stub = row$canonical_stub, subdir = row$canonical_subdir),
      alias = list(stub = row$alias_stub, subdir = row$alias_subdir)
    )
    return(
      purrr::imap_dfr(roles, function(info, artifact_role) {
        if (is.null(info$stub) || is.na(info$stub) || !nzchar(info$stub)) {
          return(tibble::tibble())
        }
        purrr::map_dfr(row$expected_extension_list[[1]], function(ext) {
          artifact_path <- artifact_file_path(info$stub, ext, info$subdir)
          exists_flag <- file.exists(artifact_path)
          tibble::tibble(
            manuscript_label = row$manuscript_label_safe,
            numbering_slot = row$numbering_slot,
            kind = row$kind,
            section = row$section,
            artifact_role = artifact_role,
            ext = ext,
            artifact_path = format_manifest_path(artifact_path),
            exists = exists_flag,
            source_type = row$source_type,
            required_in_validation = row$required_in_validation,
            pdf_display = row$pdf_display,
            allowed_missing = FALSE,
            check_status = dplyr::if_else(exists_flag, "present", "missing_required"),
            severity = dplyr::if_else(exists_flag, "none", row$missing_artifact_severity),
            notes = row$notes
          )
        })
      })
    )
  }
  if (identical(row$status, "external/manual")) {
    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        manuscript_label = row$manuscript_label_safe,
        numbering_slot = row$numbering_slot,
        kind = row$kind,
        section = row$section,
        artifact_role = "external/manual",
        ext = "",
        artifact_path = "",
        exists = NA,
        source_type = row$source_type,
        required_in_validation = row$required_in_validation,
        pdf_display = row$pdf_display,
        allowed_missing = TRUE,
        check_status = "external_manual_declared",
        severity = row$missing_artifact_severity,
        notes = row$notes
      )
    )
  }
  tibble::tibble(
    manuscript_label = row$manuscript_label_safe,
    numbering_slot = row$numbering_slot,
    kind = row$kind,
    section = row$section,
    artifact_role = "suppressed",
    ext = "",
    artifact_path = "",
    exists = NA,
    source_type = row$source_type,
    required_in_validation = row$required_in_validation,
    pdf_display = row$pdf_display,
    allowed_missing = TRUE,
    check_status = "suppressed_draft_only",
    severity = "none",
    notes = row$notes
  )
}

artifact_check_status <- purrr::map_dfr(
  seq_len(nrow(manuscript_asset_manifest_internal)),
  ~ build_artifact_check_rows(manuscript_asset_manifest_internal[.x, , drop = FALSE])
)

artifact_check_missing <- artifact_check_status |>
  dplyr::filter(check_status %in% c("missing_required", "external_manual_declared"))

write_csv_safely(artifact_check_status, results_path("artifact_check_status.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(artifact_check_missing, results_path("artifact_check_missing.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

manuscript_asset_audit <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    existence_status = dplyr::case_when(
      status == "generated" &
        file.exists(canonical_artifact_file) &
        file.exists(alias_artifact_file) ~ "generated",
      status == "external/manual" ~ "external/manual",
      status == "draft_only" ~ "draft_only",
      status == "generated" ~ "missing",
      TRUE ~ status
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    manuscript_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    title = title_safe,
    canonical_artifact_path,
    alias_artifact_path,
    existence_status
  )

write_csv_safely(manuscript_asset_audit, results_path("manuscript_asset_audit.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

artifact_provenance_manifest <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    manuscript_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    numbering_slot,
    title = title_safe,
    caption = caption_safe,
    kind,
    section,
    chunk_label,
    status,
    source_type,
    required_in_validation,
    expected_extensions,
    pdf_display,
    deprecated_replacement,
    missing_artifact_severity,
    canonical_stub,
    canonical_artifact_path,
    alias_stub,
    alias_artifact_path,
    analysis_family,
    notes
  )

canonical_asset_registry <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    numbering_slot,
    manuscript_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    title = title_safe,
    kind,
    section,
    status,
    source_type,
    required_in_validation,
    pdf_display,
    canonical_stub,
    canonical_artifact_path,
    alias_stub,
    alias_artifact_path,
    deprecated_replacement,
    analysis_family
  )

internal_debug_asset_registry <- internal_debug_assets |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    numbering_slot,
    artifact_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    title = title_safe,
    kind,
    section,
    status,
    source_type,
    required_in_validation,
    pdf_display,
    canonical_stub,
    canonical_artifact_path,
    alias_stub,
    alias_artifact_path,
    analysis_family
  )

write_csv_safely(artifact_provenance_manifest, results_path("artifact_provenance_manifest.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(canonical_asset_registry, results_path("canonical_asset_registry.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(internal_debug_asset_registry, results_path("internal_debug_asset_registry.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

write_csv_safely(
  manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      manuscript_label = manuscript_label_safe,
      title = title_safe,
      kind,
      section,
      chunk_label,
      canonical_artifact_path,
      alias_artifact_path,
      status,
      source_type,
      required_in_validation,
      pdf_display,
      notes
    ),
  results_path("manuscript_asset_manifest.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

supplement_manifest_internal <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::filter(section == "supplement", .data$pdf_display) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    supp_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    title = title_safe,
    analysis_family = analysis_family,
    artifact_path = alias_artifact_path,
    chunk_name = chunk_label,
    notes = notes,
    artifact_file = alias_artifact_file
  )

write_csv_safely(
  supplement_manifest_internal |>
    dplyr::select(-artifact_file),
  results_path("supplement_manifest.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

write_markdown_report(
  c(
    "# Current Render Scope",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Extended exploratory supplement display: ", RENDER_EXTENDED_EXPLORATORY_SUPPLEMENT),
    paste0("- Likelihood-ratio supplement display: ", RENDER_LIKELIHOOD_RATIO_SUPPLEMENT),
    "",
    "## Manuscript-Facing Core Outputs",
    "",
    "- ROR outputs compare relative association strength by blood-gas modality on the odds-ratio scale.",
    "- Standardized risk-difference outputs compare VBG minus ABG absolute predicted risks after common-source marginal standardization.",
    "- Likelihood-ratio outputs express pCO2-conditioned predicted odds relative to a common weighted target-population baseline odds.",
    "- Offset scans are exploratory and do not define an equivalence, noninferiority, or agreement margin.",
    "",
    "## Internal/Debug Outputs",
    "",
    "- Source-heavy validation, package manifests, and rendering checks remain side-effect artifacts outside the manuscript-facing display."
  ),
  results_path("README_CURRENT_RENDER.md")
)

manuscript_sync_lines <- c(
  "# Manuscript sync report",
  "",
  paste0("- Run ID: ", diag_run_id),
  paste0("- Active validation assets: ", nrow(active_manuscript_assets)),
  paste0("- Generated validation assets: ", nrow(generated_manuscript_assets)),
  paste0("- External/manual assets: ", sum(active_manuscript_assets$status == "external/manual")),
  paste0("- Draft-only assets suppressed: ", sum(manuscript_asset_manifest_internal$status == "draft_only")),
  paste0("- Missing required generated artifacts: ", sum(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required", na.rm = TRUE)),
  paste0("- Allowed external/manual declarations: ", sum(artifact_check_status$check_status == "external_manual_declared", na.rm = TRUE)),
  paste0("- Glyph audit failures: ", sum(glyph_audit$glyph_status == "fail", na.rm = TRUE)),
  paste0("- Duplicate/numbering conflicts: ", sum(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict", na.rm = TRUE)),
  "",
  "## Active numbering map",
  ""
)

active_numbering_lines <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::transmute(line = paste0("- ", numbering_slot, ": ", title_safe, " [", kind, "; ", status, "]")) |>
  dplyr::pull(line)

write_markdown_report(
  c(manuscript_sync_lines, active_numbering_lines),
  results_path("manuscript_sync_report.md")
)

expected_active_labels <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("^Figure ", .data$manuscript_label_safe) ~ 1L,
      grepl("^Table ", .data$manuscript_label_safe) ~ 2L,
      grepl("^Figure S", .data$manuscript_label_safe) ~ 3L,
      grepl("^Table S", .data$manuscript_label_safe) ~ 4L,
      TRUE ~ 5L
    ),
    suppressWarnings(as.integer(gsub("[^0-9]", "", .data$manuscript_label_safe)))
  ) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$manuscript_label_safe)
poster_required_files <- c(
  results_path("figs", "cohort_flow_poster.png"),
  results_path("figs", "cohort_flow_poster.pdf"),
  results_path("figs", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg_poster.png"),
  results_path("figs", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg_poster.pdf")
)
poster_required_svg_files <- c(
  results_path("figs", "cohort_flow_poster.svg"),
  results_path("figs", "key-results-spline-main-mi-ipw-abg-vbg_poster.svg")
)
figure_alias_checks <- artifact_check_status |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$kind == "figure", .data$artifact_role == "alias", .data$ext %in% c("png", "pdf"))
table_s1_title_safe <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$manuscript_label_safe == "Table S1") |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$title_safe) |>
  (\(x) if (length(x)) x[[1]] else "")()
manuscript_asset_sync_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  check = c(
    "expected_active_labels_present",
    "no_unexpected_active_labels",
    "deprecated_figure3_suppressed",
    "generated_artifacts_present",
    "duplicate_registry_clear",
    "figure_png_pdf_aliases_present",
    "table_s1_sublabels_present",
    "table_s1_title_content_aligned",
    "poster_assets_present"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (all(expected_active_labels %in% active_manuscript_assets$manuscript_label_safe)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (setequal(expected_active_labels, active_manuscript_assets$manuscript_label_safe)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (!any(active_manuscript_assets$manuscript_label_safe == "Figure 3")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (!any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required", na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (!any(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict", na.rm = TRUE)) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (nrow(figure_alias_checks) > 0L && all(figure_alias_checks$check_status == "present")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(c("S1A.", "S1B.", "S1C.") %in% substr(table_s1_panel_order, 1L, 4L))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (grepl("Inclusion criteria", table_s1_title_safe, fixed = TRUE) &&
        all(c("Code system", "Source code/value or extract field", "Role", "Notes") %in% names(table_s1_inclusion_criteria))) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (all(file.exists(poster_required_files)) &&
        (!poster_svg_available() || all(file.exists(poster_required_svg_files))) &&
        file.exists(results_path("poster_visual_qc.md"))) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  severity = c("Fatal", "Fatal", "Fatal", "Fatal", "Fatal", "Major", "Major", "Major", "Major"),
  detail = c(
    paste(setdiff(expected_active_labels, active_manuscript_assets$manuscript_label_safe), collapse = "; "),
    paste(setdiff(active_manuscript_assets$manuscript_label_safe, expected_active_labels), collapse = "; "),
    "Figure 3 must remain draft-only/suppressed.",
    collapse_unique_text(artifact_check_status$artifact_path[artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required"]),
    collapse_unique_text(duplicate_asset_audit$audit_key[duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict"]),
    collapse_unique_text(figure_alias_checks$artifact_path[figure_alias_checks$check_status != "present"]),
    paste(table_s1_panel_order, collapse = "; "),
    "Table S1 remains an inclusion-criteria/code-definition table with source fields, roles, and notes.",
    paste(
      c(
        vapply(poster_required_files, display_path, character(1L), must_exist = FALSE),
        vapply(poster_required_svg_files, display_path, character(1L), must_exist = FALSE),
        display_path(results_path("poster_visual_qc.md"), must_exist = FALSE)
      ),
      collapse = "; "
    )
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    detail = dplyr::if_else(!nzchar(.data$detail), "No issue detected.", .data$detail),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )
write_csv_safely(manuscript_asset_sync_audit, results_path("manuscript_asset_sync_audit.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_markdown_report(
  c(
    "# Manuscript Asset Sync Audit",
    "",
    paste0("- Run ID: ", diag_run_id),
    paste0("- Overall status: ", if (any(manuscript_asset_sync_audit$status == "FAIL")) "FAIL" else "PASS"),
    "",
    markdown_table(manuscript_asset_sync_audit |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  results_path("manuscript_asset_sync_audit.md")
)

# helper: inspect only table CSV headers for publication-quality raw/internal
# field leakage. This deliberately avoids reading table bodies or analytic data.
read_csv_header_safely <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || is.na(path) || !nzchar(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
    return(character(0))
  }
  tryCatch(
    names(utils::read.csv(path, nrows = 0, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)),
    error = function(e) character(0)
  )
}

publication_quality_internal_columns <- c(
  "var_type", "row_type", "panel", "analysis_family", "artifact_file",
  "chunk_name", "run_id", "run_ts", "source_type", "canonical_stub",
  "alias_stub", "canonical_artifact_path", "alias_artifact_path"
)

table_csv_headers_for_asset <- function(row) {
  row <- as.list(row)
  if (!identical(row$kind, "table")) return(character(0))
  csv_paths <- c(
    artifact_file_path(row$canonical_stub, "csv", row$canonical_subdir),
    artifact_file_path(row$alias_stub, "csv", row$alias_subdir)
  )
  csv_paths <- unique(csv_paths[!is.na(csv_paths) & nzchar(csv_paths)])
  unique(unlist(lapply(csv_paths, read_csv_header_safely), use.names = FALSE))
}

publication_quality_table_header_audit <- purrr::map_dfr(
  seq_len(nrow(active_manuscript_assets)),
  function(idx) {
    row <- active_manuscript_assets[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    headers <- table_csv_headers_for_asset(row)
    tibble::tibble(
      manuscript_label = row$manuscript_label_safe,
      raw_field_count = sum(tolower(headers) %in% tolower(publication_quality_internal_columns)),
      raw_fields = collapse_unique_text(headers[tolower(headers) %in% tolower(publication_quality_internal_columns)])
    )
  }
)

table_pdf_path_for_asset <- function(row) {
  row <- as.list(row)
  if (!identical(row$kind, "table")) return(NA_character_)
  stub <- if (!is.na(row$alias_stub) && nzchar(row$alias_stub)) row$alias_stub else row$canonical_stub
  subdir <- if (!is.na(row$alias_subdir) && nzchar(row$alias_subdir)) row$alias_subdir else row$canonical_subdir
  artifact_file_path(stub, "pdf", subdir)
}

audit_table_pdf_visual <- function(asset_label, path, dpi = 150L,
                                   fail_margin_px = 12L,
                                   warn_margin_px = 28L) {
  base_row <- function(page, status, severity, detail,
                       check_type = "page_margin",
                       min_margin = NA_integer_,
                       margins = c(left = NA_integer_, right = NA_integer_,
                                   top = NA_integer_, bottom = NA_integer_)) {
    tibble::tibble(
      asset_label = asset_label,
      artifact_path = if (is.na(path) || !nzchar(path)) NA_character_ else display_path(path, must_exist = FALSE),
      check_type = check_type,
      page = as.integer(page),
      status = status,
      severity = severity,
      min_margin_px = as.integer(min_margin),
      left_margin_px = as.integer(margins[["left"]]),
      right_margin_px = as.integer(margins[["right"]]),
      top_margin_px = as.integer(margins[["top"]]),
      bottom_margin_px = as.integer(margins[["bottom"]]),
      detail = detail
    )
  }

  if (is.na(path) || !nzchar(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
    return(base_row(NA_integer_, "FAIL", "Major", "Table PDF is missing.", check_type = "file_presence"))
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("pdftools", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(base_row(NA_integer_, "WARN", "Minor", "pdftools unavailable; table visual QC requires manual review.", check_type = "tooling"))
  }
  page_n <- tryCatch(pdftools::pdf_info(path)$pages, error = function(e) NA_integer_)
  if (!is.finite(page_n) || page_n <= 0L) {
    return(base_row(NA_integer_, "FAIL", "Major", "Could not determine table PDF page count.", check_type = "page_count"))
  }

  margin_rows <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(page_n), function(page_i) {
    img <- tryCatch(
      pdftools::pdf_render_page(path, page = page_i, dpi = dpi, numeric = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(img) || length(dim(img)) != 3L || dim(img)[[3]] < 3L) {
      return(base_row(page_i, "FAIL", "Major", "Could not render table PDF page to bitmap."))
    }
    rgb <- img[, , seq_len(3L), drop = FALSE]
    nonwhite <- apply(rgb < 0.985, c(1L, 2L), any)
    coords <- which(nonwhite, arr.ind = TRUE)
    if (!nrow(coords)) {
      return(base_row(page_i, "FAIL", "Major", "Rendered table page appears blank."))
    }
    height_px <- dim(nonwhite)[[1]]
    width_px <- dim(nonwhite)[[2]]
    margins <- c(
      left = min(coords[, "col"]) - 1L,
      right = width_px - max(coords[, "col"]),
      top = min(coords[, "row"]) - 1L,
      bottom = height_px - max(coords[, "row"])
    )
    min_margin <- min(margins)
    status <- dplyr::case_when(
      min_margin <= fail_margin_px ~ "FAIL",
      min_margin <= warn_margin_px ~ "WARN",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
    severity <- dplyr::case_when(
      identical(status, "FAIL") ~ "Major",
      identical(status, "WARN") ~ "Minor",
      TRUE ~ "Pass"
    )
    detail <- paste0(
      "Rendered at ", dpi, " dpi; page size ", width_px, "x", height_px,
      " px; nearest content margin = ", min_margin, " px."
    )
    base_row(page_i, status, severity, detail, min_margin = min_margin, margins = margins)
  })

  text_rows <- audit_table_pdf_text_completeness(asset_label, path)
  semantic_rows <- audit_table_pdf_semantics(asset_label, path)
  dplyr::bind_rows(margin_rows, text_rows, semantic_rows)
}

normalize_table_qc_text <- function(x) {
  x <- paste(x, collapse = " ")
  x <- tolower(iconv(x, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT", sub = " "))
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", " ", x, perl = TRUE)
  trimws(gsub("\\s+", " ", x, perl = TRUE))
}

table_s1_expected_text_fragments <- function() {
  if (!exists("table_s1_display", inherits = TRUE)) return(character(0))
  vals <- c(
    as.character(table_s1_display$`Criterion / variable`),
    as.character(table_s1_display$`Code/source field`),
    as.character(table_s1_display$`Role in analysis`),
    as.character(table_s1_display$Note)
  )
  vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & nzchar(vals)]
  fragments <- vapply(vals, normalize_table_qc_text, character(1L))
  fragments <- fragments[nchar(fragments) >= 12L]
  fragments <- vapply(strsplit(fragments, " ", fixed = TRUE), function(words) {
    paste(utils::head(words[nzchar(words)], 12L), collapse = " ")
  }, character(1L))
  unique(fragments[nzchar(fragments)])
}

audit_table_pdf_text_completeness <- function(asset_label, path) {
  base_row <- function(status, severity, detail) {
    tibble::tibble(
      asset_label = asset_label,
      artifact_path = display_path(path, must_exist = FALSE),
      check_type = "text_completeness",
      page = NA_integer_,
      status = status,
      severity = severity,
      min_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      left_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      right_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      top_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      bottom_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      detail = detail
    )
  }
  pdf_text <- tryCatch(pdftools::pdf_text(path), error = function(e) character())
  if (!length(pdf_text) || !nzchar(paste(pdf_text, collapse = ""))) {
    return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Could not extract table PDF text."))
  }
  if (!identical(asset_label, "Table S1")) {
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table PDF text extraction succeeded."))
  }
  pdf_text_norm <- normalize_table_qc_text(pdf_text)
  expected <- table_s1_expected_text_fragments()
  expected <- expected[nzchar(expected)]
  observed_tokens <- unique(strsplit(pdf_text_norm, " ", fixed = TRUE)[[1L]])
  fragment_detected <- function(fragment) {
    tokens <- unique(strsplit(fragment, " ", fixed = TRUE)[[1L]])
    tokens <- tokens[nchar(tokens) >= 3L]
    if (!length(tokens)) return(TRUE)
    mean(tokens %in% observed_tokens) >= 0.85
  }
  missing <- expected[!vapply(expected, fragment_detected, logical(1L))]
  if (length(missing)) {
    return(base_row(
      "FAIL",
      "Major",
      paste0("Table S1 PDF text is missing expected fragments: ", paste(utils::head(missing, 12L), collapse = "; "))
    ))
  }
  base_row("PASS", "Pass", paste0("All ", length(expected), " Table S1 text fragments were detected in the table PDF."))
}

audit_table_pdf_semantics <- function(asset_label, path) {
  base_row <- function(status, severity, detail, page = NA_integer_) {
    tibble::tibble(
      asset_label = asset_label,
      artifact_path = display_path(path, must_exist = FALSE),
      check_type = "detached_columns",
      page = as.integer(page),
      status = status,
      severity = severity,
      min_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      left_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      right_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      top_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      bottom_margin_px = NA_integer_,
      detail = detail
    )
  }
  pdf_text <- tryCatch(pdftools::pdf_text(path), error = function(e) character())
  if (!length(pdf_text) || !nzchar(paste(pdf_text, collapse = ""))) {
    return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Could not extract table PDF text for semantic detached-column checks."))
  }
  page_text <- vapply(pdf_text, normalize_table_qc_text, character(1L))
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S6")) {
    ror_pages <- which(grepl("vbg abg ror", page_text) | (grepl("\\bror\\b", page_text) & grepl("vbg abg", page_text)))
    if (!length(ror_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S6 PDF text does not contain the VBG/ABG ROR column label."))
    }
    detached_pages <- ror_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[ror_pages]) & grepl("pco2 contrast", page_text[ror_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S6 ROR page(s) lack Outcome and pCO2 contrast row identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S6 ROR columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and pCO2 contrast identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S7")) {
    ror_pages <- which(grepl("vbg abg ror", page_text) | (grepl("\\bror\\b", page_text) & grepl("vbg abg", page_text)))
    if (!length(ror_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S7 PDF text does not contain the VBG/ABG ROR column label."))
    }
    detached_pages <- ror_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[ror_pages]) &
      grepl("abg pco2", page_text[ror_pages]) &
      grepl("vbg pco2", page_text[ror_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S7 ROR page(s) lack Outcome plus ABG/VBG pCO2 row identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S7 ROR columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and ABG/VBG pCO2 identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S8")) {
    summary_pages <- which(
      grepl("offset", page_text) &
        grepl("flags", page_text) &
        grepl("geom|geometric", page_text) &
        grepl("\\bror\\b", page_text)
    )
    if (!length(summary_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S8 PDF text does not contain the offset-scan summary columns."))
    }
    detached_pages <- summary_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("offset", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("flags", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("\\bbest\\b", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("geom|geometric", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("mean", page_text[summary_pages]) &
      grepl("\\blog\\b", page_text[summary_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S8 offset-summary page(s) lack Outcome, offset, flags, geometric, and log-ROR identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S8 offset-scan columns appear on page(s) with Outcome, offset, flags, geometric, and log-ROR identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S9")) {
    rd_pages <- which(
      grepl("risk difference", page_text) &
        grepl("vbg", page_text) &
        grepl("abg", page_text)
    )
    if (!length(rd_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S9 PDF text does not contain the VBG-minus-ABG risk-difference column label."))
    }
    detached_pages <- rd_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("pco2 category", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("percentage|\\bpp\\b", page_text[rd_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S9 risk-difference page(s) lack Outcome, pCO2 category, and percentage-point identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S9 risk-difference columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and pCO2 category identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S10")) {
    rd_pages <- which(
      grepl("risk difference", page_text) &
```
