```{r supplement-artifact-manifest}
        grepl("vbg", page_text) &
        grepl("abg", page_text)
    )
    if (!length(rd_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S10 PDF text does not contain the VBG-minus-ABG risk-difference column label."))
    }
    detached_pages <- rd_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("abg pco2", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("vbg pco2", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("percentage|\\bpp\\b", page_text[rd_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S10 risk-difference page(s) lack Outcome plus ABG/VBG pCO2 and percentage-point identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S10 risk-difference columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and ABG/VBG pCO2 identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S11")) {
    rd_pages <- which(
      grepl("offset", page_text) &
        grepl("flags", page_text) &
        grepl("risk difference|\\brd\\b", page_text)
    )
    if (!length(rd_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S11 PDF text does not contain the risk-difference offset-scan summary columns."))
    }
    detached_pages <- rd_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("offset", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("flags", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("\\bbest\\b", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("mean", page_text[rd_pages]) &
      grepl("\\brd\\b|risk difference", page_text[rd_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S11 offset-summary page(s) lack Outcome, offset, flags, and RD summary identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S11 risk-difference offset-scan columns appear on page(s) with Outcome, offset, flags, and RD summary identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S12")) {
    lr_pages <- which(
      grepl("common baseline odds", page_text) |
        (grepl("baseline", page_text) & grepl("odds", page_text))
    )
    if (!length(lr_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S12 PDF text does not contain common baseline odds."))
    }
    detached_pages <- lr_pages[!grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[lr_pages])]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S12 baseline-odds page(s) lack Outcome identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S12 baseline odds appear on page(s) with Outcome identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S13")) {
    lr_pages <- which(
      grepl("pco2 category", page_text) &
        (grepl("lr ratio", page_text) | grepl("likelihood ratio", page_text))
    )
    if (!length(lr_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S13 PDF text does not contain pCO2 category and likelihood-ratio columns."))
    }
    detached_pages <- lr_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("pco2 category", page_text[lr_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S13 likelihood-ratio page(s) lack Outcome and pCO2 category identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S13 likelihood-ratio columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and pCO2 category identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S14")) {
    lr_pages <- which(
      (grepl("lr ratio", page_text) | grepl("likelihood ratio", page_text)) &
        grepl("abg pco2", page_text) &
        grepl("vbg pco2", page_text)
    )
    if (!length(lr_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S14 PDF text does not contain ABG/VBG pCO2 likelihood-ratio columns."))
    }
    detached_pages <- lr_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("abg pco2", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("vbg pco2", page_text[lr_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S14 likelihood-ratio page(s) lack Outcome plus ABG/VBG pCO2 identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S14 likelihood-ratio columns appear on page(s) with Outcome and ABG/VBG pCO2 identifiers."))
  }
  if (identical(asset_label, "Table S15")) {
    lr_pages <- which(
      grepl("offset", page_text) &
        grepl("flags", page_text) &
        (grepl("lr ratio", page_text) | grepl("log lr", page_text) | grepl("likelihood ratio", page_text))
    )
    if (!length(lr_pages)) {
      return(base_row("FAIL", "Major", "Table S15 PDF text does not contain likelihood-ratio offset-scan summary columns."))
    }
    detached_pages <- lr_pages[!(grepl("\\boutcome\\b", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("offset", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("flags", page_text[lr_pages]) &
      grepl("\\bbest\\b", page_text[lr_pages]))]
    if (length(detached_pages)) {
      return(base_row(
        "FAIL",
        "Major",
        paste0("Table S15 offset-summary page(s) lack Outcome, offset, flags, and best-offset identifiers: ", paste(detached_pages, collapse = ", ")),
        page = detached_pages[[1L]]
      ))
    }
    return(base_row("PASS", "Pass", "Table S15 likelihood-ratio offset-scan columns appear on page(s) with Outcome, offset, flags, and best-offset identifiers."))
  }
  base_row("PASS", "Pass", "No detached-column semantic checks required for this table.")
}

active_table_assets <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$kind == "table")

table_visual_qc <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(active_table_assets)), function(idx) {
  row <- active_table_assets[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  audit_table_pdf_visual(
    asset_label = row$manuscript_label_safe[[1]],
    path = table_pdf_path_for_asset(row)
  )
})

write_csv_safely(table_visual_qc, results_path("table_visual_qc.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

table_visual_qc_summary <- table_visual_qc |>
  dplyr::count(asset_label, status, severity, name = "n_pages") |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$asset_label, dplyr::desc(.data$status))

writeLines(
  c(
    "# Table Visual QC",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Run ID: ", diag_run_id),
    "- Status semantics: FAIL indicates detected page-edge overflow/clipping; WARN indicates close margins requiring manual review.",
    "",
    "## Summary",
    markdown_table(table_visual_qc_summary),
    "",
    "## Page Checks",
    markdown_table(table_visual_qc |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  results_path("table_visual_qc.md"),
  useBytes = TRUE
)

table_visual_status_by_label <- table_visual_qc |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$asset_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    table_visual_fail_n = sum(.data$check_type != "detached_columns" & .data$status == "FAIL", na.rm = TRUE),
    table_visual_warn_n = sum(.data$check_type != "detached_columns" & .data$status == "WARN", na.rm = TRUE),
    table_visual_detail = collapse_unique_text(.data$detail[.data$check_type != "detached_columns" & .data$status != "PASS"]),
    table_detached_fail_n = sum(.data$check_type == "detached_columns" & .data$status == "FAIL", na.rm = TRUE),
    table_detached_warn_n = sum(.data$check_type == "detached_columns" & .data$status == "WARN", na.rm = TRUE),
    table_detached_detail = collapse_unique_text(.data$detail[.data$check_type == "detached_columns" & .data$status != "PASS"]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    table_visual_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$table_visual_fail_n > 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$table_visual_warn_n > 0L ~ "WARN",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    )
  )

ror_figure_interpretability_qc <- tibble::tibble(
  asset_label = c("Figure S9", "Figure S10", "Figure S11", "Figure S12", "Figure S13", "Figure S14"),
  check_name = c(
    "local_interval_nonzero_uncertainty",
    "displayed_metric_highlights",
    "risk_difference_spline_nonzero_uncertainty",
    "risk_difference_displayed_metric_highlights",
    "likelihood_ratio_spline_nonzero_uncertainty",
    "likelihood_ratio_displayed_metric_highlights"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (exists("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc") &&
        all(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (exists("stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc") &&
        all(stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (exists("risk_difference_spline_figure_qc") &&
        all(risk_difference_spline_figure_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (exists("risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc") &&
        all(risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (exists("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc") &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
    if (exists("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc") &&
        all(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc$validation_status == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL"
  ),
  detail = c(
    if (exists("stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc")) paste0(
      "Local interval rows: ", sum(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc$local_interval_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
      "; zero-width CI rows: ", sum(stacked_ror_spline_local_interval_qc$zero_width_ci_n, na.rm = TRUE), "."
    ) else "Local interval QC object missing.",
    if (exists("stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc")) paste(stacked_ror_offset_scan_display_qc$detail, collapse = " | ") else "Offset display QC object missing.",
    if (exists("risk_difference_spline_figure_qc")) paste0(
      "Risk-difference readout rows: ", sum(risk_difference_spline_figure_qc$readout_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
      "; zero-width CI rows: ", sum(risk_difference_spline_figure_qc$zero_width_ci_n, na.rm = TRUE), "."
    ) else "Risk-difference spline QC object missing.",
    if (exists("risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc")) paste(risk_difference_offset_scan_display_qc$detail, collapse = " | ") else "Risk-difference offset display QC object missing.",
    if (exists("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc")) paste0(
      "Likelihood-ratio readout rows: ", sum(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc$readout_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
      "; zero-width CI rows: ", sum(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_spline_figure_qc$zero_width_ci_n, na.rm = TRUE), "."
    ) else "Likelihood-ratio spline QC object missing.",
    if (exists("baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc")) paste(baseline_relative_predicted_odds_offset_scan_display_qc$detail, collapse = " | ") else "Likelihood-ratio offset display QC object missing."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  ror_figure_interpretability_qc,
  results_path("ror_figure_interpretability_qc.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
figure_interpretability_status_by_label <- ror_figure_interpretability_qc |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$asset_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    figure_interpretability_fail_n = sum(.data$status == "FAIL", na.rm = TRUE),
    figure_interpretability_detail = paste(unique(.data$detail), collapse = " | "),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

artifact_status_by_label <- artifact_check_status |>
  dplyr::group_by(manuscript_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    missing_required_n = sum(check_status == "missing_required", na.rm = TRUE),
    present_n = sum(check_status == "present", na.rm = TRUE),
    external_manual_n = sum(check_status == "external_manual_declared", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

glyph_status_by_label <- glyph_audit |>
  dplyr::group_by(manuscript_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    glyph_fail_n = sum(glyph_status == "fail", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

publication_quality_method_pattern <- paste(
  c("MI", "IPSW", "GBM", "crude", "adjusted", "weighted", "cohort",
    "balance", "propensity", "SHAP", "missingness", "inclusion",
    "diagnostic", "spline", "categorical", "prognostic", "likelihood"),
  collapse = "|"
)

publication_quality_severity <- function(present, label_correct, purpose_correct,
                                         caption_self_explanatory, method_labeled,
                                         numbers_match_manifest, render_clean,
                                         no_clipping, no_detached_columns,
                                         no_raw_fields, glyph_safe) {
  if (
    !isTRUE(present) || !isTRUE(label_correct) ||
      !isTRUE(numbers_match_manifest) || !isTRUE(render_clean) ||
      isFALSE(no_raw_fields) || !isTRUE(glyph_safe)
  ) {
    return("Fatal")
  }
  if (
    !isTRUE(purpose_correct) || !isTRUE(caption_self_explanatory) ||
      !isTRUE(method_labeled) || isFALSE(no_clipping) ||
      isFALSE(no_detached_columns)
  ) {
    return("Major")
  }
  "Pass"
}

publication_quality_issue_summary <- function(present, label_correct, purpose_correct,
                                              caption_self_explanatory, method_labeled,
                                              numbers_match_manifest, render_clean,
                                              no_clipping, no_detached_columns,
                                              no_raw_fields, glyph_safe,
                                              raw_fields, table_visual_detail,
                                              table_detached_detail,
                                              figure_interpretability_fail_n,
                                              figure_interpretability_detail) {
  issues <- c(
    if (!isTRUE(present)) "Required artifact output is missing.",
    if (!isTRUE(label_correct)) "Manifest label does not match the numbering slot.",
    if (!isTRUE(purpose_correct)) "Title, source family, or purpose metadata is incomplete.",
    if (!isTRUE(caption_self_explanatory)) "Caption/title text may not be self-explanatory.",
    if (!isTRUE(method_labeled)) "Method or analysis family is not clearly labeled.",
    if (!isTRUE(numbers_match_manifest)) "Manifest count, label, or duplicate checks did not reconcile.",
    if (!isTRUE(render_clean)) "Registry, glyph, duplicate, or file-presence checks were not clean.",
    if (isFALSE(no_clipping)) paste0("Table visual QC detected page-boundary overflow/clipping. ", table_visual_detail),
    if (isFALSE(no_detached_columns)) paste0("Table semantic QC detected detached estimate columns. ", table_detached_detail),
    if (figure_interpretability_fail_n > 0L) paste0("Figure interpretability QC failed. ", figure_interpretability_detail),
    if (isFALSE(no_raw_fields)) paste0("Potential internal table fields detected: ", raw_fields),
    if (!isTRUE(glyph_safe)) "Unsafe manuscript glyph text detected."
  )
  issues <- issues[nzchar(issues)]
  if (!length(issues)) {
    return("No objective automated issue detected; manual visual review remains required for clipping, grayscale safety, and readability.")
  }
  paste(issues, collapse = " ")
}

publication_quality_fix <- function(severity, issue_summary) {
  if (identical(severity, "Pass")) {
    return("No automated fix required; complete manual visual review with the checklist.")
  }
  paste0("Fix the automated audit issue and rerender before circulation. Evidence: ", issue_summary)
}

duplicate_conflict_present <- any(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict", na.rm = TRUE)

publication_quality_asset_audit <- active_manuscript_assets |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    artifact_status_by_label,
    by = c("manuscript_label_safe" = "manuscript_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    glyph_status_by_label,
    by = c("manuscript_label_safe" = "manuscript_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    publication_quality_table_header_audit,
    by = c("manuscript_label_safe" = "manuscript_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    table_visual_status_by_label,
    by = c("manuscript_label_safe" = "asset_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    figure_interpretability_status_by_label,
    by = c("manuscript_label_safe" = "asset_label")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    missing_required_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$missing_required_n, 0L),
    present_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$present_n, 0L),
    external_manual_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$external_manual_n, 0L),
    glyph_fail_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$glyph_fail_n, 0L),
    raw_field_count = dplyr::coalesce(.data$raw_field_count, 0L),
    raw_fields = dplyr::coalesce(.data$raw_fields, ""),
    table_visual_fail_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_visual_fail_n, 0L),
    table_visual_warn_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_visual_warn_n, 0L),
    table_visual_status = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_visual_status, ""),
    table_visual_detail = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_visual_detail, ""),
    table_detached_fail_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_detached_fail_n, 0L),
    table_detached_warn_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_detached_warn_n, 0L),
    table_detached_detail = dplyr::coalesce(.data$table_detached_detail, ""),
    figure_interpretability_fail_n = dplyr::coalesce(.data$figure_interpretability_fail_n, 0L),
    figure_interpretability_detail = dplyr::coalesce(.data$figure_interpretability_detail, ""),
    combined_text = paste(.data$title_safe, .data$caption_safe, .data$notes, .data$analysis_family),
    artifact_path = dplyr::if_else(
      !is.na(.data$alias_artifact_path) & nzchar(.data$alias_artifact_path),
      .data$alias_artifact_path,
      .data$canonical_artifact_path
    ),
    present = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$status == "generated" ~ .data$missing_required_n == 0L & .data$present_n > 0L,
      .data$status == "external/manual" ~ .data$external_manual_n > 0L,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    label_correct = .data$manuscript_label_safe == .data$numbering_slot,
    purpose_correct = nzchar(.data$title_safe) & nzchar(.data$analysis_family),
    caption_self_explanatory = nzchar(.data$caption_safe) & nchar(.data$caption_safe) >= 30L,
    method_labeled = grepl(publication_quality_method_pattern, .data$combined_text, ignore.case = TRUE),
    numbers_match_manifest = .data$missing_required_n == 0L &
      .data$label_correct & !duplicate_conflict_present,
    render_clean = .data$missing_required_n == 0L &
      .data$glyph_fail_n == 0L &
      .data$figure_interpretability_fail_n == 0L &
      !duplicate_conflict_present,
    no_clipping = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$kind != "table" ~ NA,
      .data$table_visual_status == "FAIL" ~ FALSE,
      .data$table_visual_status == "PASS" ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ NA
    ),
    no_detached_columns = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$kind != "table" ~ TRUE,
      .data$table_detached_fail_n > 0L ~ FALSE,
      .data$table_detached_warn_n > 0L ~ NA,
      TRUE ~ TRUE
    ),
    no_raw_fields = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$kind != "table" ~ TRUE,
      .data$raw_field_count == 0L ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    glyph_safe = .data$glyph_fail_n == 0L,
    grayscale_safe = NA,
    pilot_full_status_clear = TRUE
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    severity = mapply(
      publication_quality_severity,
      .data$present,
      .data$label_correct,
      .data$purpose_correct,
      .data$caption_self_explanatory,
      .data$method_labeled,
      .data$numbers_match_manifest,
      .data$render_clean,
      .data$no_clipping,
      .data$no_detached_columns,
      .data$no_raw_fields,
      .data$glyph_safe,
      USE.NAMES = FALSE
    ),
    issue_summary = mapply(
      publication_quality_issue_summary,
      .data$present,
      .data$label_correct,
      .data$purpose_correct,
      .data$caption_self_explanatory,
      .data$method_labeled,
      .data$numbers_match_manifest,
      .data$render_clean,
      .data$no_clipping,
      .data$no_detached_columns,
      .data$no_raw_fields,
      .data$glyph_safe,
      .data$raw_fields,
      .data$table_visual_detail,
      .data$table_detached_detail,
      .data$figure_interpretability_fail_n,
      .data$figure_interpretability_detail,
      USE.NAMES = FALSE
    ),
    recommended_fix = mapply(
      publication_quality_fix,
      .data$severity,
      .data$issue_summary,
      USE.NAMES = FALSE
    ),
    manual_review_needed = is.na(.data$no_clipping) |
      is.na(.data$no_detached_columns) |
      is.na(.data$no_raw_fields) |
      is.na(.data$grayscale_safe),
    resolved = .data$severity == "Pass" & !.data$manual_review_needed
  ) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    asset_label = .data$manuscript_label_safe,
    asset_title = .data$title_safe,
    asset_type = .data$kind,
    expected_location = paste(.data$section, dplyr::if_else(.data$pdf_display, "manuscript_pdf", "artifact_only"), sep = "::"),
    artifact_path = .data$artifact_path,
    present = .data$present,
    label_correct = .data$label_correct,
    purpose_correct = .data$purpose_correct,
    caption_self_explanatory = .data$caption_self_explanatory,
    method_labeled = .data$method_labeled,
    numbers_match_manifest = .data$numbers_match_manifest,
    render_clean = .data$render_clean,
    no_clipping = .data$no_clipping,
    no_detached_columns = .data$no_detached_columns,
    no_raw_fields = .data$no_raw_fields,
    glyph_safe = .data$glyph_safe,
    grayscale_safe = .data$grayscale_safe,
    pilot_full_status_clear = .data$pilot_full_status_clear,
    severity = .data$severity,
    issue_summary = .data$issue_summary,
    recommended_fix = .data$recommended_fix,
    resolved = .data$resolved
  )

write_csv_safely(
  publication_quality_asset_audit,
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

publication_quality_status <- if (
  any(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity %in% c("Fatal", "Major"))
) {
  "FAIL"
} else if (
  any(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == "Minor") ||
    any(!publication_quality_asset_audit$resolved)
) {
  "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS"
} else {
  "PASS"
}

publication_quality_manual_review_n <- sum(
  publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == "Pass" &
    !publication_quality_asset_audit$resolved,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

publication_quality_asset_audit_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  severity = c("Fatal", "Major", "Minor", "Pass", "Manual Review"),
  n_assets = vapply(
    c("Fatal", "Major", "Minor", "Pass", "Manual Review"),
    function(level) {
      if (identical(level, "Manual Review")) {
        return(publication_quality_manual_review_n)
      }
      sum(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == level, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    integer(1L)
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$severity %in% c("Fatal", "Major") & .data$n_assets > 0L ~ "FAIL",
      .data$severity == "Minor" & .data$n_assets > 0L ~ "WARN",
      .data$severity == "Manual Review" & .data$n_assets > 0L ~ "REVIEW_NEEDED",
      TRUE ~ "PASS"
    ),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  ) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    tibble::tibble(
      severity = "Overall",
      n_assets = nrow(publication_quality_asset_audit),
      status = publication_quality_status,
      run_id = diag_run_id,
      run_ts = diag_run_ts
    )
  )

write_csv_safely(
  publication_quality_asset_audit_summary,
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

publication_quality_new_ror_assets <- publication_quality_asset_audit |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$asset_label %in% c(
    "Table S7", "Figure S9", "Table S8", "Figure S10",
    "Table S9", "Table S10", "Figure S11", "Table S11", "Figure S12",
    "Table S12", "Table S13", "Table S14", "Figure S13", "Table S15", "Figure S14"
  ))
write_markdown_report(
  c(
    "# Publication Quality Asset Audit",
    "",
    paste0("- Run mode: ", RUN_MODE),
    paste0("- Pilot fraction: ", PILOT_FRAC),
    paste0("- Overall status: ", publication_quality_status),
    "",
    "## Summary",
    markdown_table(publication_quality_asset_audit_summary),
    "",
    "## New Manuscript-Facing ROR, Risk-Difference, Likelihood-Ratio, And Offset-Scan Outputs",
    markdown_table(publication_quality_new_ror_assets |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))),
    "",
    "## All Assets",
    markdown_table(publication_quality_asset_audit |> dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character)))
  ),
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit.md")
)

validation_static_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c(
    "artifact_registry",
    "external_manual_assets",
    "glyph_audit",
    "duplicate_audit",
    "artifact_existence",
    "manuscript_display",
    "manuscript_asset_sync_audit",
    "publication_quality_asset_audit"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required")) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    if (any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "external_manual_declared")) "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS" else "PASS",
    if (any(glyph_audit$glyph_status == "fail")) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    if (any(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict")) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    if (any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required")) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    if (
      any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required") ||
      any(glyph_audit$glyph_status == "fail") ||
        any(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict")
    ) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    if (any(manuscript_asset_sync_audit$status == "FAIL")) "FAIL" else "PASS",
    publication_quality_status
  ),
  detail = c(
    paste0(sum(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required"), " missing required generated artifact rows."),
    paste0(sum(artifact_check_status$check_status == "external_manual_declared"), " declared external/manual rows."),
    paste0(sum(glyph_audit$glyph_status == "fail"), " unsafe manuscript glyph rows."),
    paste0(sum(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict"), " conflicting duplicate/numbering rows."),
    paste0(sum(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required"), " required canonical or alias artifacts missing."),
    "Manuscript-display status before post-render PDF text scan; wrapper postflight performs the final PDF-level check.",
    paste0(sum(manuscript_asset_sync_audit$status == "FAIL"), " manuscript asset synchronization failures."),
    paste0(
      sum(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == "Fatal"), " fatal / ",
      sum(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == "Major"), " major / ",
      sum(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity == "Minor"), " minor publication-quality automated issues; ",
      publication_quality_manual_review_n, " assets still require manual visual review."
    )
  )
)

validation_static_failures <- c(
  if (nrow(numbering_conflicts)) paste0("Conflicting active numbering slots: ", collapse_unique_text(numbering_conflicts$numbering_slot)),
  if (nrow(alias_conflicts)) paste0("Conflicting manuscript alias stubs: ", collapse_unique_text(alias_conflicts$alias_stub)),
  if (nrow(canonical_conflicts)) paste0("Conflicting canonical artifact stubs: ", collapse_unique_text(canonical_conflicts$canonical_stub)),
  if (nrow(canonical_path_conflicts)) paste0("Conflicting canonical artifact paths: ", collapse_unique_text(canonical_path_conflicts$canonical_artifact_path)),
  if (nrow(alias_path_conflicts)) paste0("Conflicting manuscript alias paths: ", collapse_unique_text(alias_path_conflicts$alias_artifact_path)),
  if (nrow(label_output_conflicts)) paste0("Labels mapped to multiple output path pairs: ", collapse_unique_text(label_output_conflicts$manuscript_label_safe)),
  if (nrow(output_label_conflicts)) paste0("Output paths mapped to multiple labels: ", collapse_unique_text(output_label_conflicts$output_path)),
  if (nrow(deprecated_numbering_conflicts)) "Deprecated Figure 3 remained active in the validation registry.",
  if (any(glyph_audit$glyph_status == "fail")) "Unsafe manuscript glyphs remained after normalization.",
  if (any(artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required")) paste0(
    "Missing required generated artifacts: ",
    collapse_unique_text(artifact_check_status$artifact_path[artifact_check_status$check_status == "missing_required"])
  ),
  if (any(duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict")) paste0(
    "Duplicate audit conflicts: ",
    collapse_unique_text(duplicate_asset_audit$audit_key[duplicate_asset_audit$status == "conflict"])
  ),
  if (any(manuscript_asset_sync_audit$status == "FAIL")) paste0(
    "Manuscript asset sync failures: ",
    collapse_unique_text(manuscript_asset_sync_audit$check[manuscript_asset_sync_audit$status == "FAIL"])
  ),
  if (any(publication_quality_asset_audit$severity %in% c("Fatal", "Major"))) paste0(
    "Publication-quality automated audit failures: ",
    collapse_unique_text(publication_quality_asset_audit$asset_label[
      publication_quality_asset_audit$severity %in% c("Fatal", "Major")
    ])
  )
)

if (length(validation_static_failures)) {
  stop(
    "Validation registry checks failed: ",
    paste(validation_static_failures, collapse = " | ")
  )
}
```

```{r manuscript-facing-display}
#| code-block-title: "Manuscript-facing figure and table helpers"
#| include: true
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
#| message: false
# Purpose: define the canonical manuscript-facing display helpers used later in the validation section.
manifest_row <- function(label) {
  row <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
    dplyr::filter(manuscript_label_safe == safe_manuscript_text(label))
  if (nrow(row) != 1L) stop("Expected exactly one manifest row for ", label)
  row
}

manuscript_asset_is_active <- function(label) {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  identical(row$pdf_display[[1]], TRUE)
}

# helper: resolve the display-ready figure path for one manifest label.
# LaTeX/PDF renders must fail fast if the manuscript PDF artifact is missing.
manifest_figure_path <- function(label) {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  ext <- if (knitr::is_latex_output()) "pdf" else "png"
  stub <- if (!is.na(row$alias_stub) && nzchar(row$alias_stub)) row$alias_stub else row$canonical_stub
  subdir <- if (!is.na(row$alias_subdir) && nzchar(row$alias_subdir)) row$alias_subdir else row$canonical_subdir
  path <- artifact_file_path(stub, ext, subdir)
  if (knitr::is_latex_output() && !file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Missing PDF display artifact for ", label, ": ", path)
  }
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Missing display artifact for ", label, ": ", path)
  path
}

manuscript_figure_notes <- list(
  "Figure 2" = key_results_caption_main,
  "Figure S4" = key_results_cat3_caption_main,
  "Figure S5" = key_results_caption_adjusted,
  "Figure S9" = paste(
    "Local interval readouts compare a 5 mmHg increase in ABG pCO2 with the paired 5 mmHg increase in VBG pCO2 5 mmHg higher.",
    "The y-axis is the local VBG/ABG ratio of odds ratios from stacked weighted spline interaction models pooled on the log scale.",
    "Values near 1 indicate similar local association strength by modality and are not paired-test agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority tests."
  ),
  "Figure S10" = paste(
    "The offset scan is exploratory and uses point estimates from the same stacked weighted spline models.",
    "The weighted geometric mean ROR panel describes the average signed association-strength ratio; the primary criterion panel shows support-weighted mean absolute log ROR, where lower values indicate closer pointwise parity.",
    "Highlighted points match the metric displayed in each panel, and the primary best offset may differ from the geometric-mean closest-to-1 offset because signed log deviations can cancel.",
    "The scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction and is not an agreement, equivalence, or noninferiority analysis."
  ),
  "Figure S11" = paste(
    "Spline risk-difference readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG pCO2 value 5 mmHg higher.",
    "The y-axis is the common-source marginal standardized VBG predicted risk minus ABG predicted risk in percentage points.",
    "Intervals are pooled on the risk-difference scale using Rubin's rules and are not obtained by subtracting printed confidence limits.",
    "These descriptive standardized risk differences are not agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration tests."
  ),
  "Figure S12" = paste(
    "The offset scan is exploratory and uses point estimates from the same common-source marginal standardized spline prediction functions.",
    "The signed mean panel can differ from the primary mean-absolute-RD panel because positive and negative risk differences can cancel.",
    "Highlighted points match the metric displayed in each panel.",
    "The scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction and is not an agreement, equivalence, noninferiority, or calibration analysis."
  ),
  "Figure S13" = paste(
    "Likelihood ratios are pCO2-conditioned predicted outcome odds divided by the common weighted target-population baseline odds for that outcome.",
    "Spline readouts pair each ABG pCO2 value with a VBG value 5 mmHg higher.",
    "Values above 1 indicate higher predicted outcome odds than the common baseline; values below 1 indicate lower predicted outcome odds."
  ),
  "Figure S14" = paste(
    "The offset scan is exploratory and uses point estimates from the same standardized spline prediction functions used for the likelihood-ratio readouts.",
    "The weighted geometric mean LR-ratio panel describes the average signed ratio; the primary criterion panel shows support-weighted mean absolute log LR ratio, where lower values indicate closer pointwise parity.",
    "Highlighted points match the metric displayed in each panel, and the scan does not redefine the prespecified 5 mmHg correction."
  )
)

# helper: render explanatory manuscript notes as Quarto text below figures
# instead of embedding long text inside the plot canvas.
render_manuscript_note <- function(label) {
  note <- manuscript_figure_notes[[label]]
  if (is.null(note) || !nzchar(note)) return("")
  note <- paste0("Note: ", note)
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    return(paste0(
      "\\par\\vspace{0.5em}\\noindent\\footnotesize ",
      latex_safe_table_text(escape_latex_text(note)),
      "\\normalsize"
    ))
  }
  paste0("*", note, "*")
}

# helper: insert one manifest-registered figure into the rendered notebook in
# official manuscript order, independent of generation chunk order.
render_manuscript_figure <- function(label, width = "0.88\\linewidth", height = "0.82\\textheight") {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  fig_path <- manifest_figure_path(label)
  caption_text <- row$caption_safe[[1]]
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    latex_caption <- escape_latex_text(caption_text)
    latex_path <- display_path(fig_path)
    out <- c(
      "\\clearpage",
      "\\begin{center}",
      "\\begin{minipage}{\\linewidth}",
      "\\centering",
      sprintf("\\small %s\\par", latex_caption),
      "\\vspace{0.5em}",
      sprintf("\\includegraphics[width=%s,height=%s,keepaspectratio]{%s}", width, height, latex_path),
      render_manuscript_note(label),
      "\\end{minipage}",
      "\\end{center}"
    )
    knitr::asis_output(paste(out, collapse = "\n"))
  } else {
    knitr::asis_output(
      paste0("![](", display_path(fig_path), ")\n\n*", caption_text, "*\n\n", render_manuscript_note(label), "\n")
    )
  }
}

# helper: render one manifest-registered table with its manuscript label and
# title while reusing the standard standalone-table path.
render_manifest_table <- function(label, df, file_stub, wide = FALSE, digits = 2,
                                  max_cols = 6, landscape = NULL,
                                  note = NULL) {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  render_table_pdf(
    df,
    caption = row$title_safe[[1]],
    file_stub = file_stub,
    wide = wide,
    digits = digits,
    max_cols = max_cols,
    landscape = landscape,
    display_label = label,
    caption_mode = "plain",
    page_break_before = TRUE,
    note = note
  )
}

render_manifest_panel_table <- function(label, panels, file_stub, digits = 2,
                                        landscape = TRUE, csv_df = NULL,
                                        panel_page_breaks = FALSE,
                                        scale_down = TRUE,
                                        font_size = 7,
                                        longtable = FALSE,
                                        column_widths = NULL,
                                        note = NULL) {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  render_panel_table_pdf(
    panels,
    caption = row$title_safe[[1]],
    file_stub = file_stub,
    digits = digits,
    display_label = label,
    landscape = landscape,
    page_break_before = TRUE,
    csv_df = csv_df,
    panel_page_breaks = panel_page_breaks,
    scale_down = scale_down,
    font_size = font_size,
    longtable = longtable,
    column_widths = column_widths,
    note = note
  )
}

render_manifest_definition_table <- function(label, panels, file_stub,
                                             csv_df = NULL,
                                             panel_page_breaks = TRUE) {
  row <- manifest_row(label)
  render_definition_table_pdf(
    panels,
    caption = row$title_safe[[1]],
    file_stub = file_stub,
    display_label = label,
    csv_df = csv_df,
    page_break_before = TRUE,
    panel_page_breaks = panel_page_breaks
  )
}

render_validation_manuscript_assets <- function() {
  as_asis_text <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return("")
    paste(as.character(x), collapse = "\n")
  }

  blocks <- list(
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure 1"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure 2", width = "0.98\\linewidth", height = "0.88\\textheight"),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table 1",
      tbl1_combined_csv,
      file_stub = "table1_combined",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 2,
      max_cols = 8,
      landscape = TRUE
    ),
    render_manifest_panel_table(
      "Table 2",
      table_2_weighted_display_panels,
      file_stub = "table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes",
      digits = 2,
      landscape = TRUE,
      csv_df = table_2_weighted_categorical_outcomes
    ),
    render_manifest_definition_table(
      "Table S1",
      table_s1_display_panels,
      file_stub = "table_s1_inclusion_criteria",
      csv_df = table_s1_inclusion_criteria,
      panel_page_breaks = TRUE
    ),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S1"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S2"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S3"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S4"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S5"),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S2",
      table_s2_crude_threelevel,
      file_stub = "table_s2_crude_threelevel",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 2
    ),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S3",
      table_s3_gbm_threelevel,
      file_stub = "table_s3_gbm_threelevel",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 2
    ),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S6"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S7"),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S8"),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S4",
      table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis,
      file_stub = "table_s4_missingness_primary_analysis",
      wide = FALSE,
      digits = 1,
      max_cols = 7,
      landscape = TRUE
    ),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S5",
      table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary,
      file_stub = "table_s5_mi_diagnostic_summary",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 3,
      max_cols = 4,
      landscape = TRUE
    ),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S6",
      table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3,
      file_stub = "table_s6_stacked_ror_cat3",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 2,
      max_cols = 5,
      landscape = TRUE,
      note = ror_table_s6_note
    ),
    render_manifest_panel_table(
      "Table S7",
      table_s7_panels,
      file_stub = "table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm",
      digits = 2,
      landscape = TRUE,
      csv_df = table_s7_stacked_ror_spline_readouts_5mm,
      panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
      scale_down = TRUE,
      font_size = 7,
      column_widths = c(
        "Outcome" = "0.9in",
        "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.75in",
        "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.75in",
        "ABG OR (95% CI)" = "1.15in",
        "VBG OR (95% CI)" = "1.15in",
        "VBG/ABG ROR (95% CI)" = "1.25in"
      ),
      note = ror_table_s7_note
    ),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S9"),
    render_manifest_panel_table(
      "Table S8",
      table_s8_panels,
      file_stub = "table_s8_offset_scan_summary",
      digits = 3,
      landscape = TRUE,
      csv_df = table_s8_offset_scan_summary,
      panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
      scale_down = TRUE,
	      font_size = 6.5,
	      column_widths = c(
	        "Outcome" = "0.85in",
	        "Offset" = "0.45in",
	        "Geom mean ROR" = "0.75in",
	        "|log geom ROR|" = "0.75in",
	        "Mean |log ROR|" = "0.75in",
	        "RMSE log ROR" = "0.65in",
	        "Support" = "0.58in",
	        "Grid n" = "0.42in",
	        "Flags" = "1.35in"
	      ),
	      note = ror_table_s8_note
	    ),
    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S10"),
    render_manifest_table(
      "Table S9",
      table_s9_category_risk_differences,
      file_stub = "table_s9_category_risk_differences",
      wide = TRUE,
      digits = 1,
      max_cols = 5,
      landscape = TRUE,
      note = risk_difference_table_note
    ),
    render_manifest_panel_table(
      "Table S10",
      table_s10_panels,
      file_stub = "table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm",
      digits = 1,
      landscape = TRUE,
      csv_df = table_s10_spline_risk_difference_readouts_5mm,
      panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
      scale_down = TRUE,
      font_size = 7,
      column_widths = c(
        "Outcome" = "0.9in",
        "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.65in",
        "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.65in",
        "ABG risk, % (95% CI)" = "1.05in",
        "VBG risk, % (95% CI)" = "1.05in",
        "VBG - ABG risk difference, pp (95% CI)" = "1.35in"
      ),
      note = risk_difference_table_s10_note
    ),
	    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S11"),
	    render_manifest_panel_table(
	      "Table S11",
      table_s11_panels,
      file_stub = "table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference",
      digits = 2,
      landscape = TRUE,
      csv_df = table_s11_offset_scan_risk_difference,
      panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
      scale_down = TRUE,
	      font_size = 6.5,
	      column_widths = c(
	        "Outcome" = "0.8in",
	        "Offset" = "0.45in",
	        "Mean RD, pp" = "0.7in",
	        "Mean |RD|, pp" = "0.72in",
	        "RMSE RD, pp" = "0.65in",
	        "Support" = "0.58in",
	        "Grid n" = "0.42in",
	        "Flags" = "1.45in"
	      ),
		      note = risk_difference_table_s11_note
		    ),
	    render_manuscript_figure("Figure S12")
	  )

  if (manuscript_asset_is_active("Table S12")) {
    blocks <- c(
      blocks,
      list(
        render_manifest_table(
          "Table S12",
          internal_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds,
          file_stub = "table_s12_baseline_outcome_rates_and_odds",
          wide = TRUE,
          digits = 2,
          max_cols = 12,
          landscape = TRUE,
          note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
        ),
        render_manifest_table(
          "Table S13",
          internal_categorical_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
          file_stub = "table_s13_categorical_likelihood_ratios",
          wide = TRUE,
          digits = 2,
          max_cols = 7,
          landscape = TRUE,
          note = likelihood_ratio_table_note
        ),
        render_manifest_panel_table(
          "Table S14",
          internal_bro_spline_panels,
          file_stub = "table_s14_spline_likelihood_ratios_5mm",
          digits = 2,
          landscape = TRUE,
          csv_df = internal_spline_baseline_relative_predicted_odds_5mm,
          panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
          scale_down = TRUE,
          font_size = 6.5,
          column_widths = c(
            "Outcome" = "0.75in",
            "ABG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
            "VBG pCO2 (mmHg)" = "0.58in",
            "ABG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
            "ABG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
            "VBG risk, % (95% CI)" = "0.85in",
            "VBG LR (95% CI)" = "0.95in",
            "VBG/ABG LR ratio (95% CI)" = "0.95in"
          ),
          note = internal_bro_spline_note
        ),
        render_manuscript_figure("Figure S13"),
        render_manifest_panel_table(
          "Table S15",
          internal_bro_offset_scan_panels,
          file_stub = "table_s15_offset_scan_likelihood_ratio",
          digits = 3,
          landscape = TRUE,
          csv_df = internal_offset_scan_baseline_relative_predicted_odds,
          panel_page_breaks = TRUE,
          scale_down = TRUE,
          font_size = 6.5,
          column_widths = c(
            "Outcome" = "0.8in",
            "Offset" = "0.45in",
            "Geom mean LR ratio" = "0.75in",
            "Mean |log LR ratio|" = "0.75in",
            "RMSE log LR ratio" = "0.68in",
            "Support" = "0.58in",
            "Grid n" = "0.42in",
            "Flags" = "1.35in"
          ),
          note = internal_bro_offset_note
        ),
        render_manuscript_figure("Figure S14")
      )
    )
  }

  block_text <- vapply(blocks, as_asis_text, character(1L))
  block_text <- block_text[nzchar(trimws(block_text))]
  knitr::asis_output(paste(block_text, collapse = "\n\n"))
}
```

```{r manuscript-output-display}
#| code-block-title: "Manuscript-facing figures and tables"
#| echo: false
#| results: "asis"
#| message: false
# Purpose: render manuscript-facing scientific figures and tables without
# mixing in QA/provenance validation pages.
render_validation_manuscript_assets()
```

```{r manuscript-asset-audit}
#| code-block-title: "Manuscript-facing asset audit data"
#| include: false
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: keep the compact manuscript-facing asset audit available for the final validation section.
invisible(manuscript_asset_audit)
```

```{r supplement-artifact-assertions}
#| include: false
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Purpose: verify manuscript-facing artifacts are present and numbering stays harmonized.
required_manifest_files <- c(
  results_path("manuscript_asset_manifest.csv"),
  results_path("supplement_manifest.csv"),
  results_path("artifact_provenance_manifest.csv"),
  results_path("artifact_check_status.csv"),
  results_path("artifact_check_missing.csv"),
  results_path("canonical_asset_registry.csv"),
  results_path("internal_debug_asset_registry.csv"),
  results_path("manuscript_sync_report.md"),
  results_path("manuscript_asset_sync_audit.csv"),
  results_path("manuscript_asset_sync_audit.md"),
  results_path("glyph_audit.csv"),
  results_path("duplicate_asset_audit.csv"),
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit.csv"),
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit_summary.csv"),
  results_path("publication_quality_asset_audit.md"),
  results_path("poster_visual_qc.md"),
  results_path("poster_caption_text.md"),
  results_path("README_CURRENT_RENDER.md"),
  results_path("table_visual_qc.csv"),
  results_path("table_visual_qc.md"),
  results_path("figure2_probability_standardization_audit.md"),
  results_path("gbm_probability_standardization_audit.md")
)

generated_manifest_files <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::filter(status == "generated") |>
  (\(df) c(df$canonical_artifact_file, df$alias_artifact_file))() |>
  (\(paths) paths[!is.na(paths) & nzchar(paths)])() |>
  unique()

missing_manifest_files <- c(
  required_manifest_files[!file.exists(required_manifest_files)],
  generated_manifest_files[!file.exists(generated_manifest_files)]
) |>
  unique()

supplement_manifest_expected <- manuscript_asset_manifest_internal |>
  dplyr::filter(section == "supplement", .data$pdf_display) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    supp_label = manuscript_label_safe,
    title = title_safe,
    analysis_family = analysis_family,
    artifact_path = alias_artifact_path,
    chunk_name = chunk_label,
    notes = notes
  )

supplement_manifest_actual <- utils::read.csv(
  results_path("supplement_manifest.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  na.strings = character()
)
supplement_manifest_compare_cols <- c(
  "supp_label", "title", "artifact_path", "chunk_name", "notes"
)
# helper: coerce manifest tables into a stable all-character form before
# comparison so NA handling and tibble/data.frame differences do not create
# false assertion failures.
normalize_manifest_strings <- function(df) {
  tibble::as_tibble(df) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(
        dplyr::everything(),
        ~ dplyr::if_else(is.na(.x), "", as.character(.x))
      )
    )
}
supplement_manifest_analysis_family_ok <- "analysis_family" %in% names(supplement_manifest_actual) &&
  all(nzchar(as.character(supplement_manifest_actual$analysis_family)))
supplement_manifest_matches <- supplement_manifest_analysis_family_ok && all(
  supplement_manifest_compare_cols %in% names(supplement_manifest_actual)
) && identical(
  normalize_manifest_strings(dplyr::select(supplement_manifest_expected, dplyr::all_of(supplement_manifest_compare_cols))),
  normalize_manifest_strings(supplement_manifest_actual) |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(supplement_manifest_compare_cols))
)

figure_3_aliases <- list.files(
  results_path("figs"),
  pattern = "^figure_3([._]|$)",
  full.names = TRUE
)

has_generated_s1 <- any(
  manuscript_asset_manifest_internal$manuscript_label_safe == "Table S1" &
    manuscript_asset_manifest_internal$status == "generated" &
    manuscript_asset_manifest_internal$pdf_display
)

forbidden_duplicate_files <- c(results_path("figs", "propensity-histograms-conditional-1.png"))
existing_forbidden_duplicates <- forbidden_duplicate_files[file.exists(forbidden_duplicate_files)]

if (
  length(missing_manifest_files) ||
  !supplement_manifest_matches ||
  length(figure_3_aliases) ||
  !has_generated_s1 ||
  length(existing_forbidden_duplicates)
) {
  missing_pretty <- vapply(missing_manifest_files, pretty_path, character(1L))
  duplicate_pretty <- vapply(existing_forbidden_duplicates, pretty_path, character(1L))
  figure3_pretty <- vapply(figure_3_aliases, pretty_path, character(1L))
  stop(
    "Manuscript asset check failed: missing files [",
    paste(missing_pretty, collapse = ", "),
    "]; supplement manifest matches [", supplement_manifest_matches,
    "]; Figure 3 aliases [", paste(figure3_pretty, collapse = ", "),
    "]; Table S1 generated [", has_generated_s1,
    "]; forbidden duplicates [", paste(duplicate_pretty, collapse = ", "),
    "]."
  )
}
```

```{r diagnostics-inputs}
#| include: false
# Purpose: diagnostics inputs.
stopifnot(gbm_params$stop.method == "smd.max")
stopifnot(exists("M_IMP"), exists("MAXIT_MI"), exists("MI_SEED"))
stopifnot(exists("imp"))
stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"), exists("mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list"))
meth <- imp$method

diag_fig_dir <- results_path("figs")
fs::dir_create(diag_fig_dir)
```

```{r diagnostics-missingness}
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: diagnostics missingness.

extra_miss_vars <- intersect(c("bnp", "spo2"), names(subset_data_raw))
miss_vars <- intersect(
  c(covars_ps, extra_miss_vars, "paco2", "vbg_co2", "vbg_o2sat",
    "imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure"),
  names(subset_data_raw)
)

miss_overall <- subset_data_raw |>
  summarise(across(all_of(miss_vars), ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing_overall") |>
  arrange(desc(pct_missing_overall))

miss_overall_file <- results_path("diagnostics_missingness.csv")
write_csv_safely(miss_overall, miss_overall_file, row_names = FALSE)

miss_by_strata <- bind_rows(
  subset_data_raw |>
    group_by(has_abg) |>
    summarise(across(all_of(miss_vars), ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100), .groups = "drop") |>
    pivot_longer(-has_abg, names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing") |>
    mutate(stratum = "has_abg", level = as.character(has_abg)) |>
    select(stratum, level, variable, pct_missing),
  subset_data_raw |>
    group_by(has_vbg) |>
    summarise(across(all_of(miss_vars), ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100), .groups = "drop") |>
    pivot_longer(-has_vbg, names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing") |>
    mutate(stratum = "has_vbg", level = as.character(has_vbg)) |>
    select(stratum, level, variable, pct_missing)
)

miss_by_strata_file <- results_path("diagnostics_missingness-by-strata.csv")
write_csv_safely(miss_by_strata, miss_by_strata_file, row_names = FALSE)

md_fig_file <- results_path("figs", "diag-mi-missingness-pattern.png")
grDevices::png(md_fig_file, width = 1800, height = 1200, res = 200)
mice::md.pattern(imp$data, plot = TRUE)
grDevices::dev.off()

if (nrow(miss_overall) > 0) {
  top_vars <- miss_overall |>
    slice_head(n = min(20, nrow(miss_overall))) |>
    pull(variable)
  miss_sample <- subset_data_raw |>
    select(all_of(top_vars)) |>
    slice_sample(n = min(1000, nrow(subset_data_raw)))

  p_miss <- naniar::vis_miss(miss_sample, sort_miss = TRUE) +
    theme_pub(base_size = 10) +
    labs(title = "Missingness heatmap (top 20 variables)")
  save_diag_plot(p_miss, results_path("figs", "diag-mi-missingness-heatmap.png"),
                 width = 10, height = 6)
}
```

<!-- MI convergence and mixing diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-mi-convergence}
#| include: false
# Purpose: diagnostics mi convergence.
stopifnot(exists("imp"))

log_events_summary_file <- results_path("mice_logged_events_summary.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(log_events_summary_file))
log_events_summary <- tryCatch(
  utils::read.csv(log_events_summary_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  error = function(e) data.frame()
)
if (nrow(log_events_summary) && !("empty" %in% names(log_events_summary) && all(log_events_summary$empty))) {
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    log_events_summary,
    caption = "Logged events (MI)",
    file_stub = "mice_logged_events_summary",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )

  stopifnot(all(c("variable", "n") %in% names(log_events_summary)))
  total_events <- sum(log_events_summary$n, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(total_events) && total_events > 1000) {
    warning("MI loggedEvents count is high (", total_events, "). Review mice_logged_events_summary.csv.", call. = FALSE)
  }
  by_var <- log_events_summary |>
    dplyr::group_by(variable) |>
    dplyr::summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n))
  if (nrow(by_var) && is.finite(total_events) && total_events > 0) {
    top_share <- by_var$n[1] / total_events
    if (top_share > 0.5) {
      warning("MI loggedEvents dominated by variable '", by_var$variable[1],
              "' (", round(100 * top_share, 1), "% of events).", call. = FALSE)
    }
  }
} else {
  message("No logged events to summarize.")
}

stopifnot(exists("chain_diag"))
stopifnot(nrow(chain_diag) > 0)
n_imputed <- chain_diag_stats$n_imputed_vars
n_with_tail <- chain_diag_stats$n_with_drift_tail
message("Chain diagnostics: drift_tail available for ", n_with_tail, " / ", n_imputed, " imputed variables.")
stopifnot("drift_tail_scaled" %in% names(chain_diag))
frac_flagged <- mean(chain_diag$flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
med_scaled <- stats::median(chain_diag$drift_tail_scaled, na.rm = TRUE)
max_scaled <- max(chain_diag$drift_tail_scaled, na.rm = TRUE)
message("Chain diagnostics (scaled): flagged=", round(frac_flagged, 3),
        "; median drift_tail_scaled=", signif(med_scaled, 3),
        "; max drift_tail_scaled=", signif(max_scaled, 3))

top_flagged <- chain_diag |>
  dplyr::filter(flag %in% TRUE) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(drift_tail_scaled)))
if (nrow(top_flagged)) {
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    top_flagged |>
      dplyr::select(variable, method, drift_tail, drift_tail_scaled, slope, slope_scaled,
                    tail_n_finite, tail_window_na_frac, flag_reason),
    caption = "MICE chain diagnostics (flagged drift)",
    file_stub = "mice_chain_diagnostics_flagged",
    digits = 3,
    show = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("No flagged drift in chain diagnostics.")
}

top_tail_na <- chain_diag |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(tail_window_na_frac))
if (nrow(top_tail_na)) {
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    top_tail_na,
    caption = "MICE chain diagnostics (tail NA fraction)",
    file_stub = "mice_chain_diagnostics_tail_na",
    digits = 3,
    show = FALSE
  )
}

trace_vars <- intersect(c("curr_bmi", "serum_hco3", "hr", "sodium", "serum_cr"),
                         names(imp$data))
imp_trace <- imp
if (imp$m > 10) {
  set.seed(MI_SEED)
  idx <- sort(sample(seq_len(imp$m), 10))
  imp_trace$imp <- lapply(imp$imp, function(x) x[, idx, drop = FALSE])
  imp_trace$m <- length(idx)
}

if (length(trace_vars)) {
  tr_file <- results_path("figs", "diag-mi-trace-selected.png")
  grDevices::png(tr_file, width = 1800, height = 1200, res = 200)
  plot(imp_trace, trace_vars)
  grDevices::dev.off()
}

message("Using memory-safe observed vs imputed plots from mi-diagnostics (no mids densityplot/stripplot).")
```

<!-- MI stability diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-mi-stability}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics: MI stability across m"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: diagnostics mi stability.
stopifnot(exists("imp"))
stopifnot(exists("mi_logistic_ps_abg_list"), exists("mi_logistic_ps_vbg_list"))

# helper: trim a `mids` object down to its first `m_keep` imputations for
# stability diagnostics across different values of m.
subset_mids <- function(imp_obj, m_keep) {
  if (imp_obj$m == m_keep) return(imp_obj)
  idx <- seq_len(m_keep)
  imp_new <- imp_obj
  imp_new$imp <- lapply(imp_obj$imp, function(x) x[, idx, drop = FALSE])
  imp_new$m <- m_keep
  imp_new
}

m_vals <- sort(unique(c(20, 50, M_IMP)))
m_vals <- m_vals[m_vals <= imp$m]

med_abg <- median(subset_data$paco2[subset_data$has_abg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data$paco2)], na.rm = TRUE)
med_vbg <- median(subset_data$vbg_co2[subset_data$has_vbg == 1 & !is.na(subset_data$vbg_co2)], na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(med_abg)) med_abg <- ABG_CO2_REF
if (!is.finite(med_vbg)) med_vbg <- VBG_CO2_REF
grid_abg_info_m <- make_co2_grid_ref("paco2", c(med_abg, ABG_CO2_REF), x_ref_abg, ABG_CO2_REF)
grid_vbg_info_m <- make_co2_grid_ref("vbg_co2", c(med_vbg, VBG_CO2_REF), x_ref_vbg, VBG_CO2_REF)
grid_abg_m <- grid_abg_info_m$grid
grid_vbg_m <- grid_vbg_info_m$grid
ref_idx_abg_m <- grid_abg_info_m$ref_idx
ref_idx_vbg_m <- grid_vbg_info_m$ref_idx
med_idx_abg <- match(med_abg, grid_abg_m$paco2)
med_idx_vbg <- match(med_vbg, grid_vbg_m$vbg_co2)
if (is.na(med_idx_abg)) med_idx_abg <- which.min(abs(grid_abg_m$paco2 - med_abg))
if (is.na(med_idx_vbg)) med_idx_vbg <- which.min(abs(grid_vbg_m$vbg_co2 - med_vbg))

stab_rows <- lapply(m_vals, function(mv) {
  imp_m <- subset_mids(imp, mv)
  get_imp_m <- function(i) normalize_types(mice::complete(imp_m, action = i), levels_ref)

  fits_abg <- lapply(seq_len(mv), function(i) {
    d <- get_imp_m(i)
    d <- d[, c("imv_proc", "has_abg", "paco2", adj_core), drop = FALSE]
    tryCatch(
      fit_spline_imp(
        d, get_mi_weight("ABG", i), "imv_proc", "paco2", "has_abg",
        adj_vars = adj_core,
        spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS, grid_df = grid_abg_m,
        ref_idx = ref_idx_abg_m,
        imp_index = i
      ),
      error = function(e) list(error = conditionMessage(e))
    )
  })
  collect_warnings_from_list(fits_abg)
  curve_abg <- pool_spline_curve(fits_abg, grid_abg_m, ref_idx_abg_m, ABG_CO2_REF,
                                 min_ok_frac = 0.9)

  fits_vbg <- lapply(seq_len(mv), function(i) {
    d <- get_imp_m(i)
    d <- d[, c("imv_proc", "has_vbg", "vbg_co2", adj_core), drop = FALSE]
    tryCatch(
      fit_spline_imp(
        d, get_mi_weight("VBG", i), "imv_proc", "vbg_co2", "has_vbg",
        adj_vars = adj_core,
        spline_df = SPLINE_DF, spline_basis = SPLINE_BASIS, grid_df = grid_vbg_m,
        ref_idx = ref_idx_vbg_m,
        imp_index = i
      ),
      error = function(e) list(error = conditionMessage(e))
    )
  })
  collect_warnings_from_list(fits_vbg)
  curve_vbg <- pool_spline_curve(fits_vbg, grid_vbg_m, ref_idx_vbg_m, VBG_CO2_REF,
                                 min_ok_frac = 0.9)

  bind_rows(
    tibble::tibble(group = "ABG", m = mv, OR = curve_abg$OR[med_idx_abg]),
    tibble::tibble(group = "VBG", m = mv, OR = curve_vbg$OR[med_idx_vbg])
  )
})

stab_df <- bind_rows(stab_rows)
ref <- stab_df |> filter(m == max(m_vals)) |> select(group, OR) |> rename(OR_ref = OR)
stab_df <- stab_df |>
  left_join(ref, by = "group") |>
  mutate(abs_diff = OR - OR_ref,
         pct_diff = 100 * (OR - OR_ref) / OR_ref)

stab_file <- results_path("mi_m_stability.csv")
write_csv_safely(stab_df, stab_file, row_names = FALSE)

# FMI / relative efficiency for a representative unweighted model
append_mem_snapshot("diagnostics", "mi_fmi_glm", "pre")
# This diagnostic previously used with(imp, glm(...)) which can materialize large
# completed-data objects. We pool a single coefficient via pool.scalar() instead.
fmi_formula <- imv_proc ~ has_abg + age_at_encounter + sex
fmi_vars <- all.vars(fmi_formula)
qhat <- rep(NA_real_, imp$m)
uhat <- rep(NA_real_, imp$m)
for (i in seq_len(imp$m)) {
  d_i <- mice::complete(imp, action = i)
  d_i <- d_i[, intersect(fmi_vars, names(d_i)), drop = FALSE]
  if (!all(c("imv_proc", "has_abg", "age_at_encounter", "sex") %in% names(d_i))) {
    next
  }
  cap_fit <- capture_warnings(
    glm(
      formula = fmi_formula,
      data = d_i,
      family = binomial(),
      model = FALSE,
      x = FALSE,
      y = FALSE
    ),
    context = make_context(
      stage = "diagnostics",
      component = "mi_fmi_glm",
      analysis_variant = "mi",
      model_type = "glm",
      group = NA_character_,
      outcome = "imv_proc",
      imputation = i,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  append_warnings(cap_fit$warnings)
  fit_i <- cap_fit$value
  if (!is.null(fit_i)) {
    coef_i <- stats::coef(fit_i)
    vcov_i <- tryCatch(stats::vcov(fit_i), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (
      "has_abg" %in% names(coef_i) &&
      !is.null(vcov_i) &&
      "has_abg" %in% rownames(vcov_i) &&
      "has_abg" %in% colnames(vcov_i)
    ) {
      qhat[i] <- unname(coef_i[["has_abg"]])
      uhat[i] <- unname(vcov_i["has_abg", "has_abg"])
    }
  }
  rm(list = intersect(c("d_i", "cap_fit", "fit_i", "coef_i", "vcov_i"), ls()))
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}
ok <- is.finite(qhat) & is.finite(uhat) & uhat > 0
if (sum(ok) >= 2) {
  ps <- mice::pool.scalar(
    Q = qhat[ok],
    U = uhat[ok],
    n = sum(subset_data$has_abg == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    k = 1
  )
  fmi_abg <- tibble::tibble(
    term = "has_abg",
    estimate = ps$qbar,
    std.error = sqrt(ps$t),
    fmi = ps$fmi,
    m_used = sum(ok)
  )
} else {
  warning("FMI not available from pooled scalar diagnostic; leaving FMI as NA.", call. = FALSE)
  fmi_abg <- tibble::tibble(
    term = "has_abg",
    estimate = NA_real_,
    std.error = NA_real_,
    fmi = NA_real_,
    m_used = sum(ok)
  )
}
fmi_abg$rel_eff <- if (is.finite(fmi_abg$fmi[1])) 1 / (1 + fmi_abg$fmi[1] / M_IMP) else NA_real_
append_mem_snapshot("diagnostics", "mi_fmi_glm", "post")
```

<!-- MI maxit sensitivity diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-mi-maxit}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics: MI maxit sensitivity"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: diagnostics mi maxit.
run_maxit_sensitivity <- TRUE
if (run_maxit_sensitivity) {
  stopifnot(exists("mi_df"), exists("meth"), exists("pred"))
  set.seed(MI_SEED)
  idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(mi_df)), min(2000, nrow(mi_df)))
  mi_df_sens <- mi_df[idx, , drop = FALSE]

  m_sens <- min(20, M_IMP)
  maxit_short <- max(5, floor(MAXIT_MI / 2))

  cap_short <- capture_warnings(
    mice::mice(
      data            = mi_df_sens,
      m               = m_sens,
      maxit           = maxit_short,
      predictorMatrix = pred,
      method          = meth,
      printFlag       = FALSE,
      seed            = MI_SEED
    ),
    context = make_context(
      stage = "MI",
      component = "mice_maxit_short",
      analysis_variant = "mi",
      model_type = "mice",
      group = NA_character_,
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = NA_integer_,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  append_warnings(cap_short$warnings)
  imp_short <- cap_short$value
  le_short <- as.data.frame(imp_short$loggedEvents)
  if (nrow(le_short)) {
    le_short$run_type <- "maxit_short"
  }
  write_csv_safely(le_short, results_path("mice_logged_events_maxit_short.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

  cap_long <- capture_warnings(
    mice::mice(
      data            = mi_df_sens,
      m               = m_sens,
      maxit           = MAXIT_MI,
      predictorMatrix = pred,
      method          = meth,
      printFlag       = FALSE,
      seed            = MI_SEED + 1
    ),
    context = make_context(
      stage = "MI",
      component = "mice_maxit_long",
      analysis_variant = "mi",
      model_type = "mice",
      group = NA_character_,
      outcome = NA_character_,
      imputation = NA_integer_,
      batch = NA_integer_
    )
  )
  append_warnings(cap_long$warnings)
  imp_long <- cap_long$value
  le_long <- as.data.frame(imp_long$loggedEvents)
  if (nrow(le_long)) {
    le_long$run_type <- "maxit_long"
  }
  write_csv_safely(le_long, results_path("mice_logged_events_maxit_long.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

  mean_across_imps <- function(imp_obj, var) {
    means <- vapply(seq_len(imp_obj$m), function(i) {
      d <- mice::complete(imp_obj, action = i)
      mean(d[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
    }, numeric(1))
    mean(means, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  key_vars <- intersect(c("curr_bmi", "serum_hco3", "sodium", "serum_cr"), names(mi_df_sens))
  sens_df <- lapply(key_vars, function(v) {
    m_short <- mean_across_imps(imp_short, v)
    m_long  <- mean_across_imps(imp_long, v)
    data.frame(
      variable = v,
      mean_short = m_short,
      mean_long  = m_long,
      diff       = m_long - m_short,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }) |> bind_rows()

  sens_file <- results_path("mi_maxit_sensitivity.csv")
  write_csv_safely(sens_df, sens_file, row_names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r diagnostics-weights}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics: propensity and weights"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: diagnostics weights.
stopifnot(all(c("w_abg", "w_vbg") %in% names(subset_data)))

wt_abg <- subset_data$w_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
wt_vbg <- subset_data$w_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]
ps_abg <- subset_data$ps_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
ps_vbg <- subset_data$ps_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]
trunc_abg <- subset_data$trunc_abg[subset_data$has_abg == 1]
trunc_vbg <- subset_data$trunc_vbg[subset_data$has_vbg == 1]

wt_sum <- bind_rows(
  weight_summary(wt_abg, ps = ps_abg, ps_floor = ps_floor_abg,
                 truncated = trunc_abg) |>
    mutate(group = "ABG"),
  weight_summary(wt_vbg, ps = ps_vbg, ps_floor = ps_floor_vbg,
                 truncated = trunc_vbg) |>
    mutate(group = "VBG")
)
wt_sum_file <- results_path("weight_summary.csv")
write_csv_safely(wt_sum, wt_sum_file, row_names = FALSE)

# helper: summarize propensity-score overlap numerically for one tested cohort.
ps_stat <- function(ps, group) {
  ps_ok <- ps[is.finite(ps)]
  if (!length(ps_ok)) {
    return(data.frame(
      group = group,
      ps_min = NA_real_,
      ps_p01 = NA_real_,
      ps_p50 = NA_real_,
      ps_p99 = NA_real_,
      ps_max = NA_real_,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  data.frame(
    group = group,
    ps_min = min(ps_ok, na.rm = TRUE),
    ps_p01 = stats::quantile(ps_ok, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
    ps_p50 = stats::median(ps_ok, na.rm = TRUE),
    ps_p99 = stats::quantile(ps_ok, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    ps_max = max(ps_ok, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

ps_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  ps_stat(ps_abg, "ABG"),
  ps_stat(ps_vbg, "VBG")
)
write_csv_safely(ps_summary, results_path("ps_overlap_summary.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  ps_summary,
  caption = "GBM IPSW propensity-score overlap summary (tested cohort)",
  file_stub = "ps_overlap_summary",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)

wt_df <- bind_rows(
  tibble::tibble(group = "ABG", ps = ps_abg, weight = wt_abg),
  tibble::tibble(group = "VBG", ps = ps_vbg, weight = wt_vbg)
) |>
  filter(is.finite(weight), is.finite(ps))

# helper: draw a simple histogram of stabilized weights for one cohort.
plot_hist <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = weight)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "grey70", color = "white") +
    labs(title = title, x = "Weight", y = "Count") +
    theme_pub(base_size = 10)
}

p_hist_abg <- plot_hist(filter(wt_df, group == "ABG"), "ABG weight distribution")
p_hist_vbg <- plot_hist(filter(wt_df, group == "VBG"), "VBG weight distribution")
save_diag_plot(p_hist_abg, results_path("figs", "diag-wt-weights-hist-abg.png"), width = 7, height = 5)
save_diag_plot(p_hist_vbg, results_path("figs", "diag-wt-weights-hist-vbg.png"), width = 7, height = 5)

# helper: visualize the relationship between propensities and resulting weights
# while highlighting the most extreme weights.
plot_scatter <- function(df, title) {
  top_wt <- df |>
    slice_max(order_by = weight, n = min(20, nrow(df)))
  ggplot(df, aes(x = ps, y = weight)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(data = top_wt, color = "red", size = 1.2) +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Propensity score", y = "Weight (log10)") +
    theme_pub(base_size = 10)
}

p_scatter_abg <- plot_scatter(filter(wt_df, group == "ABG"),
                              "ABG weights vs propensity (top 20 highlighted)")
p_scatter_vbg <- plot_scatter(filter(wt_df, group == "VBG"),
                              "VBG weights vs propensity (top 20 highlighted)")
save_diag_plot(p_scatter_abg, results_path("figs", "diag-wt-weights-vs-ps-abg.png"), width = 7, height = 5)
save_diag_plot(p_scatter_vbg, results_path("figs", "diag-wt-weights-vs-ps-vbg.png"), width = 7, height = 5)
```

<!-- Balance diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-balance}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics: target balance (treated vs target sample)"
#| include: false
#| message: false

# Purpose: diagnostics balance.
stopifnot(exists("target_balance_table"))

covars_use <- intersect(covars_ps, names(subset_data))

bal_target_abg <- target_balance_table(subset_data, "has_abg", subset_data$w_abg, covars_use, levels_ref) |>
  mutate(group = "ABG")
bal_target_vbg <- target_balance_table(subset_data, "has_vbg", subset_data$w_vbg, covars_use, levels_ref) |>
  mutate(group = "VBG")

bal_target <- bind_rows(bal_target_abg, bal_target_vbg)
write_csv_safely(bal_target, results_path("balance_table.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

bal_target_sum <- bal_target |>
  group_by(group, variable) |>
  summarise(
    max_abs_pre = max(abs(smd_pre), na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_post = max(abs(smd_post), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
bal_worst <- bal_target_sum |>
  group_by(group) |>
  arrange(desc(max_abs_post)) |>
  ungroup()
write_csv_safely(bal_worst, results_path("balance_worst10.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  bal_worst,
  caption = "GBM IPSW target balance by covariate (sorted by max |SMD|)",
  file_stub = "balance_worst",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)

bal_plot_df <- bal_target |>
  mutate(label = ifelse(is.na(level), variable, paste0(variable, ":", level))) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(smd_pre, smd_post),
    names_to = "stage",
    values_to = "smd"
  ) |>
  mutate(stage = recode(stage, smd_pre = "Pre", smd_post = "Post"))

p_bal_abg <- ggplot(filter(bal_plot_df, group == "ABG"),
                    aes(x = reorder(label, abs(smd)), y = smd, color = stage, shape = stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.1, 0.1), linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.05, 0.05), linetype = 3, linewidth = 0.3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Target SMD", title = "ABG target balance") +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

p_bal_vbg <- ggplot(filter(bal_plot_df, group == "VBG"),
                    aes(x = reorder(label, abs(smd)), y = smd, color = stage, shape = stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.1, 0.1), linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.05, 0.05), linetype = 3, linewidth = 0.3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Target SMD", title = "VBG target balance") +
  theme_pub(base_size = 10)

save_diag_plot(p_bal_abg, results_path("figs", "diag-balance-loveplot-abg.png"), width = 9, height = 7)
save_diag_plot(p_bal_vbg, results_path("figs", "diag-balance-loveplot-vbg.png"), width = 9, height = 7)

# MI target balance summaries across imputations
stopifnot(exists("bal_imp_abg"), exists("bal_imp_vbg"))
bal_imp <- bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$bal_long, bal_imp_vbg$bal_long)
bal_imp_summary <- bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$bal_imp_summary, bal_imp_vbg$bal_imp_summary)
worst_rows <- bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$worst_rows_overall, bal_imp_vbg$worst_rows_overall)
worst_by_imp <- bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$worst_by_imp, bal_imp_vbg$worst_by_imp)
worst_terms_by_imp <- bind_rows(bal_imp_abg$worst_terms_by_imp, bal_imp_vbg$worst_terms_by_imp)

write_csv_safely(bal_imp, results_path("balance_target_by_imp.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(bal_imp_summary, results_path("balance_target_imp_summary.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(worst_rows, results_path("balance_target_worst_rows.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  worst_rows,
  caption = "MI-logistic IPSW target SMD rows across imputations (sorted by |SMD|)",
  file_stub = "balance_target_worst_rows",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(worst_by_imp, results_path("balance_max_smd_by_imp.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(worst_terms_by_imp, results_path("balance_worst_terms.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
if (any(bal_imp_summary$max_abs_post > 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  warning("Target balance: max |SMD| > 0.10 in at least one imputation.", call. = FALSE)
}
if (nrow(bal_imp_summary)) {
  dist_tbl <- bal_imp_summary |>
    dplyr::group_by(group) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      med = median(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
      iqr = IQR(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    dist_tbl,
    caption = "Distribution of max |Target SMD| across MI-logistic IPSW imputations",
    file_stub = "balance_target_max_smd_distribution",
    digits = 3,
    show = FALSE
  )
}
if (nrow(worst_terms_by_imp)) {
  worst_freq <- worst_terms_by_imp |>
    dplyr::count(group, term, sort = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    worst_freq,
    caption = "Most frequent worst-balance terms under MI-logistic IPSW",
    file_stub = "balance_worst_terms_freq",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )
}

n_abg <- sum(subset_data$has_abg == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
n_vbg <- sum(subset_data$has_vbg == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

stopifnot(exists("wt_sum"))
ess_abg <- wt_sum$ess[wt_sum$group == "ABG"]
ess_vbg <- wt_sum$ess[wt_sum$group == "VBG"]

if (is.finite(ess_abg) && is.finite(n_abg) && ess_abg < 0.2 * n_abg) {
  warning("ABG balance: ESS < 0.2 * n_abg (", round(ess_abg, 1), " vs ", n_abg, ").", call. = FALSE)
}
if (is.finite(ess_vbg) && is.finite(n_vbg) && ess_vbg < 0.2 * n_vbg) {
  warning("VBG balance: ESS < 0.2 * n_vbg (", round(ess_vbg, 1), " vs ", n_vbg, ").", call. = FALSE)
}
```

<!-- Outcome diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-outcome}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics: outcome spline curves"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: diagnostics outcome.
stopifnot(exists("abg_curves"), exists("vbg_curves"))
  curve_abg <- abg_curves |>
    mutate(co2 = paco2) |>
    select(-paco2)
  curve_vbg <- vbg_curves |>
    mutate(co2 = vbg_co2) |>
    select(-vbg_co2)
  curve_all <- bind_rows(curve_abg, curve_vbg) |>
    mutate(outcome = factor(outcome,
                            levels = c("imv_proc", "niv_proc", "death_60d", "hypercap_resp_failure"),
                            labels = c("IMV", "NIV", "Death (60d)", "Hypercapnic RF")))
  axis_mi_outcome <- compute_or_axis_spec(list(curve_abg, curve_vbg), lo_col = "LCL", hi_col = "UCL")

  p_outcome <- ggplot(curve_all, aes(x = co2, y = OR, color = group, fill = group)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = LCL, ymax = UCL), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    or_axis_scale(axis_mi_outcome) +
    facet_wrap(~ outcome, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(
      title = "MI‑pooled MI-logistic IPSW spline odds ratios: ABG vs VBG",
      x = expression(CO[2]~"(mmHg)"),
      y = paste0("Odds ratio (ref: ABG ", ABG_CO2_REF, ", VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF, "; log scale)"),
      caption = paste0("Reference CO2: ABG ", ABG_CO2_REF, " mmHg; VBG ", VBG_CO2_REF, " mmHg")
    ) +
    theme_pub(base_size = 10)
  save_diag_plot(p_outcome, results_path("figs", "diag-outcome-or-vs-paco2.png"),
                 width = 10, height = 8)
```

<!-- Diagnostics summary and audit hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r diagnostics-summary}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics summary and audit"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: diagnostics summary.
stopifnot(exists("bal_imp_summary"), exists("wt_sum"), exists("chain_diag_stats"))
target_abg_med <- median(bal_imp_summary$max_abs_post[bal_imp_summary$group == "ABG"], na.rm = TRUE)
target_abg_max <- max(bal_imp_summary$max_abs_post[bal_imp_summary$group == "ABG"], na.rm = TRUE)
target_vbg_med <- median(bal_imp_summary$max_abs_post[bal_imp_summary$group == "VBG"], na.rm = TRUE)
target_vbg_max <- max(bal_imp_summary$max_abs_post[bal_imp_summary$group == "VBG"], na.rm = TRUE)

runtime_proj_total_hrs <- NA_real_
if (is.finite(PILOT_FRAC) && PILOT_FRAC > 0 && PILOT_FRAC < 1) {
  runtime_log_curr <- runtime_log
  runtime_log_curr <- runtime_log_curr[runtime_log_curr$run_id == runtime_run_id, , drop = FALSE]
  scalable_steps <- c("mice_imputation", "mi_single_pass")
  scalable_secs <- runtime_log_curr |>
    dplyr::filter(step_name %in% scalable_steps) |>
    dplyr::summarise(total = sum(seconds, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    dplyr::pull(total)
  if (length(scalable_secs) && is.finite(scalable_secs)) {
    runtime_proj_total_hrs <- scalable_secs / PILOT_FRAC / 3600
  }
}

# helper: pull one group's summary row out of the weight diagnostics table and
# fail loudly if it is missing.
get_wt_row <- function(group) {
  row <- wt_sum[wt_sum$group == group, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(row) == 0L) {
    stop("Weight summary missing for group: ", group)
  }
  row[, c("ps_floor", "p01", "p05", "p95", "p99", "max", "sum_w", "ess",
          "top01_weight_share", "trunc_rate"), drop = FALSE]
}

wt_abg_row <- get_wt_row("ABG")
wt_vbg_row <- get_wt_row("VBG")

diag_summary <- bind_rows(
  tibble::tibble(
    block = "ABG weights",
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    m = M_IMP,
    maxit = MAXIT_MI,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    stop_method = gbm_params$stop.method,
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    ps_floor = wt_abg_row$ps_floor,
    weight_p01 = wt_abg_row$p01,
    weight_p05 = wt_abg_row$p05,
    weight_p95 = wt_abg_row$p95,
    weight_p99 = wt_abg_row$p99,
    weight_max = wt_abg_row$max,
    sum_w = wt_abg_row$sum_w,
    ess = wt_abg_row$ess,
    top1_weight_share = wt_abg_row$top01_weight_share,
    trunc_rate = wt_abg_row$trunc_rate,
    target_max_smd_post_med = target_abg_med,
    target_max_smd_post_max = target_abg_max,
    runtime_proj_total_hrs = runtime_proj_total_hrs,
```
