```{r diagnostics-summary}
    chain_diag_n_imputed_vars = chain_diag_stats$n_imputed_vars,
    chain_diag_n_with_chainMean = chain_diag_stats$n_with_chainMean,
    chain_diag_n_with_drift_tail = chain_diag_stats$n_with_drift_tail,
    chain_diag_drift_tail_na_frac = chain_diag_stats$drift_tail_na_frac,
    chain_diag_tail_window_na_mean = chain_diag_stats$tail_window_na_mean
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    block = "VBG weights",
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    m = M_IMP,
    maxit = MAXIT_MI,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    stop_method = gbm_params$stop.method,
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    ps_floor = wt_vbg_row$ps_floor,
    weight_p01 = wt_vbg_row$p01,
    weight_p05 = wt_vbg_row$p05,
    weight_p95 = wt_vbg_row$p95,
    weight_p99 = wt_vbg_row$p99,
    weight_max = wt_vbg_row$max,
    sum_w = wt_vbg_row$sum_w,
    ess = wt_vbg_row$ess,
    top1_weight_share = wt_vbg_row$top01_weight_share,
    trunc_rate = wt_vbg_row$trunc_rate,
    target_max_smd_post_med = target_vbg_med,
    target_max_smd_post_max = target_vbg_max,
    runtime_proj_total_hrs = runtime_proj_total_hrs,
    chain_diag_n_imputed_vars = chain_diag_stats$n_imputed_vars,
    chain_diag_n_with_chainMean = chain_diag_stats$n_with_chainMean,
    chain_diag_n_with_drift_tail = chain_diag_stats$n_with_drift_tail,
    chain_diag_drift_tail_na_frac = chain_diag_stats$drift_tail_na_frac,
    chain_diag_tail_window_na_mean = chain_diag_stats$tail_window_na_mean
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    block = "ABG outcomes",
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    m = M_IMP,
    maxit = MAXIT_MI,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    stop_method = gbm_params$stop.method,
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    ps_floor = wt_abg_row$ps_floor,
    weight_p01 = wt_abg_row$p01,
    weight_p05 = wt_abg_row$p05,
    weight_p95 = wt_abg_row$p95,
    weight_p99 = wt_abg_row$p99,
    weight_max = wt_abg_row$max,
    sum_w = wt_abg_row$sum_w,
    ess = wt_abg_row$ess,
    top1_weight_share = wt_abg_row$top01_weight_share,
    trunc_rate = wt_abg_row$trunc_rate,
    target_max_smd_post_med = target_abg_med,
    target_max_smd_post_max = target_abg_max,
    runtime_proj_total_hrs = runtime_proj_total_hrs,
    chain_diag_n_imputed_vars = chain_diag_stats$n_imputed_vars,
    chain_diag_n_with_chainMean = chain_diag_stats$n_with_chainMean,
    chain_diag_n_with_drift_tail = chain_diag_stats$n_with_drift_tail,
    chain_diag_drift_tail_na_frac = chain_diag_stats$drift_tail_na_frac,
    chain_diag_tail_window_na_mean = chain_diag_stats$tail_window_na_mean
  ),
  tibble::tibble(
    block = "VBG outcomes",
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    m = M_IMP,
    maxit = MAXIT_MI,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC,
    stop_method = gbm_params$stop.method,
    ps_floor_quantile = ps_trunc_quantile,
    ps_floor = wt_vbg_row$ps_floor,
    weight_p01 = wt_vbg_row$p01,
    weight_p05 = wt_vbg_row$p05,
    weight_p95 = wt_vbg_row$p95,
    weight_p99 = wt_vbg_row$p99,
    weight_max = wt_vbg_row$max,
    sum_w = wt_vbg_row$sum_w,
    ess = wt_vbg_row$ess,
    top1_weight_share = wt_vbg_row$top01_weight_share,
    trunc_rate = wt_vbg_row$trunc_rate,
    target_max_smd_post_med = target_vbg_med,
    target_max_smd_post_max = target_vbg_max,
    runtime_proj_total_hrs = runtime_proj_total_hrs,
    chain_diag_n_imputed_vars = chain_diag_stats$n_imputed_vars,
    chain_diag_n_with_chainMean = chain_diag_stats$n_with_chainMean,
    chain_diag_n_with_drift_tail = chain_diag_stats$n_with_drift_tail,
    chain_diag_drift_tail_na_frac = chain_diag_stats$drift_tail_na_frac,
    chain_diag_tail_window_na_mean = chain_diag_stats$tail_window_na_mean
  )
)

check_abg <- bal_imp_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "ABG") |>
  dplyr::summarise(x = max(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::pull(x)
check_vbg <- bal_imp_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(group == "VBG") |>
  dplyr::summarise(x = max(max_abs_post, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::pull(x)
diag_abg <- diag_summary$target_max_smd_post_max[diag_summary$block == "ABG weights"]
diag_vbg <- diag_summary$target_max_smd_post_max[diag_summary$block == "VBG weights"]
if (length(diag_abg) && is.finite(check_abg)) {
  stopifnot(isTRUE(all.equal(check_abg, diag_abg, tolerance = 1e-8)))
}
if (length(diag_vbg) && is.finite(check_vbg)) {
  stopifnot(isTRUE(all.equal(check_vbg, diag_vbg, tolerance = 1e-8)))
}
stopifnot(exists("covars_use_abg"), exists("covars_use_vbg"))
stopifnot(setequal(covars_use_abg, covars_use_vbg))

diag_summary_file <- results_path("diagnostics_summary.csv")
write_csv_safely(diag_summary, diag_summary_file, row_names = FALSE)

diag_summary_display <- diag_summary |>
  dplyr::select(
    block,
    m,
    ess,
    trunc_rate,
    target_max_smd_post_med,
    target_max_smd_post_max
  ) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    `trunc` = trunc_rate,
    `med_max_smd` = target_max_smd_post_med,
    `max_max_smd` = target_max_smd_post_max
  )
render_table_pdf_maybe(diag_summary_display,
                       "Diagnostics summary (GBM IPSW + MI-logistic IPSW)",
                       "diagnostics_summary_display",
                       wide = TRUE,
                       digits = 3,
                       show = FALSE)

audit_lines <- c(
  "# Diagnostics Audit",
  "",
  "## A1. MI workflow",
  "- Impute -> single-pass per‑imputation loop (weights, target balance, 3‑level outcomes, spline outcomes) -> pool curves and coefficients with Rubin’s rules (chunk: `mi-single-pass`; downstream MI display chunks read those objects).",
  "## A2. MI settings",
  paste0("- m = ", M_IMP, ", maxit = ", MAXIT_MI, ", seed = ", MI_SEED,
         "; treatments/outcomes/PaCO2/VBG CO2 are not imputed but are predictors (`mi-exec`)."),
  "## A3. Propensity weighting",
  "- Unimputed weighting uses WeightIt with method = \"gbm\" and balance-based stopping (stop.method = \"smd.max\"); no AUC-based tuning (`propensity-config`, `ipw-abg-weighting`, `ipw-vbg-workflow`).",
  "- MI weighting uses logistic PS with restricted cubic splines (glm + rcs); no SHAP is computed for MI.",
  "## A4. One-sided IPSW + truncation",
  "- Weights are 1/ps for observed tests (ABG or VBG), truncated only for very small propensities (ps floor = 1st percentile), then stabilized by the mean; controls receive weight 1 for balance diagnostics only.",
  "## A5. Robust variance",
  "- Outcome models are survey::svyglm with svydesign (robust SEs), using spline(CO2) + X adjustment; ABG and VBG are fit separately within the measured cohort.",
  "## A6. Pooling",
  "- mitools::MIcombine pools coefficients and robust vcov from svyglm; spline curves are pooled pointwise on log-OR (relative to CO2_ref) and on eta for predicted-probability curves (helpers defined in `mi-single-pass`).",
  "",
  "## Potential mismatches / risks",
  "- Target balance diagnostics compare weighted treated cohort to the full analytic sample (no treated-vs-control balance).",
  "- MI stability across m uses subsets of the first m imputations from the main mids object (not full re-imputation at each m).",
  "- Unweighted analyses remain earlier in the notebook for context; primary inference is based on weighted spline models."
)
audit_file <- results_path("diagnostics_audit.md")
write_diag_lines(audit_lines, audit_file)
```

<!-- Warning and model-fit diagnostics hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r warnings-summary}
#| code-block-title: "Warnings summary (captured)"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: warnings summary.
stopifnot(exists("mi_warn_log"), exists("mi_info_log"))
warn_df <- mi_warn_log
write_csv_safely(warn_df, results_path("mi_warnings_log.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(warn_df, results_path("warnings_log.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(mi_info_log, results_path("mi_info_log.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

if (nrow(warn_df)) {
  msg_counts <- warn_df |>
    dplyr::count(stage, component, message, sort = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    msg_counts,
    caption = "Warning messages by stage/component",
    file_stub = "warnings_by_stage_component",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )

  nonconv <- warn_df |>
    dplyr::filter(grepl("glm.fit: algorithm did not converge", message, fixed = TRUE))
  if (nrow(nonconv)) {
    nonconv_ctx <- nonconv |>
      dplyr::count(stage, component, analysis_variant, model_type, outcome, group, imputation, sort = TRUE)
    render_table_pdf_maybe(
      nonconv_ctx,
      caption = "Nonconvergence contexts",
      file_stub = "nonconvergence_contexts",
      digits = 0,
      show = FALSE
    )
  }
} else {
  message("No captured warnings.")
}

write_csv_safely(plot_drop_log(), results_path("plot_drop_log.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
```

```{r mi-nonconvergence-summary}
#| code-block-title: "MI Nonconvergence Summary"
#| include: false
#| message: false

# Purpose: mi nonconvergence summary.
stopifnot(exists("mi_outcome_diag"))
if (nrow(mi_outcome_diag) == 0L) {
  stop("mi_outcome_diag is empty; outcome diagnostics were not captured.")
}
mi_outcome_diag <- enrich_model_diagnostic_flags(mi_outcome_diag)
out_diag_file <- results_path("model_fit_diagnostics.csv")
write_csv_safely(mi_outcome_diag, out_diag_file)
write_csv_safely(mi_outcome_diag, results_path("mi_outcome_fit_diagnostics.csv"))

nonconv <- mi_outcome_diag |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$nonconv_flag %in% TRUE | .data$converged %in% FALSE)
sep <- mi_outcome_diag |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$sep_flag %in% TRUE)

if (nrow(nonconv)) {
  nonconv_counts <- nonconv |>
    dplyr::count(analysis_variant, group, outcome, model_type, sort = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    nonconv_counts,
    caption = "Nonconverged fits by variant/group/outcome",
    file_stub = "nonconverged_fits_by_variant",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )

  worst_imps <- nonconv |>
    dplyr::count(imputation, sort = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    worst_imps,
    caption = "Imputations with most nonconverged fits",
    file_stub = "nonconverged_imputations",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("No nonconverged outcome fits recorded.")
}

if (nrow(sep)) {
  sep_counts <- sep |>
    dplyr::count(analysis_variant, group, outcome, model_type, sort = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    sep_counts,
    caption = "Separation flags by variant/group/outcome",
    file_stub = "separation_flags_by_variant",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("No separation flags recorded.")
}

  worst_phat <- mi_outcome_diag |>
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(min_phat) | is.finite(max_phat)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(extreme = pmin(min_phat, 1 - max_phat, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(extreme)
if (nrow(worst_phat)) {
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    worst_phat,
    caption = "Worst fitted-probability extremes",
    file_stub = "worst_phat_extremes",
    digits = 3,
    show = FALSE
  )
}

  diag_df <- enrich_model_diagnostic_flags(mi_outcome_diag)
  diag_df$phat_extreme <- diag_df$phat_low_flag | diag_df$phat_high_flag

  mi_variants <- intersect(c("mi_ipw", "weighted_imputed"), unique(diag_df$analysis_variant))
  if (!length(mi_variants)) mi_variants <- unique(diag_df$analysis_variant)

issue_summary <- diag_df |>
  dplyr::filter(analysis_variant %in% mi_variants) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, outcome, component, analysis_variant) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_fits = dplyr::n(),
    n_nonconv = sum(nonconv_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sep_warn = sum(sep_warn_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_phat_extreme = sum(phat_extreme %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sep_flag = sum(sep_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_fail = sum(diagnostic_class == "fail", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_warn = sum(diagnostic_class == "warn", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(issue_summary, results_path("mi_fit_issue_summary.csv"))

# Top warning messages by stage/component
if (nrow(mi_warn_log)) {
  warn_top <- mi_warn_log |>
    dplyr::count(stage, component, analysis_variant, model_type, message, sort = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    warn_top,
    caption = "Warnings by stage/component",
    file_stub = "warnings_by_stage_component_full",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )
}

# Top MICE loggedEvents drivers
stopifnot(exists("log_events_summary"))
if (nrow(log_events_summary)) {
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    log_events_summary,
    caption = "MICE loggedEvents drivers",
    file_stub = "mice_logged_events_drivers",
    digits = 0,
    show = FALSE
  )
}

# Replay debugging is intentionally omitted from the canonical render path.
```

<!-- Notebook chunk runtime log hidden from manuscript PDF. -->

```{r runtime-log-export}
#| code-block-title: "Runtime log"
#| include: false
#| message: false
# Purpose: runtime log export.
stopifnot(exists("runtime_log"), nrow(runtime_log) > 0)
runtime_log_curr <- runtime_log
runtime_log_curr <- runtime_log_curr[runtime_log_curr$run_id == runtime_run_id, , drop = FALSE]
runtime_log_file <- results_path("runtime_log.csv")
write_csv_safely(runtime_log_curr, runtime_log_file, row_names = FALSE)
top_steps <- runtime_log_curr |>
  arrange(desc(seconds))
top15_file <- results_path("runtime_summary_top15.csv")
write_csv_safely(top_steps, top15_file, row_names = FALSE)
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  top_steps,
  caption = "Runtime steps (seconds)",
  file_stub = "runtime_steps",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)

total_seconds <- sum(runtime_log_curr$seconds, na.rm = TRUE)
runtime_summary <- bind_rows(
  tibble::tibble(step_name = "TOTAL", seconds = total_seconds),
  runtime_log_curr |>
    arrange(desc(seconds)) |>
    select(step_name, seconds)
)
runtime_summary_file <- results_path("runtime_summary.csv")
write_csv_safely(runtime_summary, runtime_summary_file, row_names = FALSE)
render_table_pdf_maybe(
  runtime_summary,
  caption = "Runtime summary (total + all steps)",
  file_stub = "runtime_summary",
  digits = 3,
  show = FALSE
)

# GBM preflight diagnostics (CSV only)
write_csv_safely(memory_snapshots, results_path("memory_snapshots.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(gbm_preflight_design_dims, results_path("gbm_preflight_design_dims.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(gbm_preflight_warnings, results_path("gbm_preflight_warnings.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

if (is.finite(PILOT_FRAC) && PILOT_FRAC > 0 && PILOT_FRAC < 1) {
  scalable_steps <- c("mice_imputation", "mi_single_pass")
  proj <- runtime_log_curr |>
    filter(step_name %in% scalable_steps) |>
    mutate(projected_seconds = seconds / PILOT_FRAC,
           projected_hours = projected_seconds / 3600)
  proj_total <- sum(proj$projected_hours, na.rm = TRUE)
  render_table_pdf_maybe(
    proj |> select(step_name, seconds, projected_hours),
    caption = paste0("Runtime projection (scalable steps; pilot_frac = ", PILOT_FRAC, ")"),
    file_stub = "runtime_projection",
    digits = 3,
    show = FALSE
  )
  if (is.finite(proj_total) && proj_total > 10) {
    warning("Projected full-run time exceeds 10 hours (", round(proj_total, 1), "h).",
            call. = FALSE)
  }
} else {
  message("Runtime projection skipped because PILOT_FRAC == 1 (full run).")
}

stopifnot(exists("get_imp_stats"))
get_imp_df <- data.frame(
  count = get_imp_stats$count,
  seconds = get_imp_stats$seconds,
  seconds_per_call = if (get_imp_stats$count > 0) get_imp_stats$seconds / get_imp_stats$count else NA_real_,
  run_id = runtime_run_id,
  run_mode = RUN_MODE,
  n_subset = nrow(subset_data),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(get_imp_df, results_path("get_imp_usage.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
```

<!-- NIV/IMV discordance diagnostics are generated as side-effect artifacts and hidden from the manuscript PDF. -->

```{r discordance-diagnostics}
#| code-block-title: "NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance diagnostics"
#| include: false
#| results: "asis"
#| message: false
# Purpose: additive diagnostics for NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance.
discordance_outcome_vars <- c("imv_proc", "niv_proc")
discordance_outcome_labels <- c(imv_proc = "IMV", niv_proc = "NIV")
discordance_groups <- c("ABG", "VBG")

discordance_status_rows <- list()
discordance_progress_rows <- list()
discordance_progress_path <- results_path("discordance_diagnostics_progress.csv")
discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path <- results_path("discordance_marginal_standardized_imp_curves.csv")
for (stale_path in c(discordance_progress_path, discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path)) {
  if (file.exists(stale_path)) invisible(file.remove(stale_path))
}

record_discordance_status <- function(component, status, reason,
                                      artifact_path = "",
                                      optional = FALSE) {
  discordance_status_rows[[length(discordance_status_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    component = component,
    status = status,
    reason = reason,
    artifact_path = artifact_path,
    optional = optional,
    run_mode = RUN_MODE,
    pilot_frac = PILOT_FRAC
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

discordance_object_size_bytes <- function(x) {
  if (exists("safe_object_size_bytes")) {
    return(safe_object_size_bytes(x))
  }
  as.numeric(utils::object.size(x))
}

record_discordance_progress <- function(section, stage,
                                        imp_index = NA_integer_,
                                        group = NA_character_,
                                        outcome_var = NA_character_,
                                        co2_var = NA_character_,
                                        n_standardized = NA_integer_,
                                        n_grid = NA_integer_,
                                        source_size_bytes = NA_real_,
                                        prediction_size_bytes = NA_real_,
                                        detail = "") {
  mem <- if (exists("get_vcells_stats")) {
    get_vcells_stats()
  } else {
    data.frame(
      gc_vcells_used_mb = NA_real_,
      gc_vcells_limit_mb = NA_real_,
      gc_vcells_frac = NA_real_,
      gc_vcells_trigger_mb = NA_real_,
      gc_vcells_max_used_mb = NA_real_,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  row <- tibble::tibble(
    section = section,
    stage = stage,
    imp = as.integer(imp_index),
    group = group,
    outcome = ifelse(
      !is.na(outcome_var) && outcome_var %in% names(discordance_outcome_labels),
      unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var]),
      NA_character_
    ),
    outcome_var = outcome_var,
    co2_scale = co2_var,
    n_standardized = as.integer(n_standardized),
    n_grid = as.integer(n_grid),
    source_size_bytes = as.numeric(source_size_bytes),
    prediction_size_bytes = as.numeric(prediction_size_bytes),
    gc_vcells_used_mb = mem$gc_vcells_used_mb,
    gc_vcells_limit_mb = mem$gc_vcells_limit_mb,
    gc_vcells_frac = mem$gc_vcells_frac,
    gc_vcells_trigger_mb = mem$gc_vcells_trigger_mb,
    gc_vcells_max_used_mb = mem$gc_vcells_max_used_mb,
    rss_mb = if (exists("get_rss_mb")) get_rss_mb() else NA_real_,
    detail = detail
  )
  discordance_progress_rows[[length(discordance_progress_rows) + 1L]] <<- row
  write_csv_safely(
    dplyr::bind_rows(discordance_progress_rows),
    discordance_progress_path,
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  invisible(row)
}

write_discordance_status <- function() {
  status_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(discordance_status_rows)
  write_csv_safely(
    status_df,
    results_path("discordance_validation_status.csv"),
    row_names = FALSE
  )
  invisible(status_df)
}

safe_relative_gap <- function(abg_value, vbg_value) {
  ifelse(is.finite(vbg_value) & abs(vbg_value) > 0,
         (abg_value - vbg_value) / abs(vbg_value),
         NA_real_)
}

weighted_mean_safe <- function(x, w = NULL) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (is.null(w)) {
    return(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  }
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(w))
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
  sum(w[ok] * x[ok]) / sum(w[ok])
}

weighted_ess <- function(w) {
  w <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(w))
  w <- w[is.finite(w) & w > 0]
  if (!length(w)) return(NA_real_)
  sum(w)^2 / sum(w^2)
}

first_existing_col <- function(candidates, data_names) {
  hits <- candidates[candidates %in% data_names]
  if (length(hits)) hits[[1L]] else NA_character_
}

candidate_cols <- function(data_names, pattern, exclude = character(), max_n = Inf) {
  out <- grep(pattern, data_names, value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  out <- setdiff(out, exclude)
  unique(utils::head(out, max_n))
}

safe_max_numeric <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_real_)
  max(x)
}

safe_max_abs_numeric <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_real_)
  max(abs(x))
}

safe_median_numeric <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_real_)
  stats::median(x)
}

discordance_write_md <- function(lines, filename) {
  writeLines(lines, con = results_path(filename), useBytes = TRUE)
  invisible(results_path(filename))
}

parse_discordance_time_detail <- function(x, field = "", reference_date = NULL) {
  empty_time <- as.POSIXct(rep(NA_character_, length(x)), tz = "UTC")
  n_present <- sum(!is.na(x))
  status_for <- function(parsed) {
    dplyr::case_when(
      n_present == 0L ~ "all_missing",
      sum(!is.na(parsed)) > 0L ~ "parsed",
      TRUE ~ "unparsed"
    )
  }

  if (inherits(x, "POSIXt")) {
    parsed <- as.POSIXct(x, tz = "UTC")
    return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "posix_input", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
  }
  if (inherits(x, "Date")) {
    parsed <- as.POSIXct(x, tz = "UTC")
    return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "date_input", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
  }

  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
    field_label <- attr(x, "label", exact = TRUE)
    if (is.null(field_label)) field_label <- ""
    field_text <- tolower(paste(field, field_label, collapse = " "))
    date_like_field <- grepl("date|time|timestamp|datetime", field, ignore.case = TRUE)
    encounter_offset_hint <- grepl(
      "encounter.?day|during the encounter|relative to encounter|\\(encounter|encounter-year-month",
      field_text,
      perl = TRUE
    )
    has_reference_date <- !is.null(reference_date) && length(reference_date) == length(x)
    small_day_offset <- any(is.finite(x_num)) &&
      suppressWarnings(max(abs(x_num[is.finite(x_num)]), na.rm = TRUE)) <= 3660

    if (has_reference_date && date_like_field && (encounter_offset_hint || small_day_offset)) {
      parsed <- as.POSIXct(as.Date(reference_date) + x_num, tz = "UTC")
      return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "numeric_encounter_day_offset", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
    }
    if (date_like_field && any(is.finite(x_num)) &&
        suppressWarnings(stats::median(x_num[is.finite(x_num)], na.rm = TRUE)) > 1000 &&
        suppressWarnings(stats::median(x_num[is.finite(x_num)], na.rm = TRUE)) < 50000) {
      parsed <- as.POSIXct(as.Date(x_num, origin = "1960-01-01"), tz = "UTC")
      return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "numeric_stata_date", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
    }
    if (date_like_field && any(is.finite(x_num)) &&
        suppressWarnings(stats::median(x_num[is.finite(x_num)], na.rm = TRUE)) > 1e11) {
      parsed <- as.POSIXct(x_num / 1000, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")
      return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "numeric_unix_milliseconds", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
    }
    if (date_like_field && any(is.finite(x_num)) &&
        suppressWarnings(stats::median(x_num[is.finite(x_num)], na.rm = TRUE)) > 1e8) {
      parsed <- as.POSIXct(x_num, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")
      return(list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = "numeric_unix_seconds", parse_status = status_for(parsed)))
    }
    return(list(parsed = empty_time, parse_method = "unparsed_numeric", parse_status = status_for(empty_time)))
  }

  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[!nzchar(x_chr)] <- NA_character_
  parsed <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(x_chr, tz = "UTC")),
    error = function(e) empty_time
  )
  parse_method <- "character_posix"
  if (all(is.na(parsed)) && any(!is.na(x_chr))) {
    parsed <- tryCatch(
      suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(as.Date(x_chr), tz = "UTC")),
      error = function(e) empty_time
    )
    parse_method <- "character_date"
  }
  if (all(is.na(parsed)) && any(!is.na(x_chr))) parse_method <- "unparsed_character"
  list(parsed = parsed, parse_method = parse_method, parse_status = status_for(parsed))
}

parse_discordance_time <- function(x, field = "", reference_date = NULL) {
  parse_discordance_time_detail(x, field = field, reference_date = reference_date)$parsed
}

discordance_field_activity <- function(x, field = "", role = c("activity", "timestamp"), reference_date = NULL) {
  role <- match.arg(role)
  if (role == "timestamp") {
    return(as.numeric(!is.na(parse_discordance_time(x, field = field, reference_date = reference_date))))
  }
  if (is.logical(x)) {
    return(as.numeric(!is.na(x) & x))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    raw <- trimws(as.character(x))
    raw_lower <- tolower(raw)
    inactive <- is.na(raw) | !nzchar(raw) |
      raw_lower %in% c("0", "0.0", "no", "false", "absent", "none", "na", "n/a", "unknown")
    num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(raw))
    return(as.numeric(!inactive & (is.na(num) | num > 0)))
  }
  num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  as.numeric(is.finite(num) & num > 0)
}

count_active_fields <- function(data, fields, role = c("activity", "timestamp"), reference_date = NULL) {
  if (!length(fields)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(data)))
  role <- match.arg(role)
  active <- do.call(
    cbind,
    lapply(
      fields,
      function(field) discordance_field_activity(data[[field]], field = field, role = role, reference_date = reference_date)
    )
  )
  rowSums(active, na.rm = TRUE)
}

any_active_fields <- function(data, fields, role = c("activity", "timestamp"), reference_date = NULL) {
  if (!length(fields)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(data)))
  role <- match.arg(role)
  as.numeric(count_active_fields(data, fields, role = role, reference_date = reference_date) > 0)
}

compact_spline_fit <- function(x) {
  if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$fit) && is.list(x$fit) &&
      !is.null(x$fit$coef) && !is.null(x$fit$vcov)) {
    return(x$fit)
  }
  if (is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coef) && !is.null(x$vcov)) {
    return(x)
  }
  NULL
}

predict_spline_prob_from_compact <- function(fit_compact, grid_df,
                                             outcome_var,
                                             co2_var,
                                             adj_vars = adj_core) {
  stopifnot(is.list(fit_compact), !is.null(fit_compact$coef), !is.null(fit_compact$vcov))
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(grid_df), co2_var %in% names(grid_df))

  beta <- fit_compact$coef
  V <- fit_compact$vcov
  bn <- names(beta)
  if (is.null(bn) || any(!nzchar(bn))) {
    stop("predict_spline_prob_from_compact: coefficient names are required.")
  }

  if (!is.null(fit_compact$terms)) {
    tt <- fit_compact$terms
    if (!identical(attr(tt, ".Environment"), baseenv())) {
      stop("predict_spline_prob_from_compact: compact terms retain a non-base environment.")
    }
    mf_new <- stats::model.frame(
      tt,
      data = grid_df,
      na.action = stats::na.pass,
      xlev = fit_compact$xlevels
    )
    mm <- stats::model.matrix(tt, mf_new, contrasts.arg = fit_compact$contrasts)
  } else {
    rhs_terms <- c(sprintf("splines::ns(%s, %d)", co2_var, SPLINE_DF), adj_vars)
    fml <- stats::as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
    tt <- stats::delete.response(stats::terms(fml))
    mm <- stats::model.matrix(tt, data = grid_df)
  }

  missing_cols <- setdiff(bn, colnames(mm))
  if (length(missing_cols)) {
    mm <- cbind(
      mm,
      matrix(
        0,
        nrow = nrow(mm),
        ncol = length(missing_cols),
        dimnames = list(NULL, missing_cols)
      )
    )
  }
  mm <- mm[, bn, drop = FALSE]

  if (!is.null(rownames(V)) && all(bn %in% rownames(V)) && all(bn %in% colnames(V))) {
    V <- V[bn, bn, drop = FALSE]
  }

  eta <- as.numeric(mm %*% beta)
  mmV <- mm %*% V
  var_eta <- pmax(rowSums(mmV * mm), 0)
  se_eta <- sqrt(var_eta)

  tibble::as_tibble(grid_df) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      eta = eta,
      SE_eta = se_eta,
      var_eta = var_eta,
      p = stats::plogis(eta),
      p_LCL = stats::plogis(eta - 1.96 * se_eta),
      p_UCL = stats::plogis(eta + 1.96 * se_eta)
    )
}

pool_spline_prob_curve_from_compact <- function(fit_list, grid_df,
                                                outcome_var,
                                                co2_var,
                                                co2_ref,
                                                min_ok_frac = 0.9) {
  pred_list <- lapply(fit_list, function(x) {
    fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(x)
    if (is.null(fit_compact)) return(NULL)
    tryCatch(
      predict_spline_prob_from_compact(
        fit_compact,
        grid_df = grid_df,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        co2_var = co2_var
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  })

  n_grid <- nrow(grid_df)
  ok <- vapply(pred_list, function(x) {
    is.data.frame(x) &&
      nrow(x) == n_grid &&
      all(c("eta", "var_eta") %in% names(x))
  }, logical(1L))
  m_tot <- length(ok)
  m_ok <- sum(ok)
  if (m_ok < ceiling(min_ok_frac * m_tot)) {
    stop("Too many failed compact spline predictions: m_ok=", m_ok, " / m_total=", m_tot)
  }

  eta_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  var_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_grid, ncol = m_ok)
  ok_idx <- which(ok)
  for (j in seq_along(ok_idx)) {
    pred_j <- pred_list[[ok_idx[[j]]]]
    eta_mat[, j] <- pred_j$eta
    var_mat[, j] <- pred_j$var_eta
  }

  qbar <- rowMeans(eta_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  ubar <- rowMeans(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  bvar <- apply(eta_mat, 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
  tvar <- ubar + (1 + 1 / m_ok) * bvar
  se_eta <- sqrt(pmax(tvar, 0))

  tibble::as_tibble(grid_df) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      eta = qbar,
      SE_eta = se_eta,
      var_eta = tvar,
      p = stats::plogis(qbar),
      p_LCL = stats::plogis(qbar - 1.96 * se_eta),
      p_UCL = stats::plogis(qbar + 1.96 * se_eta),
      co2_ref = co2_ref,
      m_used = m_ok,
      m_total = m_tot
    )
}

nearest_curve_value <- function(curve_df, co2_var, target_value, value_col) {
  if (!nrow(curve_df) || !(co2_var %in% names(curve_df)) || !(value_col %in% names(curve_df))) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(curve_df[[co2_var]]))
  ok <- is.finite(x)
  if (!any(ok) || !is.finite(target_value)) return(NA_real_)
  idx <- which(ok)[which.min(abs(x[ok] - target_value))]
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(curve_df[[value_col]][[idx]]))
}

co2_level_targets <- function(group) {
  if (identical(group, "ABG")) {
    return(c(Low = ABG_CO2_LOW, Normal = co2_ref_abg_mi, High = ABG_CO2_HIGH))
  }
  c(Low = VBG_CO2_LOW, Normal = co2_ref_vbg_mi, High = VBG_CO2_HIGH)
}

cat_prob_value <- function(group, outcome_label, category, value_col = "p") {
  group_i <- group
  outcome_i <- outcome_label
  category_i <- category
  out <- main_cat3_probs_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::filter(
      .data$group == .env$group_i,
      .data$outcome == .env$outcome_i,
      .data$category == .env$category_i
    ) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
    dplyr::pull(dplyr::all_of(value_col))
  if (length(out)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(out[[1L]])) else NA_real_
}

cat_or_value <- function(group, outcome_label, contrast, value_col = "OR") {
  group_i <- group
  outcome_i <- outcome_label
  contrast_i <- contrast
  out <- main_cat3_results |>
    dplyr::filter(
      .data$group == .env$group_i,
      .data$outcome == .env$outcome_i,
      .data$contrast == .env$contrast_i
    ) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
    dplyr::pull(dplyr::all_of(value_col))
  if (length(out)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(out[[1L]])) else NA_real_
}

spline_current_summary_one <- function(group, outcome_var) {
  outcome_label <- discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]]
  co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
  or_df <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) abg_curves else vbg_curves
  prob_df <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) abg_prob_curves_conditional_xref else vbg_prob_curves_conditional_xref
  or_df <- or_df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == group, .data$outcome == outcome_var)
  prob_df <- prob_df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$group == group, .data$outcome == outcome_var)
  targets <- co2_level_targets(group)

  tibble::tibble(
    outcome = outcome_label,
    modality = group,
    analysis_family = "MI-logistic IPSW",
    co2_representation = "spline",
    or_low_vs_normal = nearest_curve_value(or_df, co2_var, targets[["Low"]], "OR"),
    or_high_vs_normal = nearest_curve_value(or_df, co2_var, targets[["High"]], "OR"),
    prob_normal = nearest_curve_value(prob_df, co2_var, targets[["Normal"]], "p"),
    prob_low = nearest_curve_value(prob_df, co2_var, targets[["Low"]], "p"),
    prob_high = nearest_curve_value(prob_df, co2_var, targets[["High"]], "p"),
    notes = "Current modality-specific reference profile."
  )
}

cat_current_summary <- tidyr::crossing(
  outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars,
  modality = discordance_groups
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var])) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    analysis_family = "MI-logistic IPSW",
    co2_representation = "cat3",
    or_low_vs_normal = cat_or_value(modality, outcome, "Low vs normal"),
    or_high_vs_normal = cat_or_value(modality, outcome, "High vs normal"),
    prob_normal = cat_prob_value(modality, outcome, "Normal"),
    prob_low = cat_prob_value(modality, outcome, "Low"),
    prob_high = cat_prob_value(modality, outcome, "High"),
    notes = "Current categorical ORs and predicted probabilities."
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome, modality, analysis_family, co2_representation,
    or_low_vs_normal, or_high_vs_normal, prob_normal, prob_low, prob_high, notes
  )

spline_current_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(discordance_groups, function(group) {
  purrr::map_dfr(discordance_outcome_vars, function(outcome_var) {
    spline_current_summary_one(group, outcome_var)
  })
})

discordance_current_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  cat_current_summary,
  spline_current_summary
)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_current_summary,
  results_path("discordance_current_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "current_discordance",
  "completed",
  "Current categorical and spline summaries were extracted from primary MI outputs.",
  "Results/discordance_current_summary.csv"
)

current_metric_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      co2_representation,
      metric_type = "OR",
      level = "Low vs normal",
      modality,
      value = or_low_vs_normal
    ),
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      co2_representation,
      metric_type = "OR",
      level = "High vs normal",
      modality,
      value = or_high_vs_normal
    ),
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      co2_representation,
      metric_type = "probability",
      level = "Normal",
      modality,
      value = prob_normal
    ),
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      co2_representation,
      metric_type = "probability",
      level = "Low",
      modality,
      value = prob_low
    ),
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome,
      co2_representation,
      metric_type = "probability",
      level = "High",
      modality,
      value = prob_high
    )
)

discordance_gap_metrics <- current_metric_long |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = modality, values_from = value) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    outcome,
    co2_representation,
    metric_type,
    level,
    abg_value = ABG,
    vbg_value = VBG,
    absolute_gap = ABG - VBG,
    relative_gap = safe_relative_gap(ABG, VBG),
    comment = dplyr::case_when(
      metric_type == "OR" ~ "ABG-VBG gap on relative odds scale.",
      metric_type == "probability" ~ "ABG-VBG gap on absolute probability scale.",
      TRUE ~ "ABG-VBG gap."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_gap_metrics,
  results_path("discordance_gap_metrics.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "gap_metrics",
  "completed",
  "ABG-VBG gaps were computed for OR and probability summaries.",
  "Results/discordance_gap_metrics.csv"
)

## Reproduction of the current discordance
render_table_pdf(
  discordance_current_summary |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      co2_representation = dplyr::recode(
        .data$co2_representation,
        cat3 = "3-level category",
        spline = "Spline",
        .default = .data$co2_representation
      ),
      dplyr::across(
        c(or_low_vs_normal, or_high_vs_normal, prob_normal, prob_low, prob_high),
        ~ round(.x, 3)
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      Outcome = outcome,
      Modality = modality,
      `Analysis family` = analysis_family,
      `CO2 representation` = co2_representation,
      `Low vs normal OR` = or_low_vs_normal,
      `High vs normal OR` = or_high_vs_normal,
      `Normal probability` = prob_normal,
      `Low probability` = prob_low,
      `High probability` = prob_high,
      Notes = notes
    ),
  caption = "Current NIV/IMV OR and predicted-probability summaries",
  file_stub = "discordance_current_summary_display",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 3,
  max_cols = 6,
  landscape = TRUE
)

record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "common_reference_pre",
  detail = "Starting common-reference and marginal-standardization checks."
)

## Common-reference and marginal-standardization checks
common_ref_source <- subset_data |>
  dplyr::filter(
    (.data$has_abg == 1 & is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$paco2)))) |
      (.data$has_vbg == 1 & is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data$vbg_co2))))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(adj_core))
if (!nrow(common_ref_source)) {
  common_ref_source <- subset_data |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(adj_core))
}
x_ref_common <- make_ref_profile(common_ref_source, adj_core)
rm(common_ref_source)
invisible(gc(FALSE))
record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "common_reference_source_built",
  source_size_bytes = discordance_object_size_bytes(x_ref_common),
  detail = "Common reference profile built from adjustment-only source rows."
)

grid_abg_common_info <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "paco2",
  grid_abg_mi$paco2,
  x_ref_common,
  co2_ref_abg_mi
)
grid_vbg_common_info <- make_co2_grid_ref(
  "vbg_co2",
  grid_vbg_mi$vbg_co2,
  x_ref_common,
  co2_ref_vbg_mi
)

common_ref_curve_one <- function(group, outcome_var) {
  fit_list <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) spline_fits_abg[[outcome_var]] else spline_fits_vbg[[outcome_var]]
  grid_info <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) grid_abg_common_info else grid_vbg_common_info
  co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
  co2_ref <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) co2_ref_abg_mi else co2_ref_vbg_mi
  pool_spline_prob_curve_from_compact(
    fit_list,
    grid_df = grid_info$grid,
    outcome_var = outcome_var,
    co2_var = co2_var,
    co2_ref = co2_ref
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      group = group,
      strategy = "common_reference",
      co2_scale = co2_var,
      co2_value = .data[[co2_var]]
    )
}

discordance_xref_common_prob_curves <- purrr::map_dfr(discordance_groups, function(group) {
  purrr::map_dfr(discordance_outcome_vars, function(outcome_var) {
    common_ref_curve_one(group, outcome_var)
  })
})
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_xref_common_prob_curves,
  results_path("discordance_xref_common_prob_curves.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "common_reference_complete",
  prediction_size_bytes = discordance_object_size_bytes(discordance_xref_common_prob_curves),
  detail = "Common-reference probability curves written."
)
rm(common_ref_curve_one, grid_abg_common_info, grid_vbg_common_info, x_ref_common)
invisible(gc(FALSE))

standardization_sample_cap <- common_std_sample_cap
min_marginal_ok_frac <- 0.9
min_marginal_required <- ceiling(min_marginal_ok_frac * imp_n)
standardization_source_rows <- function(d, imp_index) {
  source_df <- d[, adj_core, drop = FALSE]
  source_df <- source_df[stats::complete.cases(source_df), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!nrow(source_df)) {
    attr(source_df, "n_available") <- 0L
    attr(source_df, "sample_cap") <- as.integer(standardization_sample_cap)
    return(source_df)
  }
  build_common_std_source_df(
    d,
    imp_index = imp_index,
    adj_vars = adj_core,
    sample_cap = standardization_sample_cap
  )
}

marginal_predict_compact <- function(fit_compact, source_df, co2_var,
                                     co2_values, outcome_var) {
  predict_prob_curve_marginal_standardized(
    fit_compact = fit_compact,
    source_df = source_df,
    co2_var = co2_var,
    co2_values = co2_values,
    outcome_var = outcome_var
  )
}

marginal_status_rows <- list()

append_discordance_marginal_imp_rows <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(invisible(FALSE))
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  df$run_id <- diag_run_id
  df$run_ts <- diag_run_ts
  write_header <- !file.exists(discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path)
  utils::write.table(
    df,
    file = discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path,
    sep = ",",
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = write_header,
    append = !write_header,
    quote = TRUE,
    na = ""
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

record_marginal_status <- function(imp_index, group, outcome_var, co2_var,
                                   status, error_message = "",
                                   n_standardized = NA_integer_,
                                   n_grid = NA_integer_) {
  marginal_status_rows[[length(marginal_status_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    imp = imp_index,
    group = group,
    outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
    outcome_var = outcome_var,
    co2_scale = co2_var,
    status = status,
    error_message = error_message,
    n_standardized = as.integer(n_standardized),
    n_grid = as.integer(n_grid)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "marginal_standardization_loop_start",
  detail = paste0(
    "Streaming imputation-level marginal predictions to ",
    "Results/discordance_marginal_standardized_imp_curves.csv; chunk_rows = ",
    MARGINAL_PREDICTION_CHUNK_ROWS,
    "."
  )
)

for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  record_discordance_progress(
    "discordance_diagnostics",
    "marginal_imputation_pre",
    imp_index = imp_index
  )
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  source_imp <- standardization_source_rows(d_imp, imp_index)
  source_size_i <- discordance_object_size_bytes(source_imp)
  record_discordance_progress(
    "discordance_diagnostics",
    "marginal_source_ready",
    imp_index = imp_index,
    n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
    source_size_bytes = source_size_i,
    detail = paste0("n_available = ", attr(source_imp, "n_available"))
  )
  for (group in discordance_groups) {
    co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
    co2_values <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) grid_abg_mi$paco2 else grid_vbg_mi$vbg_co2
    fit_bank <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) spline_fits_abg else spline_fits_vbg
    for (outcome_var in discordance_outcome_vars) {
      fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(fit_bank[[outcome_var]][[imp_index]])
      if (is.null(fit_compact)) {
        record_marginal_status(
          imp_index,
          group,
          outcome_var,
          co2_var,
          status = "skipped_no_compact_fit",
          error_message = "compact spline fit unavailable",
          n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
          n_grid = length(co2_values)
        )
        record_discordance_progress(
          "discordance_diagnostics",
          "marginal_prediction_skipped_no_compact_fit",
          imp_index = imp_index,
          group = group,
          outcome_var = outcome_var,
          co2_var = co2_var,
          n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
          n_grid = length(co2_values),
          source_size_bytes = source_size_i
        )
        next
      }
      record_discordance_progress(
        "discordance_diagnostics",
        "marginal_prediction_pre",
        imp_index = imp_index,
        group = group,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        co2_var = co2_var,
        n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
        n_grid = length(co2_values),
        source_size_bytes = source_size_i
      )
      pred_try <- tryCatch(
        list(
          value = marginal_predict_compact(
            fit_compact,
            source_df = source_imp,
            co2_var = co2_var,
            co2_values = co2_values,
            outcome_var = outcome_var
          ),
          error = NULL
        ),
        error = function(e) list(value = NULL, error = conditionMessage(e))
      )
      if (!is.null(pred_try$error) || is.null(pred_try$value) || !nrow(pred_try$value)) {
        error_message <- if (is.null(pred_try$error)) {
          "prediction returned no rows"
        } else {
          pred_try$error
        }
        record_marginal_status(
          imp_index,
          group,
          outcome_var,
          co2_var,
          status = "failed_prediction",
          error_message = error_message,
          n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
          n_grid = length(co2_values)
        )
        record_discordance_progress(
          "discordance_diagnostics",
          "marginal_prediction_failed",
          imp_index = imp_index,
          group = group,
          outcome_var = outcome_var,
          co2_var = co2_var,
          n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
          n_grid = length(co2_values),
          source_size_bytes = source_size_i,
          detail = error_message
        )
        rm(pred_try, fit_compact)
        invisible(gc(FALSE))
        next
      }
      pred_imp <- pred_try$value
      pred_stream <- pred_imp |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          imp = imp_index,
          outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
          outcome_var = outcome_var,
          group = group,
          co2_scale = co2_var,
          strategy = "marginal_standardized"
        )
      append_discordance_marginal_imp_rows(pred_stream)
      record_marginal_status(
        imp_index,
        group,
        outcome_var,
        co2_var,
        status = "completed",
        n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
        n_grid = nrow(pred_imp)
      )
      record_discordance_progress(
        "discordance_diagnostics",
        "marginal_prediction_complete",
        imp_index = imp_index,
        group = group,
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        co2_var = co2_var,
        n_standardized = nrow(source_imp),
        n_grid = nrow(pred_imp),
        source_size_bytes = source_size_i,
        prediction_size_bytes = discordance_object_size_bytes(pred_stream)
      )
      rm(pred_try, pred_imp, pred_stream, fit_compact)
      invisible(gc(FALSE))
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp, source_imp, source_size_i)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
  record_discordance_progress(
    "discordance_diagnostics",
    "marginal_imputation_complete",
    imp_index = imp_index
  )
}

marginal_status_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(marginal_status_rows)
required_marginal_combos <- tidyr::crossing(
  group = discordance_groups,
  outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var]),
    m_total = imp_n,
    min_required = min_marginal_required
  )
marginal_completion_summary <- marginal_status_raw |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, outcome_var, outcome) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    m_used = sum(.data$status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE),
    m_failed = sum(.data$status == "failed_prediction", na.rm = TRUE),
    m_skipped_no_compact_fit = sum(.data$status == "skipped_no_compact_fit", na.rm = TRUE),
    m_attempted = dplyr::n(),
    first_error = {
      errors <- .data$error_message[nzchar(.data$error_message)]
      if (length(errors)) errors[[1L]] else ""
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::right_join(
    required_marginal_combos,
    by = c("group", "outcome_var", "outcome")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(m_used, m_failed, m_skipped_no_compact_fit, m_attempted),
      ~ tidyr::replace_na(.x, 0L)
    ),
    first_error = tidyr::replace_na(.data$first_error, ""),
    passed_threshold = .data$m_used >= .data$min_required
  )
marginal_status_df <- marginal_status_raw |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    marginal_completion_summary |>
      dplyr::select(
        group, outcome_var, m_used, m_total, min_required,
        passed_threshold
      ),
    by = c("group", "outcome_var")
  )
write_csv_safely(
  marginal_status_df,
  results_path("discordance_marginal_standardization_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

marginal_threshold_failures <- marginal_completion_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(!.data$passed_threshold)
if (nrow(marginal_threshold_failures)) {
  record_discordance_status(
    "marginal_standardization",
    "failed",
    paste0(
      "Marginal standardization did not meet min_marginal_ok_frac = ",
      min_marginal_ok_frac,
      " for: ",
      paste(
        paste0(
          marginal_threshold_failures$group,
          "/",
          marginal_threshold_failures$outcome,
          " (",
          marginal_threshold_failures$m_used,
          "/",
          marginal_threshold_failures$m_total,
          ")"
        ),
        collapse = "; "
      )
    ),
    "Results/discordance_marginal_standardization_status.csv"
  )
  write_discordance_status()
  stop(
    "Discordance marginal standardization failed the completion threshold: ",
    paste(
      paste0(
        marginal_threshold_failures$group,
        "/",
        marginal_threshold_failures$outcome,
        "=",
        marginal_threshold_failures$m_used,
        "/",
        marginal_threshold_failures$m_total
      ),
      collapse = ", "
    )
  )
}
record_discordance_status(
  "marginal_standardization",
  "completed",
  paste0(
    "Marginal standardization met min_marginal_ok_frac = ",
    min_marginal_ok_frac,
    " for all NIV/IMV group/outcome combinations."
  ),
  "Results/discordance_marginal_standardization_status.csv"
)

marginal_imp_curves <- if (file.exists(discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path)) {
  utils::read.csv(discordance_marginal_imp_curve_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else {
  data.frame()
}
if (!nrow(marginal_imp_curves)) {
  stop("Discordance marginal standardization produced no predictions.")
}
record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "marginal_imp_predictions_loaded",
  prediction_size_bytes = discordance_object_size_bytes(marginal_imp_curves),
  detail = "Loaded streamed imputation-level marginal predictions for pooling."
)

discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves <- marginal_imp_curves |>
  pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
    group_vars = c("outcome", "outcome_var", "group", "co2_scale", "strategy", "co2_value"),
    m_total = imp_n,
    min_ok_frac = min_marginal_ok_frac,
    context = "discordance marginal standardized probability curves"
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome, outcome_var, group, co2_scale, strategy, co2_value,
    eta, ubar, bvar, p_imp_mean, m_used, m_total,
    n_available, n_standardized, standardization_sample_cap,
    var_eta, SE_eta, p, p_LCL, p_UCL,
    passed_threshold, min_required
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves,
  results_path("discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
rm(marginal_imp_curves)
invisible(gc(FALSE))
record_discordance_progress(
  "discordance_diagnostics",
  "marginal_pooling_complete",
  prediction_size_bytes = discordance_object_size_bytes(discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves),
  detail = "Pooled marginal standardized probability curves written."
)

discordance_marginal_alignment <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_abg |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$outcome %in% discordance_outcome_vars) |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = .data$outcome) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[.data$outcome_var]),
      outcome_var = .data$outcome_var,
      group = "ABG",
      co2_scale = "paco2",
      strategy = "marginal_standardized",
      co2_value = .data$co2_value,
      manuscript_eta = .data$eta,
      manuscript_var_eta = .data$var_eta,
      manuscript_p = .data$p,
      manuscript_p_LCL = .data$p_LCL,
      manuscript_p_UCL = .data$p_UCL
    ),
  prob_curve_marginal_standardized_vbg |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$outcome %in% discordance_outcome_vars) |>
    dplyr::mutate(outcome_var = .data$outcome) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[.data$outcome_var]),
      outcome_var = .data$outcome_var,
      group = "VBG",
      co2_scale = "vbg_co2",
      strategy = "marginal_standardized",
      co2_value = .data$co2_value,
      manuscript_eta = .data$eta,
      manuscript_var_eta = .data$var_eta,
      manuscript_p = .data$p,
      manuscript_p_LCL = .data$p_LCL,
      manuscript_p_UCL = .data$p_UCL
    )
) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        outcome, outcome_var, group, co2_scale, strategy, co2_value,
        discordance_eta = .data$eta,
        discordance_var_eta = .data$var_eta,
        discordance_p = .data$p,
        discordance_p_LCL = .data$p_LCL,
        discordance_p_UCL = .data$p_UCL
      ),
    by = c("outcome", "outcome_var", "group", "co2_scale", "strategy", "co2_value")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abs_eta_diff = abs(.data$manuscript_eta - .data$discordance_eta),
    abs_var_eta_diff = abs(.data$manuscript_var_eta - .data$discordance_var_eta),
    abs_p_diff = abs(.data$manuscript_p - .data$discordance_p),
    abs_p_LCL_diff = abs(.data$manuscript_p_LCL - .data$discordance_p_LCL),
    abs_p_UCL_diff = abs(.data$manuscript_p_UCL - .data$discordance_p_UCL)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_marginal_alignment,
  results_path("discordance_marginal_standardized_alignment.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
alignment_max_diff <- discordance_marginal_alignment |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_abs_eta_diff = max(.data$abs_eta_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_var_eta_diff = max(.data$abs_var_eta_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_p_diff = max(.data$abs_p_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_p_LCL_diff = max(.data$abs_p_LCL_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_p_UCL_diff = max(.data$abs_p_UCL_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
alignment_tol <- 1e-10
alignment_passed <- nrow(discordance_marginal_alignment) > 0L &&
  all(vapply(alignment_max_diff, function(x) isTRUE(is.finite(x) && x <= alignment_tol), logical(1L)))
record_discordance_status(
  "marginal_standardized_alignment",
  ifelse(alignment_passed, "completed", "failed"),
  paste0(
    "Overlap between manuscript and discordance common-source marginal-standardized curves ",
    ifelse(alignment_passed, "matched", "did not match"),
    " within tolerance ", alignment_tol,
    "; max abs diffs were eta=", signif(alignment_max_diff$max_abs_eta_diff, 4),
    ", var_eta=", signif(alignment_max_diff$max_abs_var_eta_diff, 4),
    ", p=", signif(alignment_max_diff$max_abs_p_diff, 4),
    ", p_LCL=", signif(alignment_max_diff$max_abs_p_LCL_diff, 4),
    ", p_UCL=", signif(alignment_max_diff$max_abs_p_UCL_diff, 4), "."
  ),
  "Results/discordance_marginal_standardized_alignment.csv"
)
if (!alignment_passed) {
  write_discordance_status()
  stop("Discordance marginal standardization no longer matches manuscript common-source pooled curves.")
}

current_spline_prob_curves_for_plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  abg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$outcome %in% discordance_outcome_vars) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome_var = .data$outcome,
      outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[.data$outcome]),
      strategy = "current_modality_reference",
      co2_scale = "paco2",
      co2_value = .data$paco2
    ),
  vbg_prob_curves_conditional_xref |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$outcome %in% discordance_outcome_vars) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome_var = .data$outcome,
      outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[.data$outcome]),
      strategy = "current_modality_reference",
      co2_scale = "vbg_co2",
      co2_value = .data$vbg_co2
    )
) |>
  dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_var, group, strategy, co2_scale, co2_value, p, p_LCL, p_UCL)

standardization_curves_for_plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  current_spline_prob_curves_for_plot,
  discordance_xref_common_prob_curves |>
    dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_var, group, strategy, co2_scale, co2_value, p, p_LCL, p_UCL),
  discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves |>
    dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_var, group, strategy, co2_scale, co2_value, p, p_LCL, p_UCL)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    strategy = factor(
      strategy,
      levels = c("current_modality_reference", "common_reference", "marginal_standardized"),
      labels = c("Current reference", "Common reference", "Marginal standardized")
    )
  )

representative_prob <- function(curves, strategy_name, group, outcome_var, level) {
  strategy_i <- strategy_name
  group_i <- group
  outcome_i <- outcome_var
  co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
  target <- co2_level_targets(group)[[level]]
  df <- curves |>
    dplyr::filter(
      as.character(.data$strategy) == .env$strategy_i,
      .data$group == .env$group_i,
      .data$outcome_var == .env$outcome_i
    )
  nearest_curve_value(df, "co2_value", target, "p")
}

standardization_summary_rows <- tidyr::crossing(
  outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars,
  co2_level = c("Low", "Normal", "High")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var])) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    gap_current_ref = representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Current reference",
      "ABG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ) - representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Current reference",
      "VBG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ),
    gap_common_ref = representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Common reference",
      "ABG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ) - representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Common reference",
      "VBG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ),
    gap_marginal_standardized = representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Marginal standardized",
      "ABG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ) - representative_prob(
      standardization_curves_for_plot,
      "Marginal standardized",
      "VBG",
      outcome_var,
      co2_level
    ),
    standardization_sample_cap = standardization_sample_cap,
    interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
      is.finite(gap_current_ref) &
        is.finite(gap_common_ref) &
        abs(gap_common_ref) <= 0.75 * abs(gap_current_ref) ~ "Common reference shrinks the current probability gap.",
      is.finite(gap_current_ref) &
        is.finite(gap_marginal_standardized) &
        abs(gap_marginal_standardized) <= 0.75 * abs(gap_current_ref) ~ "Marginal standardization shrinks the current probability gap.",
      TRUE ~ "Standardization did not materially shrink the current probability gap."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    marginal_completion_summary |>
      dplyr::group_by(outcome_var, outcome) |>
      dplyr::summarise(
        m_used = min(.data$m_used, na.rm = TRUE),
        m_total = max(.data$m_total, na.rm = TRUE),
        min_required = max(.data$min_required, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = c("outcome_var", "outcome")
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome, co2_level, gap_current_ref, gap_common_ref,
    gap_marginal_standardized, standardization_sample_cap,
    m_used, m_total, min_required, interpretation
  )

discordance_standardization_summary <- standardization_summary_rows
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_standardization_summary,
  results_path("discordance_standardization_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "standardization",
  "completed",
  paste0(
    "Common-reference and marginal-standardized curves computed; marginal cap = ",
    standardization_sample_cap,
    "; min_marginal_ok_frac = ",
    min_marginal_ok_frac,
    "."
  ),
  "Results/discordance_xref_common_prob_curves.csv; Results/discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves.csv; Results/discordance_marginal_standardized_imp_curves.csv; Results/discordance_standardization_summary.csv; Results/discordance_marginal_standardization_status.csv; Results/discordance_diagnostics_progress.csv"
)

discordance_probability_standardization_plot <- standardization_curves_for_plot |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = co2_value, y = p, color = strategy, linetype = strategy)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.55) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(outcome ~ group, scales = "free_x") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "NIV/IMV predicted probabilities under alternative standardization",
    x = "CO2 value (mmHg; modality-specific scale)",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Prediction target",
    linetype = "Prediction target"
  ) +
  theme_pub(base_size = 9)

discordance_standardization_png <- results_path(
  "figs",
  "discordance_probability_standardization_niv_imv.png"
)
discordance_standardization_pdf <- results_path(
  "figs",
  "discordance_probability_standardization_niv_imv.pdf"
)
save_diag_plot(discordance_probability_standardization_plot, discordance_standardization_png, width = 8.5, height = 5.6)
save_diag_plot(discordance_probability_standardization_plot, discordance_standardization_pdf, width = 8.5, height = 5.6)
register_plot_file("discordance_probability_standardization_niv_imv", discordance_standardization_png)
render_inline_graphic(discordance_standardization_png)

## Noncollapsibility and scale checks
discordance_scale_summary <- tidyr::crossing(
  outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars,
  contrast = c("Low vs normal", "High vs normal")
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var]),
    category = dplyr::if_else(contrast == "Low vs normal", "Low", "High")
  ) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_or = cat_or_value("ABG", outcome, contrast),
    vbg_or = cat_or_value("VBG", outcome, contrast),
    abg_prob = cat_prob_value("ABG", outcome, category),
    vbg_prob = cat_prob_value("VBG", outcome, category),
    abg_prob_ref = cat_prob_value("ABG", outcome, "Normal"),
    vbg_prob_ref = cat_prob_value("VBG", outcome, "Normal"),
    abg_rd = abg_prob - abg_prob_ref,
    vbg_rd = vbg_prob - vbg_prob_ref,
    abg_rr = ifelse(is.finite(abg_prob_ref) & abg_prob_ref > 0, abg_prob / abg_prob_ref, NA_real_),
    vbg_rr = ifelse(is.finite(vbg_prob_ref) & vbg_prob_ref > 0, vbg_prob / vbg_prob_ref, NA_real_),
    comment = dplyr::case_when(
      is.finite(abg_or) & is.finite(vbg_or) &
        abs(log(abg_or) - log(vbg_or)) < abs(abg_rd - vbg_rd) ~
        "Relative odds are closer than absolute risk differences.",
      TRUE ~ "Scale check does not show clearly closer ORs."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(
    outcome, contrast, abg_or, vbg_or, abg_prob, vbg_prob,
    abg_rd, vbg_rd, abg_rr, vbg_rr, comment
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_scale_summary,
  results_path("discordance_scale_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "scale_noncollapsibility",
  "completed",
  "OR, risk-difference, risk-ratio, and predicted-probability scale summaries were computed.",
  "Results/discordance_scale_summary.csv"
)

## Missingness and procedure-capture diagnostics
outcome_source_fields <- unique(c(
  "imv_proc",
  "niv_proc",
  candidate_cols(
    names(subset_data_raw),
    "(imv|niv).*(date|time|timestamp|source|code|proc|procedure)",
    exclude = character(),
    max_n = 30
  )
))
outcome_source_fields <- outcome_source_fields[outcome_source_fields %in% names(subset_data_raw)]

if (!length(outcome_source_fields)) {
  discordance_missingness_outcome_fields <- tibble::tibble(
    field = NA_character_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "unavailable_field"
  )
  record_discordance_status(
    "outcome_field_missingness",
    "skipped",
    "No NIV/IMV procedure source fields were available.",
    "Results/discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv",
    optional = TRUE
  )
} else {
  discordance_missingness_outcome_fields <- purrr::map_dfr(outcome_source_fields, function(field) {
    x <- subset_data_raw[[field]]
    tibble::tibble(
      field = field,
      missing_overall = mean(is.na(x)),
      missing_abg_tested = mean(is.na(x[subset_data$has_abg == 1])),
      missing_vbg_tested = mean(is.na(x[subset_data$has_vbg == 1])),
      n_overall = length(x),
      n_abg_tested = sum(subset_data$has_abg == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_vbg_tested = sum(subset_data$has_vbg == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      component_status = "completed",
      reason = "available_field"
    )
  })
  record_discordance_status(
    "outcome_field_missingness",
    "completed",
    "NIV/IMV outcome-source field missingness was summarized.",
    "Results/discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv"
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_missingness_outcome_fields,
  results_path("discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

proxy_fields <- unique(c(
  "imv_proc",
  "niv_proc",
  candidate_cols(
    names(subset_data),
    "(procedure|proc|cpt|icd|code|dx|charge|document|claim)",
    exclude = c("has_abg", "has_vbg"),
    max_n = 20
  )
))
proxy_fields <- proxy_fields[proxy_fields %in% names(subset_data)]

capture_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (group in discordance_groups) {
    treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
    tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
    for (field in proxy_fields) {
      x <- d_imp[[field]]
      if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
        proxy_value <- as.integer(!is.na(x) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(x))))
      } else {
        proxy_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
      }
      capture_rows[[length(capture_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        imp = imp_index,
        group = group,
        proxy_field = field,
        proxy_type = ifelse(field %in% c("imv_proc", "niv_proc"), "binary_outcome", "coding_density_proxy"),
        unweighted_mean_tested = mean(proxy_value[tested], na.rm = TRUE),
        weighted_mean_tested = weighted_mean_safe(proxy_value[tested], weights_i[tested]),
        missing_fraction_tested = mean(is.na(proxy_value[tested])),
        n_tested = sum(tested, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

discordance_procedure_capture_proxies <- dplyr::bind_rows(capture_rows) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, proxy_field, proxy_type) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    unweighted_mean_tested = stats::median(unweighted_mean_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_mean_tested = stats::median(weighted_mean_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
    missing_fraction_tested = stats::median(missing_fraction_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_tested = stats::median(n_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_procedure_capture_proxies,
  results_path("discordance_procedure_capture_proxies.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

missing_indicator_vars <- covars_ps[covars_ps %in% names(subset_data_raw)]
missing_indicator_vars <- missing_indicator_vars[
  vapply(missing_indicator_vars, function(v) any(is.na(subset_data_raw[[v]])), logical(1L))
]

if (!length(missing_indicator_vars)) {
  discordance_missing_indicator_balance <- tibble::tibble(
    variable = NA_character_,
    group = NA_character_,
    smd_pre = NA_real_,
    smd_post = NA_real_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "no_missing_baseline_indicators"
  )
} else {
  miss_bal_rows <- list()
  target_missing <- lapply(missing_indicator_vars, function(v) as.integer(is.na(subset_data_raw[[v]])))
  names(target_missing) <- missing_indicator_vars
  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    for (group in discordance_groups) {
      treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
      treat <- subset_data[[treat_var]] == 1
      weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
      for (v in missing_indicator_vars) {
        x <- target_missing[[v]]
        target_p <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
        target_sd <- sqrt(target_p * (1 - target_p))
        pre <- mean(x[treat], na.rm = TRUE)
        post <- weighted_mean_safe(x[treat], weights_i[treat])
        miss_bal_rows[[length(miss_bal_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
          imp = imp_index,
          variable = v,
          group = group,
          missing_target = target_p,
          missing_tested = pre,
          missing_weighted = post,
          smd_pre = ifelse(is.finite(target_sd) & target_sd > 0, (pre - target_p) / target_sd, NA_real_),
          smd_post = ifelse(is.finite(target_sd) & target_sd > 0, (post - target_p) / target_sd, NA_real_)
        )
      }
    }
  }
  discordance_missing_indicator_balance <- dplyr::bind_rows(miss_bal_rows) |>
    dplyr::group_by(variable, group) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      missing_target = stats::median(missing_target, na.rm = TRUE),
      missing_tested = stats::median(missing_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
      missing_weighted = stats::median(missing_weighted, na.rm = TRUE),
      smd_pre = stats::median(smd_pre, na.rm = TRUE),
      smd_post = stats::median(smd_post, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(component_status = "completed", reason = "baseline_missingness_indicators_available")
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_missing_indicator_balance,
  results_path("discordance_missing_indicator_balance.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

capture_wide <- discordance_procedure_capture_proxies |>
  dplyr::select(group, proxy_field, weighted_mean_tested) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = weighted_mean_tested)

missingness_capture_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c("outcome_source_missingness", "procedure_capture_proxy", "baseline_missing_indicator_balance"),
  max_abs_abg_vbg_difference = c(
    suppressWarnings(max(abs(
      discordance_missingness_outcome_fields$missing_abg_tested -
        discordance_missingness_outcome_fields$missing_vbg_tested
    ), na.rm = TRUE)),
    suppressWarnings(max(abs(capture_wide$ABG - capture_wide$VBG), na.rm = TRUE)),
    suppressWarnings(max(abs(discordance_missing_indicator_balance$smd_post), na.rm = TRUE))
  ),
  interpretation = c(
    "Difference in missingness among detected NIV/IMV source fields.",
    "Difference in weighted tested-cohort proxy means.",
    "Largest post-weighting SMD among baseline missingness indicators."
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    max_abs_abg_vbg_difference = ifelse(is.infinite(max_abs_abg_vbg_difference), NA_real_, max_abs_abg_vbg_difference)
  )
write_csv_safely(
  missingness_capture_summary,
  results_path("discordance_missingness_capture_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "missingness_capture",
  "completed",
  "Procedure-source missingness, capture proxies, and baseline missingness indicator balance were summarized.",
  "Results/discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv; Results/discordance_procedure_capture_proxies.csv; Results/discordance_missing_indicator_balance.csv; Results/discordance_missingness_capture_summary.csv"
)

## Enhanced capture/completeness diagnostics
capture_exclude_fields <- c(
  "has_abg", "has_vbg", "imv_proc", "niv_proc", "vent_proc",
  "meas_arterial_gas_proc", "meas_venous_o2_proc"
)
raw_names <- names(subset_data_raw)
encounter_date_raw_field <- first_existing_col(
  c("encounter_date", "encounter_datetime", "encounter_time", "enc_date"),
  raw_names
)
encounter_date_reference <- if (!is.na(encounter_date_raw_field)) subset_data_raw[[encounter_date_raw_field]] else NULL
date_like_raw_fields <- raw_names[
  grepl("(date|time|timestamp|datetime)", raw_names, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
]
proc_code_fields <- candidate_cols(
  raw_names,
  "(cpt|pcs|icd.*proc|procedure.*code|proc.*code|billing.*code|claim.*code)",
  exclude = capture_exclude_fields,
  max_n = 150
)
proc_code_activity_fields <- setdiff(proc_code_fields, date_like_raw_fields)
proc_density_fields <- candidate_cols(
  raw_names,
  "(procedure|proc|cpt|pcs|surgery|operation|code)",
  exclude = capture_exclude_fields,
  max_n = 200
)
proc_timestamp_fields <- candidate_cols(
  raw_names,
  "(procedure|proc|cpt|pcs|surgery|operation).*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)|(date|time|timestamp|datetime).*(procedure|proc|cpt|pcs|surgery|operation)",
  exclude = capture_exclude_fields,
  max_n = 200
)
proc_density_activity_fields <- setdiff(proc_density_fields, date_like_raw_fields)
diagnosis_fields <- candidate_cols(
  raw_names,
  "(diagnosis|diag|dx|icd)",
  exclude = proc_density_fields,
  max_n = 200
)
billing_activity_fields <- candidate_cols(
  raw_names,
  "(billing|bill|charge|claim|cpt|pcs|revenue|encounter.*code)",
  exclude = capture_exclude_fields,
  max_n = 200
)
billing_activity_fields <- setdiff(billing_activity_fields, date_like_raw_fields)

raw_proxy_values <- list(
  any_cpt_pcs_code_present = any_active_fields(subset_data_raw, proc_code_activity_fields),
  total_procedure_code_count = count_active_fields(subset_data_raw, proc_code_activity_fields),
  dated_procedure_fields_present = count_active_fields(
    subset_data_raw, proc_timestamp_fields, role = "timestamp", reference_date = encounter_date_reference
  ),
  nonmissing_procedure_timestamps = count_active_fields(
    subset_data_raw, proc_timestamp_fields, role = "timestamp", reference_date = encounter_date_reference
  ),
  diagnosis_density = count_active_fields(subset_data_raw, diagnosis_fields),
  procedure_density = count_active_fields(subset_data_raw, proc_density_activity_fields),
  any_billing_activity_proxy = any_active_fields(subset_data_raw, billing_activity_fields)
)
capture_proxy_metadata <- tibble::tibble(
  proxy_name = names(raw_proxy_values),
  proxy_family = c(
    "procedure_code_presence",
    "procedure_code_density",
    "procedure_timestamp_density",
    "procedure_timestamp_density",
    "diagnosis_density",
    "procedure_density",
    "billing_activity"
  ),
  source_fields = c(
    paste(proc_code_activity_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(proc_code_activity_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(proc_timestamp_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(proc_timestamp_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(diagnosis_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(proc_density_activity_fields, collapse = "; "),
    paste(billing_activity_fields, collapse = "; ")
  )
)

enhanced_capture_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (group in discordance_groups) {
    treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
    tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
    for (proxy_name in names(raw_proxy_values)) {
      proxy_values <- raw_proxy_values[[proxy_name]]
      enhanced_capture_rows[[length(enhanced_capture_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        imp = imp_index,
        group = group,
        proxy_name = proxy_name,
        n_tested = sum(tested, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_nonmissing_tested = sum(!is.na(proxy_values[tested])),
        unweighted_mean_tested = mean(proxy_values[tested], na.rm = TRUE),
        weighted_mean_tested = weighted_mean_safe(proxy_values[tested], weights_i[tested]),
        missing_fraction_tested = mean(is.na(proxy_values[tested]))
      )
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced <- dplyr::bind_rows(enhanced_capture_rows) |>
  dplyr::left_join(capture_proxy_metadata, by = "proxy_name") |>
  dplyr::group_by(proxy_family, proxy_name, source_fields, group) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$n_tested),
    n_nonmissing_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$n_nonmissing_tested),
    unweighted_mean_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$unweighted_mean_tested),
    weighted_mean_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$weighted_mean_tested),
    missing_fraction_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$missing_fraction_tested),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
    component_status = dplyr::if_else(
      nzchar(dplyr::first(.data$source_fields)) & is.finite(.data$weighted_mean_tested),
      "completed",
      "skipped"
    ),
    reason = dplyr::if_else(
      nzchar(dplyr::first(.data$source_fields)),
      "proxy_fields_available",
      "no_matching_proxy_fields"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced,
  results_path("discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

event_date_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (outcome_var in discordance_outcome_vars) {
    date_candidates <- c(
      paste0(outcome_var, "_first_date"),
      paste0(outcome_var, "_last_date"),
      candidate_cols(
        raw_names,
        paste0("^", outcome_var, ".*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)"),
        max_n = 5
      )
    )
    date_field <- first_existing_col(unique(date_candidates), raw_names)
    date_vec <- if (!is.na(date_field)) subset_data_raw[[date_field]] else rep(NA, nrow(subset_data_raw))
    date_present <- if (!is.na(date_field)) {
      !is.na(parse_discordance_time(date_vec, field = date_field, reference_date = encounter_date_reference))
    } else {
      rep(FALSE, nrow(subset_data_raw))
    }
    y <- to01(d_imp[[outcome_var]])
    for (group in discordance_groups) {
      treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
      weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
      event_tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1 & y == 1
      missing_indicator <- as.numeric(!date_present)
      event_date_rows[[length(event_date_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        imp = imp_index,
        outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
        outcome_var = outcome_var,
        group = group,
        date_field = ifelse(is.na(date_field), "", date_field),
        n_event_tested = sum(event_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
        date_missing_unweighted = ifelse(
          !is.na(date_field) && any(event_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
          mean(missing_indicator[event_tested], na.rm = TRUE),
          NA_real_
        ),
        date_missing_weighted = ifelse(
          !is.na(date_field) && any(event_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
          weighted_mean_safe(missing_indicator[event_tested], weights_i[event_tested]),
          NA_real_
        ),
        component_status = ifelse(is.na(date_field), "skipped", "completed"),
        reason = ifelse(is.na(date_field), "date_field_unavailable", "event_conditional_date_completeness")
      )
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional <- dplyr::bind_rows(event_date_rows) |>
  dplyr::group_by(outcome, outcome_var, group, date_field, component_status, reason) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_event_tested = safe_median_numeric(.data$n_event_tested),
    date_missing_unweighted = safe_median_numeric(.data$date_missing_unweighted),
    date_missing_weighted = safe_median_numeric(.data$date_missing_weighted),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
```
