    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional,
  results_path("discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

enhanced_proxy_wide <- discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced |>
  dplyr::select(proxy_family, proxy_name, group, weighted_mean_tested, missing_fraction_tested, component_status) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = c(weighted_mean_tested, missing_fraction_tested, component_status)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_abs_diff = .data$weighted_mean_tested_ABG - .data$weighted_mean_tested_VBG,
    missing_abs_diff = .data$missing_fraction_tested_ABG - .data$missing_fraction_tested_VBG,
    max_abs_abg_vbg_difference = pmax(abs(.data$weighted_abs_diff), abs(.data$missing_abs_diff), na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_abg_vbg_difference = ifelse(is.infinite(.data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference), NA_real_, .data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference),
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff > 0 ~ "ABG_higher",
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff < 0 ~ "VBG_higher",
      TRUE ~ "no_clear_direction"
    ),
    threshold_flag = is.finite(.data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference) & .data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference > 0.05,
    evidence_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$threshold_flag ~ "difference_detected",
      is.finite(.data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference) ~ "no_large_difference",
      TRUE ~ "unusable"
    )
  )

event_date_wide <- discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional |>
  dplyr::select(outcome, outcome_var, group, date_missing_weighted, component_status) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = c(date_missing_weighted, component_status)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    proxy_family = "event_conditional_timestamp_completeness",
    proxy_name = paste0(outcome_var, "_date_missing_among_event_positive"),
    weighted_abs_diff = .data$date_missing_weighted_ABG - .data$date_missing_weighted_VBG,
    max_abs_abg_vbg_difference = abs(.data$weighted_abs_diff),
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff > 0 ~ "ABG_higher_missingness",
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff < 0 ~ "VBG_higher_missingness",
      TRUE ~ "no_clear_direction"
    ),
    threshold_flag = is.finite(.data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference) & .data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference > 0.05,
    evidence_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$threshold_flag ~ "difference_detected",
      is.finite(.data$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference) ~ "no_large_difference",
      TRUE ~ "unusable"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(proxy_family, proxy_name, max_abs_abg_vbg_difference, direction, threshold_flag, evidence_status)

discordance_capture_summary_enhanced <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  enhanced_proxy_wide |>
    dplyr::select(proxy_family, proxy_name, max_abs_abg_vbg_difference, direction, threshold_flag, evidence_status),
  event_date_wide
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$evidence_status == "difference_detected" ~
        "Capture/completeness proxy differs by >5 points or count-scale units after weighting.",
      .data$evidence_status == "no_large_difference" ~
        "Capture/completeness proxy does not show a large ABG-VBG difference.",
      TRUE ~ "Proxy was unavailable or unusable in this render subset."
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_capture_summary_enhanced,
  results_path("discordance_capture_summary_enhanced.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "enhanced_capture_diagnostics",
  "completed",
  "Enhanced coding-density, billing-activity, procedure-timestamp, and event-conditional date-completeness diagnostics were summarized.",
  "Results/discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced.csv; Results/discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional.csv; Results/discordance_capture_summary_enhanced.csv"
)

## Sentinel procedure capture checks
sentinel_specs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~sentinel_concept, ~priority_rank, ~matched_pattern,
  "ECG/EKG", 1L, "(ecg|ekg|electrocard)",
  "Chest radiograph", 2L, "(cxr|chest.*(xray|x_ray|radiograph)|xray.*chest|x_ray.*chest)",
  "Transthoracic echocardiography", 3L, "(tte|transthoracic|echo)",
  "CT chest / CT pulmonary angiography", 4L, "(ctc|ct_chest|ct.*chest|pulmonary.*angio|ctpa|cta.*chest|ct.*pulmonary)",
  "Central venous catheter placement", 5L, "(central.*ven|central.*line|cvc|cvp)",
  "Urinary catheter placement", 6L, "(urinary.*catheter|foley)",
  "Blood transfusion", 7L, "(transfusion|blood.*transfus|rbc|prbc)",
  "Hemodialysis initiation", 8L, "(hemodialysis|dialysis|renal.*replacement|crrt)",
  "Bronchoscopy", 9L, "(bronch)"
)

sentinel_excluded_fields <- c(
  "imv_proc", "niv_proc", "vent_proc",
  "meas_arterial_gas_proc", "meas_venous_o2_proc"
)
sentinel_candidate_names <- union(names(subset_data), names(subset_data_raw))
sentinel_binary_names <- setdiff(
  sentinel_candidate_names,
  grep("(date|time|timestamp|datetime)|_(first|last)_date", sentinel_candidate_names,
       value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
)
sentinel_binary_names <- setdiff(sentinel_binary_names, sentinel_excluded_fields)
sentinel_binary_names <- sentinel_binary_names[
  !grepl("(abg|vbg|blood_gas|gas|paco2|co2|po2|o2sat|hco3|ph|lactate)",
         sentinel_binary_names, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
]

sentinel_indicator <- function(x) {
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    raw <- trimws(as.character(x))
    raw_lower <- tolower(raw)
    num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(raw))
    if (all(is.na(num[!is.na(raw) & nzchar(raw)]))) {
      return(as.integer(!is.na(raw) & nzchar(raw) &
                          !raw_lower %in% c("0", "no", "false", "absent", "none")))
    }
    return(as.integer(is.finite(num) & num > 0))
  }
  num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  as.integer(is.finite(num) & num > 0)
}

sentinel_source_vector <- function(field, d_imp = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(d_imp) && field %in% names(d_imp)) {
    x <- d_imp[[field]]
  } else if (field %in% names(subset_data)) {
    x <- subset_data[[field]]
  } else if (field %in% names(subset_data_raw)) {
    x <- subset_data_raw[[field]]
  } else {
    stop("Sentinel field not found in analysis or raw data: ", field, call. = FALSE)
  }
  if (length(x) != nrow(subset_data)) {
    stop("Sentinel field has unexpected row count: ", field, call. = FALSE)
  }
  x
}

sentinel_date_stems <- function(binary_field) {
  stripped_stem <- sub("(_0|_dur|_duration)$", "", binary_field, perl = TRUE)
  stems <- unique(c(binary_field, stripped_stem))
  stems[nzchar(stems)]
}

sentinel_date_field_for <- function(binary_field, pattern) {
  force(pattern)
  raw_names <- names(subset_data_raw)
  stems <- sentinel_date_stems(binary_field)
  direct_candidates <- unique(unlist(
    lapply(stems, function(stem) {
      c(
        paste0(stem, "_first_date"),
        paste0(stem, "_last_date")
      )
    }),
    use.names = FALSE
  ))
  date_like_names <- raw_names[
    grepl("(date|time|timestamp|datetime)", raw_names, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  ]
  stem_timestamp_candidates <- unique(unlist(
    lapply(stems, function(stem) {
      date_like_names[startsWith(date_like_names, paste0(stem, "_"))]
    }),
    use.names = FALSE
  ))
  hits <- unique(c(direct_candidates, stem_timestamp_candidates))
  hits <- setdiff(hits, binary_field)
  hits <- hits[grepl("(date|time|timestamp|datetime)", hits, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)]
  hits <- hits[hits %in% raw_names]
  if (length(hits)) hits[[1L]] else NA_character_
}

sentinel_inventory_rows <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(sentinel_specs)), function(idx) {
  spec <- sentinel_specs[idx, ]
  matched_fields <- grep(
    spec$matched_pattern,
    sentinel_binary_names,
    value = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE,
    perl = TRUE
  )
  matched_fields <- unique(matched_fields)
  if (!length(matched_fields)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      sentinel_concept = spec$sentinel_concept,
      candidate_field = NA_character_,
      field_role = "binary_indicator",
      matched_pattern = spec$matched_pattern,
      present = FALSE,
      class = NA_character_,
      n_nonmissing = 0L,
      prevalence_overall = NA_real_,
      prevalence_abg_tested = NA_real_,
      prevalence_vbg_tested = NA_real_,
      events_abg_tested = 0L,
      events_vbg_tested = 0L,
      date_field = NA_character_,
      date_missing_abg_tested = NA_real_,
      date_missing_vbg_tested = NA_real_,
      priority_rank = spec$priority_rank,
      selection_reason = "no_matching_binary_field"
    ))
  }
  purrr::map_dfr(matched_fields, function(field) {
    source_vec <- sentinel_source_vector(field)
    y <- sentinel_indicator(source_vec)
    date_field <- sentinel_date_field_for(field, spec$matched_pattern)
    date_vec <- if (!is.na(date_field)) subset_data_raw[[date_field]] else rep(NA, nrow(subset_data_raw))
    abg_tested <- subset_data$has_abg == 1
    vbg_tested <- subset_data$has_vbg == 1
    tibble::tibble(
      sentinel_concept = spec$sentinel_concept,
      candidate_field = field,
      field_role = ifelse(field %in% names(subset_data), "analysis_indicator", "raw_indicator"),
      matched_pattern = spec$matched_pattern,
      present = TRUE,
      class = paste(class(source_vec), collapse = "/"),
      n_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(source_vec)),
      prevalence_overall = mean(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_abg_tested = mean(y[abg_tested] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_vbg_tested = mean(y[vbg_tested] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      events_abg_tested = sum(y[abg_tested] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      events_vbg_tested = sum(y[vbg_tested] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      date_field = ifelse(is.na(date_field), "", date_field),
      date_missing_abg_tested = ifelse(
        is.na(date_field) || !any(abg_tested & y == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        NA_real_,
        mean(is.na(date_vec[abg_tested & y == 1]))
      ),
      date_missing_vbg_tested = ifelse(
        is.na(date_field) || !any(vbg_tested & y == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        NA_real_,
        mean(is.na(date_vec[vbg_tested & y == 1]))
      ),
      priority_rank = spec$priority_rank,
      selection_reason = "candidate_detected"
    )
  })
})

sentinel_min_events <- if (IS_PILOT) 20L else 100L
sentinel_selection_scored <- sentinel_inventory_rows |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    prevalence_for_selection = suppressWarnings(max(
      c(prevalence_abg_tested, prevalence_vbg_tested),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )),
    event_count_for_selection = suppressWarnings(max(
      c(events_abg_tested, events_vbg_tested),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ))
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    prevalence_for_selection = ifelse(is.infinite(prevalence_for_selection), NA_real_, prevalence_for_selection),
    event_count_for_selection = ifelse(is.infinite(event_count_for_selection), 0L, event_count_for_selection),
    eligible = .data$present &
      is.finite(.data$prevalence_for_selection) &
      .data$prevalence_for_selection >= 0.01 &
      .data$prevalence_for_selection <= 0.60 &
      .data$event_count_for_selection >= sentinel_min_events,
    selection_reason = dplyr::case_when(
      !.data$present ~ "no_matching_binary_field",
      !is.finite(.data$prevalence_for_selection) ~ "prevalence_unavailable",
      .data$prevalence_for_selection < 0.01 ~ "prevalence_below_1_percent",
      .data$prevalence_for_selection > 0.60 ~ "prevalence_above_60_percent",
      .data$event_count_for_selection < sentinel_min_events ~ "insufficient_events",
      TRUE ~ "eligible"
    ),
    sentinel_key = paste(.data$sentinel_concept, .data$candidate_field, sep = "::")
  )

sentinel_best_by_concept <- sentinel_selection_scored |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$priority_rank, dplyr::desc(.data$eligible), dplyr::desc(.data$prevalence_for_selection)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$sentinel_concept) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

sentinel_selected_keys <- sentinel_best_by_concept |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$eligible) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$priority_rank) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 4) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$sentinel_key)

discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory <- sentinel_inventory_rows |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, candidate_field, field_role, matched_pattern, present,
    class, n_nonmissing, prevalence_overall, prevalence_abg_tested,
    prevalence_vbg_tested, date_field, date_missing_abg_tested,
    date_missing_vbg_tested, selection_reason, dplyr::everything()
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection <- sentinel_best_by_concept |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    selected = .data$sentinel_key %in% sentinel_selected_keys,
    selection_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$selected ~ "selected",
      .data$eligible ~ "not_selected_lower_priority",
      TRUE ~ paste0("not_selected_", .data$selection_reason)
    ),
    binary_field = dplyr::if_else(.data$present, .data$candidate_field, "")
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, binary_field, date_field, priority_rank, selected,
    prevalence_for_selection, event_count_for_selection,
    selection_status, selection_reason
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

selected_sentinels <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$selected)
sentinel_balance_rows <- list()
if (nrow(selected_sentinels)) {
  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
    for (row_idx in seq_len(nrow(selected_sentinels))) {
      sentinel_i <- selected_sentinels[row_idx, ]
      binary_field <- sentinel_i$binary_field
      date_field <- sentinel_i$date_field
      y <- sentinel_indicator(sentinel_source_vector(binary_field, d_imp))
      date_vec <- if (nzchar(date_field) && date_field %in% names(subset_data_raw)) {
        subset_data_raw[[date_field]]
      } else {
        rep(NA, nrow(subset_data_raw))
      }
      for (group in discordance_groups) {
        treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
        weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
        tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
        event_rows <- tested & y == 1
        sentinel_balance_rows[[length(sentinel_balance_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
          sentinel_concept = sentinel_i$sentinel_concept,
          group = group,
          imp = imp_index,
          n_tested = sum(tested, na.rm = TRUE),
          events = sum(event_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
          unweighted_rate = mean(y[tested] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
          weighted_rate = weighted_mean_safe(y[tested], weights_i[tested]),
          weighted_n = sum(weights_i[tested], na.rm = TRUE),
          ess = weighted_ess(weights_i[tested]),
          date_missing_fraction = ifelse(
            nzchar(date_field) && any(event_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean(is.na(date_vec[event_rows])),
            NA_real_
          )
        )
      }
    }
    rm(d_imp)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance <- dplyr::bind_rows(sentinel_balance_rows)
} else {
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance <- tibble::tibble(
    sentinel_concept = NA_character_,
    group = NA_character_,
    imp = NA_integer_,
    n_tested = NA_integer_,
    events = NA_integer_,
    unweighted_rate = NA_real_,
    weighted_rate = NA_real_,
    weighted_n = NA_real_,
    ess = NA_real_,
    date_missing_fraction = NA_real_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "no_sentinel_procedure_selected"
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

sentinel_metric_summary <- if (nrow(selected_sentinels)) {
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$sentinel_concept, .data$group) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      weighted_rate = stats::median(.data$weighted_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      date_missing_fraction = stats::median(.data$date_missing_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
      m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = group,
      values_from = c(weighted_rate, date_missing_fraction, m_used)
    ) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      sentinel_concept,
      abg_weighted_rate = .data$weighted_rate_ABG,
      vbg_weighted_rate = .data$weighted_rate_VBG,
      weighted_abs_diff = .data$abg_weighted_rate - .data$vbg_weighted_rate,
      weighted_relative_diff = safe_relative_gap(.data$abg_weighted_rate, .data$vbg_weighted_rate),
      date_missing_abs_diff = abs(.data$date_missing_fraction_ABG - .data$date_missing_fraction_VBG),
      m_used = pmin(.data$m_used_ABG, .data$m_used_VBG, na.rm = TRUE),
      m_used = ifelse(is.infinite(.data$m_used), NA_integer_, as.integer(.data$m_used))
    )
} else {
  tibble::tibble(
    sentinel_concept = character(),
    abg_weighted_rate = numeric(),
    vbg_weighted_rate = numeric(),
    weighted_abs_diff = numeric(),
    weighted_relative_diff = numeric(),
    date_missing_abs_diff = numeric(),
    m_used = integer()
  )
}

discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection |>
  dplyr::select(sentinel_concept, selected, selection_status, selection_reason) |>
  dplyr::left_join(sentinel_metric_summary, by = "sentinel_concept") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
      !.data$selected ~ .data$selection_status,
      is.finite(.data$date_missing_abs_diff) & .data$date_missing_abs_diff > 0.05 ~
        "Sentinel procedure timestamp completeness differs by >5 percentage points.",
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & abs(.data$weighted_abs_diff) > 0.05 ~
        "Sentinel procedure weighted capture rates differ by >5 percentage points.",
      TRUE ~ "Selected sentinel does not show a large ABG-VBG capture/completeness gap."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, selected, abg_weighted_rate, vbg_weighted_rate,
    weighted_abs_diff, weighted_relative_diff, date_missing_abs_diff,
    m_used, interpretation
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

sentinel_specificity_lookup <- tibble::tribble(
  ~sentinel_concept, ~physiologic_specificity, ~workflow_dependence, ~specificity_reason,
  "ECG/EKG", "low", "medium", "Common diagnostic test; not specific to hypercapnia escalation.",
  "Chest radiograph", "medium", "medium", "Common hospital imaging test; respiratory-adjacent but not specific to NIV/IMV decisions.",
  "Transthoracic echocardiography", "high", "high", "Cardiac pathway and service-line workflow can drive capture.",
  "CT chest / CT pulmonary angiography", "high", "high", "Respiratory/cardiopulmonary pathway and site imaging workflow can drive capture.",
  "Central venous catheter placement", "medium", "high", "General ICU procedure, but severity and service-line workflow can drive use.",
  "Urinary catheter placement", "low", "medium", "Common bedside procedure; less specific to hypercapnia physiology.",
  "Blood transfusion", "medium", "medium", "General hospital procedure, but case-mix and service-line variation can drive use.",
  "Hemodialysis initiation", "medium", "high", "Renal replacement therapy is service-line and severity dependent.",
  "Bronchoscopy", "high", "high", "Respiratory pathway procedure closely tied to pulmonary care decisions."
)

sentinel_v2_preferred_order <- c(
  "ECG/EKG",
  "Chest radiograph",
  "Urinary catheter placement",
  "Central venous catheter placement",
  "Blood transfusion",
  "Transthoracic echocardiography",
  "CT chest / CT pulmonary angiography",
  "Hemodialysis initiation",
  "Bronchoscopy"
)

sentinel_v2_scored <- sentinel_selection_scored |>
  dplyr::left_join(sentinel_specificity_lookup, by = "sentinel_concept") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    physiologic_specificity = tidyr::replace_na(.data$physiologic_specificity, "unknown"),
    workflow_dependence = tidyr::replace_na(.data$workflow_dependence, "unknown"),
    specificity_reason = tidyr::replace_na(.data$specificity_reason, "No specificity note available."),
    timestamp_available = !is.na(.data$date_field) & nzchar(.data$date_field),
    coding_completeness_proxy = ifelse(nrow(subset_data) > 0, .data$n_nonmissing / nrow(subset_data), NA_real_),
    v2_priority_rank = match(.data$sentinel_concept, sentinel_v2_preferred_order),
    v2_priority_rank = ifelse(is.na(.data$v2_priority_rank), .data$priority_rank + 100L, .data$v2_priority_rank),
    lower_specificity_eligible = .data$eligible &
      .data$physiologic_specificity %in% c("low", "medium"),
    v2_selection_reason = dplyr::case_when(
      !.data$eligible ~ .data$selection_reason,
      .data$physiologic_specificity == "high" ~ "eligible_but_physiology_or_pathway_specific",
      .data$workflow_dependence == "high" ~ "eligible_but_workflow_dependent",
      TRUE ~ "eligible_for_capture_specificity"
    )
  )

sentinel_v2_best_by_concept <- sentinel_v2_scored |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    .data$v2_priority_rank,
    dplyr::desc(.data$lower_specificity_eligible),
    dplyr::desc(.data$eligible),
    dplyr::desc(.data$timestamp_available),
    dplyr::desc(.data$prevalence_for_selection)
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$sentinel_concept) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

sentinel_v2_selected_keys <- sentinel_v2_best_by_concept |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$lower_specificity_eligible) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$v2_priority_rank, dplyr::desc(.data$timestamp_available), dplyr::desc(.data$prevalence_for_selection)) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 4) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$sentinel_key)

if (length(sentinel_v2_selected_keys) < 2L) {
  sentinel_v2_selected_keys <- sentinel_v2_best_by_concept |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$eligible) |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$v2_priority_rank, dplyr::desc(.data$timestamp_available), dplyr::desc(.data$prevalence_for_selection)) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 4) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data$sentinel_key)
}

discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2 <- sentinel_v2_scored |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    selected_v2 = .data$sentinel_key %in% sentinel_v2_selected_keys,
    evidentiary_role = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$selected_v2 & .data$physiologic_specificity %in% c("low", "medium") ~
        "capture_or_documentation_sentinel",
      .data$selected_v2 ~ "workflow_or_documentation_sentinel",
      TRUE ~ "not_selected"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, candidate_field, field_role, matched_pattern, present,
    class, n_nonmissing, prevalence_overall, prevalence_abg_tested,
    prevalence_vbg_tested, events_abg_tested, events_vbg_tested,
    date_field, date_missing_abg_tested, date_missing_vbg_tested,
    priority_rank, v2_priority_rank, physiologic_specificity,
    workflow_dependence, timestamp_available, coding_completeness_proxy,
    selected_v2, evidentiary_role, selection_reason, v2_selection_reason
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2 <- sentinel_v2_scored |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    selected = .data$sentinel_key %in% sentinel_v2_selected_keys,
    selection_status = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$selected ~ "selected",
      .data$eligible ~ "not_selected_lower_specificity_priority",
      TRUE ~ paste0("not_selected_", .data$selection_reason)
    ),
    binary_field = dplyr::if_else(.data$present, .data$candidate_field, ""),
    evidentiary_role = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$selected & .data$physiologic_specificity %in% c("low", "medium") ~
        "capture_or_documentation_sentinel",
      .data$selected ~ "workflow_or_documentation_sentinel",
      TRUE ~ "not_selected"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$v2_priority_rank, dplyr::desc(.data$selected), .data$sentinel_concept) |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, binary_field, date_field, priority_rank, v2_priority_rank,
    selected, prevalence_for_selection, event_count_for_selection,
    physiologic_specificity, workflow_dependence, timestamp_available,
    evidentiary_role, selection_status, selection_reason, v2_selection_reason
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

selected_v2_sentinels <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2 |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$selected)
sentinel_v2_balance_rows <- list()
if (nrow(selected_v2_sentinels)) {
  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
    for (row_idx in seq_len(nrow(selected_v2_sentinels))) {
      sentinel_i <- selected_v2_sentinels[row_idx, ]
      binary_field <- sentinel_i$binary_field
      date_field <- sentinel_i$date_field
      y <- sentinel_indicator(sentinel_source_vector(binary_field, d_imp))
      date_present <- if (nzchar(date_field) && date_field %in% names(subset_data_raw)) {
        !is.na(parse_discordance_time(
          subset_data_raw[[date_field]],
          field = date_field,
          reference_date = encounter_date_reference
        ))
      } else {
        rep(FALSE, nrow(subset_data_raw))
      }
      for (group in discordance_groups) {
        treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
        weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
        tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
        event_rows <- tested & y == 1
        sentinel_v2_balance_rows[[length(sentinel_v2_balance_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
          sentinel_concept = sentinel_i$sentinel_concept,
          binary_field = binary_field,
          date_field = date_field,
          group = group,
          imp = imp_index,
          weighted_rate = weighted_mean_safe(y[tested], weights_i[tested]),
          date_missing_fraction = ifelse(
            nzchar(date_field) && any(event_rows, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean(!date_present[event_rows]),
            NA_real_
          )
        )
      }
    }
    rm(d_imp)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
}

sentinel_v2_metric_summary <- if (length(sentinel_v2_balance_rows)) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(sentinel_v2_balance_rows) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$sentinel_concept, .data$binary_field, .data$date_field, .data$group) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      weighted_rate = stats::median(.data$weighted_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      date_missing_fraction = stats::median(.data$date_missing_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
      m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = group,
      values_from = c(weighted_rate, date_missing_fraction, m_used)
    ) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      sentinel_concept,
      binary_field,
      date_field,
      abg_weighted_rate = .data$weighted_rate_ABG,
      vbg_weighted_rate = .data$weighted_rate_VBG,
      weighted_abs_diff = .data$abg_weighted_rate - .data$vbg_weighted_rate,
      weighted_relative_diff = safe_relative_gap(.data$abg_weighted_rate, .data$vbg_weighted_rate),
      date_missing_abs_diff = abs(.data$date_missing_fraction_ABG - .data$date_missing_fraction_VBG),
      m_used = pmin(.data$m_used_ABG, .data$m_used_VBG, na.rm = TRUE),
      m_used = ifelse(is.infinite(.data$m_used), NA_integer_, as.integer(.data$m_used))
    )
} else {
  tibble::tibble(
    sentinel_concept = character(),
    binary_field = character(),
    date_field = character(),
    abg_weighted_rate = numeric(),
    vbg_weighted_rate = numeric(),
    weighted_abs_diff = numeric(),
    weighted_relative_diff = numeric(),
    date_missing_abs_diff = numeric(),
    m_used = integer()
  )
}

discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2 <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2 |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    sentinel_v2_metric_summary,
    by = c("sentinel_concept", "binary_field", "date_field")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
      !.data$selected ~ .data$selection_status,
      is.finite(.data$date_missing_abs_diff) & .data$date_missing_abs_diff > 0.05 ~
        "V2 sentinel timestamp completeness differs by >5 percentage points for the selected candidate field.",
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & abs(.data$weighted_abs_diff) > 0.05 ~
        "V2 sentinel weighted capture rates differ by >5 percentage points for the selected candidate field.",
      TRUE ~ "Selected v2 sentinel does not show a large ABG-VBG capture/completeness gap."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    sentinel_concept, binary_field, date_field, selected, abg_weighted_rate,
    vbg_weighted_rate, weighted_abs_diff, weighted_relative_diff,
    date_missing_abs_diff, m_used, interpretation
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2,
  results_path("discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

selected_v2_note <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2 |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$selected) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    line = paste0(
      "- ", .data$sentinel_concept, " (`", .data$binary_field, "`): ",
      .data$evidentiary_role, "; specificity=", .data$physiologic_specificity,
      "; workflow_dependence=", .data$workflow_dependence, "."
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$line)
if (!length(selected_v2_note)) selected_v2_note <- "- No v2 sentinel met prevalence/event-count criteria in this render subset."
discordance_write_md(
  c(
    "# Sentinel Procedure Specificity Note",
    "",
    "Sentinel v2 selection prioritizes procedures that are common enough to audit capture/completeness but less tightly linked to the respiratory/cardiac pathway than NIV or IMV.",
    "",
    "Selected sentinels:",
    selected_v2_note,
    "",
    "High-specificity or high-workflow-dependence candidates are interpreted as workflow/documentation sentinels rather than pure procedure-capture sentinels."
  ),
  "discordance_sentinel_specificity_note.md"
)
record_discordance_status(
  "sentinel_procedure_capture_v2",
  if (length(sentinel_v2_selected_keys) >= 2L) "completed" else if (length(sentinel_v2_selected_keys) > 0L) "partial" else "skipped",
  paste0(
    "Selected ",
    length(sentinel_v2_selected_keys),
    " v2 sentinel candidate(s) with explicit specificity and workflow-dependence labels."
  ),
  "Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_specificity_note.md",
  optional = length(sentinel_v2_selected_keys) < 2L
)

n_sentinel_selected <- sum(discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection$selected %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
record_discordance_status(
  "sentinel_procedure_capture",
  if (n_sentinel_selected >= 2L) "completed" else if (n_sentinel_selected > 0L) "partial" else "skipped",
  paste0(
    "Selected ",
    n_sentinel_selected,
    " sentinel procedure concept(s) using prevalence and event-count rules."
  ),
  "Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance.csv; Results/discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary.csv",
  optional = n_sentinel_selected < 2L
)

## Support, tail, and positivity diagnostics
make_quantile_bin <- function(x) {
  probs <- c(0, 0.02, 0.25, 0.75, 0.98, 1)
  cuts <- unique(stats::quantile(x, probs = probs, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
  if (length(cuts) < 3L) return(factor(rep(NA_character_, length(x))))
  cut(x, breaks = cuts, include.lowest = TRUE, ordered_result = TRUE)
}

tail_support_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (group in discordance_groups) {
    co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
    treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
    low_cut <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) ABG_CO2_LOW else VBG_CO2_LOW
    high_cut <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) ABG_CO2_HIGH else VBG_CO2_HIGH
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
    tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1 & is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d_imp[[co2_var]])))
    co2_x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d_imp[[co2_var]]))
    clinical_bin <- make_co2_cat3(co2_x, low_cut, high_cut)
    clinical_bin <- factor(clinical_bin, levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High"), ordered = TRUE)
    quantile_bin <- rep(NA, nrow(d_imp))
    quantile_bin[tested] <- as.character(make_quantile_bin(co2_x[tested]))
    bin_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
      tibble::tibble(bin_type = "clinical_cat3", bin = as.character(clinical_bin)),
      tibble::tibble(bin_type = "quantile_support", bin = as.character(quantile_bin))
    ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(row_id = rep(seq_len(nrow(d_imp)), times = 2L))

    for (outcome_var in discordance_outcome_vars) {
      y <- to01(d_imp[[outcome_var]])
      for (bin_type_i in unique(bin_df$bin_type)) {
        rows_i <- bin_df |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$bin_type == bin_type_i) |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            tested = tested[row_id],
            y = y[row_id],
            w = weights_i[row_id],
            co2 = co2_x[row_id]
          ) |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$tested, !is.na(.data$bin))
        if (!nrow(rows_i)) next
        tail_support_rows[[length(tail_support_rows) + 1L]] <- rows_i |>
          dplyr::group_by(bin_type, bin) |>
          dplyr::summarise(
            n_unweighted = dplyr::n(),
            co2_min = min(co2, na.rm = TRUE),
            co2_max = max(co2, na.rm = TRUE),
            weighted_n = sum(w, na.rm = TRUE),
            weighted_events = sum(w * y, na.rm = TRUE),
            weighted_event_rate = ifelse(weighted_n > 0, weighted_events / weighted_n, NA_real_),
            ess = weighted_ess(w),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            imp = imp_index,
            group = group,
            outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
            outcome_var = outcome_var
          )
      }
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

discordance_tail_support_by_bin <- dplyr::bind_rows(tail_support_rows) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, outcome, outcome_var, bin_type, bin) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_unweighted = stats::median(n_unweighted, na.rm = TRUE),
    co2_min = stats::median(co2_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    co2_max = stats::median(co2_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_n = stats::median(weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_events = stats::median(weighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_event_rate = stats::median(weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    ess = stats::median(ess, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_tail_support_by_bin,
  results_path("discordance_tail_support_by_bin.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

discordance_tail_support_summary <- discordance_tail_support_by_bin |>
  dplyr::group_by(group, outcome, bin_type) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    min_ess = min(ess, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_weighted_events = min(weighted_events, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_weighted_event_rate = max(weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_bins = dplyr::n(),
    support_flag = any(ess < 100 | weighted_events < 10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_tail_support_summary,
  results_path("discordance_tail_support_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "tail_support",
  "completed",
  "Weighted support, events, event rates, and ESS were summarized by clinical and quantile CO2 bins.",
  "Results/discordance_tail_support_summary.csv; Results/discordance_tail_support_by_bin.csv"
)

tail_clinical <- discordance_tail_support_by_bin |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$bin_type == "clinical_cat3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(bin = factor(bin, levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High")))

tail_rate_plot <- tail_clinical |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = bin, y = weighted_event_rate, color = group, group = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome, nrow = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Clinical CO2 category", y = "Weighted event rate", color = "Modality") +
  theme_pub(base_size = 9)

tail_ess_plot <- tail_clinical |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = bin, y = ess, fill = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ outcome, nrow = 1) +
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Clinical CO2 category", y = "Weighted ESS", fill = "Modality") +
  theme_pub(base_size = 9)

discordance_tail_support_plot <- tail_rate_plot / tail_ess_plot +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "Tail support and event rates for NIV/IMV")
discordance_tail_png <- results_path("figs", "discordance_tail_support_niv_imv.png")
discordance_tail_pdf <- results_path("figs", "discordance_tail_support_niv_imv.pdf")
save_diag_plot(discordance_tail_support_plot, discordance_tail_png, width = 8.5, height = 6.2)
save_diag_plot(discordance_tail_support_plot, discordance_tail_pdf, width = 8.5, height = 6.2)
register_plot_file("discordance_tail_support_niv_imv", discordance_tail_png)
render_inline_graphic(discordance_tail_png)

## Setting and subgroup sensitivity analyses
site_candidates <- candidate_cols(
  names(subset_data),
  "(^site$|facility|hospital|health_system|institution)",
  exclude = c("location"),
  max_n = 10
)
site_field <- NA_character_
if (length(site_candidates)) {
  site_levels <- vapply(site_candidates, function(v) dplyr::n_distinct(subset_data[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), integer(1L))
  feasible <- site_candidates[site_levels >= 2L & site_levels <= 50L]
  if (length(feasible)) site_field <- feasible[[1L]]
}
setting_vars <- c("encounter_type", "location", site_field)
setting_vars <- setting_vars[!is.na(setting_vars) & setting_vars %in% names(subset_data)]

setting_rows <- list()
for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
  d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
  for (group in discordance_groups) {
    treat_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
    weights_i <- get_mi_weight(group, imp_index)
    tested <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1
    for (setting_var in setting_vars) {
      for (outcome_var in discordance_outcome_vars) {
        setting_rows[[length(setting_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
          setting_level = as.character(d_imp[[setting_var]]),
          y = to01(d_imp[[outcome_var]]),
          w = weights_i,
          tested = tested
        ) |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$tested, !is.na(.data$setting_level), nzchar(.data$setting_level)) |>
          dplyr::group_by(setting_level) |>
          dplyr::summarise(
            n_unweighted = dplyr::n(),
            weighted_n = sum(w, na.rm = TRUE),
            weighted_event_rate = weighted_mean_safe(y, w),
            ess = weighted_ess(w),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            imp = imp_index,
            group = group,
            outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
            setting_var = setting_var
          )
      }
    }
  }
  rm(d_imp)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
}

discordance_setting_sensitivity <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_rows) |>
  dplyr::group_by(setting_var, setting_level, group, outcome) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_unweighted = stats::median(n_unweighted, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_n = stats::median(weighted_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_event_rate = stats::median(weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    ess = stats::median(ess, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(imp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_setting_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_setting_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
discordance_setting_rate_ranges <- discordance_setting_sensitivity |>
  dplyr::group_by(setting_var, outcome, group) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_setting_levels = dplyr::n(),
    min_weighted_event_rate = suppressWarnings(min(weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE)),
    max_weighted_event_rate = suppressWarnings(max(weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE)),
    rate_range = max_weighted_event_rate - min_weighted_event_rate,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(min_weighted_event_rate, max_weighted_event_rate, rate_range),
      ~ ifelse(is.infinite(.x), NA_real_, .x)
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_setting_rate_ranges,
  results_path("discordance_setting_rate_ranges.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "setting_sensitivity",
  "completed",
  ifelse(
    is.na(site_field),
    "Encounter-type and location sensitivity completed; no separate feasible site field was found.",
    paste0("Encounter-type, location, and site-like field sensitivity completed using ", site_field, ".")
  ),
  "Results/discordance_setting_sensitivity.csv; Results/discordance_setting_rate_ranges.csv"
)
if (is.na(site_field)) {
  discordance_site_sensitivity <- tibble::tibble(
    setting_var = NA_character_,
    setting_level = NA_character_,
    group = NA_character_,
    outcome = NA_character_,
    n_unweighted = NA_real_,
    weighted_n = NA_real_,
    weighted_event_rate = NA_real_,
    ess = NA_real_,
    m_used = NA_integer_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "No separate site/facility identifier with 2-50 levels was found."
  )
  record_discordance_status(
    "site_specific_sensitivity",
    "skipped",
    "No separate site/facility identifier with 2-50 levels was found.",
    "Results/discordance_site_sensitivity.csv",
    optional = TRUE
  )
} else {
  discordance_site_sensitivity <- discordance_setting_sensitivity |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$setting_var == .env$site_field) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      component_status = "completed",
      reason = paste0("Site-like sensitivity used field ", .env$site_field, ".")
    )
  record_discordance_status(
    "site_specific_sensitivity",
    "completed",
    paste0("Site-like sensitivity used field ", site_field, "."),
    "Results/discordance_site_sensitivity.csv"
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_site_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_site_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

## IMV-focused setting and site heterogeneity diagnostics
imv_setting_vars <- intersect(c("encounter_type", "location"), setting_vars)
imv_setting_level_specs <- purrr::map_dfr(imv_setting_vars, function(setting_var) {
  level_df <- tibble::tibble(
    setting_var = setting_var,
    setting_level = as.character(subset_data[[setting_var]]),
    has_abg = subset_data$has_abg == 1,
    has_vbg = subset_data$has_vbg == 1
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$setting_level), nzchar(.data$setting_level)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$setting_var, .data$setting_level) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_total = dplyr::n(),
      n_abg = sum(.data$has_abg, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_vbg = sum(.data$has_vbg, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$n_abg >= 10L, .data$n_vbg >= 10L) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$n_total))
  if (identical(setting_var, "location")) {
    level_df <- dplyr::slice_head(level_df, n = 8)
  }
  level_df
})

imv_setting_prediction_rows <- list()
if (nrow(imv_setting_level_specs)) {
  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
    for (spec_idx in seq_len(nrow(imv_setting_level_specs))) {
      spec_i <- imv_setting_level_specs[spec_idx, ]
      row_in_setting <- !is.na(d_imp[[spec_i$setting_var]]) &
        as.character(d_imp[[spec_i$setting_var]]) == spec_i$setting_level
      source_setting <- standardization_source_rows(d_imp[row_in_setting, , drop = FALSE], imp_index)
      if (!nrow(source_setting)) next
      for (group in discordance_groups) {
        co2_var <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
        co2_targets <- co2_level_targets(group)
        fit_bank <- if (identical(group, "ABG")) spline_fits_abg else spline_fits_vbg
        fit_compact <- compact_spline_fit(fit_bank[["imv_proc"]][[imp_index]])
        if (is.null(fit_compact)) next
        pred_try <- tryCatch(
          marginal_predict_compact(
            fit_compact,
            source_df = source_setting,
            co2_var = co2_var,
            co2_values = unname(co2_targets),
            outcome_var = "imv_proc"
          ),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        if (is.null(pred_try) || !nrow(pred_try)) next
        imv_setting_prediction_rows[[length(imv_setting_prediction_rows) + 1L]] <- pred_try |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            imp = imp_index,
            group = group,
            outcome = "IMV",
            outcome_var = "imv_proc",
            setting_var = spec_i$setting_var,
            setting_level = spec_i$setting_level,
            co2_level = names(co2_targets)[seq_len(dplyr::n())],
            n_setting_total = spec_i$n_total,
            n_setting_abg = spec_i$n_abg,
            n_setting_vbg = spec_i$n_vbg
          )
      }
    }
    rm(d_imp)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
}

if (length(imv_setting_prediction_rows)) {
  discordance_imv_setting_standardized <- dplyr::bind_rows(imv_setting_prediction_rows) |>
    pool_marginal_standardized_predictions(
      group_vars = c(
        "setting_var", "setting_level", "outcome", "outcome_var", "group",
        "co2_level", "co2_value", "n_setting_total", "n_setting_abg", "n_setting_vbg"
      ),
      m_total = imp_n,
      min_ok_frac = min_marginal_ok_frac,
      context = "discordance IMV within-setting marginal standardized predictions"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      component_status = "completed",
      reason = "within_setting_common_source_marginal_standardization"
    )
} else {
  discordance_imv_setting_standardized <- tibble::tibble(
    setting_var = NA_character_,
    setting_level = NA_character_,
    outcome = "IMV",
    outcome_var = "imv_proc",
    group = NA_character_,
    co2_level = NA_character_,
    co2_value = NA_real_,
    n_setting_total = NA_real_,
    n_setting_abg = NA_real_,
    n_setting_vbg = NA_real_,
    p = NA_real_,
    p_LCL = NA_real_,
    p_UCL = NA_real_,
    n_standardized = NA_real_,
    m_used = NA_integer_,
    standardization_sample_cap = standardization_sample_cap,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "no_setting_with_both_modalities_or_predictions"
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_imv_setting_standardized,
  results_path("discordance_imv_setting_standardized.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "imv_setting_standardized",
  ifelse(any(discordance_imv_setting_standardized$component_status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE), "completed", "skipped"),
  "IMV within-setting common-source marginal-standardized probability comparisons were generated where feasible.",
  "Results/discordance_imv_setting_standardized.csv",
  optional = !any(discordance_imv_setting_standardized$component_status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE)
)

if (is.na(site_field)) {
  discordance_imv_site_sensitivity <- tibble::tibble(
    site_field = NA_character_,
    site_level = NA_character_,
    group = NA_character_,
    outcome = "IMV",
    n_unweighted = NA_real_,
    weighted_n = NA_real_,
    weighted_event_rate = NA_real_,
    ess = NA_real_,
    m_used = NA_integer_,
    both_modality_site = NA,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "No separate site/facility identifier with 2-50 levels was found."
  )
} else {
  site_counts <- tibble::tibble(
    site_level = as.character(subset_data[[site_field]]),
    has_abg = subset_data$has_abg == 1,
    has_vbg = subset_data$has_vbg == 1
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$site_level), nzchar(.data$site_level)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$site_level) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      site_n_abg = sum(.data$has_abg, na.rm = TRUE),
      site_n_vbg = sum(.data$has_vbg, na.rm = TRUE),
      both_modality_site = .data$site_n_abg >= 20L & .data$site_n_vbg >= 20L,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  discordance_imv_site_sensitivity <- discordance_setting_sensitivity |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$setting_var == .env$site_field, .data$outcome == "IMV") |>
    dplyr::rename(site_level = setting_level) |>
    dplyr::left_join(site_counts, by = "site_level") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      site_field = .env$site_field,
      component_status = "completed",
      reason = "IMV site-level weighted event-rate sensitivity."
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      site_field, site_level, group, outcome, n_unweighted, weighted_n,
      weighted_event_rate, ess, m_used, site_n_abg, site_n_vbg,
      both_modality_site, component_status, reason
    )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_imv_site_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_imv_site_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "imv_site_sensitivity",
  ifelse(any(discordance_imv_site_sensitivity$component_status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE), "completed", "skipped"),
  ifelse(is.na(site_field), "IMV site sensitivity skipped because no feasible site identifier was found.", "IMV site-level sensitivity was generated."),
  "Results/discordance_imv_site_sensitivity.csv",
  optional = is.na(site_field)
)

imv_setting_gap_wide <- discordance_imv_setting_standardized |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$component_status == "completed") |>
  dplyr::select(setting_var, setting_level, co2_level, group, p, m_used) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = c(p, m_used))
if (!"p_ABG" %in% names(imv_setting_gap_wide)) imv_setting_gap_wide$p_ABG <- NA_real_
if (!"p_VBG" %in% names(imv_setting_gap_wide)) imv_setting_gap_wide$p_VBG <- NA_real_
if (!"m_used_ABG" %in% names(imv_setting_gap_wide)) imv_setting_gap_wide$m_used_ABG <- NA_integer_
if (!"m_used_VBG" %in% names(imv_setting_gap_wide)) imv_setting_gap_wide$m_used_VBG <- NA_integer_
imv_setting_gap_wide <- imv_setting_gap_wide |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abg_vbg_gap = .data$p_ABG - .data$p_VBG,
    abs_gap = abs(.data$abg_vbg_gap),
    m_used_min = pmin(.data$m_used_ABG, .data$m_used_VBG, na.rm = TRUE),
    m_used_min = ifelse(is.infinite(.data$m_used_min), NA_real_, .data$m_used_min)
  )

overall_imv_gap <- discordance_standardization_summary |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$outcome == "IMV") |>
  dplyr::summarise(max_abs_overall_gap = safe_max_abs_numeric(.data$gap_marginal_standardized)) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$max_abs_overall_gap)
within_imv_gap <- safe_max_abs_numeric(imv_setting_gap_wide$abg_vbg_gap)
setting_imv_rate_range <- discordance_setting_rate_ranges |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$outcome == "IMV") |>
  dplyr::summarise(max_setting_rate_range = safe_max_numeric(.data$rate_range)) |>
  dplyr::pull(.data$max_setting_rate_range)
site_imv_signal <- if (any(discordance_imv_site_sensitivity$component_status == "completed", na.rm = TRUE)) {
  discordance_imv_site_sensitivity |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$site_level, .data$outcome) |>
    dplyr::summarise(site_range = max(.data$weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE) - min(.data$weighted_event_rate, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::summarise(max_site_range = safe_max_numeric(.data$site_range)) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data$max_site_range)
} else {
  NA_real_
}

discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  component = c("overall_marginal_standardized_gap", "within_setting_standardized_gap", "setting_rate_range", "site_sensitivity_range"),
  value = c(overall_imv_gap, within_imv_gap, setting_imv_rate_range, site_imv_signal),
  evidence_status = c(
    ifelse(is.finite(overall_imv_gap) & overall_imv_gap > 0.05, "residual_gap_present", "no_large_residual_gap"),
    ifelse(is.finite(within_imv_gap) & is.finite(overall_imv_gap) & within_imv_gap >= 0.75 * overall_imv_gap, "within_setting_persists", "within_setting_attenuated_or_unavailable"),
    ifelse(is.finite(setting_imv_rate_range) & setting_imv_rate_range > 0.10, "setting_heterogeneity_present", "setting_heterogeneity_not_large"),
    ifelse(is.finite(site_imv_signal) & site_imv_signal > 0.05, "site_signal_present", "site_signal_unavailable_or_not_large")
  ),
  interpretation = c(
    "Maximum absolute IMV ABG-VBG gap after common-source marginal standardization.",
    "Maximum absolute IMV ABG-VBG gap after restricting the standardization source to feasible settings.",
    "Maximum within-modality IMV weighted event-rate range across setting variables.",
    "Maximum site-level IMV ABG-VBG weighted event-rate range among feasible sites."
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    overall_classification = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.finite(overall_imv_gap) ~ "unresolved_no_overall_gap_estimate",
      is.finite(within_imv_gap) & within_imv_gap >= 0.75 * overall_imv_gap ~ "residual_imv_gap_persists_within_settings",
      is.finite(setting_imv_rate_range) & setting_imv_rate_range > 0.10 ~ "setting_workflow_contributes_to_residual_imv_gap",
      is.finite(site_imv_signal) & site_imv_signal > 0.05 ~ "site_level_heterogeneity_may_contribute",
      TRUE ~ "residual_imv_gap_partly_attenuated_or_unresolved"
    )
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary,
  results_path("discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "imv_heterogeneity_summary",
  "completed",
  "Residual IMV discordance was summarized across overall, within-setting, setting-rate-range, and site-sensitivity diagnostics.",
  "Results/discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary.csv"
)

if (nrow(imv_setting_gap_wide)) {
  imv_setting_plot_df <- imv_setting_gap_wide |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      setting_type = dplyr::case_when(
        .data$setting_var == "encounter_type" ~ "Encounter type",
        .data$setting_var == "location" ~ "Region",
        TRUE ~ display_covariate_label(.data$setting_var)
      ),
      setting_display = mapply(
        pretty_covariate_value,
        .data$setting_var,
        as.character(.data$setting_level),
        USE.NAMES = FALSE
      ),
      co2_level = factor(.data$co2_level, levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High"))
    )
  imv_setting_palette <- c(
    "Emergency" = "#0072B2",
    "Inpatient" = "#D55E00",
    "South" = "#009E73",
    "Northeast" = "#E69F00",
    "Midwest" = "#56B4E9",
    "West" = "#CC79A7"
  )
  imv_setting_plot <- imv_setting_plot_df |>
    ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = co2_level, y = abg_vbg_gap, fill = setting_display)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ setting_type, scales = "free_y") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = imv_setting_palette, na.value = "grey50") +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "IMV ABG-VBG probability gaps within feasible settings",
      x = "CO2 category",
      y = "ABG minus VBG predicted probability",
      fill = "Setting"
    ) +
    theme_pub(base_size = 9)
  imv_setting_png <- results_path("figs", "discordance_imv_setting_heterogeneity.png")
  save_diag_plot(imv_setting_plot, imv_setting_png, width = 8.5, height = 5.6)
  register_plot_file("discordance_imv_setting_heterogeneity", imv_setting_png)
}

dual_rows <- list()
dual_tested <- subset_data$has_abg == 1 & subset_data$has_vbg == 1
if (sum(dual_tested, na.rm = TRUE) > 0L) {
  for (outcome_var in discordance_outcome_vars) {
    y <- to01(subset_data[[outcome_var]])
    dual_rows[[length(dual_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
      modality = "ABG",
      co2_category = as.character(make_co2_cat3(subset_data$paco2, ABG_CO2_LOW, ABG_CO2_HIGH)),
      outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
      y = y,
      dual_tested = dual_tested
    )
    dual_rows[[length(dual_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
      modality = "VBG",
      co2_category = as.character(make_co2_cat3(subset_data$vbg_co2, VBG_CO2_LOW, VBG_CO2_HIGH)),
      outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
      y = y,
      dual_tested = dual_tested
    )
  }
  discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity <- dplyr::bind_rows(dual_rows) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$dual_tested, !is.na(.data$co2_category)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(outcome, modality, co2_category) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = dplyr::n(),
      events = sum(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      event_rate = mean(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  record_discordance_status(
    "dual_tested_sensitivity",
    "completed",
    "Dual-tested encounter event rates by ABG/VBG CO2 category were summarized.",
    "Results/discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity.csv"
  )
} else {
  discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity <- tibble::tibble(
    outcome = NA_character_,
    modality = NA_character_,
    co2_category = NA_character_,
    n = 0L,
    events = 0L,
    event_rate = NA_real_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "no_dual_tested_encounters"
  )
  record_discordance_status(
    "dual_tested_sensitivity",
    "skipped",
    "No dual-tested encounters were available in this render subset.",
    "Results/discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity.csv",
    optional = TRUE
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

patient_field <- first_existing_col(
  c("patient_id", "person_id", "pat_id", "empi", "mrn", "member_id"),
  names(subset_data)
)
encounter_date_field <- first_existing_col(
  c("encounter_date", "encounter_datetime", "encounter_time", "enc_date"),
  names(subset_data)
)

if (!is.na(patient_field)) {
  append_mem_snapshot("discordance", "first_encounter_sensitivity", "pre")
  first_needed_cols <- unique(c(
    patient_field,
    if (!is.na(encounter_date_field)) encounter_date_field else character(),
    "has_abg",
    "has_vbg",
    discordance_outcome_vars
  ))
  first_needed_cols <- intersect(first_needed_cols, names(subset_data))
  first_input <- subset_data[, first_needed_cols, drop = FALSE]
  first_input$.row_order <- seq_len(nrow(first_input))
  if (!is.na(encounter_date_field)) {
    first_input$.encounter_order <- suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(first_input[[encounter_date_field]]))
  } else {
    first_input$.encounter_order <- first_input$.row_order
  }
  first_order <- order(
    first_input[[patient_field]],
    first_input$.encounter_order,
    first_input$.row_order,
    na.last = TRUE
  )
  first_patient_order <- first_input[[patient_field]][first_order]
  first_keep <- !duplicated(first_patient_order)
  first_df <- first_input[first_order[first_keep], , drop = FALSE]
  discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity <- tidyr::crossing(
    outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars,
    group = discordance_groups
  ) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome = discordance_outcome_labels[[outcome_var]],
      treat_var = ifelse(group == "ABG", "has_abg", "has_vbg"),
      n_tested = sum(first_df[[treat_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      events = sum(to01(first_df[[outcome_var]]) == 1 & first_df[[treat_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      event_rate = ifelse(n_tested > 0, events / n_tested, NA_real_),
      patient_field = patient_field,
      encounter_date_field = ifelse(is.na(encounter_date_field), "", encounter_date_field)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::select(outcome, group, n_tested, events, event_rate, patient_field, encounter_date_field)
  record_discordance_status(
    "first_encounter_sensitivity",
    "completed",
    paste0("First-encounter sensitivity used patient field ", patient_field, "."),
    "Results/discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity.csv",
    optional = TRUE
  )
  rm(first_df, first_input, first_order, first_patient_order, first_keep)
  invisible(gc(FALSE))
  append_mem_snapshot("discordance", "first_encounter_sensitivity", "post")
} else {
  discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity <- tibble::tibble(
    outcome = NA_character_,
    group = NA_character_,
    n_tested = NA_integer_,
    events = NA_integer_,
    event_rate = NA_real_,
    patient_field = NA_character_,
    encounter_date_field = NA_character_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "patient_identifier_unavailable"
  )
  record_discordance_status(
    "first_encounter_sensitivity",
    "skipped",
    "No patient identifier was available for first-encounter restriction.",
    "Results/discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity.csv",
    optional = TRUE
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(memory_snapshots, results_path("memory_snapshots.csv"), row_names = FALSE)

## Timing sensitivity
timing_names <- names(subset_data_raw)
gas_time_candidates <- candidate_cols(
  timing_names,
  "(abg|vbg|blood_gas|gas).*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)",
  max_n = 20
)
proc_time_candidates <- candidate_cols(
  timing_names,
  "(imv|niv).*(date|time|timestamp|datetime)",
  max_n = 20
)

timing_field_map_rows <- list()
for (field in unique(c(gas_time_candidates, proc_time_candidates))) {
  x <- subset_data_raw[[field]]
  parsed_detail <- parse_discordance_time_detail(x, field = field, reference_date = encounter_date_reference)
  parsed <- parsed_detail$parsed
  timing_field_map_rows[[length(timing_field_map_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
    field = field,
    field_role = dplyr::case_when(
      field %in% gas_time_candidates ~ "gas_time",
      field %in% proc_time_candidates ~ "procedure_time",
      TRUE ~ "unknown"
    ),
    modality = dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("abg|arterial", field, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "ABG",
      grepl("vbg|venous", field, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "VBG",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    outcome = dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("imv", field, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "IMV",
      grepl("niv", field, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NIV",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    class = paste(class(x), collapse = "/"),
    n_nonmissing = sum(!is.na(x)),
    n_parsed = sum(!is.na(parsed)),
    parse_fraction_among_nonmissing = ifelse(sum(!is.na(x)) > 0, sum(!is.na(parsed)) / sum(!is.na(x)), NA_real_),
    parse_method = parsed_detail$parse_method,
    parse_status = parsed_detail$parse_status
  )
}
discordance_timing_field_map <- if (length(timing_field_map_rows)) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(timing_field_map_rows)
} else {
  tibble::tibble(
    field = NA_character_,
    field_role = NA_character_,
    modality = NA_character_,
    outcome = NA_character_,
    class = NA_character_,
    n_nonmissing = 0L,
    n_parsed = 0L,
    parse_fraction_among_nonmissing = NA_real_,
    parse_method = "no_candidate_fields",
    parse_status = "skipped"
  )
}
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_timing_field_map,
  results_path("discordance_timing_field_map.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

timing_pair_specs <- tidyr::crossing(
  group = discordance_groups,
  outcome_var = discordance_outcome_vars
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome = unname(discordance_outcome_labels[outcome_var]),
    gas_time_field = dplyr::case_when(
      group == "ABG" ~ first_existing_col(
        c("abg_ph_date", "abg_hco3_date", "abg_co2_date", gas_time_candidates[grepl("abg|arterial", gas_time_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
        timing_names
      ),
      TRUE ~ first_existing_col(
        c("vbg_ph_date", "vbg_hco3_date", "vbg_co2_date", gas_time_candidates[grepl("vbg|venous", gas_time_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
        timing_names
      )
    ),
    procedure_time_field = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_var == "imv_proc" ~ first_existing_col(
        c("imv_proc_first_date", "imv_first_date", proc_time_candidates[grepl("imv", proc_time_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
        timing_names
      ),
      TRUE ~ first_existing_col(
        c("niv_proc_first_date", "niv_first_date", proc_time_candidates[grepl("niv", proc_time_candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]),
        timing_names
      )
    ),
    feasible_pair = !is.na(.data$gas_time_field) & !is.na(.data$procedure_time_field)
  )

timing_restricted_rows <- list()
if (any(timing_pair_specs$feasible_pair)) {
  for (imp_index in seq_len(imp_n)) {
    d_imp <- get_imp(imp_index)
    for (pair_idx in seq_len(nrow(timing_pair_specs))) {
      pair_i <- timing_pair_specs[pair_idx, ]
      if (!pair_i$feasible_pair) next
      gas_time <- parse_discordance_time(
        subset_data_raw[[pair_i$gas_time_field]],
        field = pair_i$gas_time_field,
        reference_date = encounter_date_reference
      )
      proc_time <- parse_discordance_time(
        subset_data_raw[[pair_i$procedure_time_field]],
        field = pair_i$procedure_time_field,
        reference_date = encounter_date_reference
      )
      date_only_pair <- !grepl("time|timestamp|datetime", paste(pair_i$gas_time_field, pair_i$procedure_time_field), ignore.case = TRUE)
      gas_precedes_proc <- if (date_only_pair) {
        !is.na(gas_time) & !is.na(proc_time) & as.Date(gas_time) <= as.Date(proc_time)
      } else {
        !is.na(gas_time) & !is.na(proc_time) &
          as.numeric(difftime(proc_time, gas_time, units = "mins")) >= 30
      }
      treat_var <- if (identical(pair_i$group, "ABG")) "has_abg" else "has_vbg"
      co2_var <- if (identical(pair_i$group, "ABG")) "paco2" else "vbg_co2"
      low_cut <- if (identical(pair_i$group, "ABG")) ABG_CO2_LOW else VBG_CO2_LOW
      high_cut <- if (identical(pair_i$group, "ABG")) ABG_CO2_HIGH else VBG_CO2_HIGH
      weights_i <- get_mi_weight(pair_i$group, imp_index)
      y <- to01(d_imp[[pair_i$outcome_var]])
      tested_with_gas_time <- d_imp[[treat_var]] == 1 & !is.na(gas_time)
      event_after_gas <- tested_with_gas_time & y == 1 & gas_precedes_proc
      co2_category <- factor(
        make_co2_cat3(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d_imp[[co2_var]])), low_cut, high_cut),
        levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),
        ordered = TRUE
      )
      timing_restricted_rows[[length(timing_restricted_rows) + 1L]] <- tibble::tibble(
        co2_level = as.character(co2_category),
        denominator = tested_with_gas_time,
        event_after_gas = event_after_gas,
        event_original = tested_with_gas_time & y == 1,
        w = weights_i
      ) |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$denominator, !is.na(.data$co2_level)) |>
        dplyr::group_by(.data$co2_level) |>
        dplyr::summarise(
          n_restricted = dplyr::n(),
          original_events = sum(.data$event_original, na.rm = TRUE),
          gas_precedes_events = sum(.data$event_after_gas, na.rm = TRUE),
          weighted_event_rate_original = weighted_mean_safe(.data$event_original, .data$w),
          weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes = weighted_mean_safe(.data$event_after_gas, .data$w),
          weighted_n = sum(.data$w, na.rm = TRUE),
          ess = weighted_ess(.data$w),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          imp = imp_index,
          group = pair_i$group,
          outcome = pair_i$outcome,
          outcome_var = pair_i$outcome_var,
          gas_time_field = pair_i$gas_time_field,
          procedure_time_field = pair_i$procedure_time_field,
          timing_rule = ifelse(date_only_pair, "gas_date_on_or_before_procedure_date", "gas_time_at_least_30_minutes_before_procedure_time"),
          component_status = "completed",
          reason = "restricted_event_definition_uses_gas_precedes_procedure"
        )
    }
    rm(d_imp)
    invisible(gc(FALSE))
  }
}

if (length(timing_restricted_rows)) {
  discordance_timing_restricted_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(timing_restricted_rows) |>
    dplyr::group_by(group, outcome, outcome_var, co2_level, gas_time_field, procedure_time_field, timing_rule, component_status, reason) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_restricted = safe_median_numeric(.data$n_restricted),
      original_events = safe_median_numeric(.data$original_events),
      gas_precedes_events = safe_median_numeric(.data$gas_precedes_events),
      weighted_event_rate_original = safe_median_numeric(.data$weighted_event_rate_original),
      weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes = safe_median_numeric(.data$weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes),
      weighted_n = safe_median_numeric(.data$weighted_n),
      ess = safe_median_numeric(.data$ess),
      m_used = dplyr::n_distinct(.data$imp),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  timing_status_value <- "completed"
  timing_status_reason <- "Timing-restricted event summaries were generated from feasible gas/procedure timestamp pairs."
} else {
  discordance_timing_restricted_summary <- tibble::tibble(
    group = timing_pair_specs$group,
    outcome = timing_pair_specs$outcome,
    outcome_var = timing_pair_specs$outcome_var,
    co2_level = NA_character_,
    gas_time_field = ifelse(is.na(timing_pair_specs$gas_time_field), "", timing_pair_specs$gas_time_field),
    procedure_time_field = ifelse(is.na(timing_pair_specs$procedure_time_field), "", timing_pair_specs$procedure_time_field),
    timing_rule = NA_character_,
    n_restricted = NA_real_,
    original_events = NA_real_,
    gas_precedes_events = NA_real_,
    weighted_event_rate_original = NA_real_,
    weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes = NA_real_,
    weighted_n = NA_real_,
    ess = NA_real_,
    m_used = NA_integer_,
    component_status = "skipped",
    reason = "No feasible parsed gas/procedure timestamp pair produced restricted rows."
  )
  timing_status_value <- "skipped"
  timing_status_reason <- "No feasible parsed gas/procedure timestamp pair produced restricted rows."
}

discordance_timing_status <- tibble::tibble(
  component = "timing_sensitivity",
  status = timing_status_value,
  gas_time_fields = paste(gas_time_candidates, collapse = "; "),
  procedure_time_fields = paste(proc_time_candidates, collapse = "; "),
  feasible_pairs = sum(timing_pair_specs$feasible_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
  reason = timing_status_reason
)
discordance_timing_sensitivity <- discordance_timing_restricted_summary
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_timing_status,
  results_path("discordance_timing_status.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_timing_sensitivity,
  results_path("discordance_timing_sensitivity.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_timing_restricted_summary,
  results_path("discordance_timing_restricted_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "timing_sensitivity",
  ifelse(identical(timing_status_value, "completed"), "completed", "skipped"),
  timing_status_reason,
  "Results/discordance_timing_field_map.csv; Results/discordance_timing_status.csv; Results/discordance_timing_restricted_summary.csv",
  optional = !identical(timing_status_value, "completed")
)

## Summary of hypotheses and interpretation
standardization_supported <- any(
  is.finite(discordance_standardization_summary$gap_current_ref) &
    (
      abs(discordance_standardization_summary$gap_common_ref) <=
        0.75 * abs(discordance_standardization_summary$gap_current_ref) |
        abs(discordance_standardization_summary$gap_marginal_standardized) <=
          0.75 * abs(discordance_standardization_summary$gap_current_ref)
    ),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

scale_supported <- any(
  grepl("Relative odds are closer", discordance_scale_summary$comment, fixed = TRUE),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

capture_threshold_rows <- discordance_capture_summary_enhanced |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$threshold_flag %in% TRUE)
capture_evidence_families <- dplyr::n_distinct(capture_threshold_rows$proxy_family)
capture_event_conditional_signal <- any(
  capture_threshold_rows$proxy_family == "event_conditional_timestamp_completeness",
  na.rm = TRUE
)
legacy_capture_signal <- any(
  missingness_capture_summary$max_abs_abg_vbg_difference > 0.05,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
capture_supported <- capture_evidence_families >= 2L && capture_event_conditional_signal
capture_partially_supported <- !capture_supported &&
  (capture_evidence_families >= 1L || legacy_capture_signal)
capture_evidence_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  capture_supported ~ "supported",
  capture_partially_supported ~ "partially_supported",
  legacy_capture_signal ~ "partially_supported",
  TRUE ~ "not_supported"
)

setting_supported <- any(discordance_setting_rate_ranges$rate_range > 0.10, na.rm = TRUE) ||
  any(discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary$evidence_status %in% c(
    "within_setting_persists",
    "setting_heterogeneity_present",
    "site_signal_present"
  ), na.rm = TRUE)

sentinel_selected_n <- sum(discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2$selected %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
sentinel_inconclusive <- sentinel_selected_n < 2L
sentinel_v2_evidence <- discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2 |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$selected) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2 |>
      dplyr::select(
        sentinel_concept, binary_field, date_field, weighted_abs_diff,
        date_missing_abs_diff, m_used, interpretation
      ),
    by = c("sentinel_concept", "binary_field", "date_field")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    large_weighted_diff = is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & abs(.data$weighted_abs_diff) > 0.05,
    large_date_diff = is.finite(.data$date_missing_abs_diff) & .data$date_missing_abs_diff > 0.05,
    large_difference = .data$large_weighted_diff | .data$large_date_diff,
    lower_specificity = .data$physiologic_specificity %in% c("low", "medium"),
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff > 0 ~ "ABG_higher",
      is.finite(.data$weighted_abs_diff) & .data$weighted_abs_diff < 0 ~ "VBG_higher",
      TRUE ~ "no_clear_direction"
    )
  )
sentinel_large_lower_specificity <- sentinel_v2_evidence |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$large_difference, .data$lower_specificity)
sentinel_supported <- !sentinel_inconclusive &&
  nrow(sentinel_large_lower_specificity) >= 2L &&
  dplyr::n_distinct(sentinel_large_lower_specificity$direction[sentinel_large_lower_specificity$direction != "no_clear_direction"]) <= 1L
sentinel_partially_supported <- !sentinel_supported &&
  !sentinel_inconclusive &&
  any(sentinel_v2_evidence$large_difference, na.rm = TRUE)
sentinel_evidence_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  sentinel_supported ~ "supported",
  sentinel_partially_supported ~ "partially_supported",
  sentinel_inconclusive ~ "inconclusive",
  TRUE ~ "not_supported"
)

tail_supported <- any(discordance_tail_support_summary$support_flag %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)

dual_inconclusive <- any(
  dplyr::bind_rows(discordance_status_rows) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$component == "dual_tested_sensitivity") |>
    dplyr::pull(status) == "skipped",
  na.rm = TRUE
)

timing_inconclusive <- any(
  dplyr::bind_rows(discordance_status_rows) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$component == "timing_sensitivity") |>
    dplyr::pull(status) == "skipped",
  na.rm = TRUE
)

timing_supported <- any(
  is.finite(discordance_timing_restricted_summary$weighted_event_rate_original) &
    is.finite(discordance_timing_restricted_summary$weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes) &
    abs(discordance_timing_restricted_summary$weighted_event_rate_original -
          discordance_timing_restricted_summary$weighted_event_rate_gas_precedes) > 0.05,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
timing_evidence_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  timing_inconclusive ~ "inconclusive",
  timing_supported ~ "partially_supported",
  TRUE ~ "not_supported"
)

discordance_write_md(
  c(
    "# Discordance Interpretation Rules",
    "",
    "These rules intentionally separate broad workflow/completeness signals from stronger evidence for modality-specific procedure-capture bias.",
    "",
    "- Reference-profile / standardization is supported when common-reference or common-source marginal standardization shrinks at least one current probability gap by at least 25%.",
    "- Setting/workflow heterogeneity is supported when within-modality setting ranges exceed 10 percentage points or IMV-focused within-setting/site diagnostics show persistent heterogeneity.",
    "- Differential missingness or procedure capture is supported only when at least two enhanced proxy families cross the 5-point threshold and event-conditional timestamp completeness also points to a difference; otherwise any weaker signal is partial.",
    "- Sentinel procedure capture/completeness is supported only when at least two selected low/medium-specificity sentinels show large differences in the same direction; workflow-dependent sentinels are partial evidence.",
    "- Timing is inconclusive unless feasible gas/procedure pairs can be parsed; timing-restricted differences above 5 points are treated as partial evidence, not proof.",
    "- Tail support is supported when the existing ESS/event-count support flag is triggered.",
    "- Intrinsic modality-specific measurement is not supported by default when dual-tested summaries are available for review."
  ),
  "discordance_interpretation_rules.md"
)

discordance_interpretation_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  hypothesis = c(
    "Reference-profile / standardization effect",
    "Setting or workflow heterogeneity",
    "Differential missingness or procedure capture",
    "Sentinel procedure capture/completeness",
    "Scale / noncollapsibility effect",
    "Same-encounter timing structure",
    "Tail support / positivity",
    "Intrinsic modality-specific measurement effect"
  ),
  evidence_status = c(
    ifelse(standardization_supported, "supported", "not_supported"),
    ifelse(setting_supported, "supported", "not_supported"),
    capture_evidence_status,
    sentinel_evidence_status,
    ifelse(scale_supported, "supported", "not_supported"),
    timing_evidence_status,
    ifelse(tail_supported, "supported", "not_supported"),
    ifelse(dual_inconclusive, "inconclusive", "not_supported")
  ),
  key_evidence = c(
    ifelse(standardization_supported, "Common or marginal standardization shrank at least one current probability gap by >=25%.", "Standardization did not shrink probability gaps by >=25%."),
    ifelse(setting_supported, "Setting-rate ranges or IMV-focused setting/site diagnostics show material heterogeneity.", "Within-modality setting-specific weighted event-rate ranges were <=10 percentage points and IMV follow-up did not show a large setting/site signal."),
    dplyr::case_when(
      capture_supported ~ "Multiple enhanced proxy families plus event-conditional timestamp completeness point to capture/completeness differences.",
      capture_partially_supported ~ "At least one broad capture/completeness proxy differs, but evidence is not specific enough to prove procedure-capture bias.",
      TRUE ~ "Enhanced capture/completeness proxies did not show large usable ABG-VBG differences."
    ),
    dplyr::case_when(
      sentinel_inconclusive ~ "Fewer than two suitable v2 sentinel procedure concepts were selected.",
      sentinel_supported ~ "At least two selected low/medium-specificity sentinels showed large same-direction capture/completeness differences.",
      sentinel_partially_supported ~ "Selected sentinels show some capture/completeness differences, but specificity or directional consistency is insufficient.",
      TRUE ~ "Selected v2 sentinels did not show large capture/completeness differences."
    ),
    ifelse(scale_supported, "At least one contrast had closer ABG-VBG agreement on OR scale than risk-difference scale.", "OR-scale agreement was not consistently closer than probability-scale agreement."),
    dplyr::case_when(
      timing_inconclusive ~ "Timestamp fields were unavailable, ambiguous, or could not support a restricted subset.",
      timing_supported ~ "Gas-precedes-procedure restricted event rates differed from original event rates by >5 points.",
      TRUE ~ "Timing-restricted summaries were feasible but did not show a large difference."
    ),
    ifelse(tail_supported, "At least one clinical/quantile bin had ESS <100 or weighted events <10.", "Tail bins did not trigger the ESS/event-count support flag."),
    ifelse(dual_inconclusive, "Dual-tested subset was unavailable in this render subset.", "Dual-tested subset event rates were generated for direct review.")
  ),
  recommended_next_step = c(
