    "If supported, consider whether manuscript probability curves should use common or marginal standardization in a future methodological ticket.",
    "If supported, consider setting-stratified or setting-interaction sensitivity models.",
    "If supported, audit NIV/IMV source-field construction and coding-density definitions before changing models.",
    "If supported, inspect selected sentinel source fields and date-field definitions before attributing NIV/IMV gaps to physiology.",
    "Use risk differences/RRs beside ORs when communicating procedure outcomes.",
    "If timestamps become available, restrict to blood gases clearly preceding NIV/IMV.",
    "If supported, avoid overinterpreting tail probability gaps and consider trimming/support annotations.",
    "Compare dual-tested event-rate patterns against primary ABG/VBG gaps before attributing discordance to modality."
  )
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    supported = .data$evidence_status == "supported",
    not_supported = .data$evidence_status == "not_supported",
    inconclusive = .data$evidence_status == "inconclusive"
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    hypothesis, evidence_status, supported, not_supported, inconclusive,
    key_evidence, recommended_next_step
  )
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_interpretation_summary,
  results_path("discordance_interpretation_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "interpretation_summary",
  "completed",
  "Conservative hypothesis-level interpretation summary and rulebook were generated.",
  "Results/discordance_interpretation_summary.csv; Results/discordance_interpretation_rules.md"
)

discordance_remaining_issues_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  domain = c(
    "resolved_or_strongly_clarified",
    "resolved_or_strongly_clarified",
    "resolved_or_strongly_clarified",
    "still_unresolved",
    "still_unresolved",
    "still_unresolved",
    "still_unresolved"
  ),
  issue = c(
    "NIV probability discordance",
    "Tail support / positivity",
    "Intrinsic modality-specific measurement",
    "Residual IMV probability discordance",
    "Workflow or setting heterogeneity",
    "Capture/completeness contribution",
    "Timing contribution"
  ),
  current_assessment = c(
    ifelse(standardization_supported, "Common-source standardization materially clarifies at least one NIV/IMV probability gap; prior 25% output indicated NIV attenuation.", "Standardization did not materially attenuate current gaps in this render."),
    ifelse(tail_supported, "Tail support flagged in at least one bin; retain caution.", "Tail support is not a leading explanation by current ESS/event-count flags."),
    ifelse(dual_inconclusive, "Dual-tested evidence unavailable in this render.", "Dual-tested summaries are available and do not by themselves support an intrinsic modality explanation."),
    ifelse(is.finite(overall_imv_gap) & overall_imv_gap > 0.05, "Residual IMV ABG-VBG probability gap remains above 5 points.", "Residual IMV gap is not large in this render."),
    ifelse(setting_supported, "Setting/workflow heterogeneity remains plausible.", "Setting/workflow heterogeneity is not strongly supported in this render."),
    ifelse(capture_evidence_status %in% c("supported", "partially_supported"), "Capture/completeness remains plausible but evidence level is explicitly conservative.", "Capture/completeness is not supported by enhanced proxies in this render."),
    ifelse(timing_inconclusive, "Timing remains unresolved due to unavailable or insufficient timestamp pairs.", "Timing sensitivity was feasible; see timing restricted summary.")
  ),
  next_step = c(
    "Keep common-source marginal standardization as manuscript default.",
    "Keep tail/support diagnostics as validation context.",
    "Use dual-tested results as guardrail against over-attributing gaps to modality.",
    "Use IMV-focused setting/site/capture/timing outputs to guide the deferred 25% rerun interpretation.",
    "Review within-setting and site-sensitivity artifacts before changing manuscript language.",
    "Do not describe procedure capture as proven unless enhanced proxies and event-conditional timestamps converge.",
    "If richer timestamps become available, repeat the gas-precedes-procedure sensitivity."
  )
)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_remaining_issues_summary,
  results_path("discordance_remaining_issues_summary.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "remaining_issues_summary",
  "completed",
  "Resolved versus unresolved discordance issues were summarized.",
  "Results/discordance_remaining_issues_summary.csv"
)

if (is.finite(overall_imv_gap) && overall_imv_gap > 0.05) {
  discordance_write_md(
    c(
      "# IMV Interpretation Note",
      "",
      paste0("The current render retains a residual IMV marginal-standardized ABG-VBG probability gap of approximately ", round(overall_imv_gap, 4), "."),
      "",
      "For manuscript interpretation, retain the standardized IMV probabilities as diagnostics/supplemental context but avoid implying that the residual probability gap is fully explained unless setting, capture, sentinel, and timing diagnostics converge.",
      "",
      "The categorical OR summaries and broad spline-shape agreement should remain central when describing IMV if the deferred larger subset rerun confirms persistent probability-scale discordance."
    ),
    "imv_interpretation_note.md"
  )
}

metadata_audit_rows <- list()
metadata_audit_row <- function(component, artifact, check, observed, expected, status, detail) {
  metadata_audit_rows[[length(metadata_audit_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    component = component,
    artifact = artifact,
    check = check,
    observed = as.character(observed),
    expected = as.character(expected),
    status = status,
    detail = detail
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

discordance_cap_values <- unique(discordance_standardization_summary$standardization_sample_cap)
metadata_audit_row(
  "standardization_metadata",
  "discordance_standardization_summary.csv",
  "sample_cap_matches_common_source_policy",
  paste(discordance_cap_values, collapse = "; "),
  standardization_sample_cap,
  ifelse(length(discordance_cap_values) == 1L && identical(as.integer(discordance_cap_values[[1L]]), as.integer(standardization_sample_cap)), "passed", "failed"),
  "Discordance marginal-standardization cap should match the manuscript common-source cap for this run mode."
)

if (exists("standardization_prediction_summary")) {
  if ("standardization_sample_cap" %in% names(standardization_prediction_summary)) {
    std_pred_caps <- unique(standardization_prediction_summary$standardization_sample_cap)
    metadata_audit_row(
      "standardization_metadata",
      "standardization_prediction_summary.csv",
      "prediction_sample_cap_matches_common_source_policy",
      paste(std_pred_caps, collapse = "; "),
      standardization_sample_cap,
      ifelse(length(std_pred_caps) == 1L && identical(as.integer(std_pred_caps[[1L]]), as.integer(standardization_sample_cap)), "passed", "failed"),
      "Primary standardization prediction summary should share the same deterministic cap when the column is present."
    )
  } else {
    metadata_audit_row(
      "standardization_metadata",
      "standardization_prediction_summary.csv",
      "prediction_sample_cap_column_presence",
      "standardization_sample_cap column absent",
      "not required for this status-only artifact",
      "passed",
      "Completion-status artifact does not carry the sample cap; cap is audited in prediction outputs and discordance summaries."
    )
  }
}

if (exists("manuscript_probability_output_map")) {
  manuscript_method_values <- manuscript_probability_output_map |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$manuscript_facing %in% TRUE) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data$new_probability_method) |>
    unique()
  metadata_audit_row(
    "manuscript_probability_method",
    "manuscript_probability_output_map.csv",
    "manuscript_outputs_use_common_source_marginal_standardization",
    paste(manuscript_method_values, collapse = "; "),
    "common_source_marginal_standardized",
    ifelse(length(manuscript_method_values) > 0L && all(manuscript_method_values == "common_source_marginal_standardized"), "passed", "failed"),
    "Manuscript-facing probability artifacts should not silently revert to modality-specific reference profiles."
  )
}

if (exists("probability_method_comparison_summary")) {
  method_compare_values <- unique(probability_method_comparison_summary$probability_method)
  metadata_audit_row(
    "probability_method_labels",
    "probability_method_comparison_summary.csv",
    "comparison_includes_common_source_method",
    paste(method_compare_values, collapse = "; "),
    "Common-source marginal standardized",
    ifelse("Common-source marginal standardized" %in% method_compare_values || "common_source_marginal_standardized" %in% method_compare_values, "passed", "failed"),
    "Diagnostic comparison should retain the common-source method label alongside reference-profile sensitivities."
  )
}

allowed_interpretation_labels <- c("supported", "partially_supported", "not_supported", "inconclusive")
interpretation_labels <- unique(discordance_interpretation_summary$evidence_status)
metadata_audit_row(
  "interpretation_labels",
  "discordance_interpretation_summary.csv",
  "interpretation_status_values_are_allowed",
  paste(interpretation_labels, collapse = "; "),
  paste(allowed_interpretation_labels, collapse = "; "),
  ifelse(all(interpretation_labels %in% allowed_interpretation_labels), "passed", "failed"),
  "Interpretation labels should be conservative and finite."
)

discordance_metadata_audit <- dplyr::bind_rows(metadata_audit_rows)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_metadata_audit,
  results_path("discordance_metadata_audit.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)
record_discordance_status(
  "discordance_metadata_audit",
  ifelse(any(discordance_metadata_audit$status == "failed", na.rm = TRUE), "failed", "completed"),
  "Discordance metadata labels, method labels, and sample caps were audited.",
  "Results/discordance_metadata_audit.csv"
)

status_df_pre_manifest <- write_discordance_status()

discordance_required_artifacts <- c(
  "discordance_validation_status.csv",
  "discordance_current_summary.csv",
  "discordance_gap_metrics.csv",
  "discordance_diagnostics_progress.csv",
  "discordance_xref_common_prob_curves.csv",
  "discordance_marginal_standardized_prob_curves.csv",
  "discordance_marginal_standardized_imp_curves.csv",
  "discordance_marginal_standardized_alignment.csv",
  "discordance_marginal_standardization_status.csv",
  "discordance_standardization_summary.csv",
  "discordance_scale_summary.csv",
  "discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv",
  "discordance_procedure_capture_proxies.csv",
  "discordance_missing_indicator_balance.csv",
  "discordance_missingness_capture_summary.csv",
  "discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced.csv",
  "discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional.csv",
  "discordance_capture_summary_enhanced.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_specificity_note.md",
  "discordance_tail_support_summary.csv",
  "discordance_tail_support_by_bin.csv",
  "discordance_setting_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_setting_rate_ranges.csv",
  "discordance_site_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_imv_setting_standardized.csv",
  "discordance_imv_site_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_imv_heterogeneity_summary.csv",
  "discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_timing_field_map.csv",
  "discordance_timing_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_timing_restricted_summary.csv",
  "discordance_timing_status.csv",
  "discordance_interpretation_summary.csv",
  "discordance_interpretation_rules.md",
  "discordance_metadata_audit.csv",
  "discordance_remaining_issues_summary.csv",
  "figs/discordance_probability_standardization_niv_imv.png",
  "figs/discordance_tail_support_niv_imv.png",
  "discordance_artifact_manifest.csv"
)

discordance_artifact_manifest <- tibble::tibble(
  artifact_path = discordance_required_artifacts,
  required = TRUE,
  kind = dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("^figs/", artifact_path) ~ "figure",
    grepl("\\.md$", artifact_path) ~ "markdown",
    grepl("manifest|status", artifact_path) ~ "validation",
    TRUE ~ "csv"
  ),
  exists = vapply(
    artifact_path,
    function(path) {
      if (identical(path, "discordance_artifact_manifest.csv")) return(TRUE)
      file.exists(results_path(path))
    },
    logical(1L)
  ),
  purpose = "NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance diagnostic artifact."
)
write_csv_safely(
  discordance_artifact_manifest,
  results_path("discordance_artifact_manifest.csv"),
  row_names = FALSE
)

missing_discordance_artifacts <- discordance_artifact_manifest |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$required, !.data$exists) |>
  dplyr::pull(artifact_path)
if (length(missing_discordance_artifacts)) {
  stop(
    "Discordance artifact completeness check failed: ",
    paste(missing_discordance_artifacts, collapse = ", ")
  )
}
record_discordance_status(
  "artifact_manifest",
  "completed",
  "All required discordance artifacts were present.",
  "Results/discordance_artifact_manifest.csv"
)
status_df <- write_discordance_status()

required_status_failures <- status_df |>
  dplyr::filter(!.data$optional, .data$status != "completed")
if (nrow(required_status_failures)) {
  stop(
    "Required discordance component(s) did not complete: ",
    paste(required_status_failures$component, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

render_table_pdf(
  discordance_interpretation_summary |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      evidence_status = dplyr::recode(
        .data$evidence_status,
        supported = "Supported",
        partially_supported = "Partially supported",
        not_supported = "Not supported",
        inconclusive = "Inconclusive",
        .default = .data$evidence_status
      ),
      supported = ifelse(supported, "Yes", "No"),
      not_supported = ifelse(not_supported, "Yes", "No"),
      inconclusive = ifelse(inconclusive, "Yes", "No")
    ) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      Hypothesis = hypothesis,
      `Evidence status` = evidence_status,
      Supported = supported,
      `Not supported` = not_supported,
      Inconclusive = inconclusive,
      `Key evidence` = key_evidence,
      `Recommended next step` = recommended_next_step
    ),
  caption = "Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance",
  file_stub = "discordance_interpretation_summary_display",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 2,
  max_cols = 5,
  landscape = TRUE
)

cat(
  "Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance\n\n",
  "- Required discordance diagnostics completed in run mode `", RUN_MODE, "` with `pilot_frac = ", PILOT_FRAC, "`.\n",
  "- Enhanced capture proxies, sentinel v2 specificity notes, IMV setting heterogeneity, timing field mapping, and metadata audits were generated for this diagnostic section.\n",
  "- Optional timing, first-encounter, dual-tested, and site-specific diagnostics may be marked skipped when required fields or rows are unavailable.\n",
  "- The final remaining-issues summary separates resolved or strongly clarified findings from unresolved residual IMV, workflow, capture/completeness, and timing questions.\n",
  "- Detailed artifacts are written under `Results/discordance_*` and `Results/figs/discordance_*`.\n",
  sep = ""
)
```

  "publication_quality_asset_audit.md",

  "diag_mi_shap_errors.csv", "diag_mi_shap_method_used.csv", "mi_shap_imp_diagnostics.csv",
  "mice_logged_events_raw.csv", "mice_logged_events_summary.csv",
  "mice_pred_width_preflight.csv", "mice_chain_diagnostics.csv",

  "mice_smoketest.log",

  "discordance_marginal_standardized_imp_curves.csv",

  "discordance_standardization_summary.csv", "discordance_scale_summary.csv",
  "discordance_missingness_outcome_fields.csv",
  "discordance_procedure_capture_proxies.csv",
  "discordance_missing_indicator_balance.csv",
  "discordance_missingness_capture_summary.csv",
  "discordance_capture_proxies_enhanced.csv",
  "discordance_capture_date_completeness_conditional.csv",
  "discordance_capture_summary_enhanced.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_balance.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_inventory_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_selection_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_procedure_summary_v2.csv",
  "discordance_sentinel_specificity_note.md",
  "discordance_tail_support_summary.csv",
  "discordance_tail_support_by_bin.csv",
  "discordance_setting_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_setting_rate_ranges.csv",
  "discordance_site_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_imv_setting_standardized.csv",
  "discordance_imv_site_sensitivity.csv",

  "discordance_dual_tested_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_first_encounter_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_timing_field_map.csv",
  "discordance_timing_sensitivity.csv",
  "discordance_timing_restricted_summary.csv",
  "discordance_timing_status.csv",
  "discordance_interpretation_summary.csv",
  "discordance_interpretation_rules.md",

  "figs/discordance_tail_support_niv_imv.png"
)
missing_files <- expected_diag[!file.exists(results_path(expected_diag))]
stopifnot(length(missing_files) == 0)

# Only a subset of diagnostics tables are guaranteed to be rewritten with the
# current run metadata on every render. Many analysis CSVs are checked here for
# existence, but their contents may be intentionally preserved across reruns or
# written by helpers that do not stamp the current run_id into the first row.
# Restrict freshness checks to the end-of-run diagnostics that are explicitly
# regenerated in this session.
run_id_check_files <- c(
  "runtime_log.csv", "runtime_summary.csv", "runtime_summary_top15.csv",
  "warnings_log.csv", "mi_warnings_log.csv", "mi_info_log.csv",
  "diagnostics_summary.csv", "diagnostics_missingness.csv",
  "diagnostics_missingness-by-strata.csv", "plot_drop_log.csv"
)

run_id_mismatch <- character()
for (f in run_id_check_files) {
  path <- results_path(f)
  if (grepl("\\.csv$", f)) {
    df <- tryCatch(read.csv(path, nrows = 1), error = function(e) NULL)
    stopifnot(!is.null(df))
    stopifnot("run_id" %in% names(df))
    if (nrow(df) > 0 && !identical(as.character(df$run_id[1]), diag_run_id)) {
      run_id_mismatch <- c(run_id_mismatch, f)
    }
  }
}

if (length(missing_files) || length(run_id_mismatch)) {
  msg <- paste0(
    "Diagnostics completeness check failed: missing files [",
    paste(missing_files, collapse = ", "),
    "]; run_id mismatch [",
    paste(run_id_mismatch, collapse = ", "),
    "]."
  )
  stop(msg)
}
```

## Save, export, and session info

```{r diagnostics-audit-run}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics audit (auto-run)"
#| include: false
#| echo: true

# Purpose: diagnostics audit run. The audit implementation is intentionally
# embedded so this canonical QMD can execute without external source files.
audit_md <- results_path("diagnostics_audit.md")
audit_summary <- results_path("diagnostics_audit_summary.csv")
audit_issues <- results_path("diagnostics_audit_issues.csv")

run_diagnostics_audit <- function(results_dir) {
safe_read_csv <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    return(read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  }
  NULL
}

safe_read_lines <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) readLines(path) else character()
}

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  if (length(x) == 0L || all(!is.finite(x))) return("NA")
  formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits)
}

coalesce_logical <- function(x, fallback, n) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(rep(fallback, n))
  x <- as.logical(x)
  if (length(x) == 0L) return(rep(fallback, n))
  x[is.na(x)] <- fallback
  x
}

enrich_model_diag <- function(df, prob_eps = 1e-6) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(df)
  n <- nrow(df)
  if (!"top_warning" %in% names(df)) df$top_warning <- NA_character_
  if (!"min_phat" %in% names(df)) df$min_phat <- NA_real_
  if (!"max_phat" %in% names(df)) df$max_phat <- NA_real_
  if (!"converged" %in% names(df)) df$converged <- NA
  if (!"sep_flag" %in% names(df)) df$sep_flag <- FALSE
  if (!"nonconv_flag" %in% names(df)) df$nonconv_flag <- FALSE
  warn_chr <- as.character(df$top_warning)
  warn_chr[is.na(warn_chr)] <- ""
  phat_low_default <- is.finite(df$min_phat) & df$min_phat < prob_eps
  phat_high_default <- is.finite(df$max_phat) & df$max_phat > 1 - prob_eps
  sep_warn_default <- grepl("fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1", warn_chr, fixed = TRUE) |
    grepl("separat", warn_chr, ignore.case = TRUE)
  nonconv_default <- coalesce_logical(df$nonconv_flag, FALSE, n) |
    coalesce_logical(!as.logical(df$converged), FALSE, n) |
    grepl("did not converge", warn_chr, fixed = TRUE)
  df$phat_low_flag <- if ("phat_low_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    coalesce_logical(df$phat_low_flag, FALSE, n) | phat_low_default
  } else {
    phat_low_default
  }
  df$phat_high_flag <- if ("phat_high_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    coalesce_logical(df$phat_high_flag, FALSE, n) | phat_high_default
  } else {
    phat_high_default
  }
  df$sep_warn_flag <- if ("sep_warn_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    coalesce_logical(df$sep_warn_flag, FALSE, n) | sep_warn_default
  } else {
    sep_warn_default
  }
  df$nonconv_flag <- nonconv_default
  df$central_plot_instability_flag <- if ("central_plot_instability_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    coalesce_logical(df$central_plot_instability_flag, FALSE, n)
  } else {
    rep(FALSE, n)
  }
  df$sep_flag <- coalesce_logical(df$sep_flag, FALSE, n) |
    df$phat_low_flag | df$phat_high_flag | df$sep_warn_flag
  df$diagnostic_class <- ifelse(
    df$nonconv_flag | df$sep_warn_flag | df$central_plot_instability_flag,
    "fail",
    ifelse(df$phat_low_flag | df$phat_high_flag | df$sep_flag, "warn", "pass")
  )
  df$diagnostic_status <- ifelse(
    df$diagnostic_class == "fail",
    "FAIL",
    ifelse(df$diagnostic_class == "warn", "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS", "PASS")
  )
  df
}

write_md <- function(lines, path) {
  writeLines(lines, con = path)
}

dir.create(file.path(results_dir, "diagnostics_audit_snippets"), showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- Inventory ---------------------------------------------------------------
all_files <- list.files(results_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
all_files <- all_files[!grepl("/cache/", all_files)]
fi <- file.info(all_files)
inventory <- data.frame(
  path = all_files,
  size_bytes = fi$size,
  mtime = fi$mtime,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

expected <- c(
  "runtime_log.csv",
  "runtime_summary.csv",
  "runtime_summary_top15.csv",
  "warnings_log.csv",
  "mi_warnings_log.csv",
  "mice_smoketest.log",
  "mice_batches_log.csv",
  "mice_chain_diagnostics.csv",
  "mice_pred_width_preflight.csv",
  "mice_logged_events_raw.csv",
  "mice_logged_events_summary.csv",
  "mice_spec.rds",
  "mi_outcome_fit_diagnostics.csv",
  "model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
  "mi_spline_curve_abg.csv",
  "mi_spline_curve_vbg.csv",
  "balance_target_imp_summary.csv",
  "balance_max_smd_by_imp.csv",
  "weight_summary.csv",
  "ps_overlap_summary.csv",
  "diagnostics_summary.csv",
  "plot_drop_log.csv"
)

exists_expected <- file.exists(file.path(results_dir, expected))
expected_tbl <- data.frame(
  artifact = expected,
  present = exists_expected,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# --- Run configuration -------------------------------------------------------
diag_sum <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "diagnostics_summary.csv"))
runtime_log <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "runtime_log.csv"))

run_id_val <- if (!is.null(runtime_log) && "run_id" %in% names(runtime_log) && nrow(runtime_log) > 0) {
  as.character(runtime_log$run_id[[1]])
} else {
  format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
}

run_ts_val <- if (!is.null(runtime_log) && "run_ts" %in% names(runtime_log) && nrow(runtime_log) > 0) {
  as.character(runtime_log$run_ts[[1]])
} else {
  as.character(Sys.time())
}

run_mode <- if (!is.null(runtime_log) && "run_mode" %in% names(runtime_log)) {
  paste(unique(runtime_log$run_mode), collapse = ", ")
} else {
  "NA"
}
is_pilot_mode <- grepl("pilot", run_mode, ignore.case = TRUE)

pilot_frac <- if (!is.null(diag_sum) && "pilot_frac" %in% names(diag_sum)) {
  paste(unique(diag_sum$pilot_frac), collapse = ", ")
} else {
  "NA"
}

m_used <- if (!is.null(diag_sum) && "m" %in% names(diag_sum)) {
  paste(unique(diag_sum$m), collapse = ", ")
} else {
  "NA"
}

maxit_used <- if (!is.null(diag_sum) && "maxit" %in% names(diag_sum)) {
  paste(unique(diag_sum$maxit), collapse = ", ")
} else {
  "NA"
}

# --- Runtime -----------------------------------------------------------------
runtime_top <- NULL
total_seconds <- NA_real_
if (!is.null(runtime_log)) {
  total_seconds <- sum(runtime_log$seconds, na.rm = TRUE)
  runtime_top <- runtime_log[order(-runtime_log$seconds), , drop = FALSE]
  runtime_top <- head(runtime_top, 10)
}

# --- MI health ---------------------------------------------------------------
smoke_lines <- safe_read_lines(file.path(results_dir, "mice_smoketest.log"))
smoke_failed <- any(grepl("Smoke test failed", smoke_lines, fixed = TRUE))

batches <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "mice_batches_log.csv"))
batch_note <- "NA"
batch_m_unique <- NULL
gc_limit_bad <- FALSE
if (!is.null(batches)) {
  if ("m_batch" %in% names(batches)) {
    batch_m_unique <- sort(unique(batches$m_batch))
  }
  ok_vals <- NULL
  if ("ok" %in% names(batches)) {
    ok_vals <- batches$ok
    if (is.character(ok_vals)) ok_vals <- as.logical(ok_vals)
    if (is.factor(ok_vals)) ok_vals <- as.logical(as.character(ok_vals))
  }
  fail_n <- if (!is.null(ok_vals)) sum(!ok_vals, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_
  batch_note <- paste0("batches=", nrow(batches),
                       "; m_batch=", if (!is.null(batch_m_unique)) paste(batch_m_unique, collapse = ", ") else "NA",
                       "; failures=", if (!is.na(fail_n)) fail_n else "NA")

  limit_col <- NULL
  for (cand in c("vcells_limit_mb_post", "vcells_limit_mb_pre", "vcells_limit_mb", "gc_vcells_limit_mb")) {
    if (cand %in% names(batches)) {
      limit_col <- cand
      break
    }
  }
  if (!is.null(limit_col)) {
    lim <- batches[[limit_col]]
    lim <- as.numeric(lim)
    gc_limit_bad <- all(is.finite(lim)) && max(lim, na.rm = TRUE) < 1
  }
}

chain_diag <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "mice_chain_diagnostics.csv"))
chain_issue <- FALSE
chain_issue_note <- "NA"
if (!is.null(chain_diag)) {
  if ("empty" %in% names(chain_diag) || !"variable" %in% names(chain_diag)) {
    chain_issue <- TRUE
    chain_issue_note <- "chain diagnostics empty or missing columns"
  } else {
    all_numeric_names <- all(grepl("^\\d+$", chain_diag$variable))
    eligible <- rep(TRUE, nrow(chain_diag))
    if ("method" %in% names(chain_diag)) {
      eligible <- eligible & chain_diag$method != ""
    }
    if ("diagnostic_available" %in% names(chain_diag)) {
      eligible <- eligible & (chain_diag$diagnostic_available %in% TRUE)
    }
    drift_tail_na <- if (any(eligible)) mean(is.na(chain_diag$drift_tail[eligible])) else NA_real_
    drift_tail_any <- if (any(eligible)) sum(is.finite(chain_diag$drift_tail[eligible])) else 0
    chain_issue <- all_numeric_names ||
      (is.finite(drift_tail_na) && drift_tail_na > 0.20) ||
      (any(eligible) && drift_tail_any == 0)
    chain_issue_note <- paste0("numeric_names=", all_numeric_names,
                               "; drift_tail_na_frac=", fmt_num(drift_tail_na))
  }
}

pred_width <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "mice_pred_width_preflight.csv"))
max_mm_cols <- NA_real_
if (!is.null(pred_width) && "mm_cols" %in% names(pred_width)) {
  max_mm_cols <- max(pred_width$mm_cols, na.rm = TRUE)
}

mi_warn <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "mi_warnings_log.csv"))
mi_warn_note <- "NA"
if (!is.null(mi_warn)) {
  mi_warn_note <- paste0("warnings=", nrow(mi_warn))
}

# --- Balance -----------------------------------------------------------------
bal_imp <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "balance_target_imp_summary.csv"))
bal_note <- "NA"
bal_max_abg <- NA_real_
bal_max_vbg <- NA_real_
if (!is.null(bal_imp) && all(c("group", "max_abs_post") %in% names(bal_imp))) {
  bal_max_abg <- max(bal_imp$max_abs_post[bal_imp$group == "ABG"], na.rm = TRUE)
  bal_max_vbg <- max(bal_imp$max_abs_post[bal_imp$group == "VBG"], na.rm = TRUE)
  bal_note <- paste0("ABG max|SMD|=", fmt_num(bal_max_abg),
                     "; VBG max|SMD|=", fmt_num(bal_max_vbg))
}

# --- Outcome fits -------------------------------------------------------------
model_diag <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "model_fit_diagnostics.csv"))
sep_total <- 0L
outcome_fail_total <- 0L
outcome_warn_total <- 0L
sep_by <- NULL
if (!is.null(model_diag)) {
  model_diag <- enrich_model_diag(model_diag)
  write.csv(model_diag, file.path(results_dir, "model_fit_diagnostics.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  sep_total <- sum(model_diag$sep_flag, na.rm = TRUE)
  outcome_fail_total <- sum(model_diag$diagnostic_class == "fail", na.rm = TRUE)
  outcome_warn_total <- sum(model_diag$diagnostic_class == "warn", na.rm = TRUE)
  sep_by <- aggregate(sep_flag ~ analysis_variant + model_type + group + outcome,
                      data = model_diag, FUN = sum)
  sep_by <- sep_by[order(-sep_by$sep_flag), , drop = FALSE]
}

fit_issue <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "mi_fit_issue_summary.csv"))

# --- Plot integrity -----------------------------------------------------------
plot_drop <- safe_read_csv(file.path(results_dir, "plot_drop_log.csv"))

# --- Issues list --------------------------------------------------------------
issues <- list()

add_issue <- function(severity, component, file, snippet, why, fix) {
  issues[[length(issues) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
    severity = severity,
    component = component,
    evidence_file = file,
    evidence_snippet = snippet,
    why_it_matters = why,
    recommended_fix = fix,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (any(!expected_tbl$present)) {
  missing_expected <- expected_tbl$artifact[!expected_tbl$present]
  add_issue(
    "medium",
    "Inventory",
    "Results/diagnostics_audit.md",
    paste0("Missing expected artifacts: ", paste(missing_expected, collapse = ", ")),
    "Missing diagnostics artifacts weaken validation coverage and can hide silent regressions.",
    "Regenerate the missing diagnostics artifacts or adjust the expected inventory if the contract changed intentionally."
  )
}

if (isTRUE(smoke_failed)) {
  add_issue(
    "high",
    "MI",
    "Results/mice_smoketest.log",
    "Smoke test failed",
    "A failed MI smoke test indicates the imputation path is unstable before full validation.",
    "Inspect the smoke-test log and fix the underlying MI execution error before relying on downstream pooled outputs."
  )
}

if (!exists_expected[match("mice_logged_events_summary.csv", expected)]) {
  add_issue(
    "medium",
    "MI",
    "Results/mice_logged_events_summary.csv",
    "Missing file",
    "Logged-events summary is absent; cannot verify MICE stability drivers.",
    "Ensure loggedEvents summary is written even when empty (write a 0-row CSV)."
  )
}

if (chain_issue) {
  add_issue(
    "medium",
    "MI",
    "Results/mice_chain_diagnostics.csv",
    chain_issue_note,
    "Chain diagnostics appear incomplete (numeric variable names and/or drift_tail all NA).",
    "Check chainMean/chainVar dimension names and skip variables with insufficient finite iterations."
  )
}

if (gc_limit_bad) {
  add_issue(
    "low",
    "MI",
    "Results/mice_batches_log.csv",
    "gc_vcells_limit_mb < 1 MB",
    "Vcells limit appears mis-scaled; memory pressure fraction may be invalid.",
    "Verify mem.maxVSize units and logging conversion in get_vcells_stats()."
  )
}

if (!is.na(bal_max_abg) && bal_max_abg > 0.10) {
  bal_severity <- if (isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "medium" else "high"
  add_issue(
    bal_severity,
    "Balance",
    "Results/balance_target_imp_summary.csv",
    paste0("ABG max|SMD|=", fmt_num(bal_max_abg)),
    if (identical(bal_severity, "high")) {
      "ABG target balance exceeds 0.10 threshold across imputations."
    } else {
      "ABG target balance exceeds 0.10 in a pilot/subset render; this is a validation warning, not a full-analysis failure."
    },
    if (identical(bal_severity, "high")) {
      "Revisit GBM tuning, covariate set, or truncation to improve ABG balance."
    } else {
      "Confirm balance on the larger validation subset or full render before changing the weighting model."
    }
  )
}

if (!is.na(bal_max_vbg) && bal_max_vbg > 0.10) {
  bal_severity <- if (isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "medium" else "high"
  add_issue(
    bal_severity,
    "Balance",
    "Results/balance_target_imp_summary.csv",
    paste0("VBG max|SMD|=", fmt_num(bal_max_vbg)),
    if (identical(bal_severity, "high")) {
      "VBG target balance exceeds 0.10 threshold across imputations."
    } else {
      "VBG target balance exceeds 0.10 in a pilot/subset render; this is a validation warning, not a full-analysis failure."
    },
    if (identical(bal_severity, "high")) {
      "Revisit GBM tuning, covariate set, or truncation to improve VBG balance."
    } else {
      "Confirm balance on the larger validation subset or full render before changing the weighting model."
    }
  )
}

if (!is.null(model_diag) && outcome_fail_total > 0) {
  add_issue(
    "high",
    "Outcome",
    "Results/model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
    paste0("diagnostic_class == fail for ", outcome_fail_total, " / ", nrow(model_diag), " fits"),
    "Nonconvergence, explicit separation warnings, or central-plot instability can invalidate manuscript-critical estimates.",
    "Inspect failed diagnostic rows and fix the affected model path before relying on the manuscript-facing display."
  )
}

if (!is.null(model_diag) && outcome_fail_total == 0 && outcome_warn_total > 0) {
  add_issue(
    "medium",
    "Outcome",
    "Results/model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
    paste0("tail/off-profile fitted-probability warnings for ", outcome_warn_total, " / ", nrow(model_diag), " fits"),
    "Tail-only fitted-probability extremes require transparent reporting but do not by themselves invalidate manuscript-facing plots.",
    "Keep the warning in the diagnostics summary and reassess if any flagged row affects the displayed central curve range."
  )
}

fit_issue_sep_col <- if (!is.null(fit_issue)) {
  intersect(c("n_sep_flag", "sep_n"), names(fit_issue))
} else {
  character()
}
if (!is.null(model_diag) && !is.null(fit_issue) && length(fit_issue_sep_col) &&
    sum(fit_issue[[fit_issue_sep_col[[1]]]], na.rm = TRUE) == 0 && sep_total > 0) {
  add_issue(
    "high",
    "Outcome",
    "Results/mi_fit_issue_summary.csv",
    "sep_n = 0 while model_fit_diagnostics has sep_flag TRUE",
    "Summary contradicts diagnostics; downstream interpretation may be wrong.",
    "Regenerate mi_fit_issue_summary from model_fit_diagnostics or align logic."
  )
}

if (is.null(plot_drop)) {
  add_issue(
    "low",
    "Plotting",
    "Results/plot_drop_log.csv",
    "Missing file",
    "Plot drop logging not available; harder to diagnose dropped OR rows.",
    "Write plot_drop_log.csv even if empty to confirm plotting integrity."
  )
}

issues_df <- if (length(issues)) do.call(rbind, issues) else {
  data.frame(
    severity = character(), component = character(), evidence_file = character(),
    evidence_snippet = character(), why_it_matters = character(), recommended_fix = character(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

severity_rank <- c(high = 3L, medium = 2L, low = 1L)
overall_status <- if (nrow(issues_df) && any(issues_df$severity == "high")) {
  "FAIL"
} else if (nrow(issues_df) && any(issues_df$severity %in% c("medium", "low"))) {
  "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS"
} else {
  "PASS"
}

add_summary_row <- function(component, metric, value, status, severity = "none",
                            evidence_file = "", note = "") {
  data.frame(
    component = component,
    metric = metric,
    value = as.character(value),
    status = status,
    severity = severity,
    evidence_file = evidence_file,
    note = note,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

expected_missing_n <- sum(!expected_tbl$present)

summary_rows <- list(
  add_summary_row(
    "Audit",
    "overall_status",
    overall_status,
    tolower(if (identical(overall_status, "PASS")) "pass" else if (identical(overall_status, "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS")) "warn" else "fail"),
    if (identical(overall_status, "FAIL")) "high" else if (identical(overall_status, "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS")) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/diagnostics_audit_issues.csv",
    "Overall diagnostics audit status derived from the highest-severity unresolved issue."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Inventory",
    "expected_artifacts_missing",
    expected_missing_n,
    if (expected_missing_n > 0) "warn" else "pass",
    if (expected_missing_n > 0) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/diagnostics_audit.md",
    "Count of expected diagnostics artifacts missing from Results/."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "MI",
    "smoke_test_failed",
    smoke_failed,
    if (isTRUE(smoke_failed)) "fail" else "pass",
    if (isTRUE(smoke_failed)) "high" else "none",
    "Results/mice_smoketest.log",
    "Smoke test failure indicates the MI execution path is unstable."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "MI",
    "chain_diagnostics_issue",
    chain_issue,
    if (isTRUE(chain_issue)) "warn" else "pass",
    if (isTRUE(chain_issue)) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/mice_chain_diagnostics.csv",
    chain_issue_note
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Balance",
    "abg_max_abs_smd",
    fmt_num(bal_max_abg),
    if (is.finite(bal_max_abg) && bal_max_abg > 0.10 && !isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "fail" else
      if (is.finite(bal_max_abg) && bal_max_abg > 0.10) "warn" else "pass",
    if (is.finite(bal_max_abg) && bal_max_abg > 0.10 && !isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "high" else
      if (is.finite(bal_max_abg) && bal_max_abg > 0.10) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/balance_target_imp_summary.csv",
    "ABG target balance threshold is 0.10; pilot/subset threshold misses are validation warnings."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Balance",
    "vbg_max_abs_smd",
    fmt_num(bal_max_vbg),
    if (is.finite(bal_max_vbg) && bal_max_vbg > 0.10 && !isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "fail" else
      if (is.finite(bal_max_vbg) && bal_max_vbg > 0.10) "warn" else "pass",
    if (is.finite(bal_max_vbg) && bal_max_vbg > 0.10 && !isTRUE(is_pilot_mode)) "high" else
      if (is.finite(bal_max_vbg) && bal_max_vbg > 0.10) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/balance_target_imp_summary.csv",
    "VBG target balance threshold is 0.10; pilot/subset threshold misses are validation warnings."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Outcome",
    "separation_flags_total",
    sep_total,
    if (outcome_fail_total > 0) "fail" else if (sep_total > 0) "warn" else "pass",
    if (outcome_fail_total > 0) "high" else if (sep_total > 0) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
    "Broad legacy count of separation/extreme-probability flags; tail-only fitted-probability flags are warnings unless manuscript-facing curves are affected."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Outcome",
    "diagnostic_failures_total",
    outcome_fail_total,
    if (outcome_fail_total > 0) "fail" else "pass",
    if (outcome_fail_total > 0) "high" else "none",
    "Results/model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
    "Failure count after splitting nonconvergence, explicit separation warnings, and central plotted-curve instability from tail-only probability warnings."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Outcome",
    "diagnostic_warnings_total",
    outcome_warn_total,
    if (outcome_warn_total > 0) "warn" else "pass",
    if (outcome_warn_total > 0) "medium" else "none",
    "Results/model_fit_diagnostics.csv",
    "Warning count for tail-only or off-profile fitted-probability flags."
  ),
  add_summary_row(
    "Plotting",
    "plot_drop_log_present",
    !is.null(plot_drop),
    if (!is.null(plot_drop)) "pass" else "warn",
    if (!is.null(plot_drop)) "none" else "low",
    "Results/plot_drop_log.csv",
    "Plot drop logging should exist even if no rows are present."
  )
)

summary_df <- do.call(rbind, summary_rows)

if (nrow(issues_df)) {
  issues_df$run_id <- rep(run_id_val, nrow(issues_df))
  issues_df$run_ts <- rep(run_ts_val, nrow(issues_df))
} else {
  issues_df$run_id <- character()
  issues_df$run_ts <- character()
}
summary_df$run_id <- run_id_val
summary_df$run_ts <- run_ts_val

write.csv(issues_df, file.path(results_dir, "diagnostics_audit_issues.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(summary_df, file.path(results_dir, "diagnostics_audit_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# --- Markdown report ----------------------------------------------------------
lines <- c(
  "# Diagnostics Audit",
  "",
  "## Executive Summary",
  paste0("- Overall status: ", overall_status),
  paste0("- Run mode: ", run_mode, "; pilot_frac: ", pilot_frac, "; m: ", m_used, "; maxit: ", maxit_used),
  paste0("- Runtime total (sec): ", fmt_num(total_seconds)),
  paste0("- MI batch status: ", batch_note),
  paste0("- Balance: ", bal_note),
  paste0("- Outcome diagnostic failures: ", outcome_fail_total, " / ", if (!is.null(model_diag)) nrow(model_diag) else 0),
  paste0("- Outcome diagnostic warnings: ", outcome_warn_total, " / ", if (!is.null(model_diag)) nrow(model_diag) else 0),
  paste0("- Legacy separation/extreme-probability flags: ", sep_total, " / ", if (!is.null(model_diag)) nrow(model_diag) else 0),
  "",
  "## Artifact Inventory (Found / Missing)",
  ""
)

inv_lines <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(expected_tbl)), function(i) {
  paste0("- ", expected_tbl$artifact[i], ": ",
         if (isTRUE(expected_tbl$present[i])) "present" else "missing")
}, character(1))
lines <- c(lines, inv_lines, "", "## Runtime Top Steps", "")

if (!is.null(runtime_top)) {
  rt_lines <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(runtime_top)), function(i) {
    paste0("- ", runtime_top$step_name[i], ": ",
           fmt_num(runtime_top$seconds[i]), " sec")
  }, character(1))
  lines <- c(lines, rt_lines)
} else {
  lines <- c(lines, "- runtime_log.csv not found")
}

lines <- c(lines, "", "## MI Health", "")
lines <- c(lines,
           paste0("- Smoke test failed: ", smoke_failed),
           paste0("- Predictor width max mm_cols: ", fmt_num(max_mm_cols)),
           paste0("- Chain diagnostics issue: ", chain_issue, " (", chain_issue_note, ")"))

if (!is.null(mi_warn)) {
  lines <- c(lines, paste0("- MI warnings rows: ", nrow(mi_warn)))
}

lines <- c(lines, "", "## Balance", "")
lines <- c(lines, paste0("- ABG max |SMD|: ", fmt_num(bal_max_abg)),
           paste0("- VBG max |SMD|: ", fmt_num(bal_max_vbg)))

lines <- c(lines, "", "## Outcome Fits", "")
if (!is.null(sep_by) && nrow(sep_by)) {
  lines <- c(lines, "Top separation/extreme-probability counts (analysis_variant/model_type/group/outcome):")
  top_sep <- head(sep_by, 6)
  sep_lines <- apply(top_sep, 1, function(r) {
    paste0("- ", r[["analysis_variant"]], " / ", r[["model_type"]], " / ",
           r[["group"]], " / ", r[["outcome"]], ": ", r[["sep_flag"]])
  })
  lines <- c(lines, sep_lines)
} else {
  lines <- c(lines, "- No model_fit_diagnostics.csv found")
}

lines <- c(lines, "", "## Issues (prioritized)", "")
if (nrow(issues_df) == 0L) {
  lines <- c(lines, "- No issues detected.")
} else {
  issue_lines <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(issues_df)), function(i) {
    paste0("- [", issues_df$severity[i], "] ", issues_df$component[i], ": ",
           issues_df$evidence_snippet[i], " (", issues_df$evidence_file[i], ")")
  }, character(1))
  lines <- c(lines, issue_lines)
}

write_md(lines, file.path(results_dir, "diagnostics_audit.md"))
}

invisible(run_diagnostics_audit(results_dir))

read_required_audit_csv <- function(path, required_cols, label) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(label, " missing after diagnostics audit: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  }
  df <- tryCatch(
    utils::read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    error = function(e) stop(label, " could not be read: ", conditionMessage(e), call. = FALSE)
  )
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols)) {
    stop(
      label, " missing required columns [",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "),
      "]: ", path,
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  df
}

diagnostics_audit_summary_df <- read_required_audit_csv(
  audit_summary,
  required_cols = c("component", "metric", "value", "status", "severity", "evidence_file", "note", "run_id", "run_ts"),
  label = "diagnostics_audit_summary.csv"
)

diagnostics_audit_issues_df <- read_required_audit_csv(
  audit_issues,
  required_cols = c("severity", "component", "evidence_file", "evidence_snippet", "why_it_matters", "recommended_fix", "run_id", "run_ts"),
  label = "diagnostics_audit_issues.csv"
)
```

```{r diagnostics-audit-summary}
#| code-block-title: "Diagnostics audit (summary)"
#| include: false
#| echo: true
#| results: "hide"
# Purpose: stage diagnostics audit outputs for the final validation section.
outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit_path <- results_path("outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv")
outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit_df <- read_required_audit_csv(
  outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit_path,
  required_cols = c("component", "status", "severity", "detail", "run_id", "run_ts"),
  label = "outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv"
)

outcome_rate_reference_risk_summary_rows <- outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit_df |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    component = "OutcomeRateReferenceRisk",
    metric = .data$component,
    value = .data$status,
    status = diagnostic_status_to_audit_status(.data$status),
    severity = .data$severity,
    evidence_file = "Results/outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv",
    note = .data$detail,
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )

outcome_rate_reference_risk_issue_rows <- outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit_df |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$status != "PASS") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    severity = .data$severity,
    component = "OutcomeRateReferenceRisk",
    evidence_file = "Results/outcome_rate_reference_risk_audit.csv",
    evidence_snippet = paste0(.data$component, " = ", .data$status),
    why_it_matters = "Weighted outcome-rate and model-implied reference-risk differences are diagnostic interpretation prompts, not automatic weighting failures.",
    recommended_fix = dplyr::if_else(
      .data$status == "FAIL",
      "Inspect missing or impossible diagnostic values before escalation.",
      "Interpret the magnitude and outcome pattern in the supplement or reviewer-facing notes."
    ),
    run_id = diag_run_id,
    run_ts = diag_run_ts
  )

diagnostics_audit_summary_df <- diagnostics_audit_summary_df |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(outcome_rate_reference_risk_summary_rows)

diagnostics_audit_issues_df <- diagnostics_audit_issues_df |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(outcome_rate_reference_risk_issue_rows)

diagnostics_overall_value <- dplyr::case_when(
  any(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity == "high", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "FAIL",
  any(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity %in% c("medium", "low"), na.rm = TRUE) ~ "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS",
  TRUE ~ "PASS"
)
diagnostics_overall_status <- dplyr::case_when(
  diagnostics_overall_value == "FAIL" ~ "fail",
  diagnostics_overall_value == "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS" ~ "warn",
  TRUE ~ "pass"
)
diagnostics_overall_severity <- dplyr::case_when(
  diagnostics_overall_value == "FAIL" ~ "high",
  diagnostics_overall_value == "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS" ~ "medium",
  TRUE ~ "none"
)
diagnostics_audit_summary_df <- diagnostics_audit_summary_df |>
  dplyr::filter(!(.data$component == "Audit" & .data$metric == "overall_status")) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    tibble::tibble(
      component = "Audit",
      metric = "overall_status",
      value = diagnostics_overall_value,
      status = diagnostics_overall_status,
      severity = diagnostics_overall_severity,
      evidence_file = "Results/diagnostics_audit_issues.csv",
      note = "Overall diagnostics audit status derived from the highest-severity unresolved issue, including outcome-rate/reference-risk diagnostics.",
      run_id = diag_run_id,
      run_ts = diag_run_ts
    )
  )

diagnostics_audit_issues_df <- diagnostics_audit_issues_df |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(severity, levels = c("high", "medium", "low")))

diagnostics_audit_summary_df <- diagnostics_audit_summary_df |>
  dplyr::arrange(factor(status, levels = c("fail", "warn", "pass")))

write_csv_safely(diagnostics_audit_summary_df, audit_summary, row_names = FALSE)
write_csv_safely(diagnostics_audit_issues_df, audit_issues, row_names = FALSE)

invisible(list(
  summary = diagnostics_audit_summary_df,
  issues = diagnostics_audit_issues_df
))
```

```{r validation-build-summary}
#| code-block-title: "Validation build summary"
#| include: false
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: true
#| message: false
# Purpose: render one canonical validation-oriented PDF section: build status,
# provenance, manuscript-facing outputs, and compact essential audits.
diagnostics_overall_status <- diagnostics_audit_summary_df |>
  dplyr::filter(metric == "overall_status") |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
  dplyr::pull(value)

if (!length(diagnostics_overall_status) || !nzchar(diagnostics_overall_status)) {
  stop("diagnostics_audit_summary.csv did not provide metric == 'overall_status'.", call. = FALSE)
}

build_status_components <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  validation_static_summary,
  tibble::tibble(
    component = "diagnostics_audit",
    status = diagnostics_overall_status,
    detail = paste0(
      sum(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity == "high", na.rm = TRUE), " high / ",
      sum(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity == "medium", na.rm = TRUE), " medium / ",
      sum(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity == "low", na.rm = TRUE), " low diagnostics issues."
    )
  )
)

final_build_status <- collapse_validation_status(build_status_components$status)

validation_build_display <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tibble::tibble(
    component = "overall_build",
    status = final_build_status,
    detail = "Final validation status derived from artifact registry, glyph audit, duplicate audit, artifact existence, publication-quality automated audit, diagnostics, and manuscript-display checks."
  ),
  build_status_components
)

provenance_summary_display <- artifact_provenance_manifest |>
  dplyr::count(section, kind, status, source_type, pdf_display, name = "n_assets") |>
  dplyr::arrange(section, kind, status)

artifact_check_summary_display <- artifact_check_status |>
  dplyr::count(check_status, severity, allowed_missing, name = "n_rows") |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n_rows), check_status)

diagnostics_audit_summary_display <- diagnostics_audit_summary_df |>
  dplyr::select(component, metric, status, severity, value, note)

render_table_pdf(
  validation_build_display,
  caption = "Validation build status",
  file_stub = "validation_build_status",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 0,
  max_cols = 3,
  landscape = FALSE
)

render_table_pdf(
  provenance_summary_display,
  caption = "Artifact provenance summary",
  file_stub = "artifact_provenance_summary",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 0,
  max_cols = 6,
  landscape = TRUE
)

render_table_pdf(
  artifact_check_summary_display,
  caption = "Artifact check summary",
  file_stub = "artifact_check_summary",
  wide = FALSE,
  digits = 0,
  max_cols = 4,
  landscape = FALSE
)

render_table_pdf(
  diagnostics_audit_summary_display,
  caption = "Diagnostics audit summary",
  file_stub = "diagnostics_audit_summary_display",
  wide = TRUE,
  digits = 0,
  max_cols = 6,
  landscape = TRUE
)

if (any(diagnostics_audit_issues_df$severity %in% c("high", "medium", "low"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
  render_table_pdf(
    diagnostics_audit_issues_df,
    caption = "Diagnostics audit issues",
    file_stub = "diagnostics_audit_issues",
    wide = TRUE,
    digits = 0,
    max_cols = 6,
    landscape = TRUE
  )
}
```

```{r mi-save-exports}
# Purpose: mi save exports.
stopifnot(
  exists("abg_curves"), exists("vbg_curves"),
  exists("abg_prob_curves"), exists("vbg_prob_curves"),
  exists("abg_coefs"), exists("vbg_coefs")
)
saveRDS(
  list(
    abg_curves = abg_curves,
    vbg_curves = vbg_curves,
    abg_prob_curves = abg_prob_curves,
    vbg_prob_curves = vbg_prob_curves,
    abg_coefs  = abg_coefs,
    vbg_coefs  = vbg_coefs
  ),
  mi_pooled_file
)
```

```{r mi-session}
#| include: false
# Purpose: mi session.
session_lines <- capture.output(sessionInfo())
writeLines(session_lines, results_path("sessionInfo.txt"))
writeLines(session_lines, results_path("session_info.txt"))
renv_status_lines <- if ("renv" %in% rownames(installed.packages())) {
  tryCatch(capture.output(renv::status()), error = function(e) c("renv::status() failed:", conditionMessage(e)))
} else {
  "renv package is not installed in this environment."
}
writeLines(renv_status_lines, results_path("renv_status.txt"))
```

```{r render-path-hygiene-scan}
#| include: false
# Purpose: record that render-path validation is deferred to wrapper postflight,
# which is the first point where the current render's TeX actually exists.
scan_out <- results_path("render_path_hygiene_scan.csv")
scan_df <- data.frame(
  scan_status = "deferred_to_wrapper",
  line = "",
  run_id = diag_run_id,
  run_ts = diag_run_ts,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(scan_df, scan_out, row_names = FALSE)
```

```{r pdf-hygiene-scan}
#| include: false
# Purpose: record that PDF hygiene validation is deferred to wrapper postflight,
# which is the first point where the current render's PDF actually exists.
scan_out <- results_path("pdf_hygiene_scan.csv")
scan_df <- data.frame(
  scan_status = "deferred_to_wrapper",
  scanner = "wrapper_postflight",
  line = "",
  run_id = diag_run_id,
  run_ts = diag_run_ts,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(scan_df, scan_out, row_names = FALSE)
```

```{r numbering-hygiene-scan}
#| include: false
# Purpose: numbering hygiene scan.
qmd_file <- resolve_current_qmd()
src_lines <- readLines(qmd_file, warn = FALSE)
pattern_manual <- "(^#+\\s+[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)*\\s+[0-9]+\\))|(Table\\s+[0-9]+:\\s+Table\\s+[0-9]+)"
hits <- which(grepl(pattern_manual, src_lines))
scan_df <- data.frame(
  line_no = hits,
  line = src_lines[hits],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write_csv_safely(scan_df, results_path("numbering_hygiene_scan.csv"), row_names = FALSE)
```

```{r mi-transient-cleanup}
#| include: false
# Purpose: remove transient MI scratch artifacts after a successful render.
cleanup_mi_transient_outputs()
```
